Matthew1:1 Yesu Giduc zoux Ndaawitv Hungh nyei zeiv-fun. Ndaawitv Hungh yaac zoux Apc^laa^ham nyei zeiv-fun. Ih zanc fiev naaiv se Yesu Giduc doic jiex doic nyei douh zong. 
Matthew1:2 Apc^laa^ham zoux I^sakc nyei die. I^sakc zoux Yaakopv nyei die. Yaakopv zoux Yu^ndaa mbuo muoz-dorn doic nyei die. 
Matthew1:3 Yu^ndaa zoux Beletv caux Zelaa nyei die. Ninh mbuo nyei maa heuc Taamaa. Beletv zoux Hetv^lon nyei die. Hetv^lon zoux Laam nyei die. 
Matthew1:4 Laam zoux Am^mi^naa^ndapc nyei die. Am^mi^naa^ndapc zoux Naason nyei die. Naason zoux Sanx^mon nyei die. 
Matthew1:5 Sanx^mon zoux Mbo^aatc nyei die. Mbo^aatc nyei maa heuc Laa^hapc. Mbo^aatc zoux O^mbetc nyei die. O^mbetc nyei maa heuc Lu^te. O^mbetc zoux Jetc^si nyei die. 
Matthew1:6 Jetc^si zoux Ndaawitv Hungh nyei die. Ndaawitv Hungh zoux Saa^lo^morn nyei die. Saa^lo^morn nyei maa zinh ndaangc zoux U^li^yaa nyei auv. 
Matthew1:7 Saa^lo^morn zoux Le^hox^mbo^am nyei die. Le^hox^mbo^am zoux Aa^mbi^yaa nyei die. Aa^mbi^yaa zoux Aasaax nyei die. 
Matthew1:8 Aasaax zoux Ye^ho^saa^fatv nyei die. Ye^ho^saa^fatv zoux Yolam nyei die. Yolam zoux Utc^si^yaa nyei die. 
Matthew1:9 Utc^si^yaa zoux Yotaam nyei die. Yotaam zoux Aa^hatc nyei die. Aa^hatc zoux He^se^ki^yaa nyei die. 
Matthew1:10 He^se^ki^yaa zoux Maa^natv^se nyei die. Maa^natv^se zoux Aamon nyei die. Aamon zoux Yo^si^yaa nyei die. 
Matthew1:11 Yo^si^yaa zoux Ye^ko^ni^yaa mbuo muoz-doic nyei die. Wuov zanc doix zuqc I^saa^laa^en Mienh zuqc caangv mingh Mbaa^mbi^lon Deic-Bung. 
Matthew1:12 Zuqc caangv mingh liuz, nqa'haav Ye^ko^ni^yaa zoux Se^an^ti^en nyei die. Se^an^ti^en zoux Se^lupv^mbaa^mben nyei die." 
Matthew1:13 Se^lupv^mbaa^mben zoux Aa^mbi^yutv nyei die. Aa^mbi^yutv zoux E^li^yaa^kim nyei die. E^li^yaa^kim zoux Aasor nyei die. 
Matthew1:14 Aasor zoux Saax^ndokc nyei die. Saax^ndokc zoux Aakim nyei die. Aakim zoux E^li^utc nyei die. 
Matthew1:15 E^li^utc zoux E^le^aa^saa nyei die. E^le^aa^saa zoux Matv^taan nyei die. Matv^taan zoux Yaakopv nyei die. 
Matthew1:16 Yaakopv zoux Yosepv nyei die. Yosepv se Maa^li^yaa nyei nqox. Maa^li^yaa zoux Yesu nyei maa. Yesu dongh mienh heuc Giduc wuov dauh. 
Matthew1:17 Hnangv naaic, yiem Apc^laa^ham mingh taux Ndaawitv Hungh maaih ziepc feix doic mienh. Aengx yiem Ndaawitv Hungh mingh taux I^saa^laa^en Mienh zuqc guaatv mingh Mbaa^mbi^lon Deic-Bung maaih ziepc feix doic. Aengx yiem zuqc guaatv mingh nyei ziangh hoc taux Giduc cuotv seix wuov zanc, maaih ziepc feix doic." 
Matthew1:18 Yesu Giduc cuotv seix nyei jauv-louc se hnangv naaiv. Yesu nyei maa, mbuox heuc Maa^li^yaa. Yosepv gorngv ziangh ninh mi'aqv. Ninh mbuo maiv gaengh juangc dorngx bueix jiex mv baac Maa^li^yaa maaih sin aqv, se yiem Singx Lingh nyei qaqv daaih." 
Matthew1:19 Ninh nyei nqox, Yosepv, se kuv mienh yaac maiv oix bun Maa^li^yaa dorng zuangx zuqc nyaiv. Ninh ziouc yiem hnyouv hnamv oix beic ndiev tuix." 
Matthew1:20 Yosepv yiem hnyouv hnangv naaiv nor hnamv. Maaih dauh Ziouv nyei fin-mienh daaih box mbeix mbuox ninh, “Ndaawitv nyei zeiv-fun, Yosepv aah! Maiv dungx gamh nziex. Gunv longc Maa^li^yaa zoux meih nyei auv aqv oc. Ninh maaih jienv wuov norm sin se Singx Lingh bun ninh maaih." 
Matthew1:21 Ninh oix duqv dauh dorn. Meih oix zuqc tengx wuov dauh dorn cuotv mbuox heuc Yesu, weic zuqc ninh oix njoux ninh nyei baeqc fingx leih ndutv ninh mbuo nyei zuiz.”" 
Matthew1:22 Naaiv deix sic cuotv daaih weic bun doix nzengc zinh ndaangc Ziouv longc wuov dauh douc waac mienh gorngv nyei waac. Ninh gorngv," 
Matthew1:23 “Maaih dauh maiv nziaauc jiex dorn nyei sieqv, oix maaih norm sin, yungz duqv dauh dorn. Ninh mbuo oix cuotv mbuox heuc I^maa^nu^en.” (Eix leiz se “Tin-Hungh caux mbuo yiem.”)" 
Matthew1:24 Yosepv nyie daaih, ninh ei jienv Ziouv nyei fin-mienh mbuox nyei waac zoux, ziouc dorh Maa^li^yaa daaih zoux ninh nyei auv aqv." 
Matthew1:25 Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv nitv doic taux Maa^li^yaa duqv naaiv dauh dorn daaih. Yosepv tengx wuov dauh dorn cuotv mbuox heuc Yesu. 
Matthew2:1 Yesu cuotv seix yiem Yu^ndie Saengv, Mbetc^le^hem Mungv wuov zanc, doix zuqc Helotv zoux hungh diex. Nqa'haav maaih deix samx hleix nyei domh fin-saeng yiem dong bung daaih taux Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh" 
Matthew2:2 naaic gaax, “Cuotv seix daaih zoux Yiutai Mienh nyei hungh wuov dauh gu'nguaaz yiem haaix? Yie mbuo buatc ninh nyei hleix yiem dong bung cuotv ziouc daaih baaix ninh.”" 
Matthew2:3 Helotv Hungh muangx haiz naaiv deix waac ninh ziouc hnyouv maiv henh yietc deix. Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei zuangx mienh yietc zungv yaac hnyouv maiv henh nzengc. 
Matthew2:4 Helotv ziouc heuc Yiutai Mienh nyei zuangx sai mienh bieiv caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng daaih nzoih yiem zunv ziouc naaic ninh mbuo, “Zoux Giduc wuov dauh oix cuotv seix yiem haaix?”" 
Matthew2:5 Ninh mbuo dau, “Yiem Yu^ndie Saengv, Mbetc^le^hem Mungv, weic zuqc douc waac mienh hnangv naaiv nor fiev," 
Matthew2:6 ‘Yu^ndaa Deic-Bung, Mbetc^le^hem Mungv aah! Yiem Yu^ndaa Deic-Bung nyei domh zingh, meih maiv zeiz gauh faix jiex. Weic zuqc maaih dauh domh jien oix yiem meih naaic cuotv daaih dorh yie nyei baeqc fingx, I^saa^laa^en Mienh.’+”" 
Matthew2:7 Helotv ziouc heuc wuov deix samx hleix nyei domh fin-saeng daaih, bingx jienv longx-longx nyei naaic gaax, “Wuov norm hleix ziangh haaix cuotv daaih?”" 
Matthew2:8 Naaic liuz, Helotv ziouc mbuox ninh mbuo mingh Mbetc^le^hem Mungv. Ninh gorngv, “Meih mbuo gunv mingh Mbetc^le^hem Mungv longx-longx nyei lorz wuov dauh fu'jueiv. Lorz buatc, nzuonx daaih mbuox yie, yie ziouc haih mingh baaix ninh.”" 
Matthew2:9 Muangx hungh diex gorngv liuz, wuov deix domh fin-saeng ziouc cuotv jauv mingh aqv. Zinh ndaangc yiem dong bung buatc cuotv wuov norm hleix mingh ndaangc ninh mbuo. Mingh taux fu'jueiv yiem wuov norm dorngx gu'nguaaic ziouc dingh jienv wuov." 
Matthew2:10 Domh fin-saeng buatc wuov norm hleix ziouc njien-youh orn-lorqc haic. 
Matthew2:11 Bieqc biauv mingh, buatc wuov dauh fu'jueiv caux ninh nyei maa, Maa^li^yaa, ziouc gueic njiec ndau baaix wuov dauh fu'jueiv. Ninh mbuo zorqv ninh mbuo dorh daaih nyei zingh nyeic cuotv daaih fongc horc bun ninh. Maaih jiem caux i nyungc ndaang nyei ndiangx-zung heuc mu^yorc caux faan^gen^sen." 
Matthew2:12 Tin-Hungh box mbeix mbuox wuov deix domh fin-saeng maiv dungx nzuonx Helotv wuov. Ninh mbuo ziouc yangh ganh diuh jauv nzuonx ninh mbuo nyei deic-bung. 
Matthew2:13 Wuov deix domh fin-saeng nzuonx mi'aqv. Maaih dauh Ziouv nyei fin-mienh box mbeix mbuox Yosepv, “Jiez sin daaih, dorh jienv fu'jueiv caux ninh nyei maa biaux mingh I^yipv Deic-Bung. Oix zuqc yiem wuov zuov taux yie mbuox meih, weic zuqc Helotv oix lorz naaiv dauh fu'jueiv daix.”" 
Matthew2:14 Yosepv ziouc jiez sin daaih, lungh muonz zanc dorh jienv wuov dauh fu'jueiv caux fu'jueiv nyei maa biaux mingh I^yipv Deic-Bung," 
Matthew2:15 yiem wuov zuov taux Helotv daic mingh. Hnangv naaic cuotv daaih weic bun doix nzengc Ziouv longc douc waac mienh gorngv nyei waac. Ninh gorngv, “Yie heuc yie nyei dorn yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung cuotv daaih.”" 
Matthew2:16 Helotv Hungh hiuv duqv wuov deix domh fin-saeng nduov ninh, ninh ziouc qiex jiez! haic. Ninh njiec lingc daix nzengc Mbetc^le^hem Mungv caux huing nzuonx nyei dorngx wuov deix i hnyangx ga'ndiev maengx nyei gu'nguaaz-dorn. Helotv hnangv naaiv nor daix naaiv deix fu'jueiv ei ninh naaic samx hleix nyei domh fin-saeng buatc hleix cuotv nyei ziangh hoc funx daaih." 
Matthew2:17 Naaiv deix sic cuotv daaih doix nzengc wuov dauh douc waac mienh, Ye^le^mi, nyei waac. Ye^le^mi gorngv," 
Matthew2:18 “Haiz mienh yiem wuov Laamaa Zingh mbiouh mbiouh bungx-sing bungx-qiex nyei nyiemv. Laasen nyiemv ninh nyei fu'jueiv, ninh yaac maiv longc haaix dauh tengx ninh jaiv nzauh, weic zuqc ninh nyei fu'jueiv daic mi'aqv.”" 
Matthew2:19 Helotv Hungh daic mi'aqv. Yiem I^yipv Deic-Bung maaih dauh Ziouv nyei fin-mienh daaih box mbeix Yosepv. 
Matthew2:20 Fin-mienh gorngv, “Jiez sin daaih, dorh wuov dauh fu'jueiv caux jienv fu'jueiv nyei maa nzuonx I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung aqv oc. Weic zuqc oix hoic naaiv dauh fu'jueiv nyei maengc wuov deix daic nzengc mi'aqv.”" 
Matthew2:21 Yosepv ziouc jiez sin dorh jienv fu'jueiv caux fu'jueiv nyei maa nzuonx I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung aqv. 
Matthew2:22 Mv baac haiz gorngv Aan^ke^laa^atc nzipc ninh nyei die, Helotv, zoux Yu^ndie Saengv nyei hungh, Yosepv ziouc gamh nziex maiv mingh wuov aqv. Tin-Hungh yaac box mbeix donv Yosepv, Yosepv mbuo ziouc mingh Gaa^li^li Saengv," 
Matthew2:23 yiem norm mungv mbuox heuc Naa^saa^letv. Naaiv deix jauv cuotv daaih doix nzengc douc waac mienh nyei waac. Wuov deix douc waac mienh gorngv, “Mienh oix heuc ninh zoux Naa^saa^letv Mienh.”" 
Matthew3:1 Ziangh hoc taux, tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov dauh Yo^han mingh wuov Yu^ndie Deic-Bung-Huaang zunh doz." 
Matthew3:2 Ninh gorngv, “Oix zuqc goiv hnyouv guangc meih mbuo nyei zuiz, weic zuqc Tin-Hungh daaih zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei ziangh hoc taux fatv aqv.”" 
Matthew3:3 Douc waac mienh, I^saa^yaa, gorngv nyei, se dongh naaiv dauh Yo^han aqv. I^saa^yaa gorngv, “Maaih laanh mienh yiem deic-bung-huaang heuc jienv gorngv, ‘Oix zuqc liuc leiz Ziouv nyei jauv. Ninh nyei jauv oix zuqc koi zaqc nyei.’+”" 
Matthew3:4 Yo^han zuqv nyei lui-houx longc lorh torh biei ndatv daaih, yaac longc ndopv-hlaang sai jienv jaaiv. Ninh nyanc nyei ga'naaiv se jopv-nyeic caux lomc nyei mueiz-dorngh." 
Matthew3:5 Mienh yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh caux gormx Yu^ndie Saengv caux Jor^ndaen Ndaaih hlen yietc zungv horngc zaangc nyei dorngx, cuotv mingh lorz Yo^han." 
Matthew3:6 Ninh mbuo nyiemc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz, Yo^han ziouc yiem wuov Jor^ndaen Ndaaih tengx ninh mbuo jiex wuom nyei leiz." 
Matthew3:7 Yo^han buatc Faa^li^si Mienh caux Saa^ndu^si Mienh camv nyei daaih lorz ninh, oix jiex wuom nyei leiz ziouc gorngv ninh mbuo. Ninh gorngv, “Meih mbuo naaic ndui naang-doqc nyei buonv aah! Tin-Hungh dingc zuiz nyei ziangh hoc oix taux. Haaix dauh kuinx meih mbuo biaux ndutv?" 
Matthew3:8 Meih mbuo zoux sic oix zuqc bun cing meih mbuo goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz. 
Matthew3:9 Yaac maiv dungx yiem hnyouv hnamv, ‘Yie mbuo maaih Apc^laa^ham zoux yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix.’ Yie mbuox meih mbuo, Tin-Hungh zungv haih zorqv naaiv deix la'bieiv zoux benx Apc^laa^ham nyei zeiv-fun.’" 
Matthew3:10 Ih zanc mbenc ziangx bouv, zungv an jienv ndiangx-gorn. Haaix diuh ndiangx ziangh biouv maiv kuv, oix zuqc goix guangc buov douz mingh." 
Matthew3:11 “Yie longc wuom tengx meih mbuo jiex leiz, bun cing meih mbuo goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz. Mv baac yie daaih ndaangc, aengx maaih dauh nqa'haav daaih. Ninh zoux gauh hlo yie. Yie zungv maiv puix tengx ninh hnengx heh. Ninh oix longc Singx Lingh yaac longc douz tengx meih mbuo jiex leiz." 
Matthew3:12 Ninh nyei buoz nanv jienv ga'naaiv-cenv, oix fioux nzengc ninh nyei mborqv mbiauh ciangv yaac siou ninh nyei mbiauh dapv lamz. Mv baac cuqv-maux ninh oix longc yietc liuz maiv haih daic nyei douz buov jienv.”" 
Matthew3:13 Wuov zanc Yesu yiem Gaa^li^li mingh Jor^ndaen Ndaaih, oix Yo^han tengx ninh jiex wuom nyei leiz." 
Matthew3:14 Mv baac Yo^han oix Yesu goiv za'eix, ninh ziouc gorngv, “Horpc zuqc meih tengx yie jiex leiz, mv baac meih daaih lorz yie?”" 
Matthew3:15 Yesu dau Yo^han, “Meih gunv tengx yie aqv. Mbuo hnangv naaiv zoux, se zoux duqv horpc nzengc ei Tin-Hungh oix mbuo zoux nyei.” Yo^han ziouc tengx aqv." 
Matthew3:16 Yesu jiex leiz yiem wuom yietv cuotv daaih wuov zanc, lungh ziouc nqoi. Yesu buatc Tin-Hungh nyei Singx Lingh njiec daaih hnangv norqc nqo nor, yaac nzopc jienv ninh." 
Matthew3:17 Maaih qiex yiem gu'nguaaic lungh gorngv, “Naaiv se yie nyei Dorn-hnamv. Yie za'gengh a'hneiv haic ninh.”" 
Matthew4:1 Yesu jiex liuz wuom nyei leiz, Singx Lingh ziouc dorh ninh mingh deic-bung-huaang zuqc mienv nyei hungh seix." 
Matthew4:2 Feix ziepc hnoi feix ziepc muonz Yesu zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc, hnyouv ziouc sie aqv." 
Matthew4:3 Mienv nyei hungh ziouc daaih lorz ninh yaac gorngv, “Meih za'gengh Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn nor, heuc naaiv deix la'bieiv benx njuov daaih maah!”" 
Matthew4:4 Yesu dau, “Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv, ‘Mienh maiv zeiz kungx kaux nyanc hopv yungz maengc hnangv, mv baac oix zuqc kaux Tin-Hungh gorngv nyei joux-joux waac.’+”" 
Matthew4:5 Mienv nyei hungh ziouc dorh Yesu mingh cing-nzengc nyei zingh, Ye^lu^saa^lem, bun ninh yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv hlang jiex nyei dorngx," 
Matthew4:6 gorngv mbuox ninh, “Meih za'gengh Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn nor, biu njiec gaax. Weic zuqc Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv, ‘Tin-Hungh oix paaiv ninh nyei fin-mienh goux jienv meih. Ninh mbuo ziouc longc buoz bouh jienv meih, maiv bun meih nyei zaux zong zuqc la'bieiv.’+”" 
Matthew4:7 Yesu dau, “Mv baac Ging-Sou yaac fiev jienv gorngv, ‘Maiv dungx seix Ziouv, meih nyei Tin-Hungh.’+”" 
Matthew4:8 Mienv nyei hungh aengx dorh Yesu faaux norm hlang haic nyei mbong, bun ninh mangc lungh ndiev maanc guoqv yaac mangc maanc guoqv nyei njang-laangc." 
Matthew4:9 Mienv nyei hungh gorngv, “Se gorngv meih gueic njiec baaix yie, yie ziouc zorqv naaiv deix yietc zungv bun meih.”" 
Matthew4:10 Yesu ziouc dau, “Saadaan aah! Biaux nqoi maah! Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv, ‘Oix zuqc baaix Ziouv, meih nyei Tin-Hungh. Kungx oix zuqc fu-sux ninh nduqc dauh hnangv.’+”" 
Matthew4:11 Mienv nyei hungh ziang naaic leih nqoi Yesu mi'aqv. Fin-mienh ziouc daaih liuc leiz Yesu. 
Matthew4:12 Yesu haiz gorngv Yo^han zuqc wuonx loh, ninh ziouc mingh Gaa^li^li Saengv mi'aqv." 
Matthew4:13 Yesu maiv yiem Naa^saa^letv Mungv, ninh mingh yiem Kaa^be^naa^um Mungv, Gaa^li^li Koiv-Dorn hlen, Se^mbu^lun caux Napv^taa^li Deic nyei gapv-jaaix dorngx." 
Matthew4:14 Hnangv naaic cuotv daaih se weic bun zinh ndaangc tengx Tin-Hungh douc waac wuov dauh I^saa^yaa nyei waac doix nzengc. 
Matthew4:15 I^saa^yaa gorngv, “Se^mbu^lun caux Napv^taa^li Deic, yiem wuov ngaanc ziqc Jor^ndaen Ndaaih, dongh mingh koiv wuov diuh jauv, se Janx yiem nyei deic-bung, Gaa^li^li." 
Matthew4:16 Yiem hmuangx gu'nyuoz nyei baeqc fingx, zungv duqv buatc domh njang. Yiem zuqc daic nyei dongh linh gu'nyuoz wuov deix, maaih njang cuotv daaih ziux jienv ninh mbuo.”" 
Matthew4:17 Yangh naaiv mingh Yesu jiez gorn zunh doz. Ninh gorngv, “Oix zuqc goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz. Tin-Hungh daaih zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei hnoi taux fatv aqv.”" 
Matthew4:18 Yesu yangh jauv gan Gaa^li^li Koiv-Dorn hlen mingh, buatc maaih i muoz-dorn. Ninh mbuo zoux zorqv mbiauz nyei mienh, yiem wuov koiv borngz mbiauz. Maaih dauh heuc Simon, aengx maaih norm mbuox heuc Bide, caux jienv ninh nyei youz, An^ndaa^lu." 
Matthew4:19 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo daaih gan yie oc. Yie oix njaaux meih mbuo lorz mienh, hnangv ih zanc meih mbuo lorz mbiauz nor.”" 
Matthew4:20 Ninh mbuo liemh zeih guangc ninh mbuo nyei mungz gan jienv Yesu mingh aqv. 
Matthew4:21 Yesu jiex mingh deix aengx buatc Se^mbe^ndi nyei i dauh dorn, Yaagorpc caux Yo^han. Naaiv deix i muoz caux ninh mbuo nyei die yiem wuov nzangv liuc leiz mungz. Yesu heuc ninh mbuo daaih." 
Matthew4:22 Ninh mbuo liemh zeih guangc jienv ninh mbuo nyei die, guangc jienv nzangv, gan Yesu mingh aqv." 
Matthew4:23 Yesu mingh gormx Gaa^li^li Saengv, yiem ninh mbuo nyei wuic dorngh njaaux mienh, yaac zunh Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei kuv fienx. Ninh yaac zorc longx zuangx mienh nyei nyungc-nyungc baengc." 
Matthew4:24 Yesu nyei mengh dauh sing buangv Silie Deic-Bung. Mienh ziouc dorh yietc zungv baengc mienh daaih lorz Yesu, se dorh butv nyungc-nyungc baengc caux zuqc diev mun nyei, zuqc mienv muoqv nyei, butv dungz-ndin nyei, caux butv baengc-mbai nyei mienh daaih. Yesu yaac zorc longx ninh mbuo." 
Matthew4:25 Mienh camv haic gan jienv Yesu mingh. Maaih deix yiem Gaa^li^li Saengv, maaih deix yiem Totv^mbu^li Saengv, maaih deix yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh, maaih deix yiem Yu^ndie Saengv, aengx maaih deix yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih nyei dong bung maengx gan jienv Yesu mingh." 
Matthew5:1 Yesu buatc mienh ndongc naaic camv, ninh ziouc faaux norm mbong mingh zueiz jienv. Ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo yaac daaih yiem zunv." 
Matthew5:2 Yesu ziouc jiez gorn njaaux ninh mbuo. Ninh gorngv," 
Matthew5:3 “Ganh hiuv duqv ganh qiemx zuqc Tin-Hungh wuov deix, maaih njien-youh aqv, weic zuqc maaih Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv ninh mbuo." 
Matthew5:4 Maaih you-nzauh wuov deix, maaih njien-youh aqv, weic zuqc Tin-Hungh oix tengx jaiv you-nzauh." 
Matthew5:5 Hnyouv suonc wuov deix, maaih njien-youh aqv, weic zuqc Tin-Hungh laengz bun nyei, ninh mbuo oix duqv zipv nzengc." 
Matthew5:6 Ngorc oix zoux horpc Tin-Hungh nyei hnyouv wuov deix, maaih njien-youh aqv, weic zuqc Tin-Hungh oix bun ninh mbuo duqv buangv eix." 
Matthew5:7 Korv-lienh mienh wuov deix, maaih njien-youh aqv, weic zuqc Tin-Hungh oix korv-lienh ninh mbuo." 
Matthew5:8 Maaih cing-nzengc nyei hnyouv wuov deix, maaih njien-youh aqv, weic zuqc ninh mbuo oix duqv buatc Tin-Hungh." 
Matthew5:9 Kuinx i bung mienh horpc hnyouv daaih maaih baengh orn wuov deix, maaih njien-youh aqv, weic zuqc Tin-Hungh oix nyiemc ninh mbuo zoux ninh nyei naamh nyouz." 
Matthew5:10 Weic zoux ei Tin-Hungh nyei eix zuqc mienh zoux doqc wuov deix, maaih njien-youh aqv, weic zuqc maaih Tin-Hungh zoux ninh mbuo nyei Ziouv gunv ninh mbuo." 
Matthew5:11 “Meih mbuo weic yie zuqc mienh gorngv doqc, zoux doqc, zuqc mienh gorngv nyungc-nyungc waaic nyei jauv, meih mbuo ziouc maaih njien-youh aqv." 
Matthew5:12 Oix zuqc njien-youh a'hneiv weic zuqc yiem wuov tin-dorngh maaih domh zingh nyeic oix bun meih mbuo. Zinh ndaangc douc waac mienh fih hnangv nyei zuqc mienh zoux doqc. 
Matthew5:13 “Meih mbuo se hnangv nzauv weic yiem baamh mienh mbu'ndongx. Mv baac se gorngv nzauv nyei mueix tuix zaamv mingh, hnangv haaix nor noic duqv aengx nzaaih daaih? Naaiv deix nzauv maiv lamh longc aqv. Oix zuqc dox guangc bun mienh caaiv hnangv." 
Matthew5:14 “Meih mbuo se hnangv njang weic ziux lungh ndiev mienh. Yietc norm zingh yiem wuov mbong-ningv maiv haih bingx maiv mbueiz mienh. 
Matthew5:15 Yaac maiv maaih mienh diemv zieqc dang daaih, zorqv tongv nqopv jienv. Dang m'daaih don dang nyei baaih ziux njang yietc biauv mienh." 
Matthew5:16 Meih mbuo yaac oix zuqc hnangv dang nor, ziux lungh ndiev mienh. Hnangv naaic, ninh mbuo duqv buatc meih mbuo zoux nyei kuv sic ziouc taaih meih mbuo nyei tin-dorngh Diex." 
Matthew5:17 “Maiv dungx hnamv yie daaih guangc Mose nyei Leiz-Latc caux Tin-Hungh nyei Douc Waac Mienh njaaux nyei waac. Yie maiv zeiz daaih guangc. Yie daaih weic bun yietc zungv cuotv daaih zien. 
Matthew5:18 “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, maaih lungh caux ndau corc yiem jienv nyei ziangh hoc, Leiz-Latc nyei yietc dimv yietc waeqc nzaangc zungv maiv haih ndortv. Zuov taux nyungc-nyungc dunh yunh nzengc." 
Matthew5:19 “Hnangv naaic, haaix dauh baamz liemh faix jiex wuov diuh leiz, aengx njaaux mienh fih hnangv nyei baamz, wuov dauh yiem Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv zuqc zoux gauh faix jiex. Mv baac haaix dauh muangx nzengc leiz, aengx njaaux mienh fih hnangv nyei zoux, wuov dauh yiem Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv duqv zoux hlo." 
Matthew5:20 Yie ziouc mbuox meih mbuo, meih mbuo oix zuqc gan Tin-Hungh gauh longx njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux Faa^li^si Mienh. Maiv zei aeqv, meih mbuo zungv maiv duqv bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv." 
Matthew5:21 “Loz-hnoi njaaux mienh naaiv deix waac meih mbuo haiz jiex nyei, ‘Maiv dungx daix mienh. Haaix dauh daix mienh oix zuqc dingc zuiz.’" 
Matthew5:22 Mv baac yie mbuox meih mbuo, haaix dauh qiex jiez ninh nyei gorx-youz, zungv zuqc siemv zuiz aqv. Haaix dauh hemx ninh nyei gorx-youz, ‘Ga'naaiv-hngongx aah!’ wuov dauh zuqc dorh mingh Gunv Sic Wuic siemv zuiz. Haaix dauh hemx ninh nyei gorx-youz, ‘Ga'naaiv-mbuo piqv,’ gamh nziex wuov dauh zic duqv ndortv deic nyuoqc nyei douz." 
Matthew5:23 “Hnangv naaiv nor, se gorngv meih dorh ga'naaiv mingh ziec-dorngh oix ziec bun Tin-Hungh, mv baac taux wuov jangx zuqc meih nyei gorx-youz maaih haaix nyungc caux meih maiv horpc," 
Matthew5:24 oix zuqc zorqv meih dorh mingh nyei ga'naaiv an jienv ziec-dorngh ga'hlen, mingh caux meih nyei gorx-youz gorngv horpc. Gorngv sung liuz cingx daaih zorqv meih nyei ga'naaiv ziec bun Tin-Hungh." 
Matthew5:25 “Gorngv hnangv maaih mienh gox meih, dorh meih mingh wuov sic dorngh, meih caux ninh mingh maiv gaengh taux sic dorngh, oix zuqc caux ninh gorngv horpc. Zuov taux sic dorngh, nziex ninh oix zorqv meih jiu bun siemv zuiz jien. Siemv zuiz jien aengx zorqv meih jiu bun hungh baeng. Meih ziouc zuqc wuonx jienv loh aqv." 
Matthew5:26 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih, meih oix zuqc wuonx jienv loh zuov taux meih jaauv sung nzengc, maiv caa yietc norm dongh zinh nyei zaeqv cingx duqv cuotv." 
Matthew5:27 “Meih mbuo haiz jiex loz-hnoi njaaux mienh naaiv deix waac, ‘Maiv dungx hienx auv hienx nqox.’" 
Matthew5:28 Mv baac ih zanc yie mbuox meih mbuo, haaix dauh buatc dauh m'sieqv dorn yaac haiz hanc, se dorngx yiem hnyouv hienx liuz aqv." 
Matthew5:29 Hnangv naaic, se gorngv meih nyei mbiaauc bung m'zing nduov meih baamz zuiz, oix zuqc gueix guangc. Meih nyei sin waaic fangx corc gauh longx meih nyei ziangh sin zuqc ndortv deic nyuoqc." 
Matthew5:30 Gorngv hnangv meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz bun meih baamz zuiz, oix zuqc hngaqv guangc. Zoqc jieqv buoz corc gauh longx meih nyei ziangh sin zuqc ndortv deic nyuoqc." 
Matthew5:31 “Aengx maaih joux waac gorngv, ‘Haaix dauh leih ninh nyei auv oix zuqc fiev zeiv leih cai sou bun jienv ninh.’" 
Matthew5:32 Mv baac ih zanc yie mbuox meih mbuo, haaix dauh leih ninh nyei auv yaac maiv zeiz laaix ninh nyei auv hienx nqox, wuov dauh auv aengx mingh longc siang-nqox, wuov dauh loz-nqox zoux bun ninh nyei auv benx hienx nqox nyei mienh. Ninh longc wuov dauh siang-nqox yaac benx hienx auv nyei mienh aqv." 
Matthew5:33 “Loz-hnoi njaaux mienh naaiv deix waac meih mbuo yaac haiz mi'aqv. Waac gorngv, ‘Maiv dungx bungx ndortv meih laengz nyei waac. Meih yiem Ziouv nyei nza'hmien laengz haaix nyungc waac oix zuqc ei jienv zoux.’" 
Matthew5:34 Mv baac ih zanc yie mbuox meih mbuo, maiv dungx ziangv haaix nyungc laengz waac. Maiv dungx ziangv tin-dorngh laengz waac, weic zuqc tin-dorngh se Tin-Hungh nyei weic." 
Matthew5:35 Yaac maiv dungx ziangv ndau, weic zuqc ndau se ninh lorngx zaux nyei dorngx. Yaac maiv dungx ziangv Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh laengz waac, weic zuqc naaiv norm zingh se Domh Hungh Diex nyei zingh." 
Matthew5:36 Liemh maiv dungx ziangv meih nyei m'nqorngv laengz waac weic zuqc meih maiv haih zoux yietc diuh meih nyei mba'biei baeqc fai jieqv. 
Matthew5:37 Meih kungx oix zuqc gorngv zaqc zeiz fai maiv zeiz gaux aqv. Aengx gorngv gauh camv naaic se yiem hiuang orqv wuov dauh daaih. 
Matthew5:38 “Meih mbuo haiz jiex loz-hnoi njaaux mienh naaiv joux waac, ‘M'zing jaauv m'zing, nyaah jaauv nyaah.’" 
Matthew5:39 Mv baac ih zanc yie gorngv mbuox meih mbuo, mienh zoux dorngc bun meih, maiv dungx jaauv win. Se gorngv maaih mienh mbaix meih nyei mbiaauc bung hmien, oix zuqc liemh zaaix maengx bung huin mingh bun ninh mbaix." 
Matthew5:40 “Se gorngv maaih dauh mienh dorh meih mingh sic dorngh oix gox longc meih nyei lui, liemh meih nyei domh lui yaac oix zuqc bun ninh." 
Matthew5:41 “Se gorngv maaih dauh mienh zorqv meih fungx bou, aapv meih nyiex ninh nyei ga'naaiv yietc gilo jauv, meih oix zuqc tengx nyiex mingh i gilo." 
Matthew5:42 “Maaih mienh tengx meih tov haaix nyungc, meih oix zuqc bun aqv. Maaih mienh oix gaav meih nyei ga'naaiv longc, yaac oix zuqc bun ninh longc." 
Matthew5:43 “Meih mbuo haiz jiex loz-hnoi mienh njaaux naaiv deix waac, ‘Oix zuqc hnamv meih nyei gorx-youz, nzorng meih nyei win-wangv.’" 
Matthew5:44 Mv baac ih zanc yie gorngv mbuox meih mbuo, oix zuqc hnamv meih mbuo nyei win-wangv. Zoux doqc meih mbuo wuov deix, oix zuqc tengx ninh mbuo daux gaux." 
Matthew5:45 Meih mbuo hnangv naaiv nor zoux, meih mbuo ziouc benx meih mbuo nyei tin-dorngh Diex nyei dorn aqv. “Maiv gunv kuv mienh fai mienh waaic mienh, Tin-Hungh yaac bun mba'hnoi ziux fih hnangv nyei. Ninh yaac bun lungh duih mbiungc tengx zoux longx zoux waaic nyei mienh duqv fih hnangv." 
Matthew5:46 “Se gorngv meih mbuo kungx hnamv dongh hnamv meih mbuo wuov deix mienh hnangv, Tin-Hungh weic haaix diuc horpc zuqc bun zingh nyeic meih mbuo? Liemh tengx Lomaa hungh jaa siou nzou-zinh wuov deix mienh yaac hnangv naaiv nor zoux." 
Matthew5:47 Se gorngv meih mbuo kungx caux meih mbuo hnamv wuov deix mienh gorngv waac hnangv, meih mbuo zoux haaix nyungc gauh longx zuangx mienh? Liemh maiv gaengh hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh wuov deix mienh yaac hnangv naaic nor zoux ni!" 
Matthew5:48 “Meih mbuo oix zuqc dunh yunh, hnangv meih mbuo nyei tin-dorngh Diex nor, dunh yunh." 
Matthew6:1 “Meih mbuo oix zuqc faix fim. Tin-Hungh oix meih mbuo zoux nyei kuv sic maiv dungx dorng zuangx zoux weic bun mienh buatc. Se gorngv meih mbuo dorng zuangx zoux, meih mbuo maiv duqv zipv tin-dorngh Diex bun nyei zingh nyeic." 
Matthew6:2 “Wuov nyungc, meih cuotv fim tengx mienh jomc mienh, maiv dungx hu hu hiaangv hiaangv nyei zoux, hnangv beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh yiem wuic dorngh yaac yiem jaai-horngc zoux, weic oix bun mienh ceng nor. Yie mbuox zien meih mbuo, ninh mbuo nyei zingh nyeic ninh mbuo duqv zipv liuz aqv." 
Matthew6:3 Cuotv fim tengx mienh jomc mienh wuov zanc, liemh maiv dungx bun meih zuoqc jiex nyei loz-gaeng doic hiuv." 
Matthew6:4 “Hnangv naaic, maiv maaih haaix dauh hiuv duqv meih zoux naaiv deix jauv, mv baac meih nyei Zaangc Diex, dongh mangc duqv buatc meih gem jienv zoux nyei sic, ziouc bun zingh nyeic meih aqv." 
Matthew6:5 “Meih mbuo haaix zanc daux gaux, maiv dungx zoux hnangv beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo a'hneiv souv jienv wuov wuic dorngh yaac souv wuov jaai-horngc nyei jauv-caax daux gaux weic bun zuangx mienh buatc. Yie mbuox zien meih mbuo, ninh mbuo nyei zingh nyeic ninh mbuo duqv zipv liuz aqv." 
Matthew6:6 Meih daux gaux nyei ziangh hoc, oix zuqc bieqc gen mingh, guon jienv gaengh, caux meih mangc maiv buatc nyei Zaangc Diex gorngv waac. Hnangv naaic, meih nyei Zaangc Diex, dongh mangc buatc meih gem jienv zoux nyei sic, ziouc bun zingh nyeic meih aqv." 
Matthew6:7 “Meih mbuo daux gaux nyei ziangh hoc, maiv dungx paan mingh puoqv nzuonx nyei gorngv hnangv maiv gaengh hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh wuov deix mienh nor. Ninh mbuo laaic gorngv waac camv Tin-Hungh cingx daaih muangx duqv haiz ninh mbuo daux gaux nyei waac." 
Matthew6:8 Maiv dungx hnangv ninh mbuo nor zoux. Meih mbuo maiv gaengh tov, meih mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex zungv jaa-ndaangc hiuv duqv meih mbuo qiemx zuqc nyei nyungc-nyungc." 
Matthew6:9 “Meih mbuo horpc zuqc hnangv naaiv nor daux gaux. ‘Yie mbuo nyei tin-dorngh Diex aah! Tov bun mienh taaih meih nyei cing-nzengc mbuox. 
Matthew6:10 Tov bun meih zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei hnoi taux. Tov bun yiem naaiv baamh gen nyungc-nyungc ei meih nyei eix cuotv daaih, hnangv yiem tin-dorngh nyungc-nyungc ei meih nyei eix cuotv daaih nor." 
Matthew6:11 Yie mbuo hnoi-hnoi qiemx zuqc nyei nyanc hopv, tov bun gaux ih hnoi nyanc." 
Matthew6:12 Tov guangc yie mbuo zoux nyei zuiz, hnangv yie mbuo guangc zoux dorngc yie mbuo wuov deix mienh nyei zuiz nor." 
Matthew6:13 Maiv dungx bun yie mbuo buangh seix hnyouv nyei sic, mv baac njoux yie mbuo leih ndutv hiuang orqv wuov dauh. Weic zuqc meih yietc liuz maaih hungh lingc, maaih qaqv, maaih njang-laangc, taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Aamen.’" 
Matthew6:14 “Se gorngv mienh dorngc meih mbuo, meih mbuo yaac guangc bun ninh mbuo nor, meih mbuo nyei tin-dorngh Diex yaac guangc meih mbuo nyei zuiz." 
Matthew6:15 Mv baac mienh dorngc meih mbuo, meih mbuo yaac maiv guangc nor, meih mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex yaac maiv guangc meih mbuo nyei zuiz." 
Matthew6:16 “Meih mbuo zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc wuov zanc, maiv dungx zoux hmien hmuangx hnangv beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh zoux. Ninh mbuo zoux hmien hmuangx hnangv kouv kouv wuov, oix zuangx mienh zieqv duqv ninh mbuo zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc. Yie mbuox zien meih mbuo, ninh mbuo nyei zingh nyeic ninh mbuo duqv zipv liuz aqv." 
Matthew6:17 Meih mbuo zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc nyei ziangh hoc, oix zuqc nzaaux nzengc hmien, zorqv youh nzaatv jienv mba'biei baic sung" 
Matthew6:18 weic maiv bun mienh hiuv duqv meih zei. Kungx meih mangc maiv buatc nyei Zaangc Diex hiuv hnangv. Meih nyei Zaangc Diex, dongh mangc duqv buatc meih gem jienv zoux nyei sic, ziouc bun zingh nyeic meih aqv." 
Matthew6:19 “Maiv dungx weic ganh siou jaaix nyei ga'naaiv yiem naaiv baamh gen, weic zuqc haih jiex sioux jiex nzingx nyei. Gaeng yaac haih ngaatc waaic nzengc. Janx-zaqc yaac haih betv bieqc daaih nimc." 
Matthew6:20 Oix zuqc weic ganh siou jaaix nyei ga'naaiv yiem wuov tin-dorngh weic zuqc maiv haih jiex sioux jiex nzingx. Gaeng yaac maiv haih ngaatc waaic. Janx-zaqc yaac maiv haih betv bieqc daaih nimc. 
Matthew6:21 Meih siou jaaix nyei ga'naaiv yiem haaix norm dorngx, meih nyei hnyouv haaix zanc yaac jangx jienv wuov aqv." 
Matthew6:22 “M'zing beiv sin nyei dang. Se gorngv meih nyei m'zing njang nor, ziangh sin ziouc njang nzengc." 
Matthew6:23 Meih nyei m'zing maiv njang nor, meih nyei sin ziouc hmuangx aqv. Hnangv naaic, se gorngv yiem meih gu'nyuoz nyei njang hmuangx mingh, ziouc za'gengh hmuangx haic aqv." 
Matthew6:24 “Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih zoux duqv i dauh ziouv nyei bou. Hnangv naaic, ninh oix nzorng naaiv dauh, oix hnamv wuov dauh. Maiv zei aeqv, ninh oix taaih naaiv dauh, oix mangc piex wuov dauh. Meih mbuo maiv haih dongh dangh zoux Tin-Hungh nyei bou yaac zoux Nyaanh nyei bou." 
Matthew6:25 “Weic naaiv yie gorngv mbuox meih mbuo, maiv dungx weic yungz maengc nyei nyanc hopv kuonx hnyouv. Yaac maiv dungx weic sin zaangc nyei lui-houx kuonx hnyouv. Maengc gauh jaaix jiex nyanc hopv maiv zeiz? Sin yaac gauh jaaix jiex lui-houx maiv zeiz?" 
Matthew6:26 Mangc gaax, ndaix ndaamv-lungh nyei norqc! Ninh mbuo maiv zuangx haaix nyungc yaac maiv siou dapv lamz. Mv baac meih mbuo nyei tin-dorngh Diex uix ninh mbuo. Meih mbuo zungv gauh jaaix jiex norqc maiv zeiz?" 
Matthew6:27 Meih mbuo haaix dauh laaix kuonx hnyouv haih borqv duqv maengc ndaauv deix? 
Matthew6:28 “Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc laaix lui-houx kuonx hnyouv? Hnamv mangc gaax, lomc nyei baeqc horqc biangh hnangv haaix nor ziangh! Biangh maiv zoux gong, maiv baeng suix ndatv ndie." 
Matthew6:29 Mv baac yie mbuox meih mbuo, liemh Saa^lo^morn Hungh ndongc naaic butv zoih, yaac maiv maaih zorng-zuqv ndongc yietc dorv naaiv deix biangh nzueic." 
Matthew6:30 Lomc nyei miev ih hnoi ziangh, njang hnoi kou nqaai, zuqc douz buov, mv baac Tin-Hungh zorng miev nzueic. Wuov nyungc, Tin-Hungh gauh oix zorng meih mbuo maiv zeiz? Meih mbuo sienx duqv hei haic weqv!" 
Matthew6:31 “Hnangv naaic, maiv dungx kuonx hnyouv gorngv, ‘Yie mbuo hnangv haaix nor haih lorz duqv nyanc lorz duqv hopv, lorz duqv lui-houx zuqv?’" 
Matthew6:32 Maiv gaengh sienx Tin-Hungh wuov deix mienh haaix zanc yaac kungx lorz naaiv deix ga'naaiv hnangv. Meih mbuo nyei tin-dorngh Diex hiuv duqv meih mbuo qiemx zuqc longc naaiv deix ga'naaiv. 
Matthew6:33 Gauh longc jienv jiex, meih mbuo oix zuqc bun Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv meih mbuo ndaangc, yaac oix zuqc ei nzengc ninh nyei eix, naaiv deix yietc zungv nyei ga'naaiv ninh ziouc jaa tipv bun meih mbuo." 
Matthew6:34 Weic naaiv meih mbuo maiv dungx nzauh njang hnoi nyei sic. Njang hnoi nyei sic maaih gaux njang hnoi nzauh. Mouz hnoi maaih mouz hnoi nyei sic nzauh gaux aqv. 
Matthew7:1 “Maiv dungx dingc mienh nyei zuiz, Tin-Hungh ziouc maiv dingc meih mbuo nyei zuiz," 
Matthew7:2 weic zuqc meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor dingc mienh nyei zuiz, Tin-Hungh yaac hnangv wuov nor dingc meih mbuo nyei zuiz aqv. Meih mbuo longc haaix nyungc hlaau bun mienh, Tin-Hungh yaac longc wuov nyungc hlaau bun meih mbuo." 
Matthew7:3 “Meih weic haaix diuc buatc meih nyei gorx-youz nyei m'zing maaih la'fapv yaac maiv hnamv taux meih ganh nyei m'zing maaih nqanx ndiangx? 
Matthew7:4 Ganh nyei m'zing maaih nqanx ndiangx, meih fungc haih mbuox meih nyei gorx-youz, ‘Gorx aac, yie tengx gorx ban cuotv m'zing nyei la'fapv oc.’" 
Matthew7:5 Beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc zorqv cuotv ganh nyei m'zing wuov nqanx ndiangx ndaangc cingx daaih haih mangc duqv zien tengx gorx-youz ban cuotv m'zing nyei la'fapv. 
Matthew7:6 “Maiv dungx zorqv cing-nzengc nyei ga'naaiv bun juv. Gamh nziex juv haih daaux sin daaih ngaatc meih mbuo. Yaac maiv dungx zorqv jaaix nyei la'bieiv-zou zoi bun dungz. Dungz kungx oix caaiv waaic hnangv. 
Matthew7:7 “Oix zuqc tov ziouc duqv, oix zuqc lorz ziouc buatc, oix zuqc ngaengv gaengh, gaengh ziouc nqoi." 
Matthew7:8 Weic zuqc haaix dauh tov ziouc duqv, haaix dauh lorz ziouc buatc. Haaix dauh ngaengv gaengh, gaengh ziouc nqoi." 
Matthew7:9 “Meih mbuo haaix dauh mienh, ninh nyei dorn tov njuov, meih oix bun la'bieiv ninh fai?" 
Matthew7:10 Dorn tov mbiauz, meih oix bun naang ninh fai?" 
Matthew7:11 Meih mbuo ndongc naaic waaic nyei mienh zungv hiuv duqv bun longx nyei ga'naaiv meih mbuo nyei fu'jueiv, meih mbuo nyei tin-dorngh Diex yietc zei oix bun longx nyei ga'naaiv tov ninh wuov deix mienh." 
Matthew7:12 “Meih mbuo oix mienh hnangv haaix nor zoux bun meih mbuo, meih mbuo yaac oix zuqc hnangv wuov nor zoux bun mienh. Mose nyei Leiz caux Douc Waac Mienh njaaux nyei waac, nzutv zunv gorngv se dongh naaiv aqv." 
Matthew7:13 “Oix zuqc bieqc hepc wuov dauh gaengh, weic zuqc dorh mienh mingh zuqc mietc wuov dauh gaengh jangv nyei. Jauv yaac kuh yangh nyei. Yangh wuov diuh jauv nyei mienh camv haic." 
Matthew7:14 Mv baac bieqc mingh duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc wuov dauh gaengh se hepc nyei. Jauv yaac aqc duqv yangh. Lorz buatc wuov diuh jauv nyei mienh zoqc. 
Matthew7:15 “Oix zuqc mbungh jienv jaav douc waac mienh. Ninh mbuo daaih lorz meih mbuo wuov zanc, beih zaangc hnangv ba'gi yungh, mv baac ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv ciouv hnangv hieh juv nor." 
Matthew7:16 Meih mbuo samx mangc ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv ninh mbuo aqv. Ndiangx-njimv maiv haih ziangh a'ngunc biouv. Mungv long njimv yaac maiv haih ziangh ngongh nyorx biouv. 
Matthew7:17 Ndiangx longx ziangh longx nyei biouv. Ndiangx maiv benx ziangh maiv benx nyei biouv. 
Matthew7:18 Ndiangx longx maiv haih ziangh maiv benx nyei biouv. Maiv benx nyei ndiangx maiv haih ziangh longx nyei biouv. 
Matthew7:19 Haaix diuh ndiangx ziangh biouv maiv benx, zungv zuqc goix guangc buov douz." 
Matthew7:20 Hnangv naaic, meih mbuo buatc ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic meih mbuo ziouc zieqv duqv jaav douc waac mienh aqv." 
Matthew7:21 “Heuc jienv yie, ‘Ziouv aah! Ziouv!’ wuov deix mienh, maiv zeiz dauh dauh haih duqv bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv. Kungx dongh ei yie nyei tin-dorngh Diex nyei eix zoux wuov deix duqv bieqc hnangv." 
Matthew7:22 Taux siemv zuiz wuov hnoi mienh camv nyei oix mbuox yie, ‘Ziouv aah! Ziouv! Yie mbuo dengv meih nyei mbuox douc Tin-Hungh nyei waac, yaac zunc mienv cuotv, yaac zoux jiex mbuoqc horngh nyei sic camv.’" 
Matthew7:23 Wuov zanc yie oix gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, ‘Yie liemh maiv hiuv duqv meih mbuo niaa. Meih mbuo zoux waaic nyei mienh gaanv biaux nqoi maah!’" 
Matthew7:24 “Hnangv naaiv, haaix dauh haiz liuz yie naaiv deix waac, yaac ei jienv zoux, se hnangv yietc dauh cong-mengh nyei mienh gomv biauv la'bieiv-baengh gu'nguaaic." 
Matthew7:25 Duih domh mbiungc, wuom hlo guaatv, borngz domh nziaaux buonc biauv, biauv yaac maiv mbaang, weic zuqc gomv la'bieiv-baengh gu'nguaaic." 
Matthew7:26 “Mv baac haaix dauh haiz liuz yie naaiv deix waac yaac maiv ei jienv zoux, ziouc hnangv dauh mienh hngongx mienh nor. Naaiv dauh gomv biauv yiem saa-ziou gu'nguaaic." 
Matthew7:27 Duih domh mbiungc, wuom hlo guaatv, borngz domh nziaaux buonc biauv, biauv ziouc mbaang. Lomz! lomz nyei mbaang mi'aqv.”" 
Matthew7:28 Yesu gorngv liuz naaiv deix waac, zuangx mienh mbuoqc horngh haic ninh njaaux nyei waac," 
Matthew7:29 weic zuqc ninh njaaux maiv hnangv ninh mbuo nyei njaaux leiz fin-saeng. Ninh nyei waac maaih hatc maaz haic. 
Matthew8:1 Yesu yiem mbong njiec daaih wuov zanc, maaih mienh camv! nyei gan jienv ninh mingh." 
Matthew8:2 Maaih laanh mienh butv gomh huv baengc daaih gueic njiec Yesu nyei nza'hmien. Ninh gorngv, “Domh Gorx aac, se gorngv meih oix nor, meih haih zorc longx yie nyei baengc.”" 
Matthew8:3 Yesu sung buoz maan jienv wuov laanh mienh yaac gorngv, “Yie oix zorc nyei. Meih longx daaih maah!” Wuov laanh mienh nyei baengc ziouc liemh zeih longx mi'aqv." 
Matthew8:4 Yesu aengx gorngv mbuox ninh, “Maiv dungx mbuox haaix dauh oc. Baeng zaqc nyei mingh sai mienh wuov bun ninh zaah mangc. Mangc liuz, oix zuqc ei Mose fiev nyei leiz dorh saeng-kuv mingh ziec bun Tin-Hungh weic saax meih nyei uix, zoux zorng-zengx bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv meih nyei baengc longx nzengc.”" 
Matthew8:5 Yesu bieqc Kaa^be^naa^um Mungv wuov zanc, maaih dauh Lomaa baeng-bieiv daaih lorz ninh, tov ninh tengx." 
Matthew8:6 Baeng-bieiv gorngv, “Domh Gorx aac, yie nyei bou butv baengc-mbai, bueix wuov biauv, diev duqv kouv haic.”" 
Matthew8:7 Yesu gorngv, “Yie oix mingh zorc ninh longx.”" 
Matthew8:8 Baeng-bieiv gorngv, “Domh Gorx ganh maiv zuqc mingh aqv. Yie maiv puix zipv meih bieqc yie nyei biauv. Meih kungx gorngv cuotv hnangv, yie nyei bou ziouc longx aqv." 
Matthew8:9 Yie ganh yaac yiem domh baeng-bieiv nyei buoz-ndiev, yaac maaih baeng camv yiem yie nyei ga'ndiev maengx. Yie heuc naaiv dauh mingh, ninh ziouc mingh, heuc wuov dauh daaih, ninh ziouc daaih. Heuc yie nyei nouh zoux naaiv, ninh ziouc zoux aqv.”" 
Matthew8:10 Yesu haiz naaiv deix waac ninh mbuoqc horngh haic ziouc mbuox gan ninh daaih wuov deix mienh, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, yie maiv buatc jiex mienh sienx ndongc naaiv longx. Liemh I^saa^laa^en Mienh yaac maiv maaih yietc dauh." 
Matthew8:11 Yie yaac mbuox meih mbuo, maaih mienh camv nyei yiem dong bung caux fai bung oix daaih yiem Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv caux Apc^laa^ham, I^sakc caux Yaakopv juangc dieh nyanc hnaangx." 
Matthew8:12 Mv baac horpc zuqc benx Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv nyei mienh wuov deix, daaux nzuonx zuqc zunc cuotv ga'nyiec hmuangx nyei dorngx, yiem wuov bungx-sing bungx-qiex nyei nyiemv, ngaatc jienv nyaah diev.”" 
Matthew8:13 Yesu aengx mbuox baeng-bieiv, “Gunv nzuonx biauv aqv. Ei meih sienx nyei, za'gengh oix hnangv naaiv nor cuotv daaih aqv.” Doix wuov norm ziangh hoc ninh nyei bou ziouc longx mi'aqv." 
Matthew8:14 Yesu bieqc Bide nyei biauv, buatc Bide nyei maa-diev butv baengc, sin jorm nyei, bueix jienv wuov coux." 
Matthew8:15 Yesu nanv ninh nyei buoz, sin ziouc laangh mi'aqv. Ninh ziouc jiez sin daaih fu-sux Yesu." 
Matthew8:16 Lungh maanz-hmuangx, maaih mienh dorh zuqc mienv muoqv nyei mienh camv nyei daaih lorz Yesu. Yesu gorngv nduqc joux waac hnangv ziouc zunc mienv cuotv nzengc mi'aqv. Dauh dauh nyei baengc yaac zorc longx nzengc." 
Matthew8:17 Ninh hnangv naaiv zoux weic bun ninh zoux nyei sic cuotv daaih doix douc waac mienh, I^saa^yaa, gorngv nyei waac. I^saa^yaa gorngv, “Ninh ndaam yie mbuo nyei baengc tongx, yaac teix yie mbuo nyei zeqc naanc.”" 
Matthew8:18 Yesu buatc mienh camv weih gormx ninh, ziouc mbuox sai-gorx mbuo dorh ninh jiex wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv-dorn." 
Matthew8:19 Wuov zanc maaih dauh njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng daaih lorz Yesu. Ninh gorngv, “Fin-saeng aah! Maiv gunv fin-saeng mingh haaix, yie oix gan meih mingh aqv.”" 
Matthew8:20 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh, “Hieh juv maaih mbaengx-kuotv yiem, norqc yaac maaih lauz, mv baac yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, maiv maaih dorngx bueix hitv kuonx.”" 
Matthew8:21 Aengx maaih dauh sai-gorx mbuox Yesu, “Domh Gorx aac, yie tov nzuonx mingh biopv yie nyei die ndaangc.”" 
Matthew8:22 Yesu dau, “Sueih janx-daic ganh biopv ninh mbuo ganh nyei janx-daic aqv. Gan jienv yie daaih maah!”" 
Matthew8:23 Yesu bieqc nzangv, sai-gorx mbuo yaac gan jienv bieqc." 
Matthew8:24 Nzaeng jienv nzangv mingh gau, liemh zeih borngz gorng domh nziaaux, buonc wuom jiez laangc nqomz bieqc nzangv. Mv baac Yesu bueix m'njormh mi'aqv." 
Matthew8:25 Sai-gorx mbuo mingh heuc ninh nyie daaih. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Ziouv aah! Ziouv! Gaanv njoux maengc ov! Ndortv wuom daic aqv loh!”" 
Matthew8:26 Yesu dau, “Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc ndongc naaic gamh nziex? Meih mbuo sienx duqv hei haic weqv!” Yesu ziouc jiez sin daaih hatc nziaaux caux wuom-laangc. Domh nziaaux ziouc dingh mi'aqv. Wuom-laangc yaac haapv. Haaix nyungc yaac sekv nzengc mi'aqv." 
Matthew8:27 Sai-gorx mbuo mbuoqc horngh haic yaac gorngv, “Naaiv haaix nyungc mienh orqv? Liemh nziaaux caux wuom-laangc yaac muangx ninh nyei waac.”" 
Matthew8:28 Yesu jiex wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv-dorn taux Gaa^ndaa^laa Deic. Maaih i dauh mienh yiem zouv-gemh cuotv daaih buangh zuqc Yesu. Naaiv deix i dauh mienh maaih mienv yiem ninh mbuo nyei sin, ninh mbuo ziouc ciouv haic. Maiv maaih haaix dauh gaamv yangh wuov diuh jauv." 
Matthew8:29 Naaiv deix i dauh mienh liemh zeih heuc mbui nyei, “Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn aah! Meih daaih yie mbuo naaiv zoux haaix nyungc? Ziangh hoc maiv gaengh taux meih daaih zeix yie mbuo fai?”" 
Matthew8:30 Maaih yietc domh guanh dungz leih wuov go deix nyei lorz nyanc. 
Matthew8:31 Naaiv deix mienv ziouc tov Yesu, “Meih zunc yie mbuo cuotv nor, bun yie mbuo mingh bieqc wuov guanh dungz maah!”" 
Matthew8:32 Yesu gorngv, “Mingh aqv!” Mienv ziouc cuotv wuov deix i dauh mienh mingh bieqc dungz nzengc. Ziangh guanh dungz ziouc tiux njiec kamx ndortv wuom ziemx daic nzengc mi'aqv." 
Matthew8:33 Yungz dungz nyei mienh biaux bieqc mungv mingh, gorngv nzengc yietc zungv cuotv daaih nyei sic caux zinh ndaangc maaih mienv yiem sin wuov deix i dauh mienh nyei jauv-louc." 
Matthew8:34 Yietc zingh mienh ziouc cuotv mingh lorz Yesu. Lorz buatc, ninh mbuo qaqv tov Yesu cuotv ninh mbuo nyei deic-jaaix mingh." 
Matthew9:1 Yesu bieqc nzangv jiex wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv-dorn nzuonx taux ninh ganh nyei mungv. 
Matthew9:2 Maaih deix mienh dorh dauh butv baengc-mbai mienh bueix jienv jiuc daaih lorz Yesu. Yesu buatc naaiv deix mienh sienx ndongc naaiv longx, ninh ziouc mbuox baengc-mbai mienh, “Dorn aac, gunv bungx hnyouv maah! Meih nyei zuiz duqv guangc liuz aqv.”" 
Matthew9:3 Maaih deix njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng haiz Yesu hnangv naaic nor gorngv, ninh mbuo yiem hnyouv hnamv, “Aav, naaiv laanh mienh ki Tin-Hungh.”" 
Matthew9:4 Yesu hiuv duqv ninh mbuo hnangv haaix nor hnamv, ninh ziouc gorngv, “Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc yiem hnyouv hnamv cuotv waaic nyei sic?" 
Matthew9:5 Gorngv, ‘Meih nyei zuiz duqv guangc liuz aqv,’ fai gorngv ‘Jiez sin daaih yangh jauv,’ naaiv deix i joux waac, haaix joux gauh hec duqv gorngv?" 
Matthew9:6 Mv baac yie oix bun meih mbuo hiuv duqv yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, yiem lungh ndiev maaih hatc maaz guangc mienh nyei zuiz.” Yesu ziouc mbuox butv baengc-mbai nyei mienh, “Jiez sin daaih, dorh jienv meih nyei jiuc nzuonx biauv aqv.”" 
Matthew9:7 Wuov dauh mienh ziouc jiez sin nzuonx biauv mi'aqv. 
Matthew9:8 Zuangx mienh buatc hnangv naaiv nor, ninh mbuo gamh nziex haic, yaac ceng Tin-Hungh, weic zuqc ninh bun naaiv nyungc hatc maaz mienh." 
Matthew9:9 Yesu cuotv wuov norm dorngx mi'aqv. Gan jienv jauv mingh gau, buatc dauh siou nzou-zinh nyei mienh, mbuox heuc Matv^taai, zueiz jienv wuov siou nzou zaamc. Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh, “Daaih gan yie oc.” Matv^taai ziouc jiez sin gan jienv Yesu mingh aqv." 
Matthew9:10 Yesu yiem Matv^taai nyei biauv nyanc hnaangx wuov zanc, maaih tengx Lomaa hungh jaa siou nzou-zinh nyei mienh camv nyei caux mengh dauh waaic nyei mienh yaac daaih caux Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo juangc dieh nyanc hnaangx." 
Matthew9:11 Maaih deix Faa^li^si Mienh buatc ziouc naaic gaax sai-gorx, “Meih mbuo nyei sai-diex weic haaix diuc caux siou nzou nyei mienh caux mengh dauh waaic nyei mienh nyanc hnaangx?”" 
Matthew9:12 Yesu haiz ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor gorngv, ninh ziouc dau, “Wangc siangx nyei mienh maiv qiemx zuqc ndie-sai. Kungx butv-baengc mienh hnangv qiemx zuqc ndie-sai." 
Matthew9:13 Meih mbuo mingh hoqc naaiv joux Ging-Sou nyei waac nyei eix leiz maah! Ging-Sou gorngv, ‘Yie oix mienh maaih hnyouv korv-lienh mienh. Maiv zeiz oix mienh dorh saeng-kuv daaih ziec yie.’ Yie maiv zeiz daaih weic heuc kuv mienh. Yie daaih heuc mengh dauh waaic nyei mienh.”" 
Matthew9:14 Wuov zanc tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov dauh Yo^han nyei sai-gorx daaih naaic Yesu, “Yie mbuo caux Faa^li^si Mienh zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc. Meih nyei sai-gorx mbuo weic haaix diuc maiv zei?”" 
Matthew9:15 Yesu dau, “Siang-laangh corc yiem jienv cing-jaa-yinh nyei ziangh hoc, kaeqv mienh haih nzauh nyei fai? Zungv maiv haih. Mv baac hnoi-nyieqc oix taux, siang-laangh zuqc dorh mingh mi'aqv. Taux wuov zanc kaeqv mienh cingx daaih zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc." 
Matthew9:16 “Maiv maaih haaix dauh longc siang-ndie mbiev loz-lui. Siang-ndie haih soqv bun mbiev nyei dorngx jaa huv hlo. 
Matthew9:17 “Yaac maiv maaih haaix dauh zorqv siang-a'ngunc diuv dapv loz-ndopv-mbuoqc. Dapv nor, diuv nyei qiex zungx, mbuoqc ziouc mbaaix aqv. Mbuoqc huv nzengc, diuv yaac cuotv nzengc mi'aqv. Siang-diuv oix zuqc dapv siang-ndopv-mbuoqc. Hnangv naaic, liemh diuv liemh mbuoqc cingx daaih maiv haih waaic.”" 
Matthew9:18 Yesu corc gorngv jienv naaiv deix waac wuov zanc, maaih dauh gunv wuic dorngh nyei mienh daaih gueic njiec ninh nyei nza'hmien yaac gorngv, “Yie nyei sieqv coqv hoqc daic mingh. Tov meih mingh longc buoz maan ninh, ninh ziouc nangh daaih aqv.”" 
Matthew9:19 Yesu ziouc jiez sin gan jienv ninh mingh. Sai-gorx mbuo yaac gan jienv mingh. 
Matthew9:20 Mingh gau, maaih dauh m'sieqv dorn butv baengc-hlutv duqv ziepc nyeic hnyangx aqv. Ninh yangh nqa'haav nqaang daaih hluo Yesu nyei lui-juoqv," 
Matthew9:21 weic zuqc ninh yiem hnyouv hnamv, “Se gorngv yie kungx hluo ninh nyei lui hnangv, yie nyei baengc ziouc longx aqv.”" 
Matthew9:22 Yesu guinh sin buatc wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn ziouc gorngv, “M'dauh m'sieqv dorn aah! Gunv bungx hnyouv aqv. Weic zuqc meih sienx yie, meih nyei baengc longx aqv.” Dongh wuov norm ziangh hoc, baengc ziouc longx mi'aqv." 
Matthew9:23 Yesu bieqc gunv wuic dorngh wuov dauh mienh nyei biauv wuov zanc, ninh buatc biomv hlauv-ndongh nux nyei mienh caux mienh camv mbiouh mbiouh nyei." 
Matthew9:24 Ninh ziouc gorngv mbuox zuangx mienh, “Cuotv mingh maah! Naaiv dauh sieqv maiv zeiz daic. Ninh m'njormh hnangv.” Zuangx mienh ziouc jatv ninh." 
Matthew9:25 Zunc naaiv deix mienh cuotv mingh liuz, Yesu bieqc mingh nanv jienv wuov dauh sieqv nyei buoz. Sieqv ziouc jiez sin daaih aqv." 
Matthew9:26 Naaiv deix fienx sing buangv wuov norm deic-bung. 
Matthew9:27 Yesu cuotv wuov norm dorngx mi'aqv. Gan jienv jauv mingh gau, maaih i dauh m'zing maengh nyei mienh gan jienv mingh, heuc jienv gorngv, “Ndaawitv nyei Zeiv-Fun aah! Korv-lienh yie mbuo maah!”" 
Matthew9:28 Yesu bieqc biauv mingh, wuov deix i dauh m'zing maengh nyei mienh daaih lorz ninh. Yesu naaic gaax ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo sienx yie haih zorc meih mbuo nyei m'zing fai?” Ninh mbuo dau, “Domh Gorx aac, yie mbuo sienx nyei.”" 
Matthew9:29 Yesu ziouc hluo ninh mbuo nyei m'zing yaac gorngv, “Ei meih mbuo sienx nyei, ziouc duqv aqv.”" 
Matthew9:30 Ninh mbuo nyei m'zing ziouc haih mangc duqv buatc aqv. Yesu hatc ninh mbuo. “Cin-maanc maiv dungx mbuox haaix dauh.” 
Matthew9:31 Mv baac ninh mbuo cuotv mingh zunh Yesu zoux nyei jauv buangv wuov norm deic-bung. 
Matthew9:32 Wuov deix i dauh mienh cuotv mingh wuov zanc, mienh dorh dauh zuqc mienv muoqv hngongx, maiv haih gorngv waac nyei mienh, daaih lorz Yesu." 
Matthew9:33 Yesu zunc mienv cuotv liuz, wuov dauh mienh ziouc liemh zeih haih gorngv waac. Zuangx mienh mbuoqc horngh haic, laanh mbuox laanh, “Yiem I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung maiv gaengh buatc jiex naaiv nyungc sic.”" 
Matthew9:34 Mv baac Faa^li^si Mienh gorngv, “Mienv nyei hungh bun ninh maaih lingc zunc mienv cuotv hnangv.”" 
Matthew9:35 Yesu youh jienv zueih mungv zueih laangz mingh, yiem wuic dorngh njaaux mienh yaac zunh Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei kuv fienx. Ninh yaac zorc longx nyungc-nyungc baengc." 
Matthew9:36 Yesu buatc naaiv deix mienh camv ninh za'gengh! haiz korv-lienh haic weic zuqc ninh mbuo kouv haic, maiv lamh kaux dorngx, hnangv guanh ba'gi yungh maiv maaih ziouv goux nor." 
Matthew9:37 Yesu ziouc mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo, “Gaeng-zuangx camv mv baac gong-mienh zoqc." 
Matthew9:38 Weic naaiv oix zuqc tov gaeng-zuangx nyei Ziouv paaiv gong-mienh cuotv mingh siou ninh nyei gaeng-zuangx.” 
Matthew10:1 Yesu heuc ninh nyei ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx daaih zunv, jiu hatc maaz bun ninh mbuo haih zunc hieh guaiv mienv cuotv yaac haih zorc nyungc-nyungc baengc longx." 
Matthew10:2 Naaiv deix ziepc nyeic dauh gong-zoh nyei mbuox se maaih hnangv naaiv. Da'yietv dauh heuc Simon, aengx maaih norm mbuox heuc Bide. Aengx maaih ninh nyei youz, An^ndaa^lu. Maaih Se^mbe^ndi nyei Dorn, Yaagorpc, caux Yaagorpc nyei youz, Yo^han." 
Matthew10:3 Maaih Filipv caux Mbaa^to^lo^miu, maaih Tomatv caux siou nzou wuov dauh Matv^taai, maaih An^fe^atc nyei Dorn, Yaagorpc, caux Tatv^nde^atc." 
Matthew10:4 Maaih hnamv guoqv zaangc wuov dauh Simon. Yaac maaih maaic Yesu wuov dauh Yu^ndaatc I^saa^kaa^li^otc. 
Matthew10:5 Yesu paaiv naaiv deix ziepc nyeic dauh gong-zoh cuotv mingh wuov zanc, ninh yaac njaaux ziangx. Ninh gorngv, “Maiv dungx mingh haaix fingx Janx nyei deic-bung. Yaac maiv dungx bieqc Saa^maa^lie Deic-Bung nyei haaix norm mungv." 
Matthew10:6 Kungx oix zuqc mingh lorz I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Ninh mbuo se hnangv dingx laaih nyei ba'gi yungh nor. 
Matthew10:7 Meih mbuo yietc binc mingh yietc binc zunh mbuox mienh, ‘Tin-Hungh daaih zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei ziangh hoc taux fatv aqv.’" 
Matthew10:8 Oix zuqc zorc baengc, heuc daic mingh nyei mienh nangh daaih, zorc longx butv gomh huv baengc nyei mienh, yaac zunc mienv cuotv. Meih mbuo baeqc baeqc duqv daaih nyei yaac oix zuqc baeqc baeqc bun." 
Matthew10:9 Meih mbuo nyei nyaanh mbuoqc, maiv dungx dapv jiem fai nyaanh fai dongh zinh dorh mingh." 
Matthew10:10 Cuotv jauv, maiv zuqc dorh mbuoqc dapv ga'naaiv, maiv dungx dorh lui-yienc, fai heh, fai biaav-mbiaac. Gong-mienh horpc zuqc duqv ninh qiemx longc nyei ga'naaiv." 
Matthew10:11 “Meih mbuo bieqc haaix norm laangz, haaix norm mungv, oix zuqc samx mangc gaax, yiem wuov maaih haaix dauh puix duqv meih mbuo hitv ninh nyei biauv. Hitv haaix dauh nyei biauv, oix zuqc hitv taux aengx cuotv wuov norm dorngx." 
Matthew10:12 Bieqc biauv wuov zanc, oix zuqc tov Tin-Hungh bun baengh orn wuov buonc mienh." 
Matthew10:13 Se gorngv wuov buonc mienh a'hneiv zipv meih mbuo nor, bun meih mbuo tov nyei baengh orn yiem wuov norm biauv. Se gorngv ninh mbuo maiv zipv meih mbuo nor, oix zuqc siou meih mbuo tov nyei baengh orn nzuonx." 
Matthew10:14 Haaix norm biauv fai haaix norm mungv maiv zipv meih mbuo fai maiv muangx meih mbuo nyei waac, oix zuqc cuotv wuov norm dorngx yaac fengx guoqv zaux nyei nie-mbung guangc wuov." 
Matthew10:15 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, taux siemv zuiz wuov hnoi, So^ndom Zingh caux Go^mo^laa Zingh oix zuqc dingc zuiz zungv gauh heng wuov norm mungv." 
Matthew10:16 “Muangx longx oc. Yie paaiv meih mbuo cuotv mingh, se hnangv bungx ba'gi yungh bieqc hieh juv guanh gu'nyuoz nor. Meih mbuo oix zuqc hnangv naang nor guai. Yaac hnangv baeqc gopv nor suonc." 
Matthew10:17 Oix zuqc faix fim. Mienh oix zorqv meih mbuo dorh mingh gunv sic wuic. Yiem ninh mbuo nyei wuic dorngh ninh mbuo yaac oix longc biaav-bin mborqv meih mbuo. 
Matthew10:18 Meih mbuo laaix yie oix zuqc mienh dorh meih mbuo mingh yiem zungx caux hungh diex nyei nza'hmien weic kuv fienx zoux zorng-zengx bun ninh mbuo caux Janx muangx. 
Matthew10:19 Ninh mbuo dorh mingh zaah naaic wuov zanc, maiv dungx nzauh oix zuqc gorngv haaix nyungc fai oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor gorngv. Taux ziangh hoc, dongh meih mbuo oix zuqc gorngv nyei waac, Tin-Hungh oix bun meih mbuo gorngv," 
Matthew10:20 weic zuqc maiv zeiz meih mbuo ganh hnamv cuotv waac gorngv. Meih mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex nyei Singx Lingh ganh longc meih mbuo gorngv. 
Matthew10:21 “Muoz-dorn doic, laanh oix zorqv laanh jiu bun mienh daix. Die yaac oix zorqv ninh nyei fu'jueiv jiu bun mienh daix. Fu'jueiv caux diex maac yaac oix benx win, ziouc jiu bun mienh daix." 
Matthew10:22 Weic yie, zuangx mienh oix nzorng meih mbuo, mv baac haaix dauh diev duqv taux daauh ziouc duqv njoux aqv." 
Matthew10:23 Meih mbuo yiem yietc norm mungv zuqc mienh zoux doqc, oix zuqc biaux mingh ganh norm mungv. Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, meih mbuo mingh I^saa^laa^en Deic-Bung nyei norm-norm laangz zoux meih mbuo nyei gong maiv gaengh ziangx, yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, ziouc taux aqv." 
Matthew10:24 “Horqc saeng maiv gauh hlo ninh nyei fin-saeng. Nouh maiv gauh hlo ninh nyei ziouv. 
Matthew10:25 Se gorngv horqc saeng haih duqv hnangv ninh nyei fin-saeng, nouh haih duqv hnangv ninh nyei ziouv, oix zuqc buangv hnyouv aqv. Se gorngv biauv-ziouv zuqc mienh heuc zoux Mbe^en^se^mbun mienv, biauv zong mienh yietc zei oix zuqc mienh heuc gauh waaic jiex nyei mbuox." 
Matthew10:26 “Hnangv naaic, maiv dungx gamh nziex mienh. Maiv maaih haaix nyungc gem jienv maiv zuqc cuotv yaangh. Maiv maaih haaix nyungc bingx jienv, mienh maiv haih hiuv." 
Matthew10:27 Yie yiem hmuangx zong bingx jienv mbuox meih mbuo nyei sic, meih mbuo oix zuqc yiem njang zong gorngv cuotv daaih. Meih mbuo yiem m'normh gorn haiz nyei waac-sapv, oix zuqc yiem wuov biauv-ngorh zunh mbuox mienh." 
Matthew10:28 Maiv dungx gamh nziex mienh. Ninh mbuo haih daix sin mv baac maiv haih daix lingh wuonh. Daaux nzuonx oix zuqc gamh nziex Tin-Hungh. Tin-Hungh haih bun liemh sin liemh lingh wuonh ndortv deic nyuoqc zuqc mietc. 
Matthew10:29 I norm norqc meix maaic duqv yietc norm dongh zinh hnangv. Mv baac cuotv liuz meih mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex nyei eix, yietc norm norqc meix maiv ndortv njiec ndau." 
Matthew10:30 Liemh meih mbuo nyei mba'biei zungv saauv nzengc mi'aqv. 
Matthew10:31 Hnangv naaic maiv dungx gamh nziex. Meih mbuo zungv gauh jaaix jiex norqc meix camv. 
Matthew10:32 “Haaix dauh dorng zuangx nyiemc yie, yie yiem yie nyei tin-dorngh Diex nyei nza'hmien yaac oix nyiemc wuov dauh." 
Matthew10:33 Mv baac haaix dauh dorng zuangx maiv nyiemc yie, yie yiem yie nyei tin-dorngh Diex nyei nza'hmien yaac maiv nyiemc wuov dauh." 
Matthew10:34 “Maiv dungx hnamv yie daaih weic bun baamh gen taaix-baengh. Yie maiv zeiz daaih weic bun baamh gen taaix-baengh, yie dorh nzuqc ndaauv daaih." 
Matthew10:35 Yie daaih weic bun “+‘dorn caux die maiv horpc, sieqv caux maa maiv horpc, mbuangz caux maa-buoc maiv horpc." 
Matthew10:36 Biauv zong mienh ziouc benx ganh nyei win-wangv aqv.’ 
Matthew10:37 “Haaix dauh hnamv diex maac gauh camv ninh hnamv yie, se maiv puix gan yie zoux sai-gorx. Haaix dauh hnamv ninh nyei naamh nyouz gauh camv ninh hnamv yie, wuov dauh yaac maiv puix zoux yie nyei sai-gorx." 
Matthew10:38 Haaix dauh maiv ndaam jienv ninh ganh nyei ziepc nzaangc jaax gan jienv yie mingh, wuov dauh maiv puix zoux yie nyei sai-gorx." 
Matthew10:39 Haaix dauh kungx oix goux ninh ganh nyei maengc, wuov dauh ziouc zuqc guangc ninh nyei maengc. Mv baac haaix dauh weic yie guangc ninh nyei maengc, wuov dauh ziouc duqv maengc ziangh aqv." 
Matthew10:40 “Haaix dauh zipv meih mbuo, ninh yaac zipv yie. Haaix dauh zipv yie, ninh yaac zipv paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh." 
Matthew10:41 Haaix dauh zipv dauh douc waac mienh weic zuqc ninh zoux douc waac mienh, wuov dauh ziouc duqv zipv zingh nyeic hnangv douc waac mienh zipv nyei zingh nyeic nor. Haaix dauh zipv kuv mienh weic zuqc ninh zoux kuv mienh, wuov dauh ziouc duqv zipv zingh nyeic hnangv kuv mienh zipv nor." 
Matthew10:42 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, haaix dauh bun korqv wuom-namx yietc dauh naaiv deix faix jiex nyei sai-gorx hopv weic zuqc ninh zoux yie nyei sai-gorx, wuov dauh nyei zingh nyeic za'gengh maiv haih ndortv.”" 
Matthew11:1 Yesu njaaux liuz ninh nyei ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx, ninh cuotv wuov norm dorngx mingh Gaa^li^li Saengv nyei mungv zunh doz njaaux mienh." 
Matthew11:2 Tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov dauh Yo^han corc wuonx jienv loh wuov zanc, ninh haiz gorngv Giduc zoux nyei gong, ziouc paaiv deix ninh nyei sai-gorx mingh" 
Matthew11:3 naaic Yesu, “Meih dongh Yo^han gorngv oix daaih wuov dauh saah? Fai yie mbuo corc oix zuqc zuov ganh dauh?”" 
Matthew11:4 Yesu dau ninh mbuo, “Nzuonx mingh gorngv meih mbuo haiz nyei caux buatc nyei naaiv deix jauv-louc bun Yo^han muangx oc." 
Matthew11:5 Mbuox ninh, m'zing maengh m'zing mbuov nyei mienh haih mangc duqv buatc, zaux mbai nyei mienh haih yangh jauv aqv. Butv gomh huv baengc wuov deix zorc longx nzengc. M'normh ndung nyei yaac haih muangx duqv haiz. Daic mingh nyei mienh aengx nangh daaih. Mienh jomc mienh yaac duqv haiz kuv fienx." 
Matthew11:6 Haaix dauh maiv nqemh yie, wuov dauh maaih njien-youh aqv.”" 
Matthew11:7 Yo^han nyei sai-gorx nzuonx nyei ziangh hoc, Yesu gorngv Yo^han nyei jauv-louc mbuox zuangx mienh. Ninh gorngv, “Meih mbuo mingh deic-bung-huaang wuov zanc, meih mbuo mingh mangc haaix nyungc? Mingh mangc diuh luoqc diqc guaengv zuqc nziaaux buonc dongz fai?" 
Matthew11:8 Meih mbuo mingh mangc haaix nyungc? Mangc dauh m'jangc dorn zuqv ciouh zuqv dunc fai? Zuqv ciouh zuqv dunc nyei mienh yiem hungh dinc hnangv lorqc. 
Matthew11:9 Wuov nyungc, meih mbuo cuotv mingh oix buatc haaix nyungc? Oix buatc dauh douc waac mienh zeiz nyei saah? Zeiz nyei. Mv baac meih mbuo oix buatc wuov dauh, ninh zungv gauh hlo douc waac mienh." 
Matthew11:10 Yo^han se dongh Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv, “Tin-Hungh gorngv, ‘Yie oix paaiv yie nyei douc fienx mienh mingh ndaangc meih, liuz leiz meih nyei jauv.’" 
Matthew11:11 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, da'faanh yiem mienh mbu'ndongx tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov dauh Yo^han, gauh hlo jiex. Mv baac yiem tin-dorngh nyei guoqv zoux gauh faix jiex wuov dauh, ninh corc gauh hlo jiex Yo^han." 
Matthew11:12 Yiem naaiv dauh Yo^han jiez gorn zunh doz taux ih zanc, Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv zuqc mienh zoux doqc yaac zuqc mienh doqc mienh oix caangv." 
Matthew11:13 Taux Yo^han nyei lungh ndiev, zuangx Douc Waac Mienh caux Mose nyei Leiz-Latc yaac gorngv Tin-Hungh oix daaih zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei jauv." 
Matthew11:14 Se gorngv meih mbuo nyunc sienx wuov deix mienh tengx Tin-Hungh douc daaih nyei waac, Yo^han se dongh ninh mbuo gorngv oix daaih wuov dauh E^li^yaa." 
Matthew11:15 Haaix dauh maaih m'normh oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx longx oc. 
Matthew11:16 “Yie oix zuqc longc haaix nyungc beiv ih jaax mienh? Ninh mbuo se hnangv fu'jueiv zueiz jienv hei-horngc, naaiv guanh heuc wuov guanh. Ninh mbuo gorngv," 
Matthew11:17 “+‘Yie mbuo biomv hlauv-ndongh nux, meih mbuo yaac maiv cangx heix. Yie mbuo baaux biopv janx-daic nyei nzung, meih mbuo yaac maiv nyiemv.’" 
Matthew11:18 Tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov dauh Yo^han daaih wuov zanc, ninh zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc, yaac maiv hopv a'ngunc diuv. Zuangx mienh gorngv, ‘Maaih mienv yiem ninh nyei sin.’" 
Matthew11:19 Yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, daaih wuov zanc, yie nyanc yaac hopv. Mienh ziouc gorngv, ‘Mangc gaax, naaiv dauh mienh kungx mauv nyanc hopv nquin hnangv. Ninh yaac caux tengx Lomaa hungh jaa siou nzou-zinh nyei mienh caux mengh dauh waaic nyei mienh zoux doic.’ Mv baac cuotv daaih nyei sic bun cing Tin-Hungh nyei cong-mengh za'gengh horpc nyei.”" 
Matthew11:20 Yesu ziouc jiez gorn gorngv wuov deix mungv weic zuqc ninh yiem wuov deix mungv zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic gauh camv jiex mv baac mienh maiv kangv goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz. 
Matthew11:21 Ninh gorngv, “Ko^laa^sin Mungv aah! Meih oix zuqc kouv aqv. Mbetc^sai^ndaa Mungv aah! Meih yaac oix zuqc kouv aqv. Yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx zoux jiex wuov deix mbuoqc horngh nyei sic, se gorngv yiem Tailaqv caux Sai^ndorn Mungv zoux cuotv daaih nor, wuov deix i norm mungv nyei mienh zungv buix jienv la'maah ndie-cou, zueiz jienv saaiv-ndui, bun cing ninh mbuo goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz lauh aqv." 
Matthew11:22 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, taux siemv zuiz wuov hnoi, Tailaqv caux Sai^ndorn Mungv zungv zuqc dingc zuiz gauh heng meih mbuo." 
Matthew11:23 Kaa^be^naa^um Mungv aah! Meih ganh oix taaih meih ganh faaux lungh fai? Meih zungv oix zuqc dorh njiec yiemh gen aqv loh! Se gorngv yiem meih naaic zoux jiex wuov deix mbuoqc horngh nyei sic yiem wuov So^ndom Zingh zoux nor, So^ndom Zingh corc haih yiem taux ih zanc." 
Matthew11:24 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, taux siemv zuiz wuov hnoi, So^ndom Zingh zungv zuqc dingc zuiz gauh heng meih aqv.”" 
Matthew11:25 Wuov zanc Yesu gorngv, “Aa Die, lungh ndau nyei Ziouv aah! Yie ceng Die weic zuqc naaiv deix sic Die gem jienv maiv bun maaih cong-mengh nyei mienh caux hoqc hlang nyei mienh hiuv, mv baac Die bun maiv hoqc hlang nyei mienh hiuv." 
Matthew11:26 Aa Die aah! Naaiv se zoux duqv horpc Die ganh nyei hnyouv. 
Matthew11:27 “Aa Die zorqv nyungc-nyungc jiu bun yie. Cuotv liuz Die, maiv maaih haaix dauh hiuv duqv Dorn. Cuotv liuz Dorn, caux Dorn bun hiuv wuov deix, maiv maaih haaix dauh hiuv duqv Die.”" 
Matthew11:28 “Meih mbuo haaix dauh kouv hnangv nyiex ga'naaiv hniev, gunv daaih yie naaiv. Yie oix bun meih mbuo hitv kuonx." 
Matthew11:29 Zorqv yie nyei ndiangx-gaaz gaaz jienv, zuotc yie nyei nyungc, weic zuqc yie hnyouv suonc, horh norh, meih mbuo ziouc duqv baengh orn." 
Matthew11:30 Weic zuqc yie bun meih mbuo wuov norm ndiangx-gaaz kuh gaaz nyei. Yie bun meih mbuo nyiex nyei ga'naaiv yaac heng.” 
Matthew12:1 Nqa'haav maiv nangc lauh, maaih norm Dingh Gong Hnoi, Yesu jiex mienh nyei mbiauh ndeic. Ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo hnyouv sie, ziouc nietv mbiauh dorv nyanc." 
Matthew12:2 Faa^li^si Mienh buatc ziouc gorngv mbuox Yesu, “Mangc gaax, meih nyei sai-gorx mbuo hnangv naaiv nor zoux, ninh mbuo zoux dorngc Dingh Gong Hnoi nyei leiz.”" 
Matthew12:3 Yesu dau, “Meih mbuo maiv doqc jiex naaiv deix jauv fai? Ndaawitv Hungh caux gan ninh wuov deix mienh hnyouv sie nyei ziangh hoc, ninh mbuo hnangv haaix nor zoux?" 
Matthew12:4 Ndaawitv bieqc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei Ndopv-Liuh zorqv gengx Tin-Hungh wuov deix njuov nyanc. Ninh caux ninh nyei mienh yaac maiv maaih leiz nyanc wuov deix njuov. Kungx maaih sai mienh ganh maaih leiz nyanc hnangv. 
Matthew12:5 Meih mbuo yaac maiv doqc jiex Mose nyei Leiz-Latc fai? Mouz norm Dingh Gong Hnoi, sai mienh yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zoux dorngc Dingh Gong Hnoi nyei Leiz mv baac ninh mbuo maiv maaih zuiz." 
Matthew12:6 Yie mbuox meih mbuo, yiem naaiv maaih dauh gauh hlo jiex zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv." 
Matthew12:7 Ging-Sou gorngv, ‘Yie oix mienh maaih hnyouv korv-lienh mienh, maiv zeiz oix mienh dorh saeng-kuv daaih ziec yie.’ Se gorngv meih mbuo za'gengh mengh baeqc naaiv joux waac nyei eix leiz, meih mbuo maiv zorqv maiv zoux dorngc nyei mienh dingc zuiz," 
Matthew12:8 weic zuqc yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, zoux Dingh Gong Hnoi nyei Ziouv.”" 
Matthew12:9 Yesu cuotv wuov norm dorngx aengx mingh bieqc norm wuic dorngh. 
Matthew12:10 Yiem wuov maaih dauh mienh maaih jieqv buoz waaic. Maaih deix mienh oix lorz jauv gox Yesu, ninh mbuo ziouc naaic gaax, “Longc Dingh Gong Hnoi zorc baengc se dorngc mbuo nyei leiz fai maiv dorngc?”" 
Matthew12:11 Yesu dau, “Se gorngv meih mbuo haaix dauh maaih dauh ba'gi yungh, Dingh Gong Hnoi wuov dauh ba'gi yungh ndortv kuotv mingh, meih mbuo maiv zeiz mingh zorqv ninh baeng cuotv daaih fai?" 
Matthew12:12 Yietc laanh mienh se gauh jaaix jiex yietc dauh ba'gi yungh. Hnangv naaic, leiz-latc bun mbuo longc Dingh Gong Hnoi zoux kuv sic duqv nyei.”" 
Matthew12:13 Yesu ziouc gorngv mbuox buoz waaic wuov dauh mienh, “Sung meih nyei buoz cuotv daaih maah!” Ninh ziouc sung buoz cuotv daaih. Ninh nyei buoz ziouc longx nzengc hnangv longx wuov jieqv nor." 
Matthew12:14 Faa^li^si Mienh ziouc cuotv mingh caangh laangh hnangv haaix nor haih daix Yesu. 
Matthew12:15 Yesu hiuv duqv ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor daav za'eix, ninh ziouc cuotv wuov norm dorngx mi'aqv. Mienh camv nyei gan jienv ninh mingh. Yesu yaac zorc longx nzengc dauh dauh nyei baengc," 
Matthew12:16 aengx hatc ninh mbuo maiv dungx gorngv mbuox mienh ninh dongh haaix dauh. 
Matthew12:17 Ninh hnangv naaiv nor zoux weic bun sic cuotv daaih doix douc waac mienh, I^saa^yaa, douc daaih nyei waac." 
Matthew12:18 I^saa^yaa gorngv, “Mangc maah! Naaiv se yie nyei bou, dongh yie ginv daaih wuov dauh. Yie hnamv haic ninh. Ninh yaac horpc yie nyei hnyouv haic. Yie oix zorqv yie nyei Singx Lingh ceix bun ninh. Ninh oix zunh yie zoux baengh fim nyei jauv bun maanc fingx muangx." 
Matthew12:19 Ninh maiv nzaeng jaax yaac maiv heuc qiex mbui, yaac maiv maaih haaix dauh haiz ninh yiem jaai-horngc nyei qiex." 
Matthew12:20 Luoqc diqc guaengv dopv mingh, ninh yaac maiv aauv ndutv, dang-cov ganx nyei sioux ninh yaac maiv biomv daic. Ninh oix hnangv naaiv zoux jienv mingh taux baengh fim nyei jauv hingh." 
Matthew12:21 Maanc fingx mienh yaac oix sienx kaux ninh ziouc maaih lamh hnamv dorngx aqv.” 
Matthew12:22 Wuov zanc mienh dorh dauh mienh daaih lorz Yesu. Naaiv dauh mienh zuqc mienv muoqv ninh m'zing maengh yaac muoqv ninh hngongx, maiv haih gorngv waac. Yesu ziouc zorc longx daaih, haih gorngv waac aqv. M'zing yaac haih mangc duqv buatc aqv." 
Matthew12:23 Zuangx mienh mbuoqc horngh haic Yesu zoux nyei sic. Laanh naaic laanh, “Naaiv dauh gengh Ndaawitv Hungh nyei Zeiv-Fun fai ni?”" 
Matthew12:24 Faa^li^si Mienh haiz naaiv deix sic, ninh mbuo gorngv, “Naaiv laanh mienh haih zunc mienv cuotv se laaix ninh longc mienv nyei hungh, Mbe^en^se^mbun, nyei lingc zunc hnangv.”" 
Matthew12:25 Yesu hiuv duqv ninh mbuo hnangv haaix nor hnamv, ninh ziouc gorngv, “Haaix norm guoqv bun nqoi zoux ziex jauv, ganh nyei guoqv zaangc mienh caux ganh nyei guoqv zaangc mienh mborqv jaax, wuov norm guoqv ziouc baaic nzengc aqv. Haaix norm mungv fai haaix biauv mienh maiv dongh hnyouv, bun nqoi, naaiv guanh caux wuov guanh mborqv jaax, ziouc baaic mi'aqv." 
Matthew12:26 Hnangv naaic, se gorngv Saadaan zunc Saadaan cuotv, naaiv bun cing ninh nyei guoqv bun nqoi. Ninh nyei guoqv hnangv haaix nor haih yiem duqv wuonv?" 
Matthew12:27 Meih mbuo gorngv yie longc Mbe^en^se^mbun mienv nyei lingc zunc mienv cuotv. Wuov nyungc meih mbuo nyei sai-gorx ni? Ninh mbuo longc haaix dauh nyei lingc zunc mienv cuotv? Meih mbuo nyei sai-gorx zoux nyei sic bun cing meih mbuo dorngc aqv. 
Matthew12:28 Yie kaux Tin-Hungh nyei Singx Lingh zunc mienv cuotv. Naaiv bun cing Tin-Hungh daaih yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx zoux Ziouv aqv. 
Matthew12:29 “Hnangv haaix nor haih bieqc mienh henv mienh nyei biauv caangv ninh nyei ga'naaiv? Oix zuqc ndoh jienv wuov dauh mienh henv mienh ndaangc cingx daaih haih caangv duqv ninh nyei ga'naaiv. 
Matthew12:30 “Haaix dauh maiv gan yie se caux yie doix-dekc. Haaix dauh maiv tengx yie siou zunv, wuov dauh zoux bun nzaanx nzengc mi'aqv." 
Matthew12:31 Weic naaiv yie mbuox meih mbuo, mienh baamz nyei yietc zungv zuiz, caux gorngv ki nyei yietc zungv waac, Tin-Hungh haih guangc nzengc. Mv baac haaix dauh gorngv ki Singx Lingh, Tin-Hungh maiv guangc wuov dauh nyei zuiz aqv." 
Matthew12:32 Haaix dauh gorngv doqc yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, Tin-Hungh ziouc guangc wuov dauh nyei zuiz. Mv baac haaix dauh gorngv doqc Singx Lingh, Tin-Hungh maiv guangc wuov dauh nyei zuiz maiv gunv yiem naaiv gitv lungh ndiev fai nqa'haav wuov gitv lungh ndiev." 
Matthew12:33 “Se gorngv ndiangx longx ziouc ziangh biouv longx. Maiv benx nyei ndiangx ziangh biouv maiv benx. Buatc haaix nyungc biouv ziouc hiuv duqv benx haaix nyungc ndiangx. 
Matthew12:34 Meih mbuo naaic ndui naang-doqc nyei buonv aah! Meih mbuo hnyouv waaic nyei mienh hnangv haaix nor haih gorngv kuv waac? Weic zuqc hnyouv zaangh buangv haaix nyungc, nzuih ziouc gorngv cuotv wuov nyungc aqv." 
Matthew12:35 Kuv mienh nyei hnyouv siou longx nyei ga'naaiv, zorqv cuotv daaih nyei yaac longx. Waaic nyei mienh siou waaic nyei ga'naaiv, zorqv cuotv daaih nyei yaac waaic." 
Matthew12:36 “Yie mbuox meih mbuo, taux siemv zuiz wuov hnoi, mouz laanh mienh gorngv nyei joux-joux henh waac, gorqv-mienh ganh oix zuqc ndaam-dorng." 
Matthew12:37 Tin-Hungh oix longc meih ganh nyei waac dingc meih maaih zuiz fai maiv maaih zuiz.” 
Matthew12:38 Wuov zanc maaih deix njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux Faa^li^si Mienh gorngv mbuox Yesu, “Fin-saeng aac, yie mbuo oix buatc norm meih bun daaih nyei jangx-hoc.”" 
Matthew12:39 Yesu gorngv, “Ih jaax nyei mienh waaic haic, maaih hieh hnyouv. Meih mbuo tov jangx-hoc mv baac cuotv liuz douc waac mienh, Yonaa, nyei jangx-hoc, ganh norm meih mbuo maiv duqv mangc aqv." 
Matthew12:40 Yonaa yiem domh mbiauz nyei ga'sie buo hnoi buo muonz, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn fih hnangv nyei oix zuqc yiem ndau-ndiev buo hnoi buo muonz." 
Matthew12:41 Taux Tin-Hungh siemv zuiz wuov hnoi, Ni^naa^we Mienh oix souv jiez daaih gox ih jaax mienh, weic zuqc Yonaa mingh zunh doz wuov zanc, ninh mbuo zungv goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz mi'aqv. Mangc maah! Ih zanc yiem naaiv corc maaih dauh gauh hlo jiex Yonaa." 
Matthew12:42 Taux Tin-Hungh siemv zuiz wuov hnoi, yiem Naamh Bung wuov dauh Hungh Maac oix souv jiez daaih gox ih jaax mienh, weic zuqc wuov dauh hungh maac yiem lungh gorn daaih muangx Saa^lo^morn Hungh cong-mengh nyei waac. Mangc maah! Ih zanc yiem naaiv maaih dauh gauh hlo jiex Saa^lo^morn." 
Matthew12:43 “Hieh guaiv mienv yiem mienh nyei sin cuotv daaih wuov zanc ninh youh jienv deic-bung-haanz mingh lorz dorngx hitv. Mingh gau, lorz maiv duqv dorngx hitv." 
Matthew12:44 Mienv ziouc gorngv, ‘Aa, yie oix nzuonx yie nyei loz-biauv yiem aqv.’ Ninh ziouc nzuonx mingh buatc ninh nyei loz-biauv puotv njang nzengc, mbenc sung, henh henh wuov." 
Matthew12:45 Ninh ziouc aengx mingh lorz siec dauh mienv gauh ciouv jiex ninh daaih. Ninh mbuo ziouc bieqc wuov dauh mienh nyei sin yiem. Wuov dauh mienh ziouc gauh kouv zinh ndaangc aqv. Meih mbuo naaiv doic hnyouv waaic nyei mienh yaac oix zuqc hnangv naaic.” 
Matthew12:46 Yesu corc caux zuangx mienh gorngv jienv waac wuov zanc, Yesu nyei maa caux ninh nyei youz mbuo taux aqv, souv ga'nyiec maengx oix caux Yesu gorngv waac." 
Matthew12:47 Maaih dauh yiem wuov nyei mienh ziouc mbuox Yesu, “Meih nyei maa caux meih nyei youz mbuo souv jienv ga'nyiec maengx, oix caux meih gorngv waac.”" 
Matthew12:48 Yesu dau, “Haaix dauh zoux yie nyei maa? Haaix dauh zoux yie nyei muoz-doic?”" 
Matthew12:49 Ninh ziouc nuqv jienv ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo yaac gorngv, “Mangc maah! Naaiv deix mienh se yie nyei maa caux yie nyei muoz-doic." 
Matthew12:50 Haaix dauh ei yie nyei tin-dorngh Diex nyei eix zoux, wuov dauh zoux yie nyei muoz-doic yaac zoux yie nyei maa.”" 
Matthew13:1 Dongh naaic hnoi Yesu cuotv wuov norm biauv mingh zueiz jienv wuov koiv-dorn hlen. 
Matthew13:2 Mienh camv haic daaih gapv zunv weih jienv ninh, ninh ziouc bieqc poux nzangv zueiz jienv. Zuangx mienh souv jienv wuov mbienx." 
Matthew13:3 Yesu longc waac-beiv njaaux camv-nyungc jauv ninh mbuo. Ninh gorngv, “Maaih dauh mienh cuotv mingh haaz nyim." 
Matthew13:4 Haaz nyei ziangh hoc, maaih deix nyim ndortv zuqc jauv. Norqc daaih nyanc nzengc mi'aqv." 
Matthew13:5 Maaih deix nyim ndortv zuqc la'bieiv-lomc, maiv maaih nie camv nyei dorngx. Nie maiv hoz, nyim ziouc guqc nyaah siepv." 
Matthew13:6 Nyutc cuotv daaih pui zuqc ziouc nyaux nzengc mi'aqv, weic zuqc nyim njiec nzungh maiv ndo." 
Matthew13:7 Maaih deix nyim ndortv zuqc njimv-lomc. Njimv hlo daaih mbiorngz jienv aqv. 
Matthew13:8 Maaih deix nyim ndortv zuqc ndau-longx, cuotv daaih ziangh duqv gitv. Maaih deix yietc gouv siou duqv yietc baeqv gouv. Maaih deix siou duqv luoqc ziepc gouv. Maaih deix siou duqv faah ziepc gouv." 
Matthew13:9 Haaix dauh maaih m'normh oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx longx oc.” 
Matthew13:10 Sai-gorx mbuo daaih naaic Yesu, “Sai-Diex weic haaix diuc longc waac-beiv njaaux naaiv deix mienh?”" 
Matthew13:11 Yesu dau, “Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh naaiv deix gem jienv nyei sic, Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo hiuv, mv baac maiv bun ninh mbuo hiuv." 
Matthew13:12 Weic zuqc haaix dauh maaih nyei, oix jaa bun ninh maaih gauh camv, zungv maaih zengc. Haaix dauh maiv maaih, liemh ninh maaih diqv dien nyei, oix zuqc zorqv mingh." 
Matthew13:13 Hnangv naaiv, yie longc waac-beiv njaaux ninh mbuo weic zuqc ‘Ninh mbuo mangc yaac mangc maiv buatc, muangx yaac muangx maiv haiz, yaac maiv mengh baeqc.’" 
Matthew13:14 Ninh mbuo doix-diuc nzengc I^saa^yaa douc nyei waac. Ninh gorngv, ‘Meih mbuo ndongc haaix muangx, meih mbuo maiv haih bieqc hnyouv, ndongc haaix mangc, yaac maiv maiv mengh baeqc." 
Matthew13:15 Weic zuqc deix baeqc fingx nyei hnyouv nzotv, ninh mbuo zotv jienv m'normh kuotv yaac njipv jienv m'zing. Maiv zei aeqv, ninh mbuo nyei m'zing haih mangc duqv buatc, m'normh haih muangx duqv haiz, hnyouv yaac haih mengh baeqc, ziouc huin nzuonx daaih bun yie zorc longx ninh mbuo.’" 
Matthew13:16 Mv baac meih mbuo orn-lorqc haic aqv, weic zuqc meih mbuo nyei m'zing haih mangc duqv buatc. Meih mbuo nyei m'normh haih muangx duqv haiz." 
Matthew13:17 Yie mbuox zien meih mbuo, zinh ndaangc maaih douc waac mienh caux kuv mienh camv oix buatc haic dongh meih mbuo buatc nyei, mv baac ninh mbuo maiv duqv buatc. Oix haiz dongh meih mbuo haiz nyei, mv baac ninh mbuo maiv duqv haiz." 
Matthew13:18 “Wuov nyungc, meih mbuo muangx gaax, haaz nyim nyei waac-beiv hnangv haaix nor." 
Matthew13:19 Haaz ndortv jauv wuov deix nyim se hnangv mienh haiz Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei kuv fienx mv baac maiv mengh baeqc. Yiem ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv wuov deix kuv fienx, hiuang orqv wuov dauh daaih caangv cuotv mi'aqv." 
Matthew13:20 Haaz ndortv la'bieiv-lomc, beiv mienh yietv haiz kuv fienx ziouc a'hneiv zipv." 
Matthew13:21 Mv baac se hnangv kuv fienx njiec nzungh maiv ndo, sienx maiv lauh. Laaix kuv fienx buangh zuqc sic fai zuqc mienh zoux doqc, ninh mbuo ziouc cuotv mi'aqv." 
Matthew13:22 Haaz ndortv zuqc njimv-lomc wuov deix nyim, beiv mienh haiz kuv fienx. Mv baac laaix kuonx hnyouv nyei sic fai laaix hnamv zinh nyaanh mbiorngz jienv kuv fienx, nyim ziouc maiv haih jauh aqv." 
Matthew13:23 Haaz ndortv ndau-longx nyei nyim, se hnangv mienh haiz kuv fienx yaac bieqc hnyouv, naaiv deix nyim ziouc ziangh duqv gitv. Maaih deix yietc gouv duqv yietc baeqv gouv, maaih deix duqv luoqc ziepc gouv, maaih deix duqv faah ziepc gouv.”" 
Matthew13:24 Yesu aengx gorngv diuh waac-beiv bun ninh mbuo muangx. Ninh gorngv, “Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh beiv dauh mienh dorh mbiauh mingh haaz wuov ndeic." 
Matthew13:25 Maaih muonz, zuangx mienh bueix m'njormh wuov zanc, maaih dauh ninh nyei win-wangv zorqv haih laengc mienh nyei mbiauh haaz zorpc jienv, ziouc biaux mi'aqv." 
Matthew13:26 Mbiauh hlo daaih, cuotv mbiauh dorv nyei ziangh hoc ziouc zieqv duqv wuov nyungc laengc mienh nyei mbiauh zorpc jienv cuotv." 
Matthew13:27 “Bou ziouc mingh naaic ndeic-ziouv, ‘Gorx aac, meih haaz mbiauh wuov ndeic maiv zeiz? Hnangv naaic, wuov nyungc laengc mienh nyei mbiauh yiem haaix daaih?’" 
Matthew13:28 “Ndeic-ziouv dau, ‘Naaiv se win-wangv zoux nyei gong.’ “Bou ziouc naaic, ‘Wuov nyungc, Gorx oix yie mbuo mingh baeng guangc fai?’" 
Matthew13:29 “Ndeic-ziouv gorngv, ‘Maiv dungx baeng aqv. Nzauh heix liemh mbiauh baeng zuqc." 
Matthew13:30 Cinh ninh hlo daaih. Taux gaatv nyei ziangh hoc yie ziouc mbuox gong-mienh gaatv wuov nyungc miev ndaangc, ndoh jienv yietc zeiv yietc zeiv nyei, dorh mingh buov guangc. Nqa'haav siou mbiauh daaih dapv jienv yie nyei lamz.’+”" 
Matthew13:31 Yesu aengx gorngv diuh waac-beiv bun ninh mbuo muangx. “Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei eix leiz beiv norm lai-jaaix nyim, maaih dauh mienh dorh mingh zuangx ninh nyei ndeic." 
Matthew13:32 Yietc buoqv nyim se dongh lai-jaaix nyim gauh faix jiex. Mv baac zuangx jienv cuotv daaih se gauh hlo jiex nyungc-nyungc lai, zungv benx ndiangx. Norqc yaac daaih zoux lauz yiem ninh nyei nquaah.”" 
Matthew13:33 Yesu aengx gorngv yietc diuh waac-beiv bun ninh mbuo muangx. “Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh se hnangv bingv nor. Maaih dauh m'sieqv dorn zorqv deix bingv qouv buo tongv mbuonv. Naaiv deix mbuonv ziouc butv nzengc mi'aqv.” 
Matthew13:34 Naaiv deix jauv yietc zungv, Yesu kungx longc waac-beiv njaaux zuangx mienh hnangv. Cuotv liuz longc waac-beiv ninh maiv njaaux haaix nyungc ninh mbuo." 
Matthew13:35 Ninh hnangv naaiv zoux weic bun doix nzengc zinh ndaangc douc waac mienh gorngv nyei waac. Ninh gorngv, “Yie oix longc waac-beiv caux ninh mbuo gorngv, yie oix zorqv dongh zinh ndaangc yiem zeix lungh zeix ndau maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh taux ih zanc nyei sic zunh yaangh bun ninh mbuo muangx.”" 
Matthew13:36 Caux zuangx mienh gorngv liuz waac, Yesu ziouc bieqc biauv mi'aqv. Sai-gorx mbuo aengx daaih gorngv, “Tov Sai-Diex porv mengh yiem ndeic zorpc haih laengc mienh nyei mbiauh nyei waac-beiv bun yie mbuo hiuv oc.”" 
Matthew13:37 Yesu dau, “Haaz mbiauh wuov dauh se yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn." 
Matthew13:38 Ndeic se naaiv baamh gen. Mbiauh nyim se Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv nyei baeqc fingx. Haih laengc mienh wuov nyungc mbiauh nyim se hiuang orqv wuov dauh nyei baeqc fingx. 
Matthew13:39 Haaz haih laengc mienh nyei nyim wuov dauh win-wangv se mienv nyei hungh. Gaatv mbiauh nyei ziangh hoc yaac beiv baamh gen nyei setv mueiz. Gaatv mbiauh wuov deix gong-mienh se fin-mienh. 
Matthew13:40 “Gong-mienh hnangv haaix nor gaatv haih laengc mienh nyei mbiauh daaih buov douz, taux baamh gen nyei nyei setv mueiz yaac hnangv wuov nor." 
Matthew13:41 Yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, oix paaiv yie nyei fin-mienh mingh zorqv dongh zorpc jienv yie nyei guoqv nyei baeqc fingx wuov deix yietc zungv nduov mienh baamz zuiz caux zoux waaic nyei mienh siou daaih" 
Matthew13:42 zoi bieqc domh douz-nzauc gu'nyuoz, bun ninh mbuo yiem wuov bungx-sing bungx-qiex nyei nyiemv, ngaatc jienv nyaah diev." 
Matthew13:43 Wuov zanc gan longx Tin-Hungh wuov deix ziouc yiem ninh mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex nyei guoqv hnangv mba'hnoi nor, ziux njang. Haaix dauh maaih m'normh, oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx longx oc." 
Matthew13:44 “Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh, se hnangv jiem nyaanh biopv jienv wuov ndeic nor. Maaih dauh mienh buatc liuz, ninh ziouc aengx biopv jienv aqv. Ninh a'hneiv haic ziouc nzuonx mingh zorqv ninh nyei jaa-dingh nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv maaic nzengc, dorh nyaanh mingh maaiz wuov nzong ndeic aqv." 
Matthew13:45 “Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh yaac hnangv dauh saeng-eix mienh mingh lorz jaaix nyei la'bieiv-zou. 
Matthew13:46 Lorz duqv norm gauh jaaix jiex, ninh ziouc nzuonx mingh maaic nzengc ninh maaih nyei yietc zungv aengx maaiz wuov norm la'bieiv-zou." 
Matthew13:47 “Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh yaac beiv mungz borngz njiec koiv guaatv duqv nyungc-nyungc mbiauz. 
Matthew13:48 Mbiauz buangv mungz, borngz mbiauz nyei mienh tor cuotv wuov mbienx mingh. Ninh mbuo ziouc zueiz jienv ginv longx nyei dapv tongv. Maiv benx wuov deix ziouc guaengx guangc." 
Matthew13:49 Baamh gen nyei setv mueiz yaac hnangv naaiv nor. Tin-Hungh nyei fin-mienh oix daaih zorqv waaic nyei mienh caux zoux horpc Tin-Hungh wuov deix bun nqoi. 
Matthew13:50 Waaic nyei zoi bieqc domh douz-nzauc gu'nyuoz, bun ninh mbuo yiem wuov bungx-sing bungx-qiex nyei nyiemv, ngaatc jienv nyaah diev.”" 
Matthew13:51 Yesu naaic sai-gorx mbuo, “Naaiv deix waac yietc zungv meih mbuo mengh baeqc nyei saah?” Ninh mbuo dau, “Mengh baeqc nyei.”" 
Matthew13:52 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Wuov nyungc, mouz dauh njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng, dongh duqv hoqc Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei zien leiz wuov deix, se hnangv dauh biauv-ziouv yiem ninh siou ga'naaiv nyei dorngx zorqv cuotv loz nyei caux siang nyei ga'naaiv daaih nor.”" 
Matthew13:53 Yesu gorngv liuz naaiv deix waac-beiv, ninh cuotv wuov norm dorngx" 
Matthew13:54 aengx nzuonx taux ninh ganh nyei buonv-mungv, yiem wuov wuic dorngh njaaux mienh. Muangx haiz nyei mienh mbuoqc horngh haic. Ninh mbuo naaic gaax, “Ninh yiem haaix duqv naaiv nyungc cong-mengh ni? Ninh hnangv haaix nor haih zoux duqv naaiv deix mbuoqc horngh nyei sic?" 
Matthew13:55 Ninh maiv zeiz wuov dauh ndiangx-zaangc nyei dorn fai? Ninh nyei maa yaac maiv zeiz Maa^li^yaa fai? Yaagorpc, Yosepv, Simon, caux Yu^ndaatc zoux ninh nyei youz maiv zeiz?" 
Matthew13:56 Ninh nyei muoc mbuo yietc zungv caux mbuo yiem naaiv maiv zeiz? Wuov nyungc, naaiv deix cong-mengh caux banh zeic zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic yiem haaix duqv daaih?”" 
Matthew13:57 Ninh mbuo ziouc nqemh ninh aqv. Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Douc waac mienh mingh taux haaix, maaih mienh taaih. Kungx ganh nyei buonv-mungv caux biauv zong mienh maiv taaih hnangv.”" 
Matthew13:58 Laaix ninh mbuo maiv sienx, yiem wuov Yesu ziouc maiv zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic camv aqv." 
Matthew14:1 Wuov zanc gunv Gaa^li^li Saengv wuov dauh Helotv Hungh muangx haiz Yesu nyei jauv-louc
