Matthew14:2 ziouc mbuox ninh nyei sin-hlen mienh, “Naaiv dauh ndongc haaix zungv dongh tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov dauh Yo^han aengx nangh daaih aqv, ninh cingx daaih maaih naaiv nyungc qaqv zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic.”" 
Matthew14:3 Zinh ndaangc Helotv, laaix ninh nyei youz Filipv nyei auv, He^lo^ndietc, zorqv Yo^han ndoh jienv dorh mingh wuonx loh," 
Matthew14:4 weic zuqc Yo^han zanc-zanc gorngv mbuox Helotv, “Meih maiv maaih leiz longc He^lo^ndietc zoux auv.”" 
Matthew14:5 Helotv ziouc jiez hnyouv oix daix Yo^han mv baac ninh gamh nziex baeqc fingx weic zuqc Yiutai Mienh taaih Yo^han zoux dauh douc waac mienh. 
Matthew14:6 Zoux gau, taux Helotv nyei sih nyietv-hnoi, He^lo^ndietc nyei sieqv yiem zuangx kaeqv mienh nyei nza'hmien cangx heix. Helotv gengh a'hneiv haic" 
Matthew14:7 ziouc laengz waac bun wuov dauh sieqv, “Maiv gunv meih oix longc haaix nyungc, yie laengz bun meih aqv.”" 
Matthew14:8 Naaiv dauh sieqv ziux ninh nyei maa mbuox nyei waac gorngv, “Tov ih zanc zorqv tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov dauh Yo^han nyei m'nqorngv an jienv torqv-sienx dorh daaih bun yie oc.”" 
Matthew14:9 Helotv Hungh nzauh haic mv baac laaix ninh dorng jienv kaeqv mienh laengz liuz ngaengc waac ninh ziouc njiec lingc ei wuov dauh sieqv nyei waac zoux. 
Matthew14:10 Ninh paaiv mienh mingh wuov loh hngaqv ndutv Yo^han nyei m'nqorngv. 
Matthew14:11 Ninh mbuo zorqv m'nqorngv daaih an jienv torqv-sienx bouh daaih bun wuov dauh sieqv. Sieqv yaac jiu bun ninh nyei maa. 
Matthew14:12 Yo^han nyei sai-gorx mbuo mingh zorqv sei dorh mingh zangx. Zangx liuz, ninh mbuo ziouc mingh mbuox Yesu mi'aqv." 
Matthew14:13 Yesu haiz liuz naaiv deix sic, ninh ganh ziouc bieqc nzangv cuotv wuov aengx mingh lengh nyei dorngx. Zuangx mienh hiuv duqv ziouc cuotv ninh mbuo nyei mungv yangh jauv gan jienv Yesu mingh." 
Matthew14:14 Yesu cuotv nzangv faaux mbienx mingh, buatc mienh camv haic. Ninh haiz korv-lienh haic ninh mbuo, ziouc zorc longx nzengc ninh mbuo nyei baengc." 
Matthew14:15 Lungh maanz-hmuangx, sai-gorx mbuo daaih mbuox Yesu, “Lungh aav lamh hmuangx aqv. Naaiv yaac lengh nyei dorngx. Tov mbuox zuangx mienh mingh aqv. Ninh mbuo ziouc haih mingh maaih laangz nyei dorngx maaiz nyanc.”" 
Matthew14:16 Yesu dau, “Ninh mbuo maiv zuqc mingh lorqc. Meih mbuo ganh lorz bun ninh mbuo nyanc maah!”" 
Matthew14:17 Sai-gorx mbuo gorngv, “Yiem naaiv yie mbuo kungx maaih biaa norm njuov caux i dauh mbiauz hnangv.”" 
Matthew14:18 Yesu gorngv, “Zorqv daaih bun yie.”" 
Matthew14:19 Yesu heuc zuangx mienh zueiz jienv maaih miev nyei dorngx. Ninh aengx zorqv wuov deix biaa norm njuov caux i dauh mbiauz daaih, cau hmien mangc lungh, laengz zingh Tin-Hungh liuz ziouc maeqv nqoi bun sai-gorx. Sai-gorx mbuo dorh mingh bun zuangx mienh nyanc." 
Matthew14:20 Zuangx mienh nyanc beuv nzengc. Zengc njiec wuov deix, sai-gorx mbuo siou daaih duqv ziepc nyeic ndaan buangv." 
Matthew14:21 Nyanc nyei mienh, daan m'jangc dorn hnangv, maaih leih maiv go biaa cin dauh. M'sieqv dorn caux fu'jueiv maiv funx." 
Matthew14:22 Yesu ziouc beqv sai-gorx mbuo bieqc nzangv mingh ndaangc, jiex wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv-dorn. Ninh ganh yiem wuov heuc mienh bun nzaanx nzuonx nzengc." 
Matthew14:23 Zuangx mienh nzaanx nzengc, Yesu ganh faaux mbong-aiv mingh daux gaux. Lungh maanz-hmuangx aqv, Yesu ganh corc yiem wuov nyei." 
Matthew14:24 Doix wuov norm ziangh hoc sai-gorx mbuo nyei nzangv leih mbienx go haic aqv. Nzangv zuqc wuom-laangc mietv mingh mietv daaih nyei, laaix nziaaux ndungc jienv." 
Matthew14:25 Lungh aav lamh njang, buo norm taux juqv norm ziangh hoc mbu'ndongx, Yesu yangh wuom-minc mingh sai-gorx mbuo wuov." 
Matthew14:26 Sai-gorx mbuo buatc ninh yangh wuom-minc daaih, ninh mbuo ziouc gamh nziex! haic. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Aav, naaiv janx-daic njoiz saah!” ziouc haeqv ninh mbuo waiz-waiz nyei heuc." 
Matthew14:27 Yesu liemh zeih gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Gunv bungx hnyouv maah! Se dongh yie, maiv dungx gamh nziex.”" 
Matthew14:28 Bide ziouc gorngv, “Ziouv aah! Se gorngv zeiz meih nor, heuc yie yangh wuom-minc mingh meih naaic.”" 
Matthew14:29 Yesu gorngv, “Daaih maah!” Bide ziouc cuotv nzangv yangh wuom-minc hungx jienv Yesu mingh." 
Matthew14:30 Mv baac Bide buatc nziaaux hlo, haeqv ninh gamh nziex haic ziouc zemh jienv njiec. Ninh heuc, “Ziouv aah! Ziouv! Njoux yie maah!”" 
Matthew14:31 Yesu liemh zeih sung buoz nanv jienv ninh yaac gorngv, “Meih sienx duqv hei haic. Meih nyei hnyouv weic haaix diuc mbungh mbienv?”" 
Matthew14:32 Ninh mbuo i dauh bieqc nzangv. Nziaaux ziang naaic dingh mi'aqv. 
Matthew14:33 Yiem nzangv wuov deix ziouc baaix Yesu. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Ziouv aah! Meih za'gengh Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn aqv.”" 
Matthew14:34 Ninh mbuo jiex wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv-dorn ziouc taux Gen^ne^saa^letv Deic. 
Matthew14:35 Yiem wuov norm dorngx mienh zieqv duqv Yesu ziouc bun waac mingh gormx wuov norm horngc zaangc. Mienh ziouc dorh yietc zungv baengc mienh taux Yesu wuov 
Matthew14:36 tov Yesu bun baengc mienh kungx hluo zuqc ninh nyei lui-juoqv. Haaix dauh hluo zuqc, baengc ziouc longx mi'aqv." 
Matthew15:1 Wuov zanc, maaih deix Faa^li^si Mienh caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh daaih lorz Yesu ziouc naaic," 
Matthew15:2 “Meih nyei sai-gorx mbuo weic haaix diuc maiv gan mbuo nyei ong-taaix nyei ei-douh? Ninh mbuo maiv ei jienv leiz nzaaux buoz ndaangc cingx daaih nyanc hnaangx.” 
Matthew15:3 Yesu dau, “Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc baamz Tin-Hungh nyei leiz-latc, weic gan meih mbuo ganh nyei ei-douh hnangv?" 
Matthew15:4 Tin-Hungh gorngv, ‘Oix zuqc tongx nimc meih mbuo nyei diex maac.’ Yaac gorngv, ‘Haaix dauh zioux ninh nyei die fai maa, oix zuqc daix wuov dauh guangc.’" 
Matthew15:5 Mv baac meih mbuo gorngv, ‘Se gorngv haaix dauh mienh gorngv mbuox ninh nyei die fai ninh nyei maa, “Yie maaih haih tengx duqv meih mbuo nyei haaix nyungc ga'naaiv yie fungx bun Tin-Hungh mi'aqv,”" 
Matthew15:6 ninh ziouc maiv zuqc tongx nimc ninh nyei diex maac. Meih mbuo hnangv naaic gan meih mbuo nyei ei-douh zoux se zoux bun Tin-Hungh nyei waac maiv lamh longc. 
Matthew15:7 Beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh aah! I^saa^yaa douc Tin-Hungh nyei waac wuov zanc ninh gorngv duqv meih mbuo zien haic aqv. Ninh gorngv," 
Matthew15:8 ‘Naaiv deix mienh longc nzuih taaih yie, mv baac ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv leih duqv yie go haic." 
Matthew15:9 Ninh mbuo zaangc yie se maiv lamh longc. Ninh mbuo zorqv mienh ganh liepc daaih nyei leiz dorngx yie nyei leiz njaaux.’+” 
Matthew15:10 Yesu heuc zuangx mienh daaih zunv ziouc mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo muangx longx, yaac oix zuqc bieqc hnyouv." 
Matthew15:11 Nyanc bieqc nzuih nyei ga'naaiv maiv haih bun mienh maaih uix. Se dongh yiem nzuih cuotv nyei bun mienh maaih uix hnangv.” 
Matthew15:12 Sai-gorx mbuo ziouc daaih mbuox Yesu, “Sai-Diex hiuv nyei fai? Sai-Diex gorngv wuov joux waac Faa^li^si Mienh mbuoqc maiv duqv.”" 
Matthew15:13 Yesu dau, “Mouz nyungc ga'naaiv maiv zeiz yie nyei tin-dorngh Diex zuangx nyei nor, zungv oix zuqc baeng cuotv nzengc." 
Matthew15:14 Sueih binc ninh mbuo aqv. Ninh mbuo zoux dorh jauv nyei mienh mv baac m'zing maengh nyei. Se gorngv m'zing maengh nyei mienh ken m'zing maengh nyei mienh, i dauh zungv zuqc ndortv kuotv aqv.”" 
Matthew15:15 Bide gorngv, “Tov Sai-Diex porv mengh naaiv diuh waac-beiv bun yie mbuo hiuv oc.”" 
Matthew15:16 Yesu gorngv, “Meih mbuo taux ih zanc corc hnangv wuov deix mienh nor maiv mengh baeqc?" 
Matthew15:17 Meih mbuo maiv hiuv duqv fai? Mienh nyanc haaix nyungc bieqc nzuih ziouc njiec ga'sie. Nqa'haav ziouc bungx cuotv mi'aqv. 
Matthew15:18 Mv baac yiem nzuih cuotv nyei, se yiem hnyouv hnamv cuotv daaih. Dongh naaiv nyungc aqv, bun mienh maaih uix." 
Matthew15:19 Weic zuqc yiem mienh nyei hnyouv haih hnamv cuotv waaic nyei sic, daix mienh, hienx auv hienx nqox, hienx sieqv hienx dorn, zoux zaqc, zoux jaav zorng-zengx, gorngv doqc mienh." 
Matthew15:20 Dongh naaiv deix sic bun mienh maaih uix. Maiv zeiz laaix nyanc hnaangx maiv nzaaux buoz ndaangc mienh cingx daaih maaih uix.” 
Matthew15:21 Yesu cuotv wuov norm dorngx aengx mingh Tailaqv caux Sai^ndorn Zingh nyei deic. 
Matthew15:22 Yiem wuov maaih dauh Kaa^naa^an m'sieqv dorn daaih heuc jienv gorngv, “Domh Gorx aah! Ndaawitv nyei Zeiv-Fun aah! Korv-lienh yie maah! Yie nyei sieqv zuqc mienv muoqv kouv haic.”" 
Matthew15:23 Mv baac Yesu maiv dau yietc joux ninh. Sai-gorx mbuo ziouc daaih tov Yesu, “Zunc ninh biaux nqoi maah! Ninh heuc jienv gan jienv mbuo daaih.”" 
Matthew15:24 Yesu dau, “Tin-Hungh paaiv yie daaih lorz I^saa^laa^en Mienh hnangv. Ninh mbuo se hnangv dingx laaih nyei ba'gi yungh nor.”" 
Matthew15:25 Naaiv dauh m'sieqv dorn ziouc gueic njiec Yesu nyei nza'hmien yaac gorngv, “Domh Gorx aah! Tov tengx yie maah!”" 
Matthew15:26 Yesu dau, “Zorqv fu'jueiv nyei hnaangx zoi bun juv nyanc se maiv horpc.”" 
Matthew15:27 Wuov dauh Janx-muangz dau, “Domh Gorx aac, zeiz nyei. Mv baac liemh juv m'daaih yiem ninh mbuo nyei ziouv nyei dieh ndiev nzauz hnaangx-hmeiv-ndortv nyanc.”" 
Matthew15:28 Yesu ziouc dau ninh, “Meih naaiv dauh dorc za'gengh sienx duqv longx haic. Ei meih oix longc nyei, meih ziouc duqv aqv.” Wuov dauh Janx-muangz nyei sieqv doix wuov norm ziangh hoc ziouc longx mi'aqv." 
Matthew15:29 Yesu cuotv wuov norm dorngx, mingh taux Gaa^li^li Koiv-Dorn hlen aengx faaux mbong-aiv zueiz jienv." 
Matthew15:30 Maaih mienh camv nyei daaih lorz ninh yaac dorh jienv zaux mbai nyei, m'zing maengh nyei, buoz-zaux waaic nyei, ga'naaiv-hngongx maiv haih gorngv waac nyei, aengx caux butv-baengc mienh camv nyei daaih taux Yesu wuov, an jienv Yesu nyei zaux-hlen. Yesu yaac zorc longx nzengc." 
Matthew15:31 Zuangx mienh mbuoqc horngh haic, buatc ga'naaiv-hngongx haih gorngv waac. Buoz-zaux waaic nyei mienh yaac longx mi'aqv. Zaux mbai nyei mienh haih yangh jauv aqv. M'zing maengh nyei haih mangc duqv buatc. Zuangx mienh ziouc ceng I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei Tin-Hungh." 
Matthew15:32 Yesu heuc ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo daaih ninh wuov yaac mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie haiz korv-lienh haic naaiv deix mienh. Ninh mbuo daaih caux yie yiem duqv buo hnoi aqv. Ih zanc yaac maiv maaih haaix nyungc nyanc. Yie maiv oix bun ninh mbuo hnyouv sie jienv nzuonx. Nzauh heix taux ndaamv-jauv mau haic, haih king mv bei.”" 
Matthew15:33 Sai-gorx mbuo gorngv, “Yiem naaiv deic-bung-huaang yie mbuo hnangv haaix nor haih lorz duqv ga'naaiv gaux uix ndongc naaic camv nyei mienh beuv?”" 
Matthew15:34 Yesu naaic ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo maaih mbu'ziex norm njuov?” Ninh mbuo dau, “Maaih siec norm njuov caux i ziex dauh mbiauz-dorn hnangv.”" 
Matthew15:35 Yesu ziouc heuc zuangx mienh zueiz jienv wuov ndau. 
Matthew15:36 Ninh zorqv wuov deix siec norm njuov caux wuov deix mbiauz daaih laengz zingh Tin-Hungh. Laengz zingh liuz ziouc maeqv nqoi bun ninh nyei sai-gorx. Sai-gorx mbuo aengx dorh mingh bun zuangx mienh nyanc. 
Matthew15:37 Zuangx mienh nyanc beuv nzengc. Nyanc liuz, sai-gorx mbuo mingh siou zengc wuov deix dapv buangv siec norm ndaan." 
Matthew15:38 Nyanc nyei mienh, daan m'jangc dorn hnangv, maaih biei cin laanh. M'sieqv dorn caux fu'jueiv maiv funx." 
Matthew15:39 Yesu heuc zuangx mienh nzuonx nzengc. Ninh ziouc bieqc nzangv mingh Maa^gaa^ndaan Deic-Bung. 
Matthew16:1 Maaih deix Faa^li^si Mienh caux Saa^ndu^si Mienh daaih seix Yesu. Ninh mbuo ziouc tov ninh zoux norm jangx-hoc bun cing ninh horpc Tin-Hungh nyei hnyouv. 
Matthew16:2 Mv baac Yesu dau, “Mba'hnoi aav lamh muotv nyei ziangh hoc, meih mbuo buatc yangh horh siqv cuotv ziouc gorngv, ‘Njang hnoi lungh hlorngx aav loh!’" 
Matthew16:3 Lungh ndorm-nziouv meih mbuo buatc yangh horh siqv caux mbuonx-jieqv cuotv ziouc gorngv, ‘Ih hnoi haih maaih mbiungc-nziaaux aqv.’ Meih mbuo haih samx duqv cuotv lungh nyei setv zeiv mv baac ih jaax nyei jangx-hoc meih mbuo samx maiv haih cuotv." 
Matthew16:4 Ih jaax nyei mienh waaic haic, maaih hieh hnyouv. Meih mbuo tov jangx-hoc mv baac cuotv liuz Yonaa nyei jangx-hoc, maiv bun ganh norm meih mbuo mangc aqv.” Yesu ziouc leih ninh mbuo mingh ganh norm dorngx mi'aqv." 
Matthew16:5 Sai-gorx mbuo jiex wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv-dorn ninh mbuo la'kuqv, maiv dorh njuov mingh." 
Matthew16:6 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Oix zuqc faix fim, mbungh jienv Faa^li^si Mienh caux Saa^ndu^si Mienh nyei bingv.”" 
Matthew16:7 Sai-gorx mbuo laanh caux laanh gorngv, “Sai-Diex hnangv naaiv nor gorngv se laaix mbuo maiv dorh njuov daaih.”" 
Matthew16:8 Yesu hiuv duqv ninh mbuo hnangv haaix nor gorngv ziouc naaic, “Meih mbuo sienx duqv hei haic. Weic haaix diuc laanh caux laanh gorngv maiv maaih njuov?" 
Matthew16:9 Meih mbuo corc maiv gaengh mengh baeqc? Meih mbuo maiv jangx yie zorqv biaa norm njuov bun biaa cin mienh nyanc, meih mbuo aengx siou zengc njiec nyei mbu'ziex ndaan?" 
Matthew16:10 Aengx maaih wuov nzunc yie longc siec norm njuov uix biei cin dauh. Zengc njiec nyei meih mbuo siou duqv mbu'ziex ndaan? 
Matthew16:11 Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc maiv mengh baeqc yie maiv zeiz gorngv njuov. Yie gorngv oix zuqc mbungh Faa^li^si caux Saa^ndu^si Mienh nyei bingv hnangv.” 
Matthew16:12 Sai-gorx mbuo ziouc mengh baeqc Yesu maiv zeiz gorngv oix zuqc mbungh hietv njuov nyei bingv. Oix zuqc mbungh Faa^li^si caux Saa^ndu^si Mienh njaaux nyei waac. 
Matthew16:13 Yesu aengx mingh Si^saa^li^yaa Fi^lipv^poi Zingh nyei deic-jaaix. Yiem wuov Yesu naaic ninh nyei sai-gorx, “Mienh gorngv yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, dongh haaix dauh?”" 
Matthew16:14 Ninh mbuo dau, “Maaih deix gorngv meih dongh tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov dauh Yo^han. Maaih deix gorngv, E^li^yaa. Aengx maaih deix gorngv Ye^le^mi fai yietc dauh douc waac mienh.”" 
Matthew16:15 Yesu aengx naaic ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo ni? Meih mbuo gorngv yie dongh haaix dauh?”" 
Matthew16:16 Simon Bide dau, “Meih dongh Giduc, ziangh jienv wuov dauh Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn.”" 
Matthew16:17 Yesu dau, “Yo^han nyei dorn, Simon, aah! Meih gengh orn-lorqc aqv. Naaiv maiv zeiz haaix dauh baamh mienh mbuox meih. Se yie nyei tin-dorngh Diex ganh bun meih hiuv hnangv." 
Matthew16:18 Yie ziouc mbuox meih, meih se Bide. Yie oix liepc yie nyei jiu-baang yiem naaiv norm la'bieiv gu'nguaaic. Daic nyei qaqv yietc liuz maiv haih hingh jiu-baang." 
Matthew16:19 Yie oix jiu Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv nyei forv-zeih bun meih. Meih yiem naaiv lungh ndiev ndoh haaix nyungc, yiem wuov tin-dorngh wuov nyungc yaac zuqc ndoh aqv. Meih yiem naaiv lungh ndiev bungx haaix nyungc, yiem wuov tin-dorngh ziouc bungx wuov nyungc aqv.”" 
Matthew16:20 Yesu aengx hatc sai-gorx mbuo maiv dungx mbuox haaix dauh ninh zoux Giduc. 
Matthew16:21 Yiem naaic daaih, Yesu jiez gorn gorngv mengh mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx, “Yie oix zuqc mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh, yiem mienh gox caux sai mienh bieiv caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng nyei buoz-ndiev zuqc siouc camv-nyungc kouv. Yie ziouc zuqc daix daic mv baac da'faam hnoi Tin-Hungh oix bun yie nangh daaih.”" 
Matthew16:22 Bide ziouc ken Yesu mingh pien deix kuinx ninh, “Ziouv aah! Tov Tin-Hungh cin-maanc maiv dungx bun naaiv deix sic cuotv. Meih yietc liuz maiv zuqc buangh naaiv deix sic.”" 
Matthew16:23 Yesu huin nzuonx gorngv Bide, “Saadaan aah! Biaux nqoi maah! Meih kungx laanh jienv yie hnangv. Meih hnamv nyei sic se maiv zeiz hnangv Tin-Hungh hnamv. Se hnangv baamh mienh hnamv hnangv.”" 
Matthew16:24 Yesu ziouc mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo, “Haaix dauh oix gan yie mingh oix zuqc siev jienv ninh ganh, ndaam jienv ninh nyei ziepc nzaangc jaax gan yie mingh." 
Matthew16:25 Haaix dauh kungx hnamv njoux ninh ganh nyei maengc hnangv, wuov dauh nyei maengc ziouc zuqc guangc. Mv baac haaix dauh weic yie guangc ninh nyei maengc, wuov dauh ziouc duqv maengc ziangh aqv." 
Matthew16:26 Haaix dauh duqv nzengc lungh ndiev nyei ga'naaiv, mv baac zuqc guangc ninh nyei maengc, ninh duqv wuov deix ga'naaiv zoux cuotv haaix nyungc? Maiv lamh longc yietc deix. Ninh maaih haaix nyungc haih tiuv duqv ninh nyei maengc nzuonx?" 
Matthew16:27 Weic zuqc yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, oix yiem yie nyei Die nyei njang-laangc gu'nyuoz yaac caux jienv yie nyei fin-mienh daaih. Daaih wuov zanc yie ziux gorqv-mienh zoux nyei sic bun zingh nyeic ninh mbuo." 
Matthew16:28 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, souv jienv naaiv nyei mienh maaih deix zungv maiv gaengh daic ziouc duqv buatc yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, daaih zoux hungh.”" 
Matthew17:1 Jiex liuz juqv hnoi, Yesu dorh jienv Bide, Yaagorpc caux Yaagorpc nyei youz, Yo^han, faaux norm mbong-hlang, lengh nyei dorngx." 
Matthew17:2 Sai-gorx mbuo mangc jienv Yesu wuov zanc, buatc Yesu tiuv nzengc fangx zeiv mi'aqv. Ninh nyei hmien hnangv mba'hnoi nor njang. Ninh nyei lui-houx yaac njang haic, mbopv baeqc nyei, zaengh zaengh wuov." 
Matthew17:3 Naaiv deix buo dauh sai-gorx aengx buatc Mose caux E^li^yaa hinc cuotv daaih caux Yesu gorngv waac. 
Matthew17:4 Bide ziouc gorngv mbuox Yesu, “Ziouv aah! Yie mbuo yiem naaiv gengh longx haic. Se gorngv Ziouv oix nor, yie zoux buo norm liuh. Zoux norm bun meih, zoux norm bun Mose, aengx zoux norm bun E^li^yaa.”" 
Matthew17:5 Bide corc gorngv jienv waac wuov zanc, maaih dorv mbuonx njang nyei daaih om jienv ninh mbuo. Aengx maaih qiex yiem wuov mbuonx gorngv, “Naaiv se yie nyei Dorn-hnamv. Yie a'hneiv haic ninh. Muangx ninh maah!”" 
Matthew17:6 Sai-gorx mbuo haiz naaiv deix qiex, ninh mbuo za'gengh! gamh nziex haic, ziouc mbaapv njiec ndau mingh." 
Matthew17:7 Yesu mingh hluo ninh mbuo yaac gorngv, “Jiez sin daaih, maiv dungx gamh nziex.”" 
Matthew17:8 Ninh mbuo ziouc cau hmien mangc, maiv buatc haaix dauh. Kungx buatc Yesu yiem wuov hnangv." 
Matthew17:9 Yiem mbong njiec wuov zanc, Yesu naeqc waac sai-gorx mbuo. Ninh gorngv, “Cin-maanc maiv dungx gorngv naaiv deix hinc yaangh nyei sic. Zuov yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, daic mingh, Tin-Hungh aengx bun yie nangh daaih cingx daaih gorngv.”" 
Matthew17:10 Sai-gorx mbuo naaic Yesu, “Njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng weic haaix diuc gorngv E^li^yaa oix zuqc daaih ndaangc?”" 
Matthew17:11 Yesu dau, “E^li^yaa za'gengh oix daaih liuc leiz ziangx nyungc-nyungc hnangv loz wuov nor." 
Matthew17:12 Mv baac yie mbuox meih mbuo, E^li^yaa zungv daaih liuz aqv. Mienh yaac zieqv maiv duqv ninh, sueih eix zoux bun ninh. Yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, yaac fih hnangv nyei oix zuqc mienh zoux doqc hoic.”" 
Matthew17:13 Dongh wuov zanc sai-gorx mbuo cingx daaih mengh baeqc Yesu gorngv nyei waac gorngv zuqc tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov dauh Yo^han. 
Matthew17:14 Ninh mbuo nzuonx taux zuangx mienh wuov, maaih laanh mienh daaih lorz Yesu, gueic njiec Yesu nyei nza'hmien" 
Matthew17:15 yaac gorngv, “Domh Gorx aac, tov korv-lienh yie nyei dorn. Ninh butv dungz-ndin, ciou duqv kouv haic, zanc-zanc king bieqc douz-nzauc yaac ndortv wuom." 
Matthew17:16 Yie dorh ninh daaih lorz meih nyei sai-gorx mv baac ninh mbuo maiv haih zorc maiv longx.” 
Matthew17:17 Yesu dau, “Meih mbuo ih jaax nyei mienh aah! Meih mbuo za'gengh maiv sienx, m'normh yaac hoz haic. Yie oix zuqc caux meih mbuo yiem ndongc haaix lauh? Yie oix zuqc nyienz duqv meih mbuo taux haaix zanc? Dorh wuov dauh dorn daaih yie naaiv maah!”" 
Matthew17:18 Yesu hatc mienv, mienv ziouc cuotv mi'aqv. Wuov dauh dorn liemh zeih longx nzengc mi'aqv." 
Matthew17:19 Nqa'haav sai-gorx mbuo daaih bingx jienv naaic Yesu, “Yie mbuo weic haaix diuc zunc wuov dauh mienv maiv cuotv?”" 
Matthew17:20 Yesu dau, “Se weic zuqc meih mbuo nyei sienx fim faix haic. Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, se gorngv meih mbuo nyei sienx fim lomh yietc norm lai-jaaix nyim nor, meih mbuo haih mbuox naaiv norm mbong, ‘Yiem naaiv suiv mingh yiem wuov maah!’ Mbong ziouc suiv aqv. Maiv maaih haaix nyungc meih mbuo maiv haih zoux." 
Matthew17:21 Mv baac kungx maaih nduqc nyungc za'eix hnangv haih zunc naaiv nyungc mienv cuotv. Oix zuqc daux gaux, yaac zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc cingx daaih haih zunc duqv cuotv.”" 
Matthew17:22 Sai-gorx mbuo yietc zungv daaih gapv zunv yiem Gaa^li^li Saengv wuov zanc, Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, zungv oix zuqc jiu bun mienh." 
Matthew17:23 Ninh mbuo oix daix yie, mv baac nqa'haav buo hnoi Tin-Hungh aengx bun yie nangh daaih.” Sai-gorx mbuo haiz ninh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv ziouc nzauh haic." 
Matthew17:24 Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo mingh taux Kaa^be^naa^um Mungv wuov zanc, siou zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei nzou-zinh wuov deix mienh daaih naaic Bide, “Meih nyei sai-diex maiv cuotv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei nzou-zinh fai?”" 
Matthew17:25 Bide dau, “Cuotv nyei.” Bide bieqc biauv mingh wuov zanc, Yesu zungv gorngv ndaangc mi'aqv. Ninh naaic, “Simon aac, meih hnangv haaix nor hnamv? Haaix dauh oix zuqc cuotv laangh zinh caux nzou-zinh bun naaiv baamh gen nyei hungh diex? Se ganh nyei dorn fai baeqc fingx?”" 
Matthew17:26 Bide dau, “Baeqc fingx cuotv.” Yesu gorngv, “Wuov nyungc, ninh ganh nyei dorn maiv zuqc cuotv." 
Matthew17:27 Mv baac mbuo maiv oix ziqc zuiz naaiv deix mienh. Meih mingh wuov koiv-dorn mbatc mbiauz. Mbatc duqv daauh dauh mbiauz, ziouc maeqv nqoi mbiauz nyei nzuih, buatc norm zinh, dorh mingh bun ninh mbuo gaux meih caux yie cuotv nyei nzou-zinh.”" 
Matthew18:1 Wuov zanc sai-gorx mbuo daaih naaic Yesu, “Yiem Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv, haaix dauh duqv zoux gauh hlo jiex?”" 
Matthew18:2 Yesu ziouc heuc dauh fu'jueiv daaih bun ninh souv jienv ninh mbuo nyei mbu'ndongx 
Matthew18:3 yaac gorngv, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, cuotv liuz meih mbuo goiv hnyouv ziouc hnangv fu'jueiv nor, meih mbuo yietc liuz maiv duqv bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv." 
Matthew18:4 Haaix dauh nyiemc ganh zoux faix hnangv naaiv dauh fu'jueiv, yiem Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv dongh naaiv dauh zoux hlo jiex." 
Matthew18:5 Haaix dauh dengv yie nyei mbuox zipv dauh fu'jueiv hnangv naaiv dauh fu'jueiv nor, wuov dauh yaac zipv yie." 
Matthew18:6 “Mv baac se gorngv haaix dauh nduov yietc dauh naaiv deix sienx yie nyei fu'jueiv-faix baamz zuiz, oix zuqc zorqv domh morc ndiux jienv wuov dauh nyei jaang bungx njiec koiv, ndo nyei dorngx, ziemx daic gauh longx." 
Matthew18:7 Laaix nduov mienh baamz zuiz nyei sic, baamh gen ziouc zuqc kouv aqv. Nduov mienh nyei sic zanc-zanc oix cuotv, mv baac zoux gorn nduov mienh wuov dauh zungv oix zuqc kouv aqv." 
Matthew18:8 “Se gorngv meih nyei buoz fai zaux nduov meih baamz zuiz, oix zuqc hngaqv guangc. Waaic deix fangx fai zoqc jieqv buoz-zaux mv baac duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc corc gauh longx maaih i jieqv buoz i jieqv zaux mv baac zuqc zoi bieqc yietc liuz zieqc jienv nyei douz." 
Matthew18:9 Se gorngv meih nyei m'zing nduov meih baamz zuiz, oix zuqc gueix guangc mingh. Zoqc norm m'zing mv baac duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc corc gauh longx maaih i norm m'zing yaac zuqc zoi bieqc deic nyuoqc nyei douz." 
Matthew18:10 “Oix zuqc faix fim, maiv dungx mangc piex yietc dauh naaiv deix faix nyei fu'jueiv. Yie mbuox meih mbuo, naaiv deix fu'jueiv nyei fin-mienh yiem tin-dorngh, zanc-zanc yiem yie nyei tin-dorngh Diex nyei nza'hmien." 
Matthew18:11 Weic zuqc yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, daaih njoux dingx laaih nyei mienh." 
Matthew18:12 “Meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor hnamv? Se gorngv maaih laanh mienh maaih yietc baeqv dauh ba'gi yungh, dingx laaih dauh, ninh hnangv haaix nor zoux? Ninh maiv zeiz guangc jienv wuov deix juov ziepc juov dauh yiem wuov mbong nyanc miev, aengx mingh lorz dingx laaih wuov dauh fai?" 
Matthew18:13 Yie mbuox zien meih mbuo, lorz buatc naaiv dauh ba'gi yungh, ninh a'hneiv haic. Gauh a'hneiv jiex wuov deix juov ziepc juov dauh maiv dingx laaih nyei ba'gi yungh." 
Matthew18:14 Fih hnangv nyei, meih mbuo nyei tin-dorngh Diex maiv oix yietc dauh naaiv deix faix nyei fu'jueiv dingx laaih." 
Matthew18:15 “Se gorngv meih nyei gorx-youz zoux dorngc meih, meih ganh oix zuqc mingh lorz ninh, bingx jienv mbuox ninh, ninh zoux dorngc nyei sic. Se gorngv ninh muangx meih nyei waac nor, meih ziouc duqv ninh aengx zoux gorx-youz." 
Matthew18:16 Se gorngv ninh maiv muangx, meih ziouc oix zuqc lorz jienv yietc dauh fai i dauh caux meih mingh tengx muangx waac ziouc haih zorqv joux-joux waac zoux zorng-zengx." 
Matthew18:17 Se gorngv wuov dauh corc maiv muangx ninh mbuo nor, oix zuqc zorqv naaiv deix sic mbuox nzengc jiu-baang. Ninh corc maiv kangv muangx jiu-baang nor, oix zuqc funx ninh se hnangv maiv sienx nyei mienh fai tengx Lomaa hungh jaa siou nzou nyei mienh." 
Matthew18:18 “Yie mbuox zien meih mbuo, meih mbuo yiem baamh gen ndoh haaix nyungc, yiem wuov tin-dorngh wuov nyungc yaac zuqc ndoh aqv. Meih mbuo yiem baamh gen bungx haaix nyungc, yiem wuov tin-dorngh yaac bungx wuov nyungc aqv." 
Matthew18:19 “Yie aengx mbuox meih mbuo, se gorngv meih mbuo yiem naaiv baamh gen maaih i laanh mienh dongh hnyouv gapv eix daux gaux tov haaix nyungc, yie nyei tin-dorngh Diex zungv weic meih mbuo zoux ziangx nzengc." 
Matthew18:20 Weic zuqc maiv gunv yiem haaix norm dorngx, maaih i buo laanh mienh dengv yie nyei mbuox gapv zunv, yie ziouc yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx.”" 
Matthew18:21 Bide aengx daaih naaic gaax Yesu, “Ziouv aac, se gorngv yie nyei gorx-youz zanc-zanc dorngc yie, yie oix zuqc guangc mbu'ziex nzunc bun ninh? Taux siec nzunc aqv fai?”" 
Matthew18:22 Yesu dau, “Yie maiv zeiz gorngv guangc siec nzunc hnangv. Oix zuqc guangc cietv ziepc nyei siec nzunc." 
Matthew18:23 “Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh se hnangv naaiv. Maaih dauh hungh diex oix caux ninh nyei bou funx zaeqv. 
Matthew18:24 Funx jienv zaeqv wuov zanc, mienh dorh dauh bou bieqc daaih. Wuov dauh bou qiemx hungh diex ziex baeqv waanc norm zinh," 
Matthew18:25 yaac maiv maaih nyaanh jaauv. Hungh diex ziouc heuc mienh dorh wuov dauh bou mingh maaic bun mienh zoux nouh. Liemh ninh nyei auv-jueiv caux ninh maaih nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv dorh mingh maaic nzengc, daaih jaauv sung zaeqv." 
Matthew18:26 “Wuov dauh bou ziouc gueic njiec qaqv tov ninh, ‘Tov ziouv sie yie, zuov yie lorz duqv daaih, yie gengh oix zuqc jaauv taux sung nzengc.’" 
Matthew18:27 Wuov dauh bou nyei ziouv korv-lienh haic ninh ziouc guangc ninh nyei zaeqv, bungx ninh nzuonx mi'aqv." 
Matthew18:28 “Naaic dauh bou cuotv mingh yaac buangh zuqc dauh zoux bou doic. Naaiv dauh bou qiemx ninh i ziex norm zinh hnangv, mv baac ninh liemh zeih goh jienv naaiv dauh nyei jaang yaac gorngv, ‘Gaanv jaauv meih qiemx yie nyei zaeqv maah!’" 
Matthew18:29 Wuov dauh zoux bou doic ziouc gueic njiec qaqv tov ninh, ‘Tov meih sie yie, yie gengh jaauv nyei lorqc.’" 
Matthew18:30 Mv baac ninh maiv kangv, yaac dorh wuov dauh bou mingh wuonx jienv loh zuov ninh jaauv sung zaeqv." 
Matthew18:31 “Aengx maaih deix lomh nzoih zoux bou doic buatc naaiv deix sic cuotv, haiz hnyouv maiv longx yietc deix, ziouc mingh mbuox ninh mbuo nyei ziouv." 
Matthew18:32 Wuov dauh bou nyei ziouv ziouc heuc ninh daaih yaac gorngv, ‘Meih naaic dauh waaic haic nyei nouh gauv aah! Meih qaqv tov yie, yie ziouc guangc nzengc meih qiemx yie nyei zaeqv." 
Matthew18:33 Meih horpc zuqc korv-lienh meih nyei zoux bou doic hnangv yie korv-lienh meih nor saa.’ 
Matthew18:34 Ninh nyei ziouv qiex jiez! haic ziouc heuc gunv loh jien dorh naaiv dauh bou mingh zeix taux ninh jaauv sung zaeqv.” 
Matthew18:35 Yesu aengx gorngv setv mueiz waac. “Se gorngv meih mbuo mouz laanh mienh maiv longc hnyouv guangc gorx-youz zoux dorngc meih mbuo nyei sic, yie nyei tin-dorngh Diex yaac fih hnangv nyei maiv guangc bun meih mbuo.”" 
Matthew19:1 Yesu gorngv liuz naaiv deix waac ziouc cuotv Gaa^li^li Saengv mingh Yu^ndie Saengv jiex wuov ngaanc ziqc Jor^ndaen Ndaaih. 
Matthew19:2 Mienh camv haic gan jienv Yesu mingh, ninh ziouc yiem wuov zorc longx ninh mbuo nyei baengc." 
Matthew19:3 Maaih deix Faa^li^si Mienh daaih seix Yesu ziouc naaic, “Maiv gunv nqox weic haaix nyungc gorn-baengx leih ninh nyei auv, se horpc mbuo nyei leiz fai?”" 
Matthew19:4 Yesu dau, “Meih mbuo maiv doqc jiex naaiv douc Ging-Sou fai? ‘Zinh ndaangc Tin-Hungh zeix lungh zeix ndau wuov zanc, ninh zeix cuotv mienh daaih benx m'jangc m'sieqv.’" 
Matthew19:5 Tin-Hungh yaac gorngv, ‘Weic naaiv m'jangc dorn dorng jaa, leih ninh nyei diex maac, caux ninh nyei auv gapv jienv. I dauh ziouc benx yietc norm sin mi'aqv." 
Matthew19:6 Hnangv naaic ninh mbuo maiv zeiz i dauh aqv. Benx yietc dauh hnangv. Weic naaiv, Tin-Hungh gapv daaih nyei cai-doix, mienh maiv dungx caeqv nqoi.”" 
Matthew19:7 Faa^li^si Mienh aengx naaic Yesu, “Wuov nyungc, Mose weic haaix diuc mbuox nqox bun zeiv leih cai sou ninh nyei auv ziouc heuc auv mingh aqv?”" 
Matthew19:8 Yesu dau, “Se laaix meih mbuo hnyouv ngaengc haic Mose cingx daaih bun meih mbuo haih leih duqv meih mbuo nyei auv. Mv baac zinh ndaangc, zeix lungh zeix ndau wuov zanc, maiv zeiz hnangv naaic." 
Matthew19:9 Yie mbuox meih mbuo, haaix dauh leih ninh nyei auv, yaac maiv zeiz laaix ninh nyei auv hienx nqox nor, aengx mingh longc siang-auv, ninh se hienx auv hnangv.”" 
Matthew19:10 Sai-gorx mbuo gorngv mbuox Yesu, “Se gorngv longc auv longc nqox nyei jauv hnangv naaic nor, yietc liuz maiv dungx longc gauh longx.”" 
Matthew19:11 Yesu dau, “Naaiv deix njaaux nyei waac, maiv zeiz dauh dauh haih ei jienv zoux. Kungx dongh duqv Tin-Hungh nyei en nyei mienh haih ei jienv zoux hnangv." 
Matthew19:12 Weic zuqc maaih camv-diuc jauv bun mienh maiv haih dorng jaa. Maaih deix cuotv seix ziangh ziouc maiv haih dorng jaa. Maaih deix zuqc mienh im dov mingh. Maaih deix weic zoux Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv nyei gong maiv dorng jaa. Haaix dauh haih ei jienv naaiv deix waac, oix zuqc ei jienv zoux aqv.”" 
Matthew19:13 Maaih deix mienh dorh fu'jueiv daaih lorz Yesu, oix Yesu maan jienv ninh mbuo, tengx ninh mbuo daux gaux. Mv baac sai-gorx mbuo gorngv-hemx naaiv deix mienh." 
Matthew19:14 Yesu gorngv, “Gunv bun fu'jueiv daaih lorz yie, maiv dungx laanh ninh mbuo saa. Weic zuqc haaix dauh longc Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv ninh, wuov dauh se hnangv naaiv deix fu'jueiv nor.”" 
Matthew19:15 Yesu maan liuz naaiv deix fu'jueiv ninh ziouc mingh mi'aqv. 
Matthew19:16 Maaih nzunc maaih dauh mienh daaih naaic Yesu, “Fin-Saeng aac, yie horpc zuqc zoux haaix nyungc longx nyei sic cingx duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc?”" 
Matthew19:17 Yesu dau, “Meih weic haaix diuc naaic yie taux longx nyei sic? Kungx maaih nduqc dauh longx hnangv. Se gorngv meih oix duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc, oix zuqc ei jienv leiz-latc zoux.”" 
Matthew19:18 Wuov dauh naaic, “Haaix deix leiz-latc?” Yesu dau, “Maiv dungx daix mienh, maiv dungx hienx auv, maiv dungx zoux zaqc yaac maiv dungx zoux jaav zorng-zengx." 
Matthew19:19 Oix zuqc tongx nimc meih nyei diex maac, yaac hnamv mienh hnangv hnamv ganh nor.”" 
Matthew19:20 Wuov dauh mienh lunx mienh gorngv, “Naaiv deix yietc zungv nyei leiz yie muangx nzengc aqv. Aengx caa haaix nyungc oix zuqc zoux fai?”" 
Matthew19:21 Yesu mbuox ninh, “Se gorngv meih oix zoux dunh yunh nyei mienh, oix zuqc mingh maaic nzengc meih maaih nyei ga'naaiv, zorqv wuov deix nyaanh bun mienh jomc mienh. Hnangv naaiv meih ziouc maaih jaaix nyei ga'naaiv siou jienv wuov tin-dorngh. Zoux liuz, daaih gan yie oc.”" 
Matthew19:22 Wuov dauh mienh lunx mienh haiz naaiv deix waac, ninh ziang naaic nzauh nzauh nyei mingh mi'aqv, weic zuqc ninh maaih jaa-dingh hoz haic." 
Matthew19:23 Yesu aengx gorngv mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, butv-zoih mienh aqc duqv bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv." 
Matthew19:24 Yie aengx gorngv nzunc mbuox meih mbuo, lorh torh cunx jiex sim-mbiuic corc gauh hungh hec butv-zoih mienh bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv.”" 
Matthew19:25 Sai-gorx mbuo haiz liuz naaiv deix waac ninh mbuo mbuoqc horngh haic aqv. Ninh mbuo naaic gaax, “Wuov nyungc, haaix dauh haih duqv njoux?”" 
Matthew19:26 Yesu mangc jienv ninh mbuo yaac gorngv, “Mienh maiv haih njoux ganh mv baac maanc sic Tin-Hungh haih zoux duqv nyei.”" 
Matthew19:27 Bide ziouc gorngv, “Sai-Diex aah! Yie mbuo guangc nzengc nyungc-nyungc daaih gan meih. Wuov nyungc, yie mbuo haih duqv haaix nyungc?”" 
Matthew19:28 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, maaih siang-lungh siang-ndau wuov zanc, yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, zueiz jienv yie njang-laangc nyei weic nyei ziangh hoc, meih mbuo gan yie nyei mienh ziouc duqv zueiz jienv ziepc nyeic norm weic siemv wuov deix ziepc nyeic fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh." 
Matthew19:29 Haaix dauh weic yie guangc ninh nyei biauv, muoz-doic, diex maac, fu'jueiv fai lingh deic, wuov dauh guangc yietc gouv ziouc duqv yietc baeqv gouv yaac duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc." 
Matthew19:30 Mv baac maaih zoux hlo nyei mienh camv oix zuqc zoux faix. Zoux faix nyei maaih camv yaac duqv zoux hlo. 
Matthew20:1 “Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh se hnangv dauh a'ngunc huingx nyei ziouv nor. Lungh ndorm nziouv nyei, ninh cuotv mingh lorz mienh tengx ninh zoux a'ngunc huingx nyei gong." 
Matthew20:2 Caux gong-mienh dingc ziangx bun horpc mienh pou-tong cingv yietc hnoi nyei gong-zinh, huingx-ziouv ziouc paaiv ninh mbuo mingh wuov huingx zoux gong." 
Matthew20:3 “Lungh domh ndorm nduoh norm ziangh hoc, huingx-ziouv aengx mingh wuov hei buatc deix mienh souv jienv wuov, maiv zoux haaix nyungc." 
Matthew20:4 Ninh ziouc gorngv, ‘Meih mbuo yaac mingh yie nyei huingx zoux gong maah! Gong-zinh horpc zuqc mbu'ziex yie ziouc bun mbuoqc wuov meih mbuo.’ Ninh mbuo ziouc mingh aqv." 
Matthew20:5 “Lungh ziangx aanx ziepc nyeic norm ziangh hoc, aengx caux njiec aanx buo norm ziangh hoc, ninh fih hnangv nyei lorz mienh zoux gong." 
Matthew20:6 Lungh maanz-hmuangx deix, aav lamh biaa norm ziangh hoc, huingx-ziouv aengx mingh wuov hei buatc deix mienh souv jienv wuov. Ninh ziouc gorngv, ‘Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc ziangh hnoi souv jienv naaic henh henh nyei, maiv zoux haaix nyungc?’" 
Matthew20:7 “Ninh mbuo dau, ‘Weic zuqc maiv maaih mienh cingv yie mbuo zoux gong.’ “Huingx-ziouv ziouc gorngv, ‘Wuov nyungc, meih mbuo yaac mingh wuov huingx zoux gong maah!’" 
Matthew20:8 “Aav lamh hmuangx, huingx-ziouv mbuox ninh nyei gunv gong mienh, ‘Heuc gong-mienh daaih koi gong-zinh bun ninh mbuo aqv. Dongh daaih zoux nqa'haav wuov deix oix zuqc bun ndaangc. Daaih ndaangc wuov deix oix zuqc bun nqa'haav.’" 
Matthew20:9 “Dongh biaa norm ziangh hoc cingx duqv jiez gorn zoux gong wuov deix duqv buangv yietc hnoi nyei gong-zinh. 
Matthew20:10 Hnangv naaic, cingv ndaangc wuov deix laaic oix duqv gauh camv. Mv baac ninh mbuo fih hnangv nyei duqv buangv yietc hnoi nyei gong-zinh hnangv." 
Matthew20:11 Ninh mbuo zipv gong-zinh mingh yaac ngopv huingx-ziouv. 
Matthew20:12 Ninh mbuo gorngv, ‘Nqa'haav daaih wuov deix kungx zoux nduqc norm ziangh hoc nyei gong hnangv niaa. Nyaanh meih corc bun caux yie mbuo fih mbuoqc nyei. Yie mbuo ziangh hnoi zuqc nyutc pui yaac zoux gong gauh kouv ninh mbuo.’" 
Matthew20:13 “Huingx-ziouv ziouc dau dauh wuov deix gong-mienh. ‘Youz aac, yie maiv zeiz pienx meih lorqc. Meih maiv zeiz caux yie gorngv dingc ziux gong-hnoi nyei gong-zinh fai?" 
Matthew20:14 Dorh jienv meih nyei gong-zinh nzuonx aqv oc. Nqa'haav cingv naaiv dauh yie oix bun caux meih fih mbuoqc. 
Matthew20:15 Yie ganh nyei nyaanh maiv zeiz sueih yie ganh longc? Buatc yie zoux hnyouv longx meih mueic jieqv fai?’+” 
Matthew20:16 Yesu aengx gorngv setv mueiz waac. “Hnangv naaic, nqa'haav wuov deix oix duqv yiem wuov ndaangc. Yiem wuov ndaangc nyei oix zuqc yiem nqa'haav.”" 
Matthew20:17 Yesu yangh jauv mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh wuov zanc, ninh dorh ninh nyei ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx mingh pien deix gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo," 
Matthew20:18 “Muangx oc. Mbuo mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh. Taux wuov, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, ziouc zuqc jiu bun sai mienh bieiv caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng. Ninh mbuo oix dingc daix ninh," 
Matthew20:19 nqa'haav zorqv ninh jiu bun Janx. Janx ziouc guatc doqc jatv, longc biaav-bin mborqv, aengx zorqv ninh ding ziepc nzaangc jaax. Mv baac nqa'haav buo hnoi, Tin-Hungh oix bun ninh nangh daaih.”" 
Matthew20:20 Wuov zanc Se^mbe^ndi nyei auv dorh ninh nyei i dauh dorn daaih Yesu wuov, gueic njiec baaix, tov yietc nyungc." 
Matthew20:21 Yesu naaic, “Meih oix longc haaix nyungc?” Ninh dau, “Ziouv aac, tov meih laengz meih duqv zoux hungh nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc bun yie nyei i dauh dorn, yietc dauh zueiz meih nyei mbiaauc maengx, yietc dauh zueiz zaaix maengx.”" 
Matthew20:22 Yesu dau wuov deix i dauh dorn, “Meih mbuo tov nyei meih mbuo maiv hiuv. Meih mbuo haih hopv dongh yie oix zuqc hopv wuov norm zaanv nyei fai?” Ninh mbuo dau, “Yie mbuo haih hopv nyei.”" 
Matthew20:23 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie hopv nyei zaanv meih mbuo za'gengh oix zuqc hopv. Mv baac yie maiv maaih leiz paaiv haaix dauh zueiz yie nyei mbiaauc maengx fai zaaix maengx. Yie nyei Die liuc leiz ziangx bun haaix dauh zueiz, wuov deix ziouc duqv zueiz aqv.”" 
Matthew20:24 Wuov deix ziepc dauh sai-gorx haiz liuz naaiv deix sic ziouc qiex jiez haic naaiv deix i muoz. 
Matthew20:25 Yesu heuc ninh mbuo yietc zungv daaih nzoih yaac gorngv, “Meih mbuo hiuv duqv Janx maaih domh jien gunv ninh mbuo. Zoux hlo nyei wuov deix maaih lingc hatc ninh mbuo." 
Matthew20:26 Mv baac meih mbuo maiv horpc zuqc hnangv naaic. Haaix dauh oix duqv zoux hlo, wuov dauh oix zuqc zoux meih mbuo nyei bou." 
Matthew20:27 Haaix dauh oix zoux hlo jiex, wuov dauh oix zuqc zoux meih mbuo nyei nouh." 
Matthew20:28 Hnangv yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn nor, yie maiv zeiz daaih oix mienh fu-sux yie. Yie daaih fu-sux mienh yaac siev yie nyei maengc weic zuoqc mienh camv nzuonx.”" 
Matthew20:29 Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo cuotv Ye^li^ko Zingh wuov zanc, maaih mienh camv nyei gan jienv Yesu mingh." 
Matthew20:30 Maaih i dauh m'zing maengh nyei mienh zueiz jienv jauv-hlen haiz gorngv Yesu yangh naaiv diuh jauv jiex. Ninh mbuo ziouc heuc, “Ziouv, Ndaawitv nyei Zeiv-Fun aah! Korv-lienh yie mbuo maah!”" 
Matthew20:31 Zuangx mienh hemx ninh mbuo, mbuox ninh mbuo maiv dungx ko lo. Mv baac ninh mbuo jaa heuc gauh mbui, “Ziouv, Ndaawitv nyei Zeiv-Fun aah! Korv-lienh yie mbuo maah!”" 
Matthew20:32 Yesu ziouc dingh jienv heuc ninh mbuo daaih, naaic ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo oix yie tengx haaix nyungc meih mbuo?”" 
Matthew20:33 Ninh mbuo dau, “Ziouv aah! Tov bun yie mbuo nyei m'zing haih mangc duqv buatc.”" 
Matthew20:34 Yesu korv-lienh haic ziouc hluo ninh mbuo nyei m'zing. Ninh mbuo liemh zeih haih mangc duqv buatc, ziouc gan jienv Yesu mingh mi'aqv." 
Matthew21:1 Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mingh taux fatv deix Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh. Yiem Ga'lanv Mbong, Mbetc^faa^yi wuov norm laangz, Yesu ziouc paaiv i dauh sai-gorx mingh ndaangc," 
Matthew21:2 mbuox ziangx ninh mbuo, “Oix zuqc mingh nza'hmien wuov norm laangz. Yietv bieqc laangz ziouc buatc dauh maaz-li nyeiz ndoh jienv wuov, aengx caux ninh nyei dorn. Oix zuqc jaiv ken daaih bun yie." 
Matthew21:3 Se gorngv haaix dauh gorngv haaix nyungc, oix zuqc mbuox ninh, ‘Ziouv qiemx zuqc longc ninh mbuo.’ Maali nyei ziouv ziouc liemh zeih bun meih mbuo ken jienv daaih.”" 
Matthew21:4 Naaiv deix sic cuotv daaih weic bun doix nzengc zinh ndaangc douc waac mienh gorngv nyei waac. Ninh gorngv," 
Matthew21:5 “Oix zuqc mbuox Si^on Zingh nyei mienh, ‘Mangc maah! Meih mbuo nyei hungh daaih meih mbuo naaiv. Ninh hnyouv suonc nyei, geh jienv maaz-li daaih, geh jienv maaz-li nyei dorn.’+”" 
Matthew21:6 Wuov deix i dauh sai-gorx ziouc mingh ei jienv Yesu mbuox nyei waac zoux. 
Matthew21:7 Ninh mbuo ken maaz-li nyeiz caux ninh nyei dorn daaih, yaac zorqv ninh mbuo nyei domh lui dimc jienv maaz-li nyei diqc daanz. Yesu ziouc geh jienv aqv." 
Matthew21:8 Maaih mienh camv haic longc ninh mbuo nyei domh lui dimc jienv jauv, yaac maaih mienh gaeqv ndiangx-normh yietc dorv yietc dorv nyei dimc jienv." 
Matthew21:9 Mingh ndaangc nyei, caux nqa'haav nyei zuangx mienh lomh nzoih heuc, “Ho^saa^naa! Ceng Ndaawitv nyei Zeiv-Fun. Tov Tin-Hungh ceix fuqv dengv Ziouv nyei mbuox daaih wuov dauh. Ho^saa^naa, ceng yiem hlang jiex nyei dorngx wuov dauh Tin-Hungh.”" 
Matthew21:10 Yesu bieqc Ye^lu^saa^lem wuov zanc, yietc zingh mienh ziouc huaang jiez nzengc daaih, laanh naaic laanh, “Naaiv dauh mienh dongh haaix dauh orqv?”" 
Matthew21:11 Zuangx mienh dau, “Naaiv se yiem Gaa^li^li Saengv, Naa^saa^letv Mungv daaih nyei douc waac mienh, Yesu.”" 
Matthew21:12 Yesu bieqc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv yaac zunc cuotv nzengc yietc zungv maaiz maaic nyei mienh. Ninh bungx king tiuv nyaanh wuov deix mienh nyei dieh caux maaic baeqc gopv wuov deix mienh nyei dangx. 
Matthew21:13 Ninh gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv, ‘Yie nyei biauv, mienh oix heuc zoux daux gaux nyei biauv.’ Mv baac meih mbuo longc zoux ‘janx-zaqc bingx nyei kuotv.’+”" 
Matthew21:14 M'zing maengh caux zaux mbai nyei mienh mingh wuov zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv lorz Yesu, Yesu yaac zorc longx ninh mbuo." 
Matthew21:15 Mv baac sai mienh bieiv caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng buatc Yesu zoux naaiv deix mbuoqc horngh nyei sic, yaac haiz fu'jueiv yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv heuc jienv gorngv, “Ov, ho^saa^naa, ceng Ndaawitv nyei Zeiv-Fun ov!” Ninh mbuo ziouc qiex jiez haic." 
Matthew21:16 Ninh mbuo naaic Yesu, “Naaiv deix fu'jueiv gorngv nyei waac meih haiz nyei fai?” Yesu dau, “Haiz nyei lorqc. Meih mbuo maiv doqc jiex naaiv deix Ging-Sou nyei waac fai? ‘Meih bun fu'jueiv-faix caux corc hopv nyorx nyei gu'nguaaz haih ceng duqv dunh yunh.’+”" 
Matthew21:17 Yesu ziouc leih ninh mbuo aengx cuotv zingh mingh Mbe^taa^ni Laangz bueix muonz. 
Matthew21:18 Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei, Yesu nzuonx zingh wuov zanc, ninh hnyouv sie." 
Matthew21:19 Ninh buatc wuov jauv-hlen maaih zungh ngongh nyorx ndiangx ziouc mingh mangc, buatc maiv maaih biouv. Kungx maaih ndiangx-normh hnangv. Ninh ziouc ziangv jienv ndiangx gorngv, “Yiem naaiv mingh meih yietc liuz maiv duqv ziangh biouv aqv.” Wuov zungh ngongh nyorx ndiangx ziouc liemh zeih kou nqaai mi'aqv." 
Matthew21:20 Sai-gorx mbuo buatc ziouc mbuoqc horngh haic yaac naaic gaax, “Naaiv zungh ngongh nyorx ndiangx hnangv haaix nor haih nqaai ndongc naaic siepv?”" 
Matthew21:21 Yesu dau, “Yie mbuox zien meih mbuo, se gorngv meih mbuo za'gengh sienx yaac maiv hlungh hluotv, meih mbuo haih zoux hnangv yie zoux bun naaiv zungh ngongh nyorx ndiangx nor. Maiv daan naaiv hnangv, meih mbuo zungv haih mbuox naaiv norm mbong, “Suiv cuotv, njiec koiv maah!” Mbong ziouc suiv aqv." 
Matthew21:22 Se gorngv meih mbuo sienx, maiv gunv meih mbuo daux gaux tov haaix nyungc, meih mbuo ziouc duqv aqv.”" 
Matthew21:23 Yesu aengx nzuonx zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv. Njaaux jienv mienh wuov zanc, sai mienh bieiv caux baeqc fingx nyei mienh gox daaih naaic ninh, “Meih maaih haaix nyungc leiz zoux naaiv deix sic? Naaiv nyungc leiz haaix dauh bun meih?”" 
Matthew21:24 Yesu dau, “Yie mv baac oix naaic joux waac meih mbuo. Se gorngv meih mbuo dau yie, yie ziouc mbuox meih mbuo, yie maaih haaix nyungc leiz zoux naaiv deix sic." 
Matthew21:25 Wuov nyungc, haaix dauh bun Yo^han maaih leiz tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz, Tin-Hungh fai baamh mienh?” Ninh mbuo ziouc laanh caux laanh caangh laangh. “Mbuo horpc zuqc hnangv haaix nor gorngv mv bei? Se gorngv mbuo gorngv, ‘Tin-Hungh bun daaih,’ ninh oix gorngv, ‘Wuov nyungc, meih mbuo weic haaix diuc maiv sienx Yo^han?’" 
Matthew21:26 Se gorngv mbuo gorngv, ‘Mienh bun daaih,’ gamh nziex zuangx mienh oix hnangv haaix nor zoux bun mbuo, weic zuqc ninh mbuo yietc zungv funx dingc Yo^han se douc waac mienh.”" 
Matthew21:27 Ninh mbuo ziouc dau Yesu, “Yie mbuo maiv hiuv duqv.” Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Hnangv naaic, yie yaac maiv mbuox meih mbuo yie maaih haaix nyungc leiz zoux naaiv deix sic." 
Matthew21:28 “Meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor hnamv? Maaih laanh mienh maaih i dauh dorn. Ninh mingh mbuox dorn-hlo, ‘Dorn aac, meih ih hnoi mingh a'ngunc huingx zoux gong oc.’" 
Matthew21:29 “Dorn-hlo dau, ‘Yie maiv oix mingh!’ Mv baac nqa'haav ninh goiv hnyouv aengx mingh aqv." 
Matthew21:30 “Wuov dauh die aengx mingh fih hnangv nyei mbuox dorn-faix. Dorn-faix dau, ‘Oz, yie mingh nyei.’ Mv baac ninh maiv mingh." 
Matthew21:31 “Naaiv deix i dauh dorn, haaix dauh ei jienv die nyei waac zoux?” Ninh mbuo dau, “Dorn-hlo.” Yesu ziouc mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie mbuox zien meih mbuo, tengx Lomaa hungh jaa siou nzou-zinh wuov deix, caux maaic buonv-sin nyei m'sieqv dorn zungv duqv bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv ndaangc meih mbuo." 
Matthew21:32 Weic zuqc tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov dauh Yo^han daaih bun meih mbuo hiuv duqv zoux horpc nyei jauv, meih mbuo yaac maiv sienx. Mv baac siou nzou-zinh caux maaic buonv-sin nyei m'sieqv dorn wuov deix sienx ninh. Meih mbuo buatc liuz naaiv deix sic mv baac nqa'haav meih mbuo corc maiv goiv hnyouv sienx ninh.”" 
Matthew21:33 Yesu aengx mbuox sai mienh bieiv caux mienh gox, “Aengx muangx diuh waac-beiv oc. Maaih laanh mienh zuangx nzong a'ngunc biouv, zoux laatc laatc jienv. Yiem huingx gu'nyuoz ninh wetv norm dorngx zoux nyueih a'ngunc biouv nyei zorngh, aengx zoux norm laauh zuov huingx. Zoux ziangx, ninh gouv bun mienh. Ninh ganh aeqv, cuotv deic-bung mi'aqv." 
Matthew21:34 “Taux biouv zuoqc nyei ziangh hoc ninh paaiv ninh nyei bou mingh zorqv ninh nyei buonc biouv. 
Matthew21:35 Gouv huingx nyei mienh zorqv naaiv deix bou. Maaih dauh ninh mbuo mborqv. Maaih dauh ninh mbuo daix. Maaih dauh ninh mbuo zorqv la'bieiv daaih zong. 
Matthew21:36 Huingx-ziouv aengx paaiv ganh deix bou mingh, gauh camv daauh nzunc, mv baac gouv huingx mienh aengx zoux bun ninh mbuo hnangv daauh nzunc wuov deix nor." 
Matthew21:37 Nqa'haav wuov nzunc, huingx-ziouv aengx paaiv ninh ganh nyei dorn mingh, yaac gorngv, ‘Ninh mbuo zungv oix taaih yie nyei dorn aqv.’" 
Matthew21:38 Mv baac gouv huingx nyei mienh buatc wuov dauh dorn, laanh mbuox laanh, ‘Nzipc naaiv norm huingx se dongh naaiv dauh aqv. Daaih maah! Mbuo zorqv ninh daix guangc mingh yaac zorqv ninh nzipc nyei jaa-dingh aqv.’" 
Matthew21:39 Ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv ninh tor cuotv ga'nyiec ziqc huingx daix guangc mi'aqv.” 
Matthew21:40 Yesu naaic, “Wuov nyungc, huingx-ziouv nzuonx wuov zanc ninh oix hnangv haaix nor zoux bun gouv huingx nyei mienh?”" 
Matthew21:41 Ninh mbuo dau, “Ninh ndongc haaix zungv oix daix guangc wuov deix waaic haic nyei mienh, aengx bun ganh deix mienh gouv ninh nyei huingx, dongh biouv zuoqc nyei ziangh hoc haih bun ninh nyei buonc biouv wuov nyungc mienh.”" 
Matthew21:42 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Ging-Sou fiev jienv naaiv deix waac meih mbuo maiv doqc jiex fai? ‘Gomv biauv zaangc nqemh cuotv wuov norm la'bieiv, zungv benx an biauv-gorqv gauh longc jienv jiex wuov norm. Naaiv se Ziouv zoux nyei sic. Ziux yie mbuo nyei m'zing mangc, buatc mbuoqc horngh haic.’+”" 
Matthew21:43 Yesu aengx gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie mbuox meih mbuo, Tin-Hungh zungv maiv bun meih mbuo yiem ninh nyei guoqv. Ninh oix bun zoux horpc ninh nyei hnyouv wuov nyungc mienh yiem ninh nyei guoqv hnangv." 
Matthew21:44 Haaix dauh ndorpc, zong zuqc naaiv norm la'bieiv, wuov dauh ziouc huv benx ziex deix mi'aqv. Naaiv norm la'bieiv ndortv, zong zuqc haaix dauh, wuov dauh ziouc muonc nzengc mi'aqv.”" 
Matthew21:45 Sai mienh bieiv caux Faa^li^si Mienh muangx haiz Yesu gorngv naaiv deix waac-beiv, ninh mbuo haiz ziqv zuqc ninh mbuo." 
Matthew21:46 Ninh mbuo ziouc oix zorqv ninh mv baac gamh nziex zuangx mienh, weic zuqc wuov deix mienh taaih Yesu zoux dauh douc waac mienh." 
Matthew22:1 Yesu aengx longc waac-beiv njaaux zuangx mienh. 
Matthew22:2 Ninh gorngv, “Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh se hnangv dauh hungh mbenc ninh nyei dorn nyei cing-jaa-hnaangx nor." 
Matthew22:3 Mbenc ziangx, ninh paaiv ninh nyei bou mingh heuc cingv liuz nyei kaeqv mienh daaih, mv baac kaeqv mienh maiv oix daaih." 
Matthew22:4 “Hungh diex aengx paaiv ganh deix bou mingh mbuox wuov deix kaeqv mienh, ‘Yie nyei cing-jaa-hnaangx mbenc ziangx aqv. Ngongh gouv caux ngongh dorn junc hliangv ziangx, nyungc-nyungc mbenc nzoih. Gunv daaih nyanc hnaangx aqv.’" 
Matthew22:5 Mv baac cingv liuz nyei kaeqv mienh maiv guen maiv sic nyei. Gorqv-mienh mingh zoux gorqv-mienh nyei gong. Maaih dauh mingh ndeic. Maaih dauh mingh zoux saeng-eix. 
Matthew22:6 Zengc wuov deix zorqv hungh paaiv mingh nyei bou zoux doqc yaac daix daic. 
Matthew22:7 Hungh diex qiex jiez! haic, ziouc paaiv ninh nyei baeng mingh mietc nzengc wuov deix daix mienh nyei mienh, aengx buov qui ninh mbuo nyei zingh." 
Matthew22:8 “Nqa'haav hungh diex aengx mbuox ninh nyei bou mbuo, ‘Cing-jaa-hnaangx mbenc ziangx aqv. Yie cingv ndaangc nyei kaeqv mienh maiv puix daaih." 
Matthew22:9 Meih mbuo ih zanc mingh wuov jaai-horngc. Lorz buatc mbu'ziex dauh, oix zuqc heuc daaih bieqc yinh.’" 
Matthew22:10 Wuov deix bou ziouc cuotv mingh gan diuh diuh jauv. Buatc mbu'ziex dauh, maiv gunv kuv mienh fai mienh waaic mienh, yietc zungv heuc daaih. Mienh ziouc buangv nzengc yinh mi'aqv." 
Matthew22:11 “Hungh diex bieqc mingh mangc kaeqv mienh ziouc buatc maaih dauh maiv zorng puix mingh yinh nyei lui-houx. 
Matthew22:12 Hungh diex naaic, ‘Youz aac, meih maiv zorng puix mingh yinh nyei lui-houx, meih hnangv haaix nor duqv bieqc?’ Wuov dauh mienh yaac maiv maaih waac dau aqv." 
Matthew22:13 “Hungh diex ziouc mbuox bou, ‘Zorqv ninh nyei buoz-zaux ndoh jienv dorh ninh mingh guangc ga'nyiec, hmuangx nyei dorngx, yiem wuov bungx-sing bungx-qiex nyei nyiemv, ngaatc jienv nyaah diev.’+”" 
Matthew22:14 Yesu aengx gorngv setv mueiz waac, “Cingv daaih nyei mienh camv, mv baac ginv daaih nyei mienh zoqc.”" 
Matthew22:15 Maaih deix Faa^li^si Mienh cuotv mingh caangh laangh daav za'eix oix nduov Yesu gorngv dorngc waac. 
Matthew22:16 Ninh mbuo ziouc paaiv deix ninh mbuo nyei sai-gorx caux deix gan Helotv Hungh wuov jauv mienh mingh lorz Yesu. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Fin-Saeng aac, yie mbuo hiuv duqv meih hnyouv zaqc. Tin-Hungh nyei jauv meih yaac njaaux duqv zien. Meih yaac maiv mangc haaix dauh nyei hmien weic zuqc meih maiv mangc haaix dauh zoux hlo fai faix." 
Matthew22:17 Wuov nyungc, tov mbuox yie mbuo, meih hnangv haaix nor hnamv? Mbuo cuotv nzou-zinh bun Lomaa nyei domh ziuh hungh, Sisaa, se dorngc mbuo nyei leiz fai?”" 
Matthew22:18 Mv baac Yesu hiuv duqv ninh mbuo nyei za'eix se waaic haic ziouc gorngv, “Meih mbuo naaic deix beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh aah! Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc oix nduov yie gorngv dorngc?" 
Matthew22:19 Zorqv norm cuotv nzou nyei nyaanh bun yie mangc gaax.” Ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv norm nyaanh bun ninh. 
Matthew22:20 Yesu naaic gaax ninh mbuo, “Naaiv haaix dauh nyei fangx caux haaix dauh nyei mbuox?”" 
Matthew22:21 Ninh mbuo dau, “Sisaa nyei.” Yesu ziouc mbuox ninh mbuo, “Hnangv naaic, haaix nyungc Sisaa Hungh nyei, oix zuqc bun Sisaa Hungh. Haaix nyungc Tin-Hungh nyei, oix zuqc bun Tin-Hungh.”" 
Matthew22:22 Ninh mbuo haiz liuz naaiv deix waac ziouc mbuoqc horngh haic yaac leih nqoi ninh mingh mi'aqv. 
Matthew22:23 Dongh wuov hnoi maaih deix Saa^ndu^si Mienh daaih lorz Yesu. (Saa^ndu^si wuov jauv mienh gorngv mienh daic mingh maiv haih nangh daaih.) 
Matthew22:24 Ninh mbuo naaic Yesu, “Fin-Saeng aac, Mose gorngv, ‘Se gorngv maaih laanh mienh maiv gaengh maaih fu'jueiv mv baac ninh daic mi'aqv, ninh nyei youz oix zuqc longc nyaam-guaav zoux auv weic duqv fu'jueiv funx gorx nyei buonc.’" 
Matthew22:25 Yie mbuo naaiv, zinh ndaangc maaih siec muoz-dorn. Dorn-hlo dorng jienv jaa, maiv gaengh maaih fu'jueiv, ninh daic mi'aqv. Youz ziouc longc ninh nyei nyaam-guaav." 
Matthew22:26 Da'naix caux Lauv Saan, aengx mingh taux Lauv Cic, yietc zungv longc jiex nzengc, yaac fih hnangv nyei, maiv maaih fu'jueiv, ziang naaic daic nzengc mi'aqv." 
Matthew22:27 Nqa'haav wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn yaac daic mi'aqv. 
Matthew22:28 Hnangv naaic, mienh daic mingh, taux nangh daaih wuov hnoi, wuov dauh auv funx benx haaix dauh nyei auv? Weic zuqc ninh mbuo yietc zungv longc jiex nyei.”" 
Matthew22:29 Yesu dau ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo dorngc nzengc aqv, weic zuqc meih mbuo maiv hiuv duqv Ging-Sou, yaac maiv hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh nyei qaqv." 
Matthew22:30 Daic mingh nyei mienh nangh daaih wuov zanc, ninh mbuo ziouc hnangv yiem tin-dorngh nyei fin-mienh nor, maiv longc auv longc nqox." 
Matthew22:31 Gorngv mienh daic mingh aengx nangh daaih wuov diuc jauv, Tin-Hungh mbuox meih mbuo wuov deix waac meih mbuo maiv doqc jiex fai?" 
Matthew22:32 Tin-Hungh gorngv, ‘Yie se Apc^laa^ham nyei Tin-Hungh, I^sakc nyei Tin-Hungh caux Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh.’ Ninh maiv zeiz daic mingh nyei mienh nyei Tin-Hungh. Ninh se mienh nangh mienh nyei Tin-Hungh.”" 
Matthew22:33 Zuangx mienh haiz Yesu hnangv naaiv nor njaaux, ninh mbuo gengh! mbuoqc horngh haic." 
Matthew22:34 Faa^li^si Mienh haiz gorngv Yesu zoux bun Saa^ndu^si Mienh maiv maaih waac dau, ninh mbuo ziouc gapv zunv daaih." 
Matthew22:35 Ninh mbuo nyei guanh maaih dauh njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng oix nduov Yesu gorngv dorngc waac. 
Matthew22:36 Ninh ziouc naaic gaax, “Fin-Saeng aac, yietc zungv Leiz-Latc, haaix diuh gauh longc jienv jiex?”" 
Matthew22:37 Yesu dau, “+‘Oix zuqc longc nzengc hnyouv, longc nzengc za'eix, longc nzengc cong-mengh hnamv Ziouv, meih nyei Tin-Hungh.’" 
Matthew22:38 Naaiv se hlo jiex, gauh longc jienv jiex nyei leiz aqv." 
Matthew22:39 Da'nyeic diuh yaac fih hnangv nyei, ‘Oix zuqc hnamv mienh hnangv hnamv ganh nor.’" 
Matthew22:40 Mose nyei Leiz-Latc caux zuangx Douc Waac Mienh njaaux nyei yietc zungv waac longc naaiv deix i diuh leiz zoux gorn.” 
Matthew22:41 Faa^li^si Mienh corc yiem zunv wuov zanc, Yesu naaic ninh mbuo," 
Matthew22:42 “Meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor hnamv? Giduc zoux haaix dauh nyei zeiv-fun?” Ninh mbuo dau, “Giduc zoux Ndaawitv Hungh nyei zeiv-fun.”" 
Matthew22:43 Yesu aengx naaic ninh mbuo, “Wuov nyungc, Singx Lingh weic haaix diuc bun Ndaawitv heuc Giduc zoux ‘Ziouv’? Ndaawitv gorngv," 
Matthew22:44 ‘Ziouv gorngv mbuox yie nyei Ziouv, zueiz jienv yie nyei mbiaauc maengx bung, zuov yie bun meih nyei win-wangv njiec meih nyei zaux-ndiev.’" 
Matthew22:45 Se gorngv Ndaawitv heuc ninh zoux ‘Ziouv,’ Giduc hnangv haaix nor haih zoux Ndaawitv nyei zeiv-fun?”" 
Matthew22:46 Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih dau yietc joux Yesu. Yiem naaic hnoi daaih, maiv maaih haaix dauh gaamv naaic haaix nyungc ninh aqv." 
Matthew23:1 Jiex daaih, Yesu mbuox zuangx mienh caux ninh nyei sai-gorx," 
Matthew23:2 “Njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux Faa^li^si Mienh maaih leiz porv mengh Mose nyei Leiz. 
Matthew23:3 Weic naaiv meih mbuo oix zuqc muangx yaac ei jienv ninh mbuo njaaux nyei waac zoux. Mv baac ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic meih mbuo maiv dungx zuotc, weic zuqc ninh mbuo njaaux mv baac maiv ei ninh mbuo njaaux nyei waac zoux." 
Matthew23:4 Ninh mbuo zorqv hniev nyei, aqc duqv nyiex nyei ga'naaiv paanx bun mienh nyiex, mv baac ninh mbuo ganh liemh maiv kangv longc yietc norm buoz-ndoqv tengx mienh bouh." 
Matthew23:5 “Ninh mbuo zoux nyei yietc zungv se weic bun mienh mangc hnangv. Mangc gaax, ninh mbuo nyei biorngh caux buoz dangh jienv dapv Ging-Sou nyei waac wuov nyungc hlapv ndongc haaix hlo! Dingx lui-juoqv wuov deix nqingh nqou ndongc haaix ndaauv!" 
Matthew23:6 Mingh yinh wuic, ninh mbuo kungx oix zueiz jiex maengx bung dieh gorn hnangv. Bieqc wuic dorngh yaac oix zueiz longx jiex nyei dorngx." 
Matthew23:7 Mingh wuov hei-horngc oix mienh zorqv yieqv taaih ninh mbuo, yaac heuc ninh mbuo zoux ‘Sai-Diex.’" 
Matthew23:8 “Maiv dungx bun mienh heuc meih mbuo zoux ‘Sai-Diex’ weic zuqc meih mbuo yietc zungv zoux gorx-youz. Meih mbuo kungx maaih nduqc dauh Sai-Diex hnangv. 
Matthew23:9 Maiv dungx heuc yiem naaiv baamh gen nyei haaix dauh zoux ‘Die,’ weic zuqc meih mbuo maaih nduqc dauh Die hnangv. Se yiem tin-dorngh wuov dauh Die." 
Matthew23:10 Yaac maiv dungx bun mienh heuc meih mbuo zoux ‘Bieiv Zeiv,’ weic zuqc meih mbuo maaih nduqc dauh Bieiv Zeiv hnangv, dongh yie, Giduc." 
Matthew23:11 “Meih mbuo haaix dauh zoux hlo jiex, wuov dauh oix zuqc zoux meih mbuo nyei bou." 
Matthew23:12 Haaix dauh taaih ganh zoux hlo, Tin-Hungh oix bun wuov dauh zoux faix. Haaix dauh nyiemc ganh zoux faix, Tin-Hungh oix bun wuov dauh zoux hlo." 
Matthew23:13 “Meih mbuo beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux Faa^li^si Mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix buangh zuqc kouv aqv. Meih mbuo dorng jienv mienh nyei hmien guon bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv wuov dauh gaengh. Meih mbuo ganh maiv bieqc. Mienh oix bieqc meih mbuo yaac dangv jienv maiv bun bieqc. 
Matthew23:14 Meih mbuo beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux Faa^li^si Mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix buangh zuqc kouv aqv. Meih mbuo nduov auv-guaav nyei jaa-dingh nyanc, yaac duqv-eix daux gaux ndaauv nyei nduov mienh. Weic naaiv meih mbuo zungv zuqc dingc zuiz gauh hniev jiex." 
Matthew23:15 “Meih mbuo beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux Faa^li^si Mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix buangh zuqc kouv aqv. Meih mbuo jiex koiv jiex guoqv weic lorz duqv nduqc laanh mienh daaih bieqc meih mbuo. Bieqc liuz, meih mbuo zoux bun ninh oix zuqc ndortv deic nyuoqc gauh camv meih mbuo i gouv." 
Matthew23:16 “Meih mbuo dorh jauv nyei m'zing maengh mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix buangh zuqc kouv aqv. Meih mbuo gorngv, ‘Haaix dauh ziangv jienv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv laengz waac, maiv ei jienv ninh laengz nyei waac zoux, maiv benx haaix nyungc. Mv baac haaix dauh ziangv jienv zorng zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv wuov deix jiem, zungv oix zuqc ei jienv ninh laengz nyei waac zoux.’" 
Matthew23:17 “M'zing maengh nyei ga'naaiv-hngongx aah! Haaix nyungc gauh longc jienv jiex? Jiem fai bun jiem cing-nzengc wuov norm zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv? 
Matthew23:18 Meih mbuo yaac gorngv, ‘Haaix dauh ziangv jienv ziec-dorngh laengz waac yaac maiv ei jienv ninh laengz nyei waac zoux, maiv benx haaix nyungc. Mv baac haaix dauh ziangv an ziec-dorngh gu'nguaaic wuov deix ziec nyei ga'naaiv laengz nor, zungv oix zuqc ei jienv ninh laengz nyei waac zoux.’" 
Matthew23:19 M'zing maengh nyei mienh aah! Haaix nyungc gauh longc jienv jiex? Ziec nyei ga'naaiv fai ziec-dorngh? Se ziec-dorngh bun ziec nyei ga'naaiv cing-nzengc. 
Matthew23:20 Hnangv naaic, haaix dauh ziangv jienv ziec-dorngh laengz waac, ninh zungv ziangv jienv ziec-dorngh caux an ziec-dorngh gu'nguaaic wuov deix ziec nyei ga'naaiv yietc zungv." 
Matthew23:21 Haaix dauh ziangv jienv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv laengz waac, ninh zungv ziangv jienv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv caux yiem biauv gu'nyuoz wuov dauh Tin-Hungh laengz waac." 
Matthew23:22 Haaix dauh ziangv jienv tin-dorngh laengz waac, ninh zungv ziangv jienv Tin-Hungh nyei weic yaac ziangv jienv zueiz weic wuov dauh Tin-Hungh laengz waac." 
Matthew23:23 “Meih mbuo beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux Faa^li^si Mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix buangh zuqc kouv aqv. Meih mbuo dorh baeqc citv, tongh hau caux yienh si ziepc gouv nyei yietc gouv fongc horc Tin-Hungh. Leiz-latc njaaux gauh longc jienv jiex nyei leiz se oix zuqc zoux baengh fim, oix zuqc korv-lienh mienh, oix zuqc zoux hnyouv zingx, mv baac meih mbuo maiv zoux. Meih mbuo horpc zuqc hnangv naaiv zoux, yaac oix zuqc maiv dungx la'kuqv ziepc gouv nyei yietc gouv ga'naaiv fongc horc Tin-Hungh." 
Matthew23:24 Meih mbuo dorh jauv nyei m'zing maengh mienh aah! Yiem meih mbuo hopv nyei ga'naaiv, faix jiex nyei gaeng meih mbuo louc cuotv mi'aqv. Mv baac lorh torh meih mbuo naqv duqv njiec nyei." 
Matthew23:25 “Meih mbuo beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux Faa^li^si Mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix buangh zuqc kouv aqv. Meih mbuo nzaaux meih mbuo nyei nzormc yienv, kungx nzaaux ga'nyiec nzengc hnangv. Mv baac gu'nyuoz zaangh buangv nzengc meih mbuo caangv daaih mauv daaih nyei ga'naaiv." 
Matthew23:26 “M'zing maengh nyei Faa^li^si Mienh aah! Nzaaux nzormc yienv oix zuqc nzaaux nzengc gu'nyuoz ndaangc. Liemh ga'nyiec ziouc nzengc mi'aqv. 
Matthew23:27 “Meih mbuo beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux Faa^li^si Mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix buangh zuqc kouv aqv. Meih mbuo se hnangv nzaatv jienv hui-baeqc nyei janx-daic zouv nor. Buatc ga'nyiec nzueic nyei, mv baac gu'nyuoz maaih janx-daic nyei mbungv caux nyungc-nyungc laih hlopv nyei ga'naaiv buangv nzengc." 
Matthew23:28 Meih mbuo fih hnangv nyei. Mienh buatc meih mbuo se hnangv kuv mienh mv baac meih mbuo beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv, maaih zuiz buangv nzengc." 
Matthew23:29 “Beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux Faa^li^si Mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix buangh zuqc kouv aqv. Douc waac mienh daic mingh, meih mbuo ceix duqv ninh mbuo nyei zouv longx haic. Kuv mienh nyei zouv meih mbuo yaac zorng duqv nzueic." 
Matthew23:30 Meih mbuo yaac gorngv, ‘Se gorngv yie mbuo yiem yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix-ngaeqv wuov jaax lungh ndiev, yie mbuo zungv maiv caux yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix-ngaeqv daix douc waac mienh.’" 
Matthew23:31 Hnangv naaic, meih mbuo laengz meih mbuo zoux daix douc waac mienh wuov deix mienh nyei zeiv-fun." 
Matthew23:32 Wuov nyungc, gunv zoux jienv mingh taux zoux ziangx hnangv meih nyei ong-taaix zoux nor." 
Matthew23:33 “Meih mbuo naaic deix naang, naaic ndui naang-doqc nyei buonv aah! Meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor haih biaux duqv ndutv, maiv zuqc dingc zuiz ndortv deic nyuoqc?" 
Matthew23:34 Weic naaiv yie oix paaiv deix douc waac mienh caux cong-mengh nyei mienh caux fin-saeng daaih lorz meih mbuo. Maaih deix meih mbuo oix daix daic. Maaih deix meih mbuo oix ding ziepc nzaangc jaax. Maaih deix meih mbuo oix yiem wuic dorngh gu'nyuoz longc biaav-bin mborqv, aengx zoux doqc bun ninh mbuo yietc norm mungv zunc cuotv jiex yietc norm mungv." 
Matthew23:35 Hnangv naaic, yietc zungv kuv mienh zuqc daix daic, naaiv nyungc zuiz ndortv zuqc meih mbuo, yiem Aa^mbaen zuqc daix taux Mbe^le^ki^yaa nyei dorn, Se^kaa^li^yaa, yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei Cing-Nzengc Dorngx caux ziec-dorngh mbu'ndongx zuqc meih mbuo daix." 
Matthew23:36 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, ih jaax mienh oix zuqc laaix naaiv deix daix mienh nyei sic zuqc dingc zuiz." 
Matthew23:37 “Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh aah! Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh! Meih daix douc waac mienh yaac zorqv la'bieiv zong daic Tin-Hungh paaiv mingh meih naaic nyei mienh. Mbu'ziex nzunc yie oix hlorv zunv meih nyei mienh, hnangv jai-nyeiz buoc dorn yiem ndaatv-ndiev nor. Mv baac meih maiv kangv bun yie zoux." 
Matthew23:38 Mangc maah! Meih nyei biauv zungv zuqc guangc benx biauv-huaang. 
Matthew23:39 Yie mbuox meih mbuo, yiem naaiv mingh meih mbuo maiv duqv buatc yie. Zuov meih mbuo gorngv, ‘Tov Tin-Hungh ceix fuqv dengv Ziouv nyei mbuox daaih wuov dauh’ cingx duqv buatc yie.”" 
Matthew24:1 Yesu yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv cuotv daaih, yangh jienv jauv mingh wuov zanc, sai-gorx mbuo daaih nuqv jienv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv-hlen wuov deix biauv heuc ninh mangc." 
Matthew24:2 Yesu gorngv, “Meih mbuo buatc naaiv deix biauv nyei saah? Yie mbuox zien meih mbuo, maaih norm hnoi yietc zungv oix zuqc caeqv nzengc. Maiv maaih yietc kuaaiv la'bieiv lapv jienv aqv.”" 
Matthew24:3 Yesu zueiz jienv Ga'lanv Mbong wuov zanc, sai-gorx mbuo ganh lengc jeiv daaih naaic ninh, “Tov mbuox yie mbuo oc. Naaiv deix sic haaix zanc oix cuotv? Maaih haaix nyungc jangx-hoc oix bun cing meih aengx oix daaih yaac bun cing baamh gen nyei setv mueiz oix taux?”" 
Matthew24:4 Yesu dau, “Oix zuqc faix fim, maiv dungx muangx haaix dauh nduov meih mbuo." 
Matthew24:5 Maaih mienh camv nyei oix longc yie nyei mbuox daaih gorngv, ‘Yie se dongh Giduc wuov dauh aqv.’ Ninh mbuo ziouc nduov mienh camv." 
Matthew24:6 Taux wuov zanc meih mbuo duqv haiz mienh mborqv domh jaax yaac haiz mborqv domh jaax nyei fienx, mv baac meih mbuo maiv dungx gamh nziex. Naaiv deix sic ndongc haaix oix zuqc cuotv, mv baac setv mueiz nyei hnoi-nyieqc maiv gaengh taux." 
Matthew24:7 Naaiv fingx oix caux wuov fingx mborqv jaax. Naaiv norm guoqv oix caux wuov norm guoqv mborqv domh jaax. Maaih deix dorngx oix zuqc ngorc hnaangx, maaih deix dorngx ndau dongz." 
Matthew24:8 Naaiv deix sic cuotv daaih bun cing setv mueiz nyei hnoi-nyieqc jiez gorn cuotv. 
Matthew24:9 “Taux wuov zanc meih mbuo ziouc zuqc zorqv jiu bun mienh zoux doqc yaac daix guangc. Laaix yie, maanc fingx oix nzorng meih mbuo." 
Matthew24:10 Wuov zanc mienh camv oix cuotv, maiv sienx yie. Laanh oix zorqv laanh jiu bun win-wangv. Laanh yaac oix nzorng laanh." 
Matthew24:11 Aengx maaih jaav douc waac mienh camv nyei cuotv daaih nduov mienh camv. 
Matthew24:12 Hiuang orqv nyei sic oix faanv, mienh camv nyei hnyouv ziouc namx jienv njiec, maiv hnamv mienh yaac maiv hnamv Tin-Hungh." 
Matthew24:13 Mv baac haaix dauh diev duqv taux daauh taux mueiz, wuov dauh ziouc duqv njoux aqv." 
Matthew24:14 Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei kuv fienx zungv oix zunh buangv lungh ndiev weic zoux zorng-zengx bun maanc fingx hiuv. Nqa'haav, setv mueiz nyei hnoi-nyieqc ziouc taux aqv." 
Matthew24:15 “Meih mbuo ziouc duqv buatc douc waac mienh, Ndaa^ni^en, gorngv jiex nyei sic cuotv. Maaih zoux bun nyungc-nyungc waaic wuov dauh domh hieh youx yiem jienv cing-nzengc nyei dorngx, (doqc sou nyei mienh oix zuqc mengh baeqc naaiv deix waac)." 
Matthew24:16 Wuov zanc, yiem Yu^ndie Saengv wuov deix oix zuqc biaux faaux mbong." 
Matthew24:17 Mienh yiem biauv-ngorh oix zuqc gaanv njiec, liemh maiv dungx bieqc biauv zorqv haaix nyungc dorh mingh." 
Matthew24:18 Yiem ndeic nyei mienh maiv dungx nzuonx biauv zorqv ganh nyei domh lui. 
Matthew24:19 Yiem wuov deix hnoi-nyieqc maaih jienv sin nyei, caux maaih gu'nguaaz hopv nyorx nyei m'sieqv dorn za'gengh zuqc kouv aqv." 
Matthew24:20 Meih mbuo oix zuqc tov Tin-Hungh, taux biaux nyei ziangh hoc maiv dungx bun doix zuqc dong-gen hnoi fai doix zuqc Dingh Gong Hnoi." 
Matthew24:21 Weic zuqc taux wuov zanc maaih domh zeqc naanc. Yiem zeix lungh zeix ndau daaih maiv maaih jiex ndongc naaiv nzunc siem. Yangh naaiv jiex yietc liuz yaac maiv maaih aqv. 
Matthew24:22 Se gorngv Tin-Hungh maiv bun wuov deix hnoi-nyieqc zoqc njiec deix, maiv maaih haaix dauh duqv maengc cuotv. Se weic Tin-Hungh ginv daaih nyei mienh ninh cingx daaih oix bun wuov deix hnoi-nyieqc zoqc njiec." 
Matthew24:23 “Wuov zanc, se gorngv haaix dauh mbuox meih mbuo, ‘Mangc gaax, Giduc yiem naaiv!’ fai ‘Giduc yiem wuov!’ maiv dungx sienx." 
Matthew24:24 Weic zuqc maaih mienh gorngv ninh mbuo zoux Giduc mv baac jaav nyei, aengx maaih jaav douc waac mienh oix cuotv daaih. Ninh mbuo oix zoux domh jangx-hoc caux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic nduov mienh. Se gorngv haih nduov duqv zuqc nor, ninh mbuo oix liemh Tin-Hungh ginv daaih nyei mienh nduov." 
Matthew24:25 Muangx oc. Naaiv deix sic maiv gaengh cuotv yie jaa-ndaangc mbuox ziangx meih mbuo. 
Matthew24:26 “Hnangv naaic, se gorngv maaih mienh mbuox meih mbuo, ‘Mangc maah! Ninh yiem wuov deic-bung-huaang,’ maiv dungx cuotv mingh lorz. Mienh aengx gorngv, ‘Mangc maah! Ninh yiem biauv gu'nyuoz,’ maiv dungx sienx." 
Matthew24:27 Weic zuqc borngz mba'lingc yiem dong bung njapc dangh, njang mingh taux fai bung hnangv haaix nor, yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, aengx daaih wuov zanc yaac oix hnangv wuov nor." 
Matthew24:28 Ga'naaiv-daic yiem haaix, domh jaangv-ngongh yaac yiem wuov aqv." 
Matthew24:29 “Wuov deix hnoi nyei zeqc naanc yietv jiex liuz, ‘Mba'hnoi ziouc jieqv mingh, hlaax yaac maiv ziux njang aqv. Zuangx hleix yiem wuov lungh oix ndortv njiec daaih. Yiem lungh maaih qaqv nyei ga'naaiv zungv zuqc ndanc dongz.’" 
Matthew24:30 “Wuov zanc yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, nyei jangx-hoc oix yiem wuov lungh cuotv daaih. Lungh ndiev maanc fingx mienh ziouc bungx-sing bungx-qiex nyei nyiemv. Ninh mbuo duqv buatc yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, maaih qaqv caux domh njang-laangc yiem wuov mbuonx njiec daaih." 
Matthew24:31 Maaih nzatc nyei qiex mbui, yie ziouc paaiv yie nyei fin-mienh mingh taux biei bung nziaaux, yiem naaiv bung lungh gorn mingh taux wuov bung lungh gorn, siou zunv yie ginv daaih nyei mienh." 
Matthew24:32 “Meih mbuo oix zuqc longc ngongh nyorx ndiangx hoqc yietc diuc. Buatc ndiangx cuotv cunx, nqoi normh lunx, meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv aav lamh deix bieqc haac gueix mi'aqv." 
Matthew24:33 Fih hnangv nyei, meih mbuo buatc naaiv deix yietc zungv sic cuotv wuov zanc, meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, taux fatv aqv, zungv yiem jienv gaengh ndaangc aqv." 
Matthew24:34 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, naaiv doic mienh guei seix maiv gaengh nzengc, naaiv deix yietc zungv sic ziouc cuotv daaih aqv." 
Matthew24:35 Lungh ndau oix jiex nzengc, mv baac yie nyei waac yietc liuz maiv jiex." 
Matthew24:36 “Wuov norm hnoi, wuov norm ziangh hoc, maiv maaih haaix dauh hiuv. Liemh tin-dorngh nyei fin-mienh maiv hiuv. Dorn yaac maiv hiuv. Kungx Zaangc Diex ganh hiuv hnangv." 
Matthew24:37 Noyaa nyei lungh ndiev hnangv haaix nor, yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, aengx daaih wuov zanc yaac oix zuqc hnangv wuov nor." 
Matthew24:38 Mbiungc-suiv-imx maiv gaengh yiemx lungh ndiev wuov zanc, mienh nyanc yaac hopv, bungx sieqv, gorngv auv zoux cing-jaa, taux Noyaa bieqc nzangv wuov hnoi." 
Matthew24:39 Ninh mbuo liemh maiv hiuv mbiungc-suiv-imx oix yiemx taux wuom guaatv ninh mbuo mingh nzengc. Yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, aengx daaih wuov zanc yaac oix hnangv naaic nor." 
Matthew24:40 Wuov zanc maaih i laanh mienh yiem wuov ndeic zoux gong. Oix zipv laanh mingh, guangc laanh yiem wuov." 
Matthew24:41 Maaih i dauh m'sieqv dorn morc maeqc. Oix zipv dauh mingh, guangc dauh yiem wuov." 
Matthew24:42 “Weic naaiv meih mbuo oix zuqc ging hnyouv mbungh jienv, weic zuqc meih mbuo maiv hiuv duqv meih mbuo nyei Ziouv haaix hnoi daaih." 
Matthew24:43 Naaiv meih mbuo hiuv duqv nyei. Se gorngv biauv-ziouv hiuv duqv lungh muonz zanc janx-zaqc haaix norm ziangh hoc daaih, ninh ziouc ging hnyouv zuov jienv, maiv bun janx-zaqc bieqc biauv." 
Matthew24:44 Hnangv naaic, meih mbuo oix zuqc liuc leiz ziangx, zanc-zanc zuov jienv, weic zuqc meih mbuo liemh jangx maiv zaaic nyei ziangh hoc, yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, ziouc taux aqv." 
Matthew24:45 “Wuov nyungc, haaix dauh zoux hnyouv zingx, cong-mengh nyei bou? Wuov dauh aeqv, ziouv paaiv goux ninh nyei biauv zong mienh yaac ziux ziangh hoc zorqv yietc zuangx bou nyei buonc nyanc hopv bun ninh mbuo." 
Matthew24:46 Ziouv nzuonx daaih buatc naaiv dauh bou zoux duqv zingx, bou ziouc njien-youh aqv." 
Matthew24:47 Yie mbuox zien meih mbuo, ziouv oix bun naaiv dauh bou goux nzengc ninh nyei yietc zungv jaa-dingh." 
Matthew24:48 Mv baac se gorngv wuov dauh bou maiv benx, ninh yiem hnyouv hnamv, ‘Aa, yie nyei ziouv maiv gaengh nzuonx siepv.’" 
Matthew24:49 Ninh ziouc dongz sin mborqv ninh nyei zoux bou doic yaac caux hopv diuv nquin nyei mienh juangc nyanc juangc hopv. 
Matthew24:50 Bou jangx maiv zaaic nyei hnoi, jangx maiv zaaic nyei ziangh hoc, ninh nyei ziouv ziouc nzuonx daaih aqv." 
Matthew24:51 Ziouv oix dingc ninh nyei zuiz hniev nyei, zunc ninh mingh caux beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh yiem, bungx-sing bungx-qiex nyei nyiemv, ngaatc jienv nyaah diev.”" 
Matthew25:1 “Tin-Hungh daaih zoux Ziouv gunv mienh wuov zanc, beiv ziepc dauh sieqv-dorn bouh jienv youh dang cuotv mingh zipv siang-laangh nor." 
Matthew25:2 Wuov deix sieqv-dorn, maaih biaa dauh hngongx, maaih biaa dauh guai." 
Matthew25:3 Hngongx wuov deix, bouh jienv dang mingh mv baac maiv dorh youh mingh mbungh." 
Matthew25:4 Guai wuov deix, bouh jienv dang aengx zorqv youh dapv baengh dorh jienv mingh." 
Matthew25:5 Wuov deix sieqv-dorn zuov lauh nyei, maiv buatc siang-laangh daaih ziouc m'njormh da'hngatv, ziang naaic m'njormh nzengc." 
Matthew25:6 “Taux ndaamv muonz, maaih qiex heuc jienv gorngv, ‘Siang-laangh taux aav loh! Daaih zipv ninh aqv.’" 
Matthew25:7 “Wuov deix ziepc dauh sieqv-dorn nyie daaih liuc leiz ninh mbuo nyei dang. 
Matthew25:8 Hngongx wuov deix mbuox guai wuov deix, ‘Tov bun deix youh yie mbuo. Yie mbuo nyei dang aav lamh daic aqv.’" 
Matthew25:9 “Guai wuov deix dau, ‘Gamh nziex youh maiv gaux bun meih mbuo caux yie mbuo lomh nzoih longc. Meih mbuo oix zuqc mingh wuov maaic youh nyei dorngx maaiz.’" 
Matthew25:10 “Hngongx wuov deix sieqv-dorn ziouc mingh maaiz youh maiv gaengh nzuonx, siang-laangh taux daaih aqv. Liuc leiz ziangx wuov deix biaa dauh ziouc gan jienv siang-laangh bieqc mingh nyanc cing-jaa-hnaangx. Gaengh ziouc guon jienv aqv." 
Matthew25:11 “Nqa'haav hngongx wuov deix sieqv-dorn taux daaih ziouc heuc, ‘Domh Gorx aac, Domh Gorx! Koi gaengh bun yie mbuo bieqc oc.’" 
Matthew25:12 “Siang-laangh dau, ‘Yie gorngv zien nyei, yie maiv hiuv duqv meih mbuo.’+”" 
Matthew25:13 Yesu aengx gorngv setv mueiz waac, “Hnangv naaic, meih mbuo oix zuqc ging hnyouv mbungh jienv, weic zuqc meih mbuo maiv hiuv duqv wuov norm hnoi, wuov norm ziangh hoc." 
Matthew25:14 “Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh yaac hnangv dauh mienh oix cuotv jauv mingh go nyei. Ninh ziouc heuc ninh nyei bou daaih yaac zorqv ninh nyei jaa-dingh jiu bun ninh mbuo goux. 
Matthew25:15 Ninh ei gorqv-mienh nyei banh zeic bun. Maaih dauh ninh bun biaa waanc zinh. Maaih dauh bun i waanc zinh. Maaih dauh bun yietc waanc zinh. Bun liuz, ninh ziouc cuotv jauv mingh mi'aqv." 
Matthew25:16 Duqv zipv biaa waanc zinh wuov dauh liemh zeih cuotv mingh zoux saeng-eix aengx zornc duqv biaa waanc. 
Matthew25:17 Duqv zipv i waanc wuov dauh yaac fih hnangv nyei zoux, aengx zornc duqv i waanc." 
Matthew25:18 Mv baac duqv yietc waanc wuov dauh cuotv mingh wetv kuotv biopv jienv bingx ninh nyei ziouv nyei nyaanh. 
Matthew25:19 “Nqa'haav lauh nyei, wuov deix bou nyei ziouv nzuonx daaih dimv mangc ninh mbuo nyei zaeqv-daan." 
Matthew25:20 Duqv biaa waanc zinh wuov dauh aengx dorh jienv biaa waanc ndaauv-daauh bun ninh nyei ziouv. Ninh gorngv, ‘Ziouv aac, meih bun biaa waanc zinh. Mangc gaax naaiv! Yie aengx zornc duqv biaa waanc.’" 
Matthew25:21 “Ninh nyei ziouv gorngv, ‘Longx aqv. Meih se longx haic, hnyouv zingx nyei bou. Deix baav nyaanh hnangv meih goux duqv ndongc naaic longx, yie oix bun meih goux camv nyei. Gunv bieqc daaih caux yie njien-youh maah!’" 
Matthew25:22 “Duqv i waanc zinh wuov dauh bou aengx bieqc daaih gorngv, ‘Ziouv aac, meih bun i waanc zinh yie. Mangc gaax naaiv! Yie aengx zornc duqv i waanc.’" 
Matthew25:23 Ninh nyei ziouv gorngv, ‘Longx haic aqv. Meih se longx haic, hnyouv zingx nyei bou. Deix baav nyaanh hnangv meih goux duqv ndongc naaiv longx, yie oix bun meih goux camv. Gunv bieqc daaih caux yie njien-youh aqv.’" 
Matthew25:24 “Duqv yietc waanc zinh wuov dauh bou bieqc daaih gorngv, ‘Ziouv aac, yie hiuv duqv meih maiv sie haaix dauh. Meih maiv ndortv qaqv zuangx nyei dorngx meih yaac duqv gaatv. Dongh meih maiv haaz nyim nyei dorngx meih yaac duqv siou." 
Matthew25:25 Yie gamh nziex haic ziouc mingh wetv kuotv biopv jienv meih nyei nyaanh. Naaiv! Meih nyei nyaanh aqv.’ 
Matthew25:26 “Ninh nyei ziouv gorngv, ‘Meih naaic dauh waaic haic, lueic haic nyei bou aah! Meih hiuv yie maiv ndortv qaqv zuangx nyei dorngx yie duqv gaatv? Yie maiv haaz nyim nyei dorngx yaac duqv siou?" 
Matthew25:27 Wuov nyungc, meih horpc zuqc dorh yie nyei nyaanh mingh dapv wuov nyaanh lamz. Hnangv naaic, yie nzuonx daaih yie duqv buonv-zinh yaac duqv leic zinh caux jienv niaa.’" 
Matthew25:28 “+‘Zorqv ninh nyei wuov deix nyaanh aqv. Aengx bun maaih ziepc norm wuov dauh," 
Matthew25:29 weic zuqc haaix dauh maaih deix nyei, oix tipv bun ninh maaih gauh camv, ninh ziouc maaih zengc. Haaix dauh maiv maaih, liemh ninh maaih deix baav nyei, zungv zuqc zorqv mi'aqv." 
Matthew25:30 Zorqv naaiv dauh maiv lamh longc nyei bou zoi guangc ga'nyiec hmuangx nyei dorngx mingh. Ninh oix zuqc bungx-sing bungx-qiex nyei nyiemv, ngaatc jienv nyaah diev.’" 
Matthew25:31 “Yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn daaih zoux Hungh wuov zanc, maaih zuangx fin-mienh yaac oix caux jienv daaih. Yie yaac oix zueiz jienv yie njang-laangc nyei weic." 
Matthew25:32 Maanc fingx mienh aengx daaih gapv zunv yiem yie nyei nza'hmien. Yie ziouc bun nqoi zoux i guanh, hnangv yungh ziouv bun nqoi ninh nyei ba'gi yungh caux yungh nor." 
Matthew25:33 Ba'gi yungh yiem yie nyei mbiaauc maengx, yungh yiem zaaix maengx." 
Matthew25:34 “Hungh Diex ziouc mbuox yiem mbiaauc maengx wuov deix mienh, ‘Meih mbuo naaiv deix yie nyei Die ceix fuqv nyei mienh aah! Gunv daaih aqv. Daaih zipv dongh zinh ndaangc zeix lungh zeix ndau wuov zanc Tin-Hungh liuc leiz ziangx bun meih mbuo wuov norm guoqv," 
Matthew25:35 weic zuqc yie ngorc, meih mbuo bun yie nyanc. Jaang nqaatv, meih mbuo yaac bun wuom yie hopv. Yie zoux ganh fingx mienh, meih mbuo yaac zipv yie yiem meih mbuo nyei biauv." 
Matthew25:36 Maiv maaih lui-houx zuqv, meih mbuo yaac bun yie maaih zuqv. Butv baengc, meih mbuo yaac goux yie. Yie zuqc wuonx jienv loh, meih mbuo yaac daaih mangc yie.’" 
Matthew25:37 “Wuov deix kuv mienh ziouc dau Hungh Diex, ‘Ziouv aac, yie mbuo ziangh haaix buatc meih ngorc yaac bun meih nyanc? Buatc meih jaang nqaatv yaac bun meih hopv?" 
Matthew25:38 Ziangh haaix buatc meih zoux ganh fingx mienh ziouc zipv meih yiem yie mbuo nyei biauv? Fai buatc meih maiv maaih lui-houx zuqv ziouc bun meih maaih zuqv? 
Matthew25:39 Yie mbuo ziangh haaix buatc meih butv baengc fai zuqc wuonx wuov loh yaac mingh mangc meih?’ 
Matthew25:40 “Hungh Diex ziouc dau ninh mbuo, ‘Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, meih mbuo zoux bun yietc dauh yie nyei gorx-youz, maiv gunv ninh zoux gauh faix jiex wuov dauh, meih mbuo ziouc zoux bun yie aqv.’" 
Matthew25:41 “Hungh Diex gorngv mbuox yiem zaaix maengx wuov deix mienh, ‘Zuqc Tin-Hungh zioux nyei mienh aah! Simv nqoi yie! Mingh bieqc liuc leiz ziangx bun mienv nyei hungh caux ninh nyei bou yiem wuov guaax yietc liuz maiv daic nyei douz." 
Matthew25:42 Weic zuqc yie ngorc, meih mbuo maiv bun yie nyanc. Jaang nqaatv, meih mbuo maiv bun wuom yie hopv." 
Matthew25:43 Yie zoux ganh fingx mienh, meih mbuo yaac maiv zipv yie bieqc biauv. Yie maiv maaih lui-houx zuqv, meih mbuo maiv bun lui-houx yie zuqv. Yie butv baengc fai zuqc wuonx loh, meih mbuo yaac maiv mangc yie.’" 
Matthew25:44 “Ninh mbuo ziouc dau ninh, ‘Ziouv aac, yie mbuo ziangh haaix buatc meih ngorc fai jaang nqaatv, fai zoux ganh fingx mienh fai maiv maaih lui-houx zuqv, fai butv baengc fai zuqc wuonx jienv loh yaac maiv tengx meih?’" 
Matthew25:45 “Hungh Diex ziouc dau, ‘Yie mbuox zien meih mbuo, meih mbuo maiv tengx yietc dauh naaiv deix zoux faix jiex nyei mienh, meih mbuo yaac maiv tengx yie.’+”" 
Matthew25:46 Yesu aengx gorngv setv mueiz waac, “Hnangv naaic, naaiv deix oix zuqc cuotv mingh yietc liuz siouc zuiz. Mv baac kuv mienh wuov deix ziouc duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc.”" 
Matthew26:1 Yesu gorngv liuz naaiv deix yietc zungv waac, ninh mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx," 
Matthew26:2 “Meih mbuo hiuv duqv maaih i hnoi hnangv taux Siex Maengc Zipv aqv. Yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, ziouc zuqc zorqv jiu bun mienh ding ziepc nzaangc jaax.”" 
Matthew26:3 Wuov zanc sai mienh bieiv caux baeqc fingx nyei mienh gox gapv zunv yiem Kaa^yaa^faatv domh sai mienh nyei dinc," 
Matthew26:4 caangh laangh daav za'eix bingx jienv zorqv Yesu daix guangc. 
Matthew26:5 Mv baac ninh mbuo gorngv, “Naaiv deix jiex zipv nyei hnoi gu'nyuoz mbuo maiv dungx gaengh zorqv. Gamh nziex zuangx mienh haih lunc nzengc mv bei.”" 
Matthew26:6 Yesu yiem Mbe^taa^ni Laangz, butv jiex gomh huv baengc wuov dauh Simon nyei biauv." 
Matthew26:7 Nyanc jienv hnaangx nyei ziangh hoc, maaih dauh m'sieqv dorn dorh norm la'bieiv-baengh dapv buangv jaaix haic nyei youh ndaang daaih dox Yesu nyei m'nqorngv." 
Matthew26:8 Sai-gorx mbuo buatc hnangv naaic zoux, ninh mbuo qiex jiez haic ziouc gorngv, “Baeqc baeqc zaaux guangc zoux haaix nyungc?" 
Matthew26:9 Naaiv deix youh ndaang haih maaic duqv nyaanh camv haic bun mienh jomc mienh niaa.” 
Matthew26:10 Yesu hiuv duqv ninh mbuo hnangv haaix nor gorngv ninh ziouc mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo zoux haaix nyungc la'nyauv naaiv dauh m'sieqv dorn? Ninh hnangv naaiv nor zoux bun yie se longx haic aqv." 
Matthew26:11 Meih mbuo zanc-zanc maaih mienh jomc mienh caux meih mbuo yiem. Mv baac meih mbuo maiv duqv yie caux meih mbuo yietc liuz yiem. 
Matthew26:12 Ninh zorqv youh ndaang dox yie nyei sin, ninh zoux weic liuc leiz zangx yie nyei sei." 
Matthew26:13 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, maiv gunv mingh taux lungh ndiev haaix norm dorngx zunh naaiv kuv fienx, mienh ziouc gorngv naaiv dauh m'sieqv dorn zoux nyei jauv-louc weic jangx taux ninh.”" 
Matthew26:14 Wuov deix ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx maaih dauh, dongh mbuox heuc Yu^ndaatc I^saa^kaa^li^otc wuov dauh, mingh lorz sai mienh bieiv" 
Matthew26:15 naaic ninh mbuo, “Se gorngv yie zorqv Yesu jiu bun meih mbuo, meih mbuo bun haaix nyungc yie?” Sai mienh bieiv ziouc saauv faah ziepc norm loz-hnoi nyei zinh bun Yu^ndaatc." 
Matthew26:16 Yiem naaic daaih, Yu^ndaatc lorz qangx zorqv Yesu jiu bun ninh mbuo." 
Matthew26:17 Jiex dongh Maiv An Bingv nyei Njuov nyei Zipv daauh hnoi, sai-gorx mbuo daaih naaic Yesu, “Sai-Diex oix yie mbuo yiem haaix mbenc Siex Maengc Zipv nyei hnaangx bun Sai-Diex nyanc?”" 
Matthew26:18 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo bieqc zingh mingh lorz yietc laanh mienh, yaac mbuox ninh, ‘Sai-Diex gorngv, yie nyei ziangh hoc taux aqv. Yie caux yie nyei sai-gorx oix yiem meih nyei biauv jiex Siex Maengc Zipv.’+”"
