Matthew26:19 Sai-gorx mbuo ziouc ei Yesu nyei waac zoux, mingh mbenc Siex Maengc Zipv nyei hnaangx." 
Matthew26:20 Lungh maanz-hmuangx, Yesu caux ninh nyei ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx faaux dieh nyanc hnaangx." 
Matthew26:21 Nyanc jienv hnaangx wuov zanc, Yesu gorngv, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx maaih dauh oix maaic yie.”" 
Matthew26:22 Sai-gorx mbuo za'gengh! nzauh haic ziouc yietc dauh yietc dauh nyei naaic Yesu, “Ziouv aac, maiv zeiz yie saah?”" 
Matthew26:23 Yesu dau, “Dongh caux yie juangc nzormc guoqv njuov wuov dauh oix maaic yie." 
Matthew26:24 Yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, oix zuqc guei seix hnangv Ging-Sou gorngv nor. Mv baac maaic yie wuov dauh zungv zuqc kouv aqv. Ninh maiv dungx cuotv seix gauh longx.”" 
Matthew26:25 Maaic Yesu wuov dauh Yu^ndaatc gorngv, “Sai-Diex aah! Maiv zeiz yie saah?” Yesu dau, “Naaic se meih ganh gorngv aqv.”" 
Matthew26:26 Nyanc jienv wuov zanc, Yesu zorqv njuov daaih, laengz zingh liuz Tin-Hungh, ziouc maeqv nqoi bun ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo, yaac gorngv, “Zipv daaih nyanc aqv. Naaiv se yie nyei sin.”" 
Matthew26:27 Yesu aengx zorqv zaanv a'ngunc diuv daaih, laengz zingh liuz Tin-Hungh, ziouc bun ninh mbuo, yaac gorngv, “Meih mbuo yietc zungv gunv hopv maah!" 
Matthew26:28 Naaiv se yie nyei nziaamv weic liepc jiez Tin-Hungh nyei ngaengc waac. Se liouc cuotv weic bun Tin-Hungh guangc mienh camv nyei zuiz. 
Matthew26:29 Yie mbuox meih mbuo, yiem naaiv mingh, yie maiv caux meih mbuo hopv naaiv a'ngunc diuv. Zuov taux yiem yie nyei Die nyei guoqv cingx daaih duqv caux meih mbuo siang-hopv jiex.”" 
Matthew26:30 Ninh mbuo baaux liuz nzung, ziouc cuotv daaih, mingh wuov Ga'lanv Mbong mi'aqv." 
Matthew26:31 Wuov zanc Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx, “Ih muonz meih mbuo yietc zungv oix guangc jienv yie biaux, weic zuqc Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv, ‘Tin-Hungh oix daix ba'gi yungh nyei ziouv. Ba'gi yungh guanh ziouc nzaanx nzengc mi'aqv.’" 
Matthew26:32 Mv baac yie daic mingh, Tin-Hungh aengx bun yie nangh daaih, yie ziouc mingh Gaa^li^li Saengv ndaangc meih mbuo.”" 
Matthew26:33 Bide gorngv mbuox Yesu, “Maiv gunv ninh mbuo yietc zungv guangc Sai-Diex, yie yietc liuz maiv guangc.”" 
Matthew26:34 Yesu gorngv mbuox Bide, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih. Ih muonz, jai zungv maiv gaengh nqaaix, meih zungv maiv nyiemc yie buo nzunc.”" 
Matthew26:35 Bide gorngv, “Maiv gunv yie zuqc caux Sai-Diex daic, yie yietc liuz nyiemc, maiv guangc meih.” Wuov deix sai-gorx yietc zungv yaac fih hnangv nyei gorngv." 
Matthew26:36 Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mingh norm dorngx, mbuox heuc Getc^se^maa^ni. Yesu mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx, “Meih mbuo zueiz jienv naaiv zuov yie mingh wuov maengx daux gaux.”" 
Matthew26:37 Ninh ziouc dorh Bide caux Se^mbe^ndi nyei i dauh dorn caux jienv mingh. Wuov zanc Yesu haiz hnyouv huaang, nzauh duqv kouv haic," 
Matthew26:38 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie haiz za'gengh! nzauh haic, hnangv haih daic nyei nor. Meih mbuo caux yie yiem naaiv ging hnyouv zuov jienv oc.”" 
Matthew26:39 Yesu aengx jiex mingh deix ziouc mbaapv njiec, hmien taux ndau daux gaux gorngv, “Yie nyei Die aah! Se gorngv horpc nyei nor, tov Die zorqv nqoi yie oix zuqc hopv naaiv norm zaanv. Mv baac maiv dungx ei yie nyei eix. Oix zuqc ei Die nyei eix hnangv.”" 
Matthew26:40 Yesu aengx nzuonx taux wuov deix buo dauh sai-gorx wuov, buatc ninh mbuo m'njormh nzengc. Ninh ziouc mbuox Bide, “Meih mbuo zoux haaix nyungc caux yie zuov maiv duqv yietc norm ziangh hoc?" 
Matthew26:41 Oix zuqc ging jienv hnyouv daux gaux, tov Tin-Hungh maiv dungx bun meih mbuo buangh zuqc seix hnyouv nyei sic. Meih mbuo nyei hnyouv oix zoux horpc, mv baac sin zaangc mau haic.”" 
Matthew26:42 Yesu aengx mingh daux gaux da'nyeic nzunc. Ninh gorngv, “Yie nyei Die aah! Se gorngv naaiv norm zaanv yie simv maiv ndutv, za'gengh oix zuqc hopv nor, tov ei Die nyei eix zoux ziangx.”" 
Matthew26:43 Yesu aengx nzuonx taux sai-gorx mbuo wuov, buatc ninh mbuo m'njormh mi'aqv, weic zuqc m'zing nyuix haic, nungx maiv nqoi." 
Matthew26:44 Yesu aengx leih ninh mbuo, mingh daux gaux da'faam nzunc, yaac hnangv zinh ndaangc wuov nzunc nor daux gaux." 
Matthew26:45 Nqa'haav ninh aengx nzuonx sai-gorx mbuo wuov. Ninh gorngv, “Meih mbuo corc yiem naaic bueix m'njormh hitv kuonx? Mangc maah! Ziangh hoc taux aqv. Yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, zuqc jiu bun yiem zuiz-mienh nyei buoz-ndiev." 
Matthew26:46 Jiez sin daaih, mbuo mingh aqv. Mangc gaax wuov! Maaic yie wuov dauh mienh daaih taux aqv.”" 
Matthew26:47 Yesu gorngv waac zungv maiv gaengh setv, ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx nyei yietc dauh, mbuox heuc Yu^ndaatc, daaih taux. Aengx maaih sai mienh bieiv caux baeqc fingx nyei mienh gox paaiv daaih nyei mienh camv dorh jienv nzuqc ndaauv, nanv jienv ndiangx-ndonx, gan jienv daaih." 
Matthew26:48 Maaic Yesu wuov dauh jaa-ndaangc mbuox ziangx wuov deix, ninh oix zoux norm jangx-hoc bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv Yesu. Ninh gorngv, “Yie zom haaix dauh, se dongh meih mbuo oix zorqv wuov dauh aqv. Gunv zorqv aqv.”" 
Matthew26:49 Yu^ndaatc baeng zaqc nyei mingh taux Yesu wuov yaac gorngv, “Sai-Diex aah! Baengh orn nyei saah?” Ziouc zom ninh nyei hmien." 
Matthew26:50 Yesu gorngv, “Youz aac, meih oix zoux haaix nyungc gaanv zoux siepv aqv.” Wuov deix mienh ziouc daaih njiec buoz zorqv jienv Yesu." 
Matthew26:51 Maaih dauh caux Yesu yiem wuov nyei mienh baeng ninh nyei nzuqc ndaauv cuotv, hngaqv domh sai mienh nyei nouh, pai zuqc nouh nyei yietc bung m'normh ndutv mingh." 
Matthew26:52 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Zorqv meih nyei nzuqc ndaauv tapv jienv paiv maah! Haaix dauh longc nzuqc ndaauv, zungv oix zuqc laaix nzuqc ndaauv daic." 
Matthew26:53 Meih maiv hiuv fai? Yie haih tov yie nyei Die, nduqc dangh hnangv ninh ziouc paaiv fin-mienh baeng gauh camv ziepc nyeic guanh daaih tengx yie." 
Matthew26:54 Mv baac, se gorngv yie hnangv naaic zoux, sic hnangv haaix nor haih cuotv daaih doix Ging-Sou fiev horpc zuqc cuotv nyei waac?”" 
Matthew26:55 Yesu ziouc gorngv mbuox gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh, “Meih mbuo buatc yie hnangv zaqc baeng cingx daaih dorh jienv nzuqc ndaauv caux ndiangx-ndonx daaih zorqv yie? Yie hnoi-hnoi zueiz jienv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv njaaux mienh, meih mbuo yaac maiv zorqv." 
Matthew26:56 Mv baac naaiv deix yietc zungv sic cuotv daaih weic bun doix nzengc zinh ndaangc douc waac mienh fiev jienv Ging-Sou wuov deix waac.” Wuov zanc sai-gorx mbuo ziouc guangc jienv Yesu, biaux nzengc mi'aqv." 
Matthew26:57 Zorqv Yesu wuov deix mienh dorh ninh mingh taux Kaa^yaa^faatv domh sai mienh wuov. Maaih njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux mienh gox gapv zunv yiem wuov. 
Matthew26:58 Bide gan jienv mingh mv baac leih go deix nyei, taux domh sai mienh nyei biauv-hlen bieqc laatc gu'nyuoz. Ninh caux zuov biauv nyei baeng zueiz jienv wuov, oix muangx gaax, naaiv deix sic hnangv haaix nor." 
Matthew26:59 Sai mienh bieiv caux Gunv Sic Wuic nyei zuangx mienh lorz jaav zorng-zengx gox Yesu weic bun ninh zuqc daix. 
Matthew26:60 Mv baac maiv gunv maaih mienh camv daaih zoux jaav zorng-zengx, yaac lorz maiv duqv haaix nyungc gorn-baengx gox ninh. Zoux gau, maaih i dauh cuotv daaih" 
Matthew26:61 gorngv, “Naaiv laanh mienh gorngv, ‘Yie haih caeqv nzengc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv. Buo hnoi gu'nyuoz aengx ganh ceix jiez daaih.’+”" 
Matthew26:62 Domh sai mienh ziouc souv jiez daaih naaic Yesu, “Naaiv deix mienh hnangv naaiv nor gox meih, meih maiv dau fai?”" 
Matthew26:63 Mv baac Yesu maiv ko lo. Domh sai mienh aengx mbuox Yesu, “Yie ziangv jienv yietc liuz ziangh nyei Tin-Hungh hatc meih gorngv zaqc mbuox yie mbuo, meih za'gengh Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn, Giduc, zeiz fai maiv zeiz?”" 
Matthew26:64 Yesu dau, “Se hnangv meih gorngv nor.” Mv baac yie mbuox meih mbuo, nqa'haav hingv meih mbuo oix buatc yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, zueiz jienv Nernh Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh nyei mbiaauc maengx, yaac yiem wuov mbuonx njiec daaih.”" 
Matthew26:65 Domh sai mienh haiz naaiv deix waac, ziouc betv ninh ganh nyei lui yaac gorngv, “Ninh ki Tin-Hungh! Mbuo maiv zuqc lorz haaix dauh zoux zorng-zengx aqv. Meih mbuo ih zanc zungv haiz ninh ki Tin-Hungh." 
Matthew26:66 Meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor hnamv?” Ninh mbuo dau, “Ninh dorngc aqv. Zic duqv daic aqv.”" 
Matthew26:67 Ninh mbuo ziouc tuiv wuom-nzuih naetv Yesu nyei hmien yaac longc buoz-juonh mborqv. Maaih deix longc buoz-zaangv mbaix," 
Matthew26:68 yaac gorngv, “Meih naaic dauh Giduc aah! Cai gaax! Mbuox yie mbuo maah! Haaix dauh mborqv meih?”" 
Matthew26:69 Bide zueiz jienv biauv-hlen laatc gu'nyuoz wuov zanc, maaih dauh m'sieqv bou daaih gorngv, “Meih yaac gan wuov dauh Gaa^li^li Mienh, Yesu, maiv zeiz?”" 
Matthew26:70 Mv baac Bide dorng jienv zuangx mienh maiv nyiemc. Ninh gorngv, “Yie maiv hiuv duqv meih gorngv haaix nyungc.”" 
Matthew26:71 Gorngv liuz, Bide ziouc mingh taux wuov laatc gaengh. Aengx maaih dauh m'sieqv bou buatc ninh ziouc mbuox yiem wuov ga'hlen nyei mienh, “Naaiv dauh mienh yaac gan Naa^saa^letv Mungv nyei Yesu aex.”" 
Matthew26:72 Bide aengx maiv nyiemc. Ninh gorngv, “Ndouv haaix nyungc yaac ndouv duqv, yie maiv hiuv wuov laanh mienh.”" 
Matthew26:73 Yietc zanc jiex, souv jienv wuov ga'hlen nyei mienh daaih gorngv Bide, “Zeiz nyei. Meih gengh yietc dauh wuov deix mienh aqv. Meih gorngv waac nyei qiex bun meih ganh bingx maiv mbueiz aqv.”" 
Matthew26:74 Bide ziouc aengx ndouv jiez zioux gorngv, “Yie za'gengh! maiv hiuv duqv wuov laanh mienh.” Liemh zeih jai nqaaix aqv." 
Matthew26:75 Bide jangx zuqc Yesu gorngv nyei waac, “Jai zungv maiv gaengh nqaaix, meih maiv nyiemc yie buo nzunc.” Bide ziouc cuotv mingh nyiemv duqv kouv haic." 
Matthew27:1 Lungh ndorm nziouv, zuangx sai mienh bieiv caux Yiutai Mienh nyei mienh gox gapv zunv caangh laangh ziangx hnangv haaix nor haih daix Yesu." 
Matthew27:2 Ninh mbuo ziouc ndoh Yesu, ken mingh jiu bun Lomaa Zungx, Bilaatv." 
Matthew27:3 Maaic Yesu wuov dauh Yu^ndaatc buatc Yesu zuqc dingc zuiz wuov zanc, ninh hnyouv mun haic aengx dorh wuov deix faah ziepc norm zinh daaih tuix bun sai mienh bieiv caux mienh gox." 
Matthew27:4 Ninh gorngv, “Yie zoux dorngc zuiz aqv, weic zuqc yie maaic maiv maaih zuiz nyei mienh bun ninh zuqc daic.” Wuov deix mienh dau, “Naaic maaih haaix nyungc paanx taux yie mbuo? Naaiv meih ganh nyei sic aqv.”" 
Matthew27:5 Yu^ndaatc ziouc zoi wuov deix nyaanh guangc wuov zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv gu'nyuoz cuotv mingh, ziouc mingh ndiux jaang daic mi'aqv." 
Matthew27:6 Sai mienh bieiv nzauz naaiv deix nyaanh daaih gorngv, “Naaiv deix nyaanh se maaiz maengc nyaanh ziouc hnangv guoqv jienv nziaamv nor. Caux jienv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv wuov deix nyaanh dapv se dorngc leiz.”" 
Matthew27:7 Ninh mbuo ziouc caangh laangh daaih longc naaiv deix nyaanh maaiz nzong wuov dauh nanv nie zaangc nyei ndau, zoux ganh fingx mienh nyei zouv-gemh." 
Matthew27:8 Weic naaiv wuov nzong ndau maaih mbuox heuc “Maaih Nziaamv nyei Ndau” daaih taux ih jaax hnoi. 
Matthew27:9 Naaiv deix sic cuotv daaih doix-diuc douc waac mienh, Ye^le^mi, gorngv nyei waac. Ye^le^mi gorngv, “Ninh mbuo zorqv faah ziepc norm zinh, dongh I^saa^laa^en Mienh weic ninh dingc nyei jaax-zinh," 
Matthew27:10 longc maaiz nanv nie zaangc nyei ndau, hnangv Ziouv mbuox yie zoux nor.”" 
Matthew27:11 Wuov zanc, Yesu yiem Bilaatv Zungx nyei nza'hmien. Bilaatv naaic ninh, “Meih zoux Yiutai Mienh nyei hungh?” Yesu dau, “Zeiz nyei. Se hnangv meih gorngv nor.”" 
Matthew27:12 Mv baac mienh gox caux sai mienh bieiv gox ninh wuov zanc, ninh maiv dau haaix nyungc." 
Matthew27:13 Bilaatv ziouc naaic ninh, “Ninh mbuo gox meih naaiv deix yietc zungv sic meih maiv haiz fai?”" 
Matthew27:14 Mv baac Yesu yietc joux waac maiv dau ninh. Bilaatv za'gengh mbuoqc horngh haic. 
Matthew27:15 Hnyangx-hnyangx taux Siex Maengc Zipv, Lomaa Zungx maaih leiz bungx dauh wuonx loh nyei mienh ziux zuangx mienh tov bungx haaix dauh." 
Matthew27:16 Wuov zanc maaih dauh zuqc wuonx jienv loh nyei zuiz-mienh mbuox heuc Mbaa^lapv^mbatc. Haaix dauh yaac hiuv duqv ninh nyei. 
Matthew27:17 Zuangx mienh gapv zunv wuov zanc, Bilaatv naaic gaax ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo oix yie bungx haaix dauh? Bungx Mbaa^lapv^mbatc fai bungx Yesu, dongh mienh heuc Giduc wuov dauh?”" 
Matthew27:18 Bilaatv hiuv duqv zoux hlo wuov deix Yiutai Mienh mueic jieqv Yesu cingx daaih zorqv Yesu jiu bun ninh. 
Matthew27:19 Bilaatv zueiz jienv siemv zuiz weic wuov zanc, ninh nyei auv bun waac mingh mbuox ninh, “Maiv dungx zoux haaix nyungc bun wuov laanh kuv mienh weic zuqc a'hmuangx yie mbeix mbeix taux naaiv laanh mienh ziouc haiz hnyouv maiv longx yietc deix.”" 
Matthew27:20 Sai mienh bieiv caux mienh gox nduov zuangx mienh tov Bilaatv bungx Mbaa^lapv^mbatc, daix Yesu guangc." 
Matthew27:21 Bilaatv ziouc naaic zuangx mienh, “Naaiv deix i dauh, meih mbuo oix yie bungx haaix dauh?” Ninh mbuo dau, “Bungx Mbaa^lapv^mbatc.”" 
Matthew27:22 Bilaatv ziouc naaic, “Wuov nyungc, Yesu, dongh mienh heuc Giduc wuov dauh, meih mbuo oix yie hnangv haaix nor zoux?” Ninh mbuo yietc zungv dau, “Zorqv ninh ding jienv ziepc nzaangc jaax!”" 
Matthew27:23 Bilaatv aengx naaic ninh mbuo, “Wuov nyungc, ninh zoux dorngc haaix nyungc zuiz?” Zuangx mienh jaa heuc gauh mbui, “Zorqv ninh ding jienv ziepc nzaangc jaax maah!”" 
Matthew27:24 Bilaatv buatc ninh gorngv jienv mingh yaac maiv lamh longc, zungv gamh nziex zuangx mienh oix lunc nzengc. Ninh ziouc zorqv wuom dorng jienv zuangx mienh nzaaux buoz yaac gorngv, “Naaiv dauh mienh zuqc daic se maiv paanx taux yie. Naaiv yietc zungv ndortv zuqc meih mbuo ganh aqv.”" 
Matthew27:25 Zuangx mienh dongh joux waac dau, “Naaiv dauh mienh daic, liouc cuotv ninh nyei nziaamv, youh yie mbuo caux yie mbuo ganh nyei fun-faqv ndaam-dorng.”" 
Matthew27:26 Bilaatv ziouc bungx Mbaa^lapv^mbatc bun ninh mbuo. Mv baac Yesu, ninh bun zuqc biaav-bin mborqv liuz, jiu bun baeng dorh mingh ding ziepc nzaangc jaax." 
Matthew27:27 Bilaatv Zungx nyei baeng aengx dorh Yesu bieqc zungx nyei dinc gu'nyuoz. Wuov guanh baeng yietc zungv ziouc mingh weih jienv ninh. 
Matthew27:28 Ninh mbuo jaiv nqoi Yesu nyei lui-houx aengx zorqv deix lui-ndaauv-siqv tengx ninh buix jienv," 
Matthew27:29 yaac longc njimv ciqv norm hungh ningv ndongx jienv ninh nyei m'nqorngv. Ninh mbuo aengx zorqv luoqc diqc guaengv bun ninh nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz nanv jienv, aengx gueic njiec ninh nyei nza'hmien guatc doqc jatv ninh, yaac gorngv, “Yiutai Mienh nyei hungh aah! Ziangh duqv maanc fuix aqv!”" 
Matthew27:30 Ninh mbuo aengx tuiv wuom-nzuih naetv ninh, zorqv wuov diuh luoqc diqc guaengv mborqv ninh nyei m'nqorngv." 
Matthew27:31 Guatc doqc jatv liuz, ninh mbuo ziouc jaiv nqoi lui-ndaauv-siqv, aengx zorqv ninh ganh nyei lui tengx ninh zuqv jienv ziouc dorh ninh mingh ding ziepc nzaangc jaax." 
Matthew27:32 Ninh mbuo cuotv mingh wuov zanc, buangh zuqc dauh Sailin mienh, mbuox heuc Simon. Baeng ziouc aapv Simon ndaam Yesu nyei ziepc nzaangc jaax." 
Matthew27:33 Ninh mbuo mingh taux norm dorngx, mbuox heuc Gon^go^taa, eix leiz se M'nqorngv-Korqv Dorngx." 
Matthew27:34 Taux wuov ninh mbuo zorqv a'ngunc diuv peux jienv im nyei ga'naaiv bun Yesu hopv. Mv baac Yesu seix liuz, ziouc maiv hopv." 
Matthew27:35 Ninh mbuo zorqv Yesu ding jienv ziepc nzaangc jaax, aengx zorqv ninh nyei lui-houx daaih ndouv mangc weic bun nqoi." 
Matthew27:36 Nqa'haav ninh mbuo zueiz jienv wuov zuov mangc jienv ninh. 
Matthew27:37 Yiem Yesu nyei m'nqorngv gu'nguaaic ninh mbuo fiev jienv gox ninh wuov deix waac. Waac gorngv, “Naaiv se Yiutai Mienh nyei Hungh, Yesu.”" 
Matthew27:38 Ninh mbuo aengx ding i dauh zaqc baeng yiem Yesu nyei ga'hlen. Maaih dauh yiem mbiaauc maengx. Maaih dauh yiem zaaix maengx. 
Matthew27:39 Jiex jauv nyei mienh ki ninh, huangx jienv m'nqorngv gorngv," 
Matthew27:40 “Aav, meih oix caeqv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv, nqa'haav buo hnoi aengx ganh ceix jiez daaih ni! Njoux meih ganh aqv. Se gorngv meih zoux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn, njiec ziepc nzaangc jaax daaih maah!”" 
Matthew27:41 Sai mienh bieiv caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux mienh gox fih hnangv nyei jatv ninh. 
Matthew27:42 Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Ninh njoux duqv mienh mv baac maiv haih njoux ninh ganh orqc! Ninh zoux I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei Hungh! Se gorngv ninh ih zanc yiem ziepc nzaangc jaax njiec daaih, yie mbuo ziouc sienx ninh aqv." 
Matthew27:43 Ninh kaux Tin-Hungh yaac gorngv ninh zoux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn. Wuov nyungc, mbuo mangc gaax Tin-Hungh ih zanc za'gengh oix njoux ninh fai maiv njoux.”" 
Matthew27:44 Liemh ding ninh nyei ga'hlen wuov deix zaqc baeng fih hnangv nyei gorngv ki ninh. 
Matthew27:45 Lungh ziangx aanx nyei ziangh hoc, wuov norm deic-bung hmuangx nzengc taux njiec aanx buo norm ziangh hoc." 
Matthew27:46 Leih maiv go njiec aanx buo norm ziangh hoc, Yesu heuc qiex hlo nyei gorngv, “Eli, Eli, laa^maa^saa^mbakc^taa^ni!” Eix leiz se, “Yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Yie nyei Tin-Hungh! Meih weic haaix diuc guangc yie?”" 
Matthew27:47 Maaih deix souv jienv wuov nyei mienh haiz ninh gorngv naaiv deix waac ziouc gorngv, “Ov, ninh heuc E^li^yaa.”" 
Matthew27:48 Maaih dauh yiem wuov nyei mienh liemh zeih tiux mingh zorqv lai-nzeix-sortv ziemx a'ngunc diuv-sui daaih, longc luoqc diqc guaengv baqv jienv cunv bun Yesu hopv." 
Matthew27:49 Mv baac maaih deix yiem wuov nyei mienh gorngv, “Mbuo zuov mangc gaax, E^li^yaa gengh daaih njoux ninh nyei fai?”" 
Matthew27:50 Yesu aengx heuc nzunc mbui nyei liuz, ziouc dangx qiex mi'aqv." 
Matthew27:51 Yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv gu'nyuoz wuov kuaaiv mbaeqc gaengh ndie yiem gu'nguaaic mbaaix dorng ga'ndiev, zoux i maengx mi'aqv. Ndau yaac dongz, la'bieiv yaac mbaaix nzengc." 
Matthew27:52 Janx-daic zouv yaac nqoi mi'aqv. Tin-Hungh nyei cing-nzengc baeqc fingx, dongh daic mingh wuov deix, maaih camv nyei nangh daaih" 
Matthew27:53 cuotv zouv mingh. Yesu nangh daaih wuov zanc, wuov deix mienh bieqc wuov norm cing-nzengc nyei zingh, Ye^lu^saa^lem. Maaih mienh camv nyei duqv buatc ninh mbuo." 
Matthew27:54 Zuov Yesu wuov dauh baeng-bieiv caux ninh nyei baeng buatc ndau dongz yaac buatc nyungc-nyungc sic cuotv, haeqv ninh mbuo gamh nziex haic. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Naaiv dauh za'gengh Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn aqv.”" 
Matthew27:55 Yiem Gaa^li^li gan jienv Yesu daaih fu-sux ninh wuov deix m'sieqv dorn camv nyei yaac yiem wuov go deix nyei mangc. 
Matthew27:56 Wuov deix m'sieqv dorn maaih dauh Makv^ndaa^laa Mungv nyei Maa^li^yaa, maaih Yaagorpc caux Yosepv nyei maa Maa^li^yaa, yaac maaih Se^mbe^ndi nyei i dauh dorn nyei maa." 
Matthew27:57 Lungh maanz-hmuangx aqv, maaih dauh yiem Aa^li^maa^tie Mungv nyei butv-zoih mienh, mbuox heuc Yosepv, daaih taux. Ninh yaac zoux Yesu nyei sai-gorx." 
Matthew27:58 Yosepv mingh lorz Bilaatv, tov Yesu nyei sei. Bilaatv ziouc nqoi nzuih jiu Yesu nyei sei bun Yosepv." 
Matthew27:59 Yosepv ziouc longc siang-la'maah ndie beu jienv Yesu nyei sei," 
Matthew27:60 dorh mingh zangx siang-la'bieiv-zouv. Naaiv norm zouv Yosepv coqv hoqc zuqc daaih liouh ninh ganh longc. Zangx liuz, ninh tui kuaaiv domh la'bieiv mbaeqc jienv zouv-gaengh, ziouc mingh mi'aqv." 
Matthew27:61 Makv^ndaa^laa Mungv nyei Maa^li^yaa aengx caux ganh dauh Maa^li^yaa zueiz wuov, hmien huin mingh zouv wuov bung." 
Matthew27:62 Da'nyeic hnoi, se taux Dingh Gong Hnoi, sai mienh bieiv caux Faa^li^si Mienh mingh lorz Bilaatv," 
Matthew27:63 yaac gorngv, “Domh Gorx aac, yie mbuo jangx zuqc zinh ndaangc nduov mienh wuov dauh lov maiv gaengh daic wuov zanc ninh gorngv, ‘Nqa'haav buo hnoi yie aengx nangh daaih.’" 
Matthew27:64 Hnangv naaic, tov Domh Gorx njiec lingc paaiv baeng mingh longx-longx zuov jienv zouv taux da'faam hnoi. Nziex ninh nyei sai-gorx haih mingh nimc sei. Nqa'haav haih mbuox zuangx mienh, ‘Ninh daic mingh aengx nangh daaih aqv.’ Se gorngv hnangv naaic, gorngv-baeqc naaiv nzunc gauh waaic zinh ndaangc wuov nzunc aqv.”" 
Matthew27:65 Bilaatv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Wuov nyungc, gunv dorh baeng mingh ei meih mbuo haih zoux nyei longx-longx nyei zuov jienv zouv maah!”" 
Matthew27:66 Ninh mbuo ziouc mingh nqaapv jienv yienx zouv-gaengh, yaac bun baeng longx-longx nyei zuov jienv." 
Matthew28:1 Jiex liuz Dingh Gong Hnoi, bieqc wuov norm leiz-baaix nyei da'yietv hnoi, lungh aav lamh deix njang, Makv^ndaa^laa Mungv wuov dauh Maa^li^yaa, aengx caux ganh dauh Maa^li^yaa mingh mangc zouv." 
Matthew28:2 Liemh zeih ndau dongz seix nyei. Maaih dauh Ziouv nyei fin-mienh njiec daaih tui nqoi mbaeqc zouv-gaengh wuov kuaaiv la'bieiv, ziouc zueiz jienv wuov kuaaiv la'bieiv gu'nguaaic." 
Matthew28:3 Buatc ninh nyei fangx zeiv hnangv mba'lingc nor njang. Lui-houx mbopv baeqc nyei, hnangv sorng nor." 
Matthew28:4 Zuov zouv nyei baeng gengh! gamh nziex haic, sin zinx nzengc ziouc king wuov ndau mingh, hnangv daic mi'aqv nor." 
Matthew28:5 Fin-mienh gorngv mbuox wuov deix m'sieqv dorn, “Maiv dungx gamh nziex oc. Yie hiuv duqv meih mbuo lorz dongh zuqc ding ziepc nzaangc jaax daic wuov dauh Yesu." 
Matthew28:6 Mv baac ninh maiv yiem naaiv. Ninh ei ninh ganh gorngv nyei waac nangh daaih aqv. Daaih mangc mienh an ninh wuov norm dorngx maah! 
Matthew28:7 Mangc liuz, gaanv mingh mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx, ‘Ninh nangh daaih aqv. Ninh mingh Gaa^li^li ndaangc meih mbuo. Mingh taux wuov meih mbuo ziouc duqv buatc ninh aqv.’ Jangx jienv yie mbuox liuz meih mbuo naaiv deix waac oc.”" 
Matthew28:8 Wuov deix m'sieqv dorn yiem wuov zouv ziouc huaang-huaang zaang-zaang nyei tiux mingh mbuox sai-gorx. Ninh mbuo haiz gamh nziex nyei youc haiz njien-youh haic. 
Matthew28:9 Tiux jienv mingh gau, Yesu liemh zeih daaih buangh ninh mbuo yaac gorngv, “Baengh orn nyei saah?” Wuov deix m'sieqv dorn ziouc mingh nanv jienv Yesu nyei zaux yaac baaix ninh." 
Matthew28:10 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo maiv dungx gamh nziex. Mingh mbuox yie nyei gorx-youz mingh Gaa^li^li Saengv oc. Yiem wuov ninh mbuo ziouc duqv buatc yie.”" 
Matthew28:11 Wuov deix m'sieqv dorn gan jienv jauv mingh wuov zanc, maaih deix zuov zouv nyei baeng aengx nzuonx wuov zingh mbuox sai mienh bieiv ninh mbuo buatc cuotv daaih nyei nyungc-nyungc sic." 
Matthew28:12 Sai mienh bieiv caux mienh gox gapv zunv caangh laangh. Caangh laangh liuz, ziouc zorqv nyaanh camv nyei nzuiz bun baeng" 
Matthew28:13 yaac gorngv, “Meih mbuo oix zuqc gorngv, ‘Lungh muonz zanc meih mbuo m'njormh mingh, ninh nyei sai-gorx daaih nimc Yesu nyei sei mi'aqv.’" 
Matthew28:14 Se gorngv naaiv deix sic sing taux Bilaatv Zungx nyei m'normh yie mbuo ziouc tengx meih mbuo jaiv. Meih mbuo gunv bungx hnyouv.” 
Matthew28:15 Baeng zipv wuov deix nyaanh yaac ei jienv sai mienh bieiv caux mienh gox nyei waac zoux. Naaiv deix jauv-louc taux ih zanc Yiutai Mienh corc gorngv jienv yiem nyei. 
Matthew28:16 Wuov deix ziepc yietv dauh sai-gorx mingh Gaa^li^li Saengv, taux Yesu heuc ninh mbuo mingh wuov norm mbong." 
Matthew28:17 Yietv buatc Yesu ninh mbuo ziouc gueic njiec baaix ninh. Mv baac maaih deix corc hnyouv maiv dingc. 
Matthew28:18 Yesu daaih fatv deix mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yiem lungh yiem ndau nyei yietc zungv hatc maaz Tin-Hungh jiu bun yie mi'aqv." 
Matthew28:19 Weic naaiv, meih mbuo oix zuqc mingh njaaux maanc fingx mienh zoux yie nyei sai-gorx. Oix zuqc dengv Die, Dorn caux Singx Lingh nyei mbuox tengx ninh mbuo jiex wuom nyei leiz," 
Matthew28:20 yaac njaaux ninh mbuo ei nzengc yie mbuox meih mbuo zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc. Jangx jienv oc. Yie yietc liuz caux meih mbuo yiem taux baamh gen nyei setv mueiz.” 
Mark1:1 Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn, Yesu Giduc, nyei kuv fienx hnangv naaiv jiez gorn." 
Mark1:2 Douc waac mienh, I^saa^yaa, fiev jienv, “Tin-Hungh gorngv, ‘Mangc maah! Yie oix paaiv yie nyei douc fienx mienh mingh ndaangc liuc leiz meih nyei jauv.’+”" 
Mark1:3 “Maaih laanh mienh yiem deic-bung-huaang heuc jienv gorngv, ‘Oix zuqc liuc leiz Ziouv nyei jauv. Ninh nyei jauv oix zuqc koi zaqc nyei.’+”" 
Mark1:4 Yo^han daaih yiem deic-bung-huaang tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz yaac zunh doz gorngv, “Oix zuqc goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz, jiex wuom nyei leiz, Tin-Hungh ziouc guangc meih mbuo nyei zuiz.”" 
Mark1:5 Yiem Yu^ndie Deic caux Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei mienh camv cuotv mingh muangx Yo^han. Ninh mbuo nyiemc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz, Yo^han ziouc yiem wuov Jor^ndaen Ndaaih tengx ninh mbuo jiex wuom nyei leiz." 
Mark1:6 Yo^han zuqv nyei lui-houx longc lorh torh biei ndatv daaih, yaac longc ndopv-hlaang sai jienv jaaiv. Ninh nyanc nyei ga'naaiv se jopv-nyeic caux lomc nyei mueiz-dorngh." 
Mark1:7 Ninh zunh mbuox mienh, “Yie daaih ndaangc, maaih dauh nqa'haav daaih. Wuov dauh gauh hlo yie. Yie liemh maiv puix ndoqv njiec tengx ninh jaiv heh hlaang." 
Mark1:8 Yie longc wuom tengx meih mbuo jiex leiz, mv baac ninh oix longc Singx Lingh tengx meih mbuo jiex leiz.”" 
Mark1:9 Doix wuov deix hnoi-nyieqc, Yesu yiem Gaa^li^li Saengv nyei Naa^saa^letv Mungv mingh Yo^han wuov. Yo^han ziouc yiem wuov Jor^ndaen Ndaaih tengx ninh jiex wuom nyei leiz." 
Mark1:10 Yesu yiem wuom yietv cuotv daaih wuov zanc, ninh buatc lungh nqoi yaac buatc Singx Lingh hnangv norqc nqo nor njiec daaih nzopc jienv ninh." 
Mark1:11 Maaih qiex yiem gu'nguaaic lungh gorngv, “Meih se yie nyei Dorn-hnamv. Yie za'gengh a'hneiv haic meih.”" 
Mark1:12 Singx Lingh liemh zeih paaiv Yesu mingh wuov deic-bung-huaang. 
Mark1:13 Ninh ziouc yiem wuov feix ziepc hnoi zuqc Saadaan seix. Ninh caux hieh zoih yiem wuov, yaac maaih fin-mienh daaih liuc leiz ninh." 
Mark1:14 Yo^han zuqc wuonx jienv loh, nqa'haav Yesu mingh Gaa^li^li Saengv zunh Tin-Hungh nyei kuv fienx." 
Mark1:15 Ninh gorngv, “Ziangh hoc taux aqv. Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei hnoi fatv aqv. Meih mbuo oix zuqc goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz sienx kuv fienx.”" 
Mark1:16 Yesu yangh jauv gan jienv Gaa^li^li Koiv-Dorn hlen mingh wuov zanc, buatc i dauh zorqv mbiauz nyei mienh, Simon caux ninh nyei youz An^ndaa^lu, yiem wuov koiv borngz mbiauz." 
Mark1:17 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo daaih gan yie oc. Yie oix njaaux meih mbuo lorz mienh hnangv ih zanc meih mbuo lorz mbiauz nor.”" 
Mark1:18 Ninh mbuo liemh zeih guangc ninh mbuo nyei mungz, gan jienv Yesu mingh aqv." 
Mark1:19 Yesu jiex mingh deix aengx buatc Se^mbe^ndi nyei i dauh dorn, Yaagorpc caux Yo^han. Naaiv deix i muoz caux ninh mbuo nyei die yiem wuov nzangv liuc leiz mungz." 
Mark1:20 Yesu liemh zeih heuc ninh mbuo daaih, ninh mbuo ziouc guangc jienv ninh mbuo nyei die caux gong-mienh yiem wuov nzangv, gan Yesu mingh mi'aqv." 
Mark1:21 Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mingh taux Kaa^be^naa^um Mungv. Taux Dingh Gong Hnoi, Yesu mingh wuov wuic dorngh njaaux mienh." 
Mark1:22 Zuangx mienh mbuoqc horngh haic, weic zuqc ninh njaaux nyei waac maaih hatc maaz. Ninh njaaux maiv hnangv njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng." 
Mark1:23 Wuov zanc, liemh zeih maaih dauh zuqc hieh guaiv mienv muoqv nyei mienh bieqc ninh mbuo nyei wuic dorngh nauc-nauc nyei gorngv," 
Mark1:24 “Naa^saa^letv Mungv nyei Yesu aah! Meih maaih haaix nyungc guen zuqc yie mbuo? Meih daaih naaiv oix mietc nzengc yie mbuo? Meih haaix dauh yie hiuv nyei. Meih se Tin-Hungh nyei wuov dauh Cing-Nzengc Mienh.” 
Mark1:25 Yesu hatc wuov dauh mienv, “Maiv dungx ko lo. Cuotv naaiv dauh mienh nyei sin daaih maah!”" 
Mark1:26 Wuov dauh hieh guaiv mienv bun wuov dauh mienh ndatc ndatc nyei ciou, ngaauv-ngaauv nyei heuc jienv cuotv mi'aqv." 
Mark1:27 Zuangx mienh mbuoqc horngh haic, laanh ziouc naaic laanh, “Naaiv haaix nyungc orqv? Siang-njaaux nyei leiz fai ni? Naaiv laanh mienh maaih hatc maaz hatc hieh guaiv mienv, mienv yaac muangx ninh nyei waac.”" 
Mark1:28 Yesu nyei mengh dauh ziouc siepv-siepv nyei sing gormx Gaa^li^li Saengv. 
Mark1:29 Yesu mbuo cuotv wuic dorngh wuov zanc, baeng zaqc nyei mingh Simon caux An^ndaa^lu nyei biauv. Yaagorpc caux Yo^han yaac mingh nyei." 
Mark1:30 Simon nyei maa-diev butv baengc, sin jorm nyei, bueix jienv coux. Yesu yietv taux, mienh ziouc gorngv baengc mbuox ninh." 
Mark1:31 Yesu ziouc bieqc mingh nanv jienv baengc mienh nyei buoz, ken jiez sin daaih. Sin ziang naaic laangh mi'aqv. Ninh yaac fu-sux Yesu mbuo." 
Mark1:32 Dongh naaic hnoi mba'hnoi muotv, nziemx-yaangh nyei ziangh hoc, mienh dorh yietc zungv butv baengc caux zuqc mienv muoqv nyei mienh mingh Yesu wuov." 
Mark1:33 Mungv nyei zuangx mienh daaih gapv zunv wuov gaengh ndaangc. 
Mark1:34 Yesu ziouc zorc longx mienh camv nyei nyungc-nyungc baengc, yaac zunc cuotv camv-dauh mienv. Ninh yaac maiv bun mienv gorngv haaix nyungc weic zuqc mienv hiuv duqv ninh dongh haaix dauh." 
Mark1:35 Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei, lungh zungv maiv gaengh njang, Yesu jiez sin cuotv mingh lengh nyei dorngx, yiem wuov daux gaux." 
Mark1:36 Simon caux jienv ninh nyei doic cuotv mingh lorz. 
Mark1:37 Lorz buatc, ninh mbuo gorngv, “Zuangx mienh haaix dauh yaac lorz meih.”" 
Mark1:38 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Mbuo oix zuqc mingh huing nzuonx naaiv deix laangz weic zuqc yie yaac oix zuqc yiem wuov deix dorngx zunh doz. Yie daaih se weic hnangv naaiv nor zoux.”" 
Mark1:39 Yesu ziouc mingh gormx Gaa^li^li Saengv, yiem ninh mbuo nyei wuic dorngh zunh doz, yaac zunc mienv cuotv mienh nyei sin." 
Mark1:40 Maaih dauh butv gomh huv baengc nyei mienh daaih gueic njiec Yesu nyei nza'hmien tov ninh tengx. Ninh gorngv, “Se gorngv meih oix nor, meih haih zorc longx yie nyei baengc.”" 
Mark1:41 Yesu haiz korv-lienh haic ziouc sung buoz maan jienv ninh yaac gorngv, “Yie oix zorc nyei. Meih longx daaih maah!”" 
Mark1:42 Wuov dauh mienh nyei baengc liemh zeih tuix, ninh ziouc longx nzengc mi'aqv." 
Mark1:43 Yesu jaa waac hniev nyei, heuc ninh nzuonx aqv." 
Mark1:44 Ninh gorngv, “Naaiv deix sic cin-maanc maiv dungx mbuox haaix dauh oc. Baeng zaqc nyei mingh sai mienh wuov bun ninh zaah mangc. Mangc liuz, oix zuqc ei Mose fiev nyei leiz dorh saeng-kuv mingh ziec bun Tin-Hungh weic saax meih nyei uix, zoux zorng-zengx bun zuangx mienh hiuv duqv meih nyei baengc longx nzengc.”" 
Mark1:45 Mv baac wuov dauh mienh mingh taux haaix, qaqv gorngv naaiv deix jauv-louc. Ninh gorngv camv haic, Yesu cingx daaih maiv haih dorng zuangx bieqc haaix norm mungv. Ninh oix zuqc yiem zingh ga'nyiec lengh nyei dorngx, mv baac corc maaih faam-bung feix louc nyei mienh daaih lorz ninh." 
Mark2:1 Jiex liuz i ziex hnoi, Yesu aengx nzuonx Kaa^be^naa^um Mungv. Zuangx mienh haiz gorngv Yesu yiem biauv nyei." 
Mark2:2 Mienh camv! haic gapv zunv daaih ziouc buangv biauv nzengc. Liemh gaengh ndaangc yaac maiv maaih dorngx kungx. Yesu zunh doz bun zuangx mienh muangx wuov zanc," 
Mark2:3 maaih biei dauh mienh gaeng dauh butv baengc-mbai mienh daaih lorz Yesu. 
Mark2:4 Mv baac mienh camv haic, maiv noic duqv baengc mienh taux Yesu nyei nza'hmien. Ninh mbuo ziouc caeqv tong biauv-ngorh doix ziangx Yesu yiem wuov norm dorngx gu'nguaaic. Caeqv tong mingh, ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv baengc mienh bueix jienv jiuc bungx njiec." 
Mark2:5 Yesu buatc naaiv deix mienh sienx duqv longx, ninh ziouc mbuox butv baengc-mbai mienh, “Dorn aac, meih nyei zuiz duqv guangc liuz aqv.”" 
Mark2:6 Maaih deix njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng zueiz jienv wuov, yiem hnyouv hnamv," 
Mark2:7 “Naaiv dauh mienh fungc hnangv naaiv nor gorngv laeh? Ninh kungx gorngv ki Tin-Hungh hnangv. Cuotv liuz Tin-Hungh, maiv maaih haaix dauh guangc duqv mienh nyei zuiz.”" 
Mark2:8 Yesu liemh zeih hiuv duqv ninh mbuo hnangv haaix nor hnamv, ninh ziouc mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo nyei hnyouv weic haaix diuc hnangv naaiv nor hnamv?" 
Mark2:9 Mbuox baengc-mbai mienh, ‘Meih nyei zuiz duqv guangc liuz aqv.’ fai ‘Jiez sin daaih, dorh jienv meih nyei jiuc mingh aqv.’ Naaiv deix i joux waac, haaix joux gauh hec duqv gorngv?" 
Mark2:10 Mv baac yie oix bun meih mbuo hiuv duqv yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, yiem naaiv baamh gen maaih hatc maaz guangc zuiz.” Ninh ziouc mbuox naaic dauh butv baengc-mbai nyei mienh," 
Mark2:11 “Yie mbuox meih, jiez sin daaih, dorh jienv meih nyei jiuc nzuonx biauv aqv.”" 
Mark2:12 Zuangx mienh mangc jienv wuov zanc, naaiv dauh mienh liemh zeih jiez sin daaih dorh jienv ninh nyei jiuc cuotv mi'aqv. Ninh mbuo yietc zungv mbuoqc horngh haic ziouc ceng Tin-Hungh. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Yie mbuo gengh! maiv buatc jiex naaiv nyungc sic.”" 
Mark2:13 Yesu aengx cuotv mingh wuov Gaa^li^li Koiv-Dorn hlen. Maaih mienh camv nyei mingh ninh wuov, Yesu ziouc njaaux ninh mbuo." 
Mark2:14 Yesu aengx jiex mingh deix, buatc dauh siou nzou mienh, se An^fe^atc nyei dorn, Lewi, zueiz jienv wuov siou nzou zaamc ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh, “Daaih gan yie oc.” Lewi ziouc jiez sin gan jienv Yesu mingh aqv." 
Mark2:15 Yesu yiem Lewi nyei biauv nyanc hnaangx wuov zanc, maaih tengx Lomaa hungh jaa siou nzou nyei mienh caux mengh dauh waaic nyei mienh camv nyei gan Yesu. Maaih deix naaiv deix mienh yaac daaih caux Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo juangc dieh nyanc hnaangx." 
Mark2:16 Maaih deix fin-saeng, dongh Faa^li^si wuov jauv mienh, buatc Yesu caux mengh dauh waaic caux siou nzou nyei mienh juangc dieh nyanc hnaangx. Ninh mbuo ziouc naaic ninh nyei sai-gorx, “Ninh weic haaix diuc caux siou nzou nyei mienh caux mengh dauh waaic nyei mienh nyanc hnaangx?”" 
Mark2:17 Yesu haiz ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor gorngv, ninh ziouc dau, “Wangc siangx nyei mienh maiv qiemx zuqc ndie-sai. Kungx butv-baengc mienh hnangv qiemx zuqc ndie-sai. Yie maiv zeiz daaih heuc kuv mienh. Yie daaih heuc mengh dauh waaic nyei mienh.”" 
Mark2:18 Maaih nzunc tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov dauh Yo^han nyei sai-gorx caux Faa^li^si Mienh zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc. Maaih deix mienh daaih naaic Yesu, “Tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov dauh Yo^han caux Faa^li^si Mienh nyei sai-gorx zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc. Meih nyei sai-gorx weic haaix diuc maiv zei?”" 
Mark2:19 Yesu dau, “Siang-laangh corc yiem jienv cing-jaa-yinh nyei ziangh hoc, siang-laangh nyei kaeqv mienh haih zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc fai? Da'faanh siang-laangh corc caux ninh mbuo yiem, kaeqv mienh ziouc maiv zei aqv." 
Mark2:20 Mv baac hnoi-nyieqc oix taux, siang-laangh zuqc dorh mingh mi'aqv. Taux wuov zanc kaeqv mienh cingx daaih zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc." 
Mark2:21 “Maiv maaih haaix dauh longc siang-ndie mbiev loz-lui. Longc siang-ndie nor, siang-ndie haih soqv, betv loz-ndie bun mbiev nyei dorngx jaa huv hlo." 
Mark2:22 Yaac maiv maaih haaix dauh zorqv siang-a'ngunc diuv dapv loz-ndopv-mbuoqc. Dapv loz-mbuoqc nor, diuv haih zungx ndopv-mbuoqc mbaaix, ziang naaic cuotv nzengc. Mbuoqc yaac huv mi'aqv. Siang-a'ngunc diuv oix zuqc dapv siang-ndopv-mbuoqc.”" 
Mark2:23 Maaih norm Dingh Gong Hnoi, Yesu jiex mienh nyei mbiauh ndeic. Gan jauv mingh wuov zanc, ninh nyei sai-gorx nietv mbiauh dorv." 
Mark2:24 Faa^li^si Mienh ziouc mbuox Yesu, “Mangc gaax, ei mbuo nyei leiz, Dingh Gong Hnoi maiv horpc zuqc hnangv naaiv nor zoux. Meih nyei sai-gorx weic haaix diuc zoux?”" 
Mark2:25 Yesu dau, “Meih mbuo maiv doqc jiex naaiv deix jauv fai? Ndaawitv Hungh caux gan ninh wuov deix mienh hnyouv sie, qiemx zuqc nyanc nyei ziangh hoc, ninh mbuo hnangv haaix nor zoux?" 
Mark2:26 Dongh Aa^mbi^yaa^taa zoux domh sai mienh nyei ziangh hoc, Ndaawitv bieqc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei Ndopv-Liuh zorqv gengx Tin-Hungh nyei njuov nyanc. Kungx sai mienh ganh maaih leiz nyanc hnangv. Mv baac Ndaawitv nyanc yaac bun gan ninh wuov deix mienh caux jienv nyanc.”" 
Mark2:27 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Tin-Hungh liepc Dingh Gong Hnoi daaih tengx mienh, maiv zeiz zeix mienh daaih weic Dingh Gong Hnoi." 
Mark2:28 Weic naaiv, yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, zoux Dingh Gong Hnoi nyei Ziouv.”" 
Mark3:1 Maaih nzunc Yesu aengx bieqc wuic dorngh. Yiem wuov maaih dauh m'jangc dorn maaih jieqv buoz waaic nyei. 
Mark3:2 Maaih deix mienh oix lorz jauv gox Yesu, ninh mbuo ziouc cienh mangc jienv mangc gaax, ninh longc Dingh Gong Hnoi zorc wuov dauh mienh nyei buoz fai?" 
Mark3:3 Yesu mbuox buoz waaic wuov dauh mienh, “Meih daaih naaiv nza'hmien maengx oc.”" 
Mark3:4 Ninh ziouc naaic zuangx mienh, “Ei mbuo nyei leiz, Dingh Gong Hnoi mbuo haih zoux haaix nyungc? Haih zoux longx fai zoux waaic, njoux maengc fai hoic maengc?” Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv ko lo." 
Mark3:5 Yesu qiex jiez haic, huin naaiv bung, huin wuov bung, mangc ninh mbuo. Ninh yaac nzauh haic weic zuqc buatc ninh mbuo hnyouv ba'laqc ngaengc haic. Ninh aengx mbuox buoz waaic wuov dauh mienh, “Sung meih nyei buoz cuotv daaih maah!” Sung cuotv daaih, buoz ziouc longx nzengc mi'aqv." 
Mark3:6 Faa^li^si Mienh ziouc yiem wuic dorngh cuotv mingh caux deix gan Helotv Hungh wuov jauv mienh caangh laangh hnangv haaix nor haih daix Yesu. 
Mark3:7 Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx yiem wuov norm dorngx aengx cuotv mingh taux Gaa^li^li Koiv-Dorn hlen. Mienh camv nyei gan jienv mingh. Maaih deix yiem Gaa^li^li Saengv daaih. Maaih deix yiem Yu^ndie Saengv," 
Mark3:8 maaih deix yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh, maaih deix yiem I^ndu^me^aa Saengv, maaih deix yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih nyei dong bung maengx, maaih deix yiem Tailaqv caux Sai^ndorn Zingh daaih. Naaiv deix mienh daaih lorz Yesu weic zuqc ninh mbuo haiz gorngv ninh zoux nyei sic." 
Mark3:9 Mienh za'gengh! camv haic, Yesu ziouc mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx liuc leiz ziangx yietc poux nzangv-dorn daaih mbungh jienv zipv ninh. Nzauh heix zuangx mienh haih mbengx zuqc ninh." 
Mark3:10 Weic zuqc ninh zorc mienh camv nyei baengc longx, maaih baengc nyei mienh haaix dauh yaac oix mbengx jienv mingh hluo Yesu." 
Mark3:11 Zuqc mienv muoqv nyei mienh haaix zanc buatc Yesu ziouc mbaapv njiec Yesu nyei nza'hmien heuc jienv gorngv, “Meih dongh Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn aqv.”" 
Mark3:12 Yesu hatc mienv cin-maanc maiv dungx gorngv ninh dongh haaix dauh. 
Mark3:13 Jiex daaih Yesu faaux wuov jiex mbong, yaac heuc dongh ninh oix longc nyei mienh daaih lorz ninh. Ninh mbuo ziouc daaih taux ninh wuov." 
Mark3:14 Yesu ginv cuotv ziepc nyeic laanh mienh yaac heuc ninh mbuo zoux gong-zoh. Ninh mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie ginv meih mbuo daaih caux yie yiem yaac oix paaiv meih mbuo mingh zunh doz," 
Mark3:15 yaac bun meih mbuo maaih hatc maaz zunc mienv cuotv.” 
Mark3:16 Yesu ginv wuov deix ziepc nyeic laanh se Simon, (Yesu aengx tengx ninh cuotv norm mbuox heuc Bide)," 
Mark3:17 aengx maaih Se^mbe^ndi nyei i dauh dorn, Yaagorpc caux Yo^han, (Yesu tengx naaiv deix i muoz cuotv mbuox heuc Mbo^aa^ne^ye, eix leiz se mba'ong nyei dorn.)" 
Mark3:18 Aengx maaih An^ndaa^lu, Filipv, Mbaa^to^lo^miu, Matv^taai, Tomatv, An^fe^atc nyei dorn, Yaagorpc, Tatv^nde^atc, hnamv guoqv zaangc wuov dauh Simon," 
Mark3:19 caux maaic Yesu wuov dauh Yu^ndaatc I^saa^kaa^li^otc. 
Mark3:20 Yesu ziouc bieqc norm biauv mi'aqv. Mienh camv haic aengx gapv zunv daaih. Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx liemh maiv maaih ziangh hoc nyanc hnaangx. 
Mark3:21 Yesu nyei biauv zong mienh haiz naaiv deix sic, ninh mbuo ziouc cuotv mingh oix zorqv ninh, weic zuqc mienh gorngv, “Ninh maiv nzang aqv.”" 
Mark3:22 Maaih deix yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh daaih nyei njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng gorngv, “Ninh zuqc Mbe^en^se^mbun mienv muoqv hnangv. Naaiv dauh mienv nyei hungh bun ninh maaih lingc zunc mienv cuotv.”" 
Mark3:23 Yesu ziouc heuc ninh mbuo daaih ninh wuov yaac longc waac-beiv caux ninh mbuo gorngv. Ninh gorngv, “Saadaan hnangv haaix nor haih zunc Saadaan ganh cuotv?" 
Mark3:24 Se gorngv maaih norm guoqv bun nqoi zoux ziex jauv, ganh nyei guoqv zaangc mienh caux ganh nyei guoqv zaangc mienh mborqv jaax, wuov norm guoqv ziouc baaic mi'aqv." 
Mark3:25 Se gorngv yietc biauv mienh bun nqoi, maiv dongh hnyouv, naaiv dauh caux wuov dauh mborqv jaax, jaa-dingh ziouc baaic nzengc." 
Mark3:26 Hnangv naaic, se gorngv Saadaan nyei guoqv bun nqoi zoux ziex guanh, naaiv guanh caux wuov guanh mborqv jaax, ninh nyei guoqv ziouc baaic mi'aqv." 
Mark3:27 “Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih bieqc mienh henv mienh nyei biauv caangv ninh nyei ga'naaiv. Oix zuqc ndoh jienv wuov dauh mienh henv mienh ndaangc cingx daaih haih caangv duqv ninh nyei ga'naaiv. 
Mark3:28 “Yie mbuox zien meih mbuo, baamh mienh baamz nyei yietc zungv zuiz caux gorngv ki nyei yietc zungv waac, Tin-Hungh haih guangc nzengc." 
Mark3:29 Mv baac haaix dauh gorngv ki Singx Lingh, Tin-Hungh yietc liuz maiv guangc wuov dauh nyei zuiz, weic zuqc ninh baamz nyei zuiz se ninh ganh oix zuqc yietc liuz ndaam-dorng.”" 
Mark3:30 (Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic zuqc maaih deix mienh gorngv, “Ninh zuqc hieh guaiv mienv muoqv ninh.”)" 
Mark3:31 Yesu nyei maa caux ninh nyei youz mbuo daaih taux, souv jienv ga'nyiec maengx mbuox mienh bieqc mingh heuc Yesu." 
Mark3:32 Mienh camv nyei zueiz huing gormx Yesu, ninh mbuo ziouc mbuox ninh, “Fin-Saeng aac, meih nyei maa caux meih nyei youz mbuo yiem ga'nyiec lorz meih.”" 
Mark3:33 Yesu dau, “Haaix dauh zoux yie nyei maa, zoux yie nyei muoz-doic?”" 
Mark3:34 Ninh mangc zueiz huing gormx ninh wuov deix mienh yaac gorngv, “Mangc maah! Naaiv deix mienh se yie nyei maa caux yie nyei muoz-doic." 
Mark3:35 Haaix dauh zoux ei Tin-Hungh nyei eix, wuov dauh zoux yie nyei muoz-doic yaac zoux yie nyei maa.”" 
Mark4:1 Aengx maaih nzunc Yesu yiem Gaa^li^li Koiv-Dorn hlen jiez gorn njaaux mienh. Mienh camv! haic weih jienv ninh, ninh ziouc bieqc poux nzangv zueiz jienv, nzaeng jiex mingh deix. Zuangx mienh yiem wuov mbienx." 
Mark4:2 Ninh longc waac-beiv njaaux camv-nyungc ninh mbuo. Njaaux wuov zanc ninh gorngv," 
Mark4:3 “Muangx oc, maaih laanh mienh cuotv mingh haaz nyim." 
Mark4:4 Haaz nyei ziangh hoc, maaih deix nyim ndortv zuqc jauv. Norqc daaih nyanc nzengc mi'aqv." 
Mark4:5 Maaih deix nyim ndortv zuqc la'bieiv-lomc, maiv maaih nie camv nyei dorngx. Nie maiv hoz, nyim ziouc guqc nyaah siepv." 
Mark4:6 Nyutc cuotv daaih doqc ziouc pui nyaux nzengc weic zuqc nzungh maiv ndo. 
Mark4:7 Maaih deix nyim ndortv zuqc njimv-lomc. Njimv hlo daaih mbiorngz jienv, maiv haih ziangh nyim." 
Mark4:8 Maaih deix nyim ndortv zuqc ndau-longx, cuotv daaih ziangh duqv gitv. Maaih deix yietc gouv duqv faah ziepc gouv, maaih deix duqv luoqc ziepc gouv, maaih deix duqv yietc baeqv gouv.”" 
Mark4:9 Yesu yaac gorngv, “Haaix dauh maaih m'normh oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx longx.”" 
Mark4:10 Zuangx mienh nzuonx nzengc, wuov deix ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx caux deix gan Yesu nyei mienh tov Yesu porv mengh wuov diuh waac-beiv nyei eix leiz." 
Mark4:11 Yesu dau, “ Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh wuov deix gem jienv nyei sic Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo hiuv mi'aqv. Mv baac ga'nyiec nyei mienh kungx haiz naaiv deix yietc zungv sic benx waac-beiv hnangv." 
Mark4:12 Weic naaiv, ‘Ninh mbuo ndongc haaix mangc yaac mangc maiv buatc, ndongc haaix muangx yaac muangx maiv bieqc hnyouv. Se gorngv ninh mbuo mengh baeqc nor, nziex ninh mbuo haih goiv hnyouv lorz Tin-Hungh. Tin-Hungh ziouc guangc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz.’+”" 
Mark4:13 Yesu aengx naaic ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo maiv mengh baeqc naaiv diuh waac-beiv fai? Wuov nyungc, meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor haih mengh baeqc ganh diuh?" 
Mark4:14 Haaz nyim nyei mienh haaz nyei nyim se Tin-Hungh nyei kuv fienx. 
Mark4:15 Maaih deix mienh se hnangv ndortv zuqc jauv wuov deix nyim nor. Mienh haiz liuz kuv fienx, Saadaan liemh zeih daaih zorqv yiem hnyouv wuov deix kuv fienx cuotv mi'aqv." 
Mark4:16 Aengx maaih deix mienh se hnangv ndortv zuqc la'bieiv-lomc nyei nyim. Yietv haiz Tin-Hungh nyei kuv fienx ziouc a'hneiv zipv. 
Mark4:17 Mv baac se hnangv kuv fienx njiec nzungh maiv ndo, sienx maiv lauh. Ninh mbuo laaix kuv fienx buangh zuqc sic fai zuqc mienh zoux doqc, ninh mbuo ziouc cuotv mi'aqv." 
Mark4:18 Maaih deix mienh yaac hnangv haaz ndortv zuqc njimv-lomc wuov deix nyim. Ninh mbuo haiz Tin-Hungh nyei waac," 
Mark4:19 mv baac laaix seix zaangc nyei jauv kuonx hnyouv fai laaix hnamv zinh nyaanh, fai laaix mauv oix duqv nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv, mbiorngz jienv Tin-Hungh nyei waac, nyim ziouc maiv haih jauh aqv." 
Mark4:20 Mv baac maaih deix mienh hnangv ndortv zuqc ndau-longx wuov deix nyim. Ninh mbuo haiz Tin-Hungh nyei waac ziouc zipv daaih, yaac ziangh duqv gitv. Maaih deix yietc gouv duqv faah ziepc gouv, maaih deix duqv luoqc ziepc gouv, maaih deix duqv yietc baeqv gouv.”" 
Mark4:21 Yesu aengx mbuox ninh mbuo, “Maaih haaix dauh diemv zieqc dang zorqv tongv nqopv jienv fai don coux-ndiev? Ninh maiv zeiz zorqv dang don jienv dang nyei baaih fai?" 
Mark4:22 Maiv gunv maaih haaix nyungc bingx jienv mv baac oix cuotv daaih. Maiv gunv maaih haaix nyungc gem jienv mv baac oix mbiaangx yaangh cuotv daaih. 
Mark4:23 Haaix dauh maaih m'normh oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx longx oc.” 
Mark4:24 Ninh yaac mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo oix zuqc longc hnyouv muangx longx. Meih mbuo longc haaix nyungc hlaau bun mienh, Tin-Hungh yaac longc wuov nyungc hlaau bun meih mbuo, zungv jaa gauh camv deix." 
Mark4:25 Weic zuqc haaix dauh maaih nyei, ninh oix jaa duqv gauh camv. Haaix dauh maiv maaih, liemh ninh maaih diqv dien, zungv oix zuqc zorqv mingh.”" 
Mark4:26 Yesu gorngv jienv mingh. “Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh se hnangv laanh mienh mingh haaz nyim wuov ndeic. 
Mark4:27 Lungh muonz zanc ninh bueix m'njormh. Lungh hnoi zanc jiez sin zoux gong, mv baac nyim ganh guqc nyaah hlo daaih. Wuov laanh mienh yaac maiv hiuv duqv nyim hnangv haaix nor haih hlo." 
Mark4:28 Ndau ganh bun nyim cuotv, bun ga'naaiv hlo daaih ziangh nyim. Da'yietv buatc cuotv miuh, hlo daaih ziouc bau, aengx cuotv mbiauh dorv jauh nyei." 
Mark4:29 Mbiauh zuoqc nyei ziangh hoc, wuov laanh mienh ziouc longc ninh nyei limh ngau mingh gaatv, weic zuqc siou mbiauh nyei ziangh hoc taux aqv.”" 
Mark4:30 Yesu naaic, “Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh se hnangv haaix nor? Mbuo oix zuqc longc haaix nyungc waac-beiv cingx daaih beiv duqv zuqc?" 
Mark4:31 Se beiv norm lai-jaaix nyim zuangx njiec ndau. Yiem lungh ndiev, lai-jaaix nyim gauh faix jiex." 
Mark4:32 Zuangx njiec ndau zunx cuotv hlo daaih, gauh hlo jiex nyungc-nyungc lai. Nquaah yaac hlo, norqc zungv daaih zoux lauz bingx laangh.”" 
Mark4:33 Yesu aengx longc naaiv nyungc waac-beiv zunh doz bun zuangx mienh muangx. Ziux mienh haih mengh baeqc nyei, ninh gorngv bun ninh mbuo muangx." 
Mark4:34 Ninh kungx longc waac-beiv njaaux ninh mbuo hnangv. Ganh nyungc waac ninh maiv longc. Mv baac kungx ninh ganh caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo yiem nyei ziangh hoc, ninh porv mengh nyungc-nyungc bun ninh mbuo muangx." 
Mark4:35 Dongh wuov hnoi lungh maanz-hmuangx, Yesu mbuox sai-gorx, “Mbuo mingh wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv-dorn orqc?”" 
Mark4:36 Ninh mbuo ziouc leih nqoi zuangx mienh, bieqc Yesu zueiz jienv wuov poux nzangv, dorh ninh mingh mi'aqv. Aengx maaih deix nzangv gan jienv mingh." 
Mark4:37 Mingh gau, liemh zeih borngz gorng domh nziaaux, buonc wuom jiez laangc nqomz bieqc nzangv. Wuom aav lamh buangv nzangv aqv." 
Mark4:38 Mv baac Yesu yiem nzangv-dueiv nzomz jienv nzomz-dauh m'njormh. Sai-gorx mingh heuc ninh nyie yaac gorngv, “Sai-Diex aah! Sai-Diex! Mbuo ndortv wuom daic nzengc aqv loh! Meih maiv nzauh fai?”" 
Mark4:39 Yesu jiez sin daaih hatc nziaaux yaac hatc wuom-laangc, “Dingh aqv!” Nziaaux ziouc sienc mi'aqv. Wuom-laangc yaac dingh. Sekv nzengc mi'aqv." 
Mark4:40 Yesu naaic sai-gorx, “Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc gamh nziex? Meih mbuo corc maiv sienx kaux yie?”" 
Mark4:41 Sai-gorx mbuo gengh! gamh nziex haic. Laanh ziouc naaic laanh, “Naaiv laanh mienh haaix dauh orqv? Liemh nziaaux caux wuom-laangc yaac muangx ninh nyei waac.”" 
Mark5:1 Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx jiex wuov ngaanc ziqc Gaa^li^li Koiv-Dorn, taux Ge^laa^saa Deic." 
Mark5:2 Yesu cuotv nzangv wuov zanc, maaih laanh mienh yiem wuov zouv-gemh cuotv daaih buangh zuqc ninh. Naaiv laanh mienh maaih hieh guaiv mienv yiem ninh nyei sin." 
Mark5:3 Ziex nzunc mienh longc hlieqv-limc ndoh jienv buoz, hlieqv-kou kou jienv zaux, mv baac maiv maaih haaix dauh ndoh duqv jienv. Limc, ninh cutv dangx nzengc. Hlieqv-kou yaac wuotv nauv nzengc. Maiv maaih haaix dauh maaih qaqv gaux borngz duqv hingh ninh." 
Mark5:4  
Mark5:5 Ninh yiem wuov zouv-gemh yaac yiem mbong, lungh hnoi lungh muonz heuc jienv jiex naaiv jiex wuov, yaac zorqv la'bieiv guetv ninh ganh nyei sin." 
Mark5:6 Wuov laanh mienh corc yiem go nyei, ninh buatc Yesu ziouc tiux jienv mingh taux Yesu nyei nza'hmien gueic njiec baaix." 
Mark5:7 Ninh njiec qaqv heuc qiex mbui nyei, “Yiem Hlang Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn, Yesu aah! Meih daaih yie naaiv zoux haaix nyungc? Yie ziangv jienv Tin-Hungh tov meih maiv dungx zeix yie.”" 
Mark5:8 Ninh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic zuqc Yesu mbuox liuz ninh, “Hieh guaiv mienv aah! Cuotv naaiv laanh mienh daaih maah!”" 
Mark5:9 Yesu ziouc naaic ninh, “Meih nyei mbuox heuc haaix nyungc?” Ninh dau, “Yie nyei mbuox heuc ‘Guanh,’ weic zuqc yie mbuo maaih camv haic.”" 
Mark5:10 Ninh yaac qaqv tov Yesu maiv dungx zunc ninh mbuo cuotv naaiv norm deic-jaaix. 
Mark5:11 Maaih yietc domh guanh dungz yiem wuov jiex mbaiv lorz nyanc. 
Mark5:12 Mienv ziouc tov Yesu, “Bun yie mbuo mingh bieqc wuov guanh dungz maah!”" 
Mark5:13 Yesu ziouc nqoi nzuih ninh mbuo. Hieh guaiv mienv ziouc cuotv wuov laanh mienh aengx bieqc dungz mi'aqv. Wuov guanh dungz, leih maiv go i cin dauh, ziouc tiux njiec kamx, ndortv koiv-dorn, daic nzengc mi'aqv." 
Mark5:14 Yungz dungz nyei mienh ziouc biaux mi'aqv, mingh zunh naaiv deix sic mbuox zingh gu'nyuoz caux zingh ga'nyiec nyei fiuv-laangz nyei mienh muangx. Mienh ziouc cuotv mingh mangc gaax maaih haaix nyungc sic cuotv." 
Mark5:15 Mingh taux Yesu wuov, ninh mbuo buatc zinh ndaangc zuqc guanh mienv muoqv wuov laanh mienh zuqv jienv lui-houx zueiz jienv wuov, benx mienh longx mienh aqv. Ninh mbuo ziouc gamh nziex haic." 
Mark5:16 Buatc naaiv deix sic cuotv nyei mienh gorngv mbuox zinh ndaangc maaih mienv wuov laanh mienh nyei jauv caux dungz nyei sic bun zuangx mienh muangx. 
Mark5:17 Ninh mbuo ziouc tov Yesu cuotv ninh mbuo nyei deic-jaaix. 
Mark5:18 Yesu bieqc nzangv wuov zanc, dongh zinh ndaangc maaih mienv yiem sin wuov laanh mienh tov Yesu, “Yie tov caux meih mingh oc.”" 
Mark5:19 Mv baac Yesu maiv laengz nzuih, mbuox ninh, “Oix zuqc nzuonx biauv gorngv mbuox meih nyei hmuangv doic Ziouv hnangv haaix nor tengx, hnangv haaix nor korv-lienh meih.”" 
Mark5:20 Wuov laanh mienh ziouc mingh aqv. Mingh gormx Totv^mbu^li Saengv zunh mbuox mienh Yesu hnangv haaix nor tengx ninh. Zuangx mienh mbuoqc horngh haic aqv. 
Mark5:21 Yesu bieqc nzangv nzuonx wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv-dorn, maaih mienh camv nyei yiem wuov koiv-dorn hlen weih gormx Yesu." 
Mark5:22 Maaih dauh gunv wuic dorngh nyei mienh, mbuox heuc Yailatv, daaih taux. Yietv buatc Yesu, ninh ziouc mbaapv njiec Yesu nyei zaux-hlen" 
Mark5:23 qaqv tov ninh, “Yie nyei sieqv butv baengc hniev haic, oix daic aqv. Tov meih mingh maan jienv ninh, zorc ninh nyei baengc longx, njoux cuotv ninh nyei maengc maah!”" 
Mark5:24 Yesu ziouc gan jienv ninh mingh aqv. Mienh camv! haic gan jienv mingh, mbengx zuqc Yesu." 
Mark5:25 Maaih dauh m'sieqv dorn butv baengc-hlutv duqv ziepc nyeic hnyangx, hoic ninh kouv haic." 
Mark5:26 Lorz ndie-sai camv nyei zorc, zungv zaaux nzengc ninh nyei nyaanh. Baengc yaac maiv heng jienv njiec, zungv jaa hniev." 
Mark5:27 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn haiz mienh gorngv jiex Yesu nyei jauv, ninh ziouc mbengx jienv bieqc wuov guanh mienh. Ninh mingh taux Yesu nyei nqa'haav nqaang hluo Yesu nyei lui," 
Mark5:28 yaac yiem hnyouv hnamv, “Da'faanh yie hluo zuqc ninh nyei lui hnangv, yie nyei baengc ziouc longx aqv.”" 
Mark5:29 Yietv hluo liuz, ninh hlutv nyei nziaamv ziouc liemh zeih dingh mi'aqv. Yaac haiz ganh nyei sin zaangc baengc longx nzengc mi'aqv." 
Mark5:30 Yesu liemh zeih hiuv duqv maaih deix ninh nyei qaqv cuotv mingh tengx mienh zorc baengc, ninh ziouc yiem zuangx mienh gu'nyuoz guinh sin yaac naaic, “Haaix dauh hluo zuqc yie nyei lui?”" 
Mark5:31 Ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo dau, “Sai-Diex aah! Mienh ndongc naaic camv mbengx zuqc Sai-Diex. Meih corc gorngv, ‘Haaix dauh hluo zuqc yie?’+”" 
Mark5:32 Mv baac Yesu mangc naaiv mangc wuov, mangc gaax, haaix dauh hluo zuqc ninh." 
Mark5:33 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn hiuv duqv Yesu hnangv haaix nor tengx ninh, ziouc gamh nziex haic, sin zinx nzengc, daaih gueic njiec Yesu nyei zaux-hlen, yaac zorqv ninh nyei jauv-louc gorngv nzengc mbuox Yesu." 
Mark5:34 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh, “M'dauh m'sieqv dorn aah! Weic zuqc meih sienx yie, meih nyei baengc longx mi'aqv. Baengh orn nyei nzuonx aqv oc. Meih nyei baengc tuix nzengc aqv.”" 
Mark5:35 Yesu corc gorngv jienv waac wuov zanc, maaih deix mienh yiem gunv wuic dorngh wuov dauh mienh, Yailatv, nyei biauv, daaih mbuox Yailatv, “Meih nyei sieqv daic mi'aqv. Maiv zuqc la'nyauv fin-saeng aqv.”" 
Mark5:36 Yesu maiv muangx ninh mbuo nyei waac. Ninh gorngv mbuox gunv wuic dorngh nyei mienh, “Maiv dungx gamh nziex. Kungx oix zuqc sienx hnangv.”" 
Mark5:37 Ninh yaac maiv bun haaix dauh gan ninh mingh. Kungx dorh Bide, Yaagorpc caux Yaagorpc nyei youz, Yo^han, mingh hnangv." 
Mark5:38 Mingh taux wuic dorngh nyei mienh gox nyei biauv, Yesu buatc mienh lunc nzengc, yaac mbiouh mbiouh nyei nyiemv." 
Mark5:39 Yesu bieqc mingh mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo zoux haaix nyungc lunc nzengc? Weic haaix diuc mbiouh mbiouh nyei nyiemv? Naaiv dauh fu'jueiv maiv zeiz daic. Ninh m'njormh hnangv.”" 
Mark5:40 Mv baac zuangx mienh jatv Yesu, Yesu ziouc zunc ninh mbuo cuotv nzengc, aengx dorh wuov dauh fu'jueiv nyei diex maac caux ninh nyei buo dauh sai-gorx gan ninh bieqc fu'jueiv yiem wuov norm dorngx." 
Mark5:41 Yesu nanv jienv wuov dauh fu'jueiv nyei buoz yaac gorngv “Taa^li^taa ku^mi!” (eix leiz se “Sieqv-faix aah! Yie mbuox meih, jiez sin daaih maah!”)" 
Mark5:42 Wuov dauh sieqv liemh zeih jiez sin daaih yangh jauv aqv. Wuov zanc ninh nyei hnyangx-jeiv duqv ziepc nyeic hnyangx. Naaiv deix sic cuotv daaih, zuangx mienh za'gengh! mbuoqc horngh haic aqv." 
Mark5:43 Yesu hatc ninh mbuo cin-maanc maiv dungx gorngv naaiv deix sic mbuox haaix dauh, yaac gorngv, “Lorz deix ga'naaiv bun naaiv dauh sieqv nyanc oc.”" 
Mark6:1 Yesu leih wuov norm dorngx, aengx nzuonx ninh ganh nyei buonv-mungv. Ninh nyei sai-gorx yaac gan jienv mingh." 
Mark6:2 Taux Dingh Gong Hnoi ninh yiem wuov wuic dorngh njaaux mienh. Mienh camv yiem wuov, haiz ninh njaaux ziouc peix fuc haic. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Ninh yiem haaix duqv naaiv deix banh zeic? Ninh duqv nyei cong-mengh se haaix nyungc cong-mengh cingx haih zoux naaiv deix mbuoqc horngh nyei sic?" 
Mark6:3 Ninh zoux wuov dauh ndiangx-zaangc maiv zeiz? Zoux Maa^li^yaa nyei dorn, Yaagorpc, Yosepv, Yu^ndaatc caux Simon nyei gorx maiv zeiz? Ninh nyei muoc maiv zeiz caux mbuo yiem naaiv fai?” Ninh mbuo ziouc nqemh ninh aqv." 
Mark6:4 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Douc waac mienh mingh taux haaix maaih mienh taaih. Kungx ganh nyei buonv-mungv, ganh nyei cien-ceqv caux biauv zong mienh maiv taaih hnangv.”" 
Mark6:5 Yiem wuov norm dorngx Yesu maiv haih zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic aqv. Maaih dauh baav butv-baengc mienh ninh maan jienv zorc longx hnangv. 
Mark6:6 Ninh gengh mbuoqc horngh haic weic zuqc naaiv deix mienh maiv sienx ninh. Yesu ziouc laangz jiex laangz mingh gormx wuov norm dorngx njaaux mienh. 
Mark6:7 Ninh heuc wuov deix ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx daaih zunv, paaiv ninh mbuo yietc doix yietc doix nyei cuotv mingh. Ninh yaac bun sai-gorx mbuo maaih hatc maaz zunc hieh guaiv mienv cuotv," 
Mark6:8 yaac mbuox ninh mbuo, “Cuotv jauv, maiv dungx dorh haaix nyungc mingh, kungx dorh biaav-mbiaac hnangv. Maiv dungx dorh bienh fuix, fai mbuoqc jorngx. Yaac maiv dungx zorqv nyaanh dapv mbuoqc dorh mingh." 
Mark6:9 Oix zuqc daapc jienv heh, mv baac maiv dungx dorh lui-yienc." 
Mark6:10 Bieqc haaix norm biauv, oix zuqc hitv wuov norm biauv taux cuotv wuov norm dorngx." 
Mark6:11 Meih mbuo mingh taux haaix norm dorngx, se gorngv yiem wuov nyei mienh maiv zipv meih mbuo yaac maiv muangx meih mbuo nor, oix zuqc cuotv wuov norm dorngx yaac fengx guoqv zaux nyei nie-mbung guangc wuov, weic zoux zorng-zengx bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv ninh mbuo dorngc.”" 
Mark6:12 Sai-gorx mbuo ziouc cuotv mingh njaaux mienh oix zuqc goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz. 
Mark6:13 Ninh mbuo zunc mienv cuotv camv haic, yaac longc ga'lanv youh hietv baengc mienh nyei sin, zorc longx mienh camv nyei baengc." 
Mark6:14 Helotv Hungh muangx haiz naaiv deix jauv weic zuqc Yesu nyei mengh dauh sing mingh taux norm-norm dorngx. Maaih deix mienh gorngv, “Tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov dauh Yo^han aengx nangh daaih, ninh cingx daaih maaih naaiv nyungc qaqv zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic.”" 
Mark6:15 Mv baac maaih deix gorngv, “Ninh se E^li^yaa.” Aengx maaih deix gorngv, “Ninh se yietc dauh douc waac mienh, hnangv loz-hnoi tengx Tin-Hungh douc waac wuov deix mienh nor.”" 
Mark6:16 Helotv haiz liuz naaiv deix waac, ninh gorngv, “Dongh yie heuc baeng hngaqv ndutv m'nqorngv wuov dauh Yo^han daic mingh aengx nangh daaih.”" 
Mark6:17 Zinh ndaangc, Helotv paaiv mienh mingh zorqv Yo^han ndoh jienv dorh mingh wuonx loh. Helotv hnangv naaiv nor zoux se laaix He^lo^ndietc. He^lo^ndietc zoux Helotv nyei youz, Filipv, nyei auv mv baac Helotv ganh longc zoux auv." 
Mark6:18 Yo^han zanc-zanc mbuox Helotv, “Meih maiv maaih leiz longc meih nyei youz nyei auv benx meih nyei auv.”" 
Mark6:19 Weic naaiv He^lo^ndietc nipc win oix daix Yo^han. Mv baac maiv haih daix," 
Mark6:20 weic zuqc Helotv gamh nziex Yo^han, hiuv duqv Yo^han se kuv mienh, cing-nzengc mienh, ziouc beu jienv ninh nyei maengc aqv. Helotv haaix zanc haiz Yo^han gorngv, ninh haiz hnyouv maiv henh, mv baac corc a'hneiv muangx nyei." 
Mark6:21 Zoux gau, He^lo^ndietc duqv qangx jaauv win. Taux Helotv nyei sih nyietv-hnoi, Helotv mbenc hnaangx cingv ninh nyei domh jien caux domh baeng-bieiv caux yiem Gaa^li^li Saengv zoux hlo nyei mienh daaih zoux kaeqv." 
Mark6:22 Wuov zanc, He^lo^ndietc nyei sieqv bieqc daaih cangx heix, zoux bun Helotv caux ninh nyei kaeqv mienh horpc hnyouv haic. Helotv ziouc gorngv mbuox wuov dauh sieqv, “Oix longc haaix nyungc gunv tov aqv. Tov haaix nyungc yie ziouc bun wuov nyungc meih aqv.”" 
Mark6:23 Helotv Hungh ziouc laengz ngaengc waac gorngv, “Maiv gunv meih tov haaix nyungc, liemh tov buonc yie gunv nyei deic-bung, yie ziouc bun meih aqv.”" 
Mark6:24 Wuov dauh sieqv ziouc cuotv mingh naaic ninh nyei maa, “Yie oix zuqc tov haaix nyungc?” Ninh nyei maa dau, “Oix zuqc tov dongh tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov dauh Yo^han nyei m'nqorngv.”" 
Mark6:25 Wuov dauh sieqv liemh zeih siepv-siepv nyei nzuonx mingh mbuox Helotv Hungh, “Yie tov hungh diex ih zanc zorqv tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov dauh Yo^han nyei m'nqorngv an jienv torqv-sienx dorh daaih bun yie.”" 
Mark6:26 Hungh diex haiz naaiv deix waac ninh nzauh haic. Mv baac laaix ninh dorng jienv kaeqv mienh laengz liuz ngaengc waac, ninh maiv haih ngaengc wuov dauh sieqv tov nyei waac." 
Mark6:27 Ninh ziouc liemh zeih paaiv dauh baeng mingh zorqv Yo^han nyei m'nqorngv dorh daaih. Baeng ziouc mingh wuov loh hngaqv ndutv Yo^han nyei m'nqorngv 
Mark6:28 an jienv torqv-sienx dorh daaih bun wuov dauh sieqv. Sieqv yaac bun ninh nyei maa. 
Mark6:29 Yo^han nyei sai-gorx mbuo haiz liuz naaiv deix sic, ninh mbuo ziouc mingh zorqv Yo^han nyei sei dorh mingh zangx." 
Mark6:30 Gong-Zoh mbuo nzuonx taux Yesu wuov, zorqv ninh mbuo zoux nyei caux njaaux nyei yietc zungv gorngv bun Yesu muangx." 
Mark6:31 Weic zuqc mienh camv haic mingh mingh daaih daaih, Yesu mbuo liemh maiv maaih ziangh hoc nyanc hnaangx. Yesu ziouc mbuox sai-gorx, “Mbuo ganh mingh lengh nyei dorngx, ziouc duqv hitv deix kuonx aqv.”" 
Mark6:32 Ninh mbuo ziouc bieqc nzangv nzaeng jienv mingh lengh nyei dorngx. 
Mark6:33 Mv baac mienh camv buatc ninh mbuo mingh yaac zieqv duqv ninh mbuo. Norm-norm mungv nyei mienh ziouc tiux jienv gan mbienx mingh, zungv taux ndaangc Yesu mbuo oix mingh wuov norm dorngx." 
Mark6:34 Yesu cuotv nzangv faaux mbienx mingh, buatc mienh camv haic. Ninh haiz korv-lienh haic ninh mbuo, buatc ninh mbuo hnangv ba'gi yungh maiv maaih ziouv goux nor. Ninh ziouc jiez gorn njaaux camv-nyungc ninh mbuo." 
Mark6:35 Lungh maanz-hmuangx, Yesu nyei sai-gorx daaih mbuox ninh, “Lungh aav lamh hmuangx aqv. Naaiv yaac lengh nyei dorngx." 
Mark6:36 Tov mbuox zuangx mienh mingh aqv, mbuox ninh mbuo mingh naaiv deix dorngx nyei ndeic-liuh jorm caux laangz bun ninh mbuo ganh maaiz nyanc.”" 
Mark6:37 Yesu dau, “Meih mbuo ganh lorz bun ninh mbuo nyanc maah!” Ninh mbuo naaic, “Sai-Diex oix yie mbuo longc nyic baeqv hnoi nyei gong-zinh maaiz bun ninh mbuo nyanc fai?”" 
Mark6:38 Yesu ziouc naaic ninh mbuo, “Mingh mangc gaax, meih mbuo maaih mbu'ziex norm njuov?” Ninh mbuo mangc liuz ziouc gorngv, “Maaih biaa norm njuov caux i dauh mbiauz.”" 
Mark6:39 Yesu heuc sai-gorx mbuo mbuox zuangx mienh zueiz jienv maaih miev nyei dorngx benx yietc mbomz yietc mbomz nyei. 
Mark6:40 Maaih deix, yietc mbomz maaih yietc baeqv laanh. Maaih deix hmz ziepc laanh." 
Mark6:41 Yesu ziouc zorqv wuov deix biaa norm njuov caux i dauh mbiauz, cau hmien mangc lungh, laengz zingh Tin-Hungh liuz, ziouc maeqv nqoi njuov bun sai-gorx bun nqoi zuangx mienh. Wuov deix mbiauz ninh yaac bun nqoi zuangx mienh." 
Mark6:42 Zuangx mienh duqv nyanc beuv nzengc. 
Mark6:43 Nyanc zengc wuov deix njuov caux mbiauz, sai-gorx mbuo siou daaih duqv ziepc nyeic ndaan buangv." 
Mark6:44 Nyanc njuov nyei mienh, m'jangc dorn maaih biaa cin dauh." 
Mark6:45 Yesu liemh zeih beqv sai-gorx mbuo bieqc nzangv mingh ndaangc, jiex wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv-dorn, mingh Mbetc^sai^ndaa Mungv. Ninh ganh yiem wuov heuc mienh bun nzaanx nzuonx nzengc." 
Mark6:46 Yesu leih nqoi ninh mbuo, ziouc faaux mbong-aiv mingh yiem wuov daux gaux." 
Mark6:47 Lungh maanz-hmuangx, sai-gorx mbuo nyei nzangv yiem wuov koiv-dorn mbu'ndongx, Yesu ganh yiem wuov mbienx." 
Mark6:48 Ninh buatc sai-gorx mbuo nzaeng nzangv kouv haic, weic zuqc nziaaux maiv sunx. Lungh aav lamh njang, buo norm taux juqv norm ziangh hoc nyei dorngx, Yesu yangh wuom-minc mingh sai-gorx mbuo wuov. Yesu jang-jang oix yangh ninh mbuo ga'hlen jiex," 
Mark6:49 mv baac sai-gorx mbuo buatc ninh yangh wuom-minc daaih, laaic janx-daic njoiz ziouc waiz-waiz nyei nauc," 
Mark6:50 weic zuqc ninh mbuo yietc zungv buatc ninh ziouc haeqv ninh mbuo gamh nziex haic. Yesu liemh zeih gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Bungx hnyouv maah! Se yie. Maiv dungx gamh nziex.”" 
Mark6:51 Ninh ziouc caux ninh mbuo bieqc nzangv. Nziaaux yaac dingh mi'aqv. Sai-gorx mbuo gengh! mbuoqc horngh haic aqv," 
Mark6:52 weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv bieqc hnyouv Yesu maeqv njuov uix biaa cin laanh mienh nyei eix leiz. Ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv ngaengc haic. 
Mark6:53 Yesu mbuo jiex wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv-dorn ziouc taux Gen^ne^saa^letv Deic, dingh jienv nzangv wuov." 
Mark6:54 Cuotv nzangv wuov zanc, mienh zieqv duqv Yesu," 
Mark6:55 ziouc tiux mingh gormx wuov norm deic-bung. Ninh mbuo haiz gorngv Yesu yiem haaix ziouc zorqv jiuc gaeng butv-baengc mienh mingh taux wuov. 
Mark6:56 Maiv gunv Yesu mingh taux haaix norm domh mungv fiuv-laangz fai ndeic-liuh jorm, mienh dorh butv-baengc mienh mingh bueix wuov hei-horngc tov Yesu bun baengc mienh kungx hluo zuqc ninh nyei lui-juoqv. Haaix dauh hluo zuqc, baengc ziouc longx mi'aqv." 
Mark7:1 Maaih deix Faa^li^si Mienh caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh daaih gapv zunv Yesu wuov. 
Mark7:2 Ninh mbuo buatc maaih deix Yesu nyei sai-gorx nyanc hnaangx nyei ziangh hoc, maiv ei Faa^li^si Mienh nyei leiz-nyeic nzaaux buoz ndaangc, ziouc maaih uix." 
Mark7:3 (Faa^li^si Mienh caux yietc zungv Yiutai Mienh ei ninh mbuo ong-taaix nyei ei-douh zoux. Maiv ei leiz-nyeic nzaaux buoz, ninh mbuo zungv maiv nyanc hnaangx." 
Mark7:4 Mingh hei nzuonx daaih, se gorngv maiv ei leiz-nyeic nzaaux buoz ndaangc, ninh mbuo maiv nyanc hnaangx. Aengx maaih camv-nyungc leiz ninh mbuo oix zuqc gan. Oix zuqc ei leiz-nyeic nzaaux caeng-yienv caux dongh siqv jaa-sic.)" 
Mark7:5 Faa^li^si Mienh caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng ziouc naaic Yesu, “Meih nyei sai-gorx mbuo weic haaix diuc maiv gan ong-taaix mbuo nyei ei-douh zoux? Nyanc hnaangx nyei ziangh hoc, ninh mbuo nyei buoz maaih uix yaac maiv nzaaux?”" 
Mark7:6 Yesu dau ninh mbuo, “Douc waac mienh, I^saa^yaa, gorngv duqv horpc meih mbuo beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh. Ninh fiev jienv gorngv, ‘Naaiv deix mienh longc nzuih taaih yie, mv baac ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv leih duqv yie go haic." 
Mark7:7 Ninh mbuo zaangc yie se maiv lamh longc. Ninh mbuo zorqv mienh ganh liepc daaih nyei leiz dorngx yie nyei leiz njaaux. 
Mark7:8 Meih mbuo guangc Tin-Hungh nyei leiz-latc, aengx longc mienh ganh liepc daaih nyei ei-douh.”" 
Mark7:9 Yesu aengx gorngv, “Meih mbuo guai mbiangx-nziaaux cingx daaih guangc Tin-Hungh nyei leiz-latc weic ei jienv meih mbuo ganh nyei ei-douh zoux." 
Mark7:10 Weic zuqc Mose gorngv, ‘Oix zuqc tongx nimc meih mbuo nyei diex maac.’ Yaac gorngv, ‘Haaix dauh zioux ninh nyei die fai maa, oix zuqc daix wuov dauh guangc.’" 
Mark7:11 Mv baac meih mbuo gorngv, se gorngv maaih laanh mienh maaih haaix nyungc ga'naaiv haih longc tengx ninh nyei die fai maa mv baac ninh gorngv, ‘Naaiv se go^laa^mbaan,’ (eix leiz se fungx bun Tin-Hungh mi'aqv)," 
Mark7:12 meih mbuo ziouc maiv bun ninh zoux haaix nyungc tengx ninh nyei die fai maa. 
Mark7:13 Meih mbuo hnangv naaic gan meih mbuo nyei ei-douh zoux ziouc bun Tin-Hungh nyei waac maiv lamh longc. Aengx maaih camv-diuc jauv meih mbuo yaac fih hnangv nyei zoux.” 
Mark7:14 Yesu aengx heuc zuangx mienh daaih zunv ziouc mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo yietc zungv muangx yie oc, yaac oix zuqc mengh baeqc." 
Mark7:15 Maiv maaih haaix nyungc nyanc bieqc nzuih nyei ga'naaiv haih bun mienh maaih uix. Kungx yiem mienh nyei hnyouv hnamv cuotv daaih nyei, haih bun mienh maaih uix hnangv." 
Mark7:16 Haaix dauh maaih m'normh oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx longx oc.” 
Mark7:17 Yesu leih zuangx mienh bieqc biauv wuov zanc, ninh nyei sai-gorx tov ninh porv mengh naaiv joux waac-beiv, beiv haaix nyungc." 
Mark7:18 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo za'gengh hnangv ninh mbuo nor, maiv bieqc hnyouv fai? Meih mbuo maiv hiuv fai? Maiv maaih haaix nyungc nyanc bieqc nzuih nyei ga'naaiv haih bun mienh maaih uix." 
Mark7:19 Nyanc nyei ga'naaiv maiv zeiz bieqc hnyouv, kungx bieqc ga'sie-mbuoqc hnangv ziouc bungx cuotv mi'aqv.” (Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv ninh bun cing nyungc-nyungc nyanc nyei ga'naaiv maiv maaih uix)." 
Mark7:20 Yesu aengx gorngv, “Se yiem mienh nyei hnyouv hnamv cuotv nyei jauv bun mienh maaih uix." 
Mark7:21 Weic zuqc mienh yiem hnyouv gu'nyuoz hnamv cuotv waaic sic, hienx sieqv hienx dorn, zoux zaqc, daix mienh, hienx auv hienx nqox," 
Mark7:22 mauv ga'naaiv, zoux waaic sic, nduov mienh, zoux maiv luonx horngc, mueic jieqv, gorngv waac-huv, ceng-hlo, maiv gunv zinh hoz." 
Mark7:23 Naaiv deix yietc zungv waaic sic se yiem mienh nyei hnyouv hnamv cuotv daaih bun mienh maaih uix.” 
Mark7:24 Yesu leih wuov norm dorngx aengx mingh taux Tailaqv caux Sai^ndorn Zingh nyei deic, bieqc norm biauv. Ninh maiv oix mienh hiuv duqv ninh yiem naaic mv baac bingx maiv mbueiz aqv." 
Mark7:25 Maaih dauh Janx-muangz, ninh nyei sieqv zuqc hieh guaiv mienv muoqv. Wuov dauh Janx-muangz haiz mienh gorngv Yesu zoux nyei sic, ziouc liemh zeih daaih taux, mbaapv njiec Yesu nyei zaux-hlen." 
Mark7:26 Naaiv dauh m'sieqv dorn se Janx, yiem Silie Saengv nyei Fi^ni^sie Deic cuotv seix. Ninh tov Yesu zunc muoqv ninh nyei sieqv wuov dauh mienv cuotv." 
Mark7:27 Mv baac Yesu dau, “Oix zuqc bun fu'jueiv nyanc beuv ndaangc. Maiv horpc zuqc zorqv fu'jueiv nyei hnaangx zoi bun juv nyanc.”" 
Mark7:28 Naaiv dauh Janx-muangz gorngv, “Domh Gorx aac, juv m'daaih yiem dieh ndiev nzauz fu'jueiv nyei hnaangx-hmeiv-ndortv nyanc.”" 
Mark7:29 Yesu ziouc mbuox ninh, “Weic zuqc meih dau wuov joux waac, gunv nzuonx biauv aqv. Mienv zungv cuotv meih nyei sieqv nyei sin mi'aqv.”" 
Mark7:30 Wuov dauh Janx-muangz ziouc nzuonx biauv, buatc ninh nyei fu'jueiv bueix jienv wuov coux. Mienv za'gengh cuotv mi'aqv." 
Mark7:31 Yesu ziouc leih nqoi Tailaqv Deic jiex Sai^ndorn Zingh, yangh Totv^mbu^li Saengv mingh Gaa^li^li Koiv-Dorn." 
Mark7:32 Maaih deix mienh dorh dauh m'normh ndung, mbietc louc nyei mienh daaih tov Yesu maan jienv ninh." 
Mark7:33 Yesu ziouc dorh wuov dauh mienh cuotv mingh lengh nyei dorngx, leih nqoi zuangx mienh. Ninh longc buoz-ndoqv coqv jienv wuov dauh nyei i bung m'normh kuotv. Aengx tuiv wuom-nzuih daaih zaah jienv wuov dauh nyei mbietc." 
Mark7:34 Yesu ziouc cau hmien mangc gu'nguaaic lungh, tauv domh qiex, aengx gorngv mbuox wuov dauh mienh, “E^faa^taa!” (eix leiz se, “Koi nqoi maah!”)" 
Mark7:35 Wuov dauh mienh liemh zeih haih muangx duqv haiz. Mbietc yaac longx mi'aqv. Gorngv duqv waac junh aqv. 
Mark7:36 Yesu hatc zuangx mienh maiv dungx gorngv mbuox haaix dauh. Mv baac ninh yietc zei hatc, ninh mbuo yietc zei gorngv mbuox mienh camv." 
Mark7:37 Duqv haiz nyei mienh za'gengh! mbuoqc horngh haic. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Yesu zoux haaix nyungc za'gengh zoux duqv longx haic! Liemh m'normh ndung nyei mienh ninh zorc longx, haih muangx duqv haiz. Ga'naaiv-hngongx yaac haih gorngv waac.”" 
Mark8:1 Yiem wuov deix hnoi mienh camv haic aengx gapv zunv. Zoux gau, ninh mbuo maiv maaih haaix nyungc nyanc aqv. Yesu ziouc heuc ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo daaih yaac mbuox ninh mbuo," 
Mark8:2 “Yie korv-lienh haic naaiv deix mienh. Ninh mbuo daaih caux yie yiem duqv buo hnoi aqv. Ih zanc yaac maiv maaih haaix nyungc nyanc. 
Mark8:3 Se gorngv yie bun ninh mbuo hnyouv sie jienv nzuonx biauv, nzauh heix taux ndaamv-jauv mau haic, haih king mv bei. Maaih deix yaac yiem go nyei daaih.”" 
Mark8:4 Ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo dau, “Yiem naaiv deic-bung-huaang, haaix dauh haih lorz duqv ga'naaiv gaux bun ndongc naaic camv nyei mienh nyanc?”" 
Mark8:5 Yesu naaic ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo maaih mbu'ziex norm njuov?” Ninh mbuo dau, “Maaih siec norm.”" 
Mark8:6 Yesu ziouc heuc zuangx mienh zueiz jienv wuov ndau. Ninh zorqv wuov deix siec norm njuov daaih laengz zingh liuz Tin-Hungh, aengx maeqv nqoi cunv bun sai-gorx dorh mingh bun nqoi zuangx mienh. Sai-gorx mbuo ziouc dorh mingh bun nqoi zuangx mienh aqv." 
Mark8:7 Ninh mbuo aengx maaih i ziex dauh mbiauz-dorn. Yesu ziouc weic naaiv deix mbiauz laengz zingh liuz Tin-Hungh, ziouc mbuox sai-gorx mbuo bun nqoi zuangx mienh." 
Mark8:8 Zuangx mienh nyanc beuv nzengc. Sai-gorx mbuo ziouc mingh siou nyanc zengc wuov deix daaih dapv buangv siec norm ndaan. 
Mark8:9 Nyanc nyei mienh leih maiv go biei cin laanh. Yesu heuc zuangx mienh bun nzaanx liuz," 
Mark8:10 ziouc caux ninh nyei sai-gorx liemh zeih bieqc nzangv mingh Ndaan^maa^nu^taa Deic. 
Mark8:11 Maaih deix Faa^li^si Mienh daaih lorz Yesu, ziouc jiez gorn caux Yesu nzaeng. Ninh mbuo oix seix ninh cingx daaih tov ninh bun norm yiem tin-dorngh daaih nyei jangx-hoc." 
Mark8:12 Yesu tauv jienv domh qiex gorngv, “Naaiv doic mienh weic haaix diuc tov norm jangx-hoc? Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, yie maiv bun jangx-hoc meih mbuo ih jaax nyei mienh mangc.”" 
Mark8:13 Yesu ziouc leih nqoi ninh mbuo mi'aqv. Aengx bieqc nzangv nzaeng jienv mingh wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv-dorn. 
Mark8:14 Sai-gorx mbuo la'kuqv maiv dorh njuov mingh. Ninh mbuo yiem wuov nzangv kungx maaih nduqc norm njuov hnangv. 
Mark8:15 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Oix zuqc faix fim, mbungh jienv Faa^li^si Mienh nyei bingv caux Helotv Hungh nyei bingv.”" 
Mark8:16 Sai-gorx mbuo, laanh caux laanh gorngv, “Sai-Diex hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic zuqc mbuo maiv maaih njuov mv bei?”" 
Mark8:17 Yesu hiuv duqv ninh mbuo hnangv haaix nor gorngv, ninh ziouc naaic ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc caangh laangh gorngv maiv maaih njuov? Meih mbuo corc maiv mengh baeqc, maiv bieqc hnyouv fai? Meih mbuo za'gengh ndongc naaic hngongx?" 
Mark8:18 Meih mbuo maaih m'zing yaac mangc maiv buatc? Maaih m'normh yaac muangx maiv haiz? Meih mbuo maiv jangx fai? 
Mark8:19 Yie maeqv nqoi biaa norm njuov bun biaa cin laanh mienh nyanc wuov zanc, meih mbuo siou nyanc zengc nyei, duqv mbu'ziex ndaan buangv?” Ninh mbuo dau, “Duqv ziepc nyeic ndaan.”" 
Mark8:20 Yesu aengx naaic, “Yie maeqv nqoi siec norm njuov bun biei cin laanh mienh nyanc wuov nzunc, meih mbuo siou nyanc zengc wuov deix duqv mbu'ziex ndaan?” Ninh mbuo dau, “Duqv siec ndaan.”" 
Mark8:21 Yesu aengx naaic, “Hnangv naaic, meih mbuo corc maiv gaengh mengh baeqc fai?”" 
Mark8:22 Yesu mbuo daaih taux Mbetc^sai^ndaa Laangz, maaih deix mienh ken dauh m'zing maengh nyei mienh daaih lorz Yesu, tov Yesu maan ninh." 
Mark8:23 Yesu ken jienv wuov dauh m'zing maengh nyei mienh cuotv ga'nyiec ziqc laangz ziouc tuiv wuom-nzuih zaah jienv ninh nyei m'zing, yaac longc buoz maan jienv naaic ninh, “Meih mangc duqv buatc deix haaix nyungc fai?”" 
Mark8:24 Wuov dauh mienh cau hmien daaih mangc yaac gorngv, “Yie buatc mienh mv baac buatc ninh mbuo hnangv ndiangx nor, yangh mingh yangh daaih.”" 
Mark8:25 Yesu aengx maan nzunc ninh nyei m'zing. Ninh ziouc qaqv mangc. Naaiv nzunc ziouc mangc duqv buatc aqv. Haaix nyungc yaac buatc duqv zien. 
Mark8:26 Yesu heuc ninh nzuonx biauv aengx hatc ninh, “Maiv dungx aengx bieqc laangz aqv oc.”" 
Mark8:27 Jiex mingh, Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo mingh Si^saa^li^yaa Fi^lipv^poi Zingh nyei fiuv-laangz. Gan jauv mingh wuov zanc, Yesu naaic sai-gorx mbuo, “Mienh gorngv yie dongh haaix dauh?”" 
Mark8:28 Ninh mbuo dau, “Maaih deix gorngv meih dongh tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov dauh Yo^han. Maaih deix gorngv, E^li^yaa. Aengx maaih deix gorngv, benx dauh douc waac mienh.”" 
Mark8:29 Yesu aengx naaic ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo ni? Meih mbuo gorngv yie dongh haaix dauh?” Bide dau, “Meih dongh Giduc wuov dauh.”" 
Mark8:30 Yesu ziouc hatc ninh mbuo, “Cin-maanc maiv dungx mbuox mienh yie dongh haaix dauh.”" 
Mark8:31 Yiem naaic daaih Yesu jiez gorn njaaux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo, “Yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, oix zuqc siouc camv-nyungc kouv. Mienh gox caux sai mienh bieiv caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng oix nqemh yie. Yie yaac oix zuqc mienh daix daic mv baac da'faam hnoi yie aengx nangh daaih.”" 
Mark8:32 Ninh gorngv naaiv deix sic mengh nyei. Bide ziouc ken Yesu mingh pien deix kuinx ninh. 
Mark8:33 Mv baac Yesu huin nzuonx mangc jienv sai-gorx mbuo, yaac gorngv Bide, “Saadaan aah! Biaux nqoi maah! Meih hnamv nyei sic se maiv zeiz hnangv Tin-Hungh hnamv. Se hnangv baamh mienh hnamv cuotv nyei sic hnangv.”" 
Mark8:34 Yesu ziouc heuc zuangx mienh caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo daaih zunv yaac mbuox ninh mbuo, “Haaix dauh oix gan yie mingh oix zuqc siev jienv ninh ganh, ndaam jienv ninh nyei ziepc nzaangc jaax, gan yie mingh." 
Mark8:35 Haaix dauh kungx hnamv njoux ninh ganh nyei maengc hnangv, wuov dauh nyei maengc ziouc zuqc guangc. Mv baac haaix dauh weic yie yaac weic kuv fienx guangc ninh nyei maengc, wuov dauh ziouc njoux duqv ninh nyei maengc." 
Mark8:36 Haaix dauh duqv nzengc lungh ndiev nyei ga'naaiv mv baac zuqc guangc ninh nyei maengc, wuov dauh duqv haaix nyungc maaih lamh longc?" 
Mark8:37 Ninh maaih haaix nyungc haih tiuv duqv ninh nyei maengc nzuonx? 
Mark8:38 Yiem naaiv doic orqv haic, hieh hnyouv nyei mienh, se gorngv haaix dauh nyaiv yie yaac nyaiv yie njaaux nyei waac, yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, yiem yie nyei Die nyei njang-laangc, yaac caux cing-nzengc nyei fin-mienh daaih wuov zanc, ziouc nyaiv wuov dauh aqv.”" 
Mark9:1 Yesu aengx mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, souv jienv naaiv nyei mienh maaih deix zungv maiv gaengh daic ziouc duqv buatc Tin-Hungh maaih jienv nernh nyei qaqv daaih zoux Ziouv gunv mienh.”" 
Mark9:2 Nqa'haav juqv hnoi, Yesu dorh jienv Bide, Yaagorpc caux Yo^han faaux norm mbong-hlang, lengh nyei dorngx. Sai-gorx mbuo mangc jienv wuov zanc, buatc Yesu tiuv nzengc mi'aqv." 
Mark9:3 Ninh nyei lui-houx mbopv baeqc nyei, zaengh zaengh wuov. Lungh ndiev maiv maaih haaix dauh haih nzox duqv ninh nyei lui-houx ndongc naaic baeqc." 
Mark9:4 Wuov deix buo dauh sai-gorx aengx buatc E^li^yaa caux Mose hinc cuotv yiem wuov caux Yesu gorngv waac. 
Mark9:5 Bide ziouc gorngv mbuox Yesu, “Sai-Diex aah! Yie mbuo yiem naaiv gengh longx haic. Tov bun yie mbuo zoux buo norm liuh, zoux norm bun meih, zoux norm bun Mose, aengx zoux norm bun E^li^yaa.”" 
Mark9:6 Bide caux wuov deix sai-gorx gamh nziex haic, zungv maiv hiuv duqv oix zuqc gorngv haaix nyungc." 
Mark9:7 Maaih dorv mbuonx daaih om jienv ninh mbuo. Aengx maaih qiex yiem wuov mbuonx gorngv, “Naaiv se yie nyei Dorn-hnamv. Muangx ninh maah!”" 
Mark9:8 Sai-gorx mbuo liemh zeih mangc naaiv mangc wuov, maiv buatc haaix dauh caux ninh mbuo yiem. Kungx buatc Yesu ganh hnangv." 
Mark9:9 Yiem mbong njiec daaih wuov zanc Yesu hatc ninh mbuo, “Maiv dungx gorngv meih mbuo buatc liuz naaiv deix sic mbuox haaix dauh. Zuov yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, daic mingh aengx nangh daaih cingx daaih gorngv oc.”" 
Mark9:10 Sai-gorx mbuo haiz liuz naaiv deix waac ziouc yiem hnyouv jangx jienv, laanh caux laanh gorngv, “+‘Daic mingh aengx nangh daaih’ wuov joux waac maaih haaix nyungc eix leiz?”" 
Mark9:11 Sai-gorx mbuo ziouc naaic Yesu, “Njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng weic haaix diuc gorngv E^li^yaa oix zuqc daaih ndaangc?”" 
Mark9:12 Yesu dau, “E^li^yaa za'gengh daaih ndaangc, bun nyungc-nyungc nzuonx daaih hnangv loz wuov nor. Mv baac Ging-Sou weic haaix diuc fiev Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn oix zuqc siouc ziex nyungc kouv, yaac zuqc mienh nqemh?" 
Mark9:13 Yie mbuox meih mbuo, E^li^yaa zungv taux daaih aqv. Mienh yaac sueih eix zoux bun ninh mi'aqv, hnangv Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv nor.”" 
Mark9:14 Yesu mbuo aengx nzuonx taux wuov deix sai-gorx mbuo wuov, buatc mienh camv haic weih gormx ninh mbuo. Aengx maaih deix njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng yiem wuov caux ninh mbuo nzaeng." 
Mark9:15 Zuangx mienh yietv buatc Yesu, ninh mbuo gengh mbuoqc horngh haic yaac tiux jienv mingh zipv." 
Mark9:16 Yesu naaic ninh nyei sai-gorx, “Meih mbuo caux ninh mbuo nzaeng haaix nyungc?”" 
Mark9:17 Yiem zuangx mienh gu'nyuoz, maaih laanh mienh dau, “Fin-Saeng aac, yie dorh yie nyei dorn daaih lorz meih weic zuqc maaih dauh hieh guaiv mienv muoqv ninh maiv haih gorngv waac." 
Mark9:18 Maiv gunv yiem haaix, mienv yaac muoqv ninh, zorqv ninh zong njiec ndau. Maaih wuom-nzuih mbiaauz cuotv, ninh yaac ngaatc jienv nyaah, ciou ngaengc nzengc. Yie tov meih nyei sai-gorx zunc mienv cuotv, mv baac ninh mbuo maiv haih zunc maiv cuotv.”" 
Mark9:19 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo naaiv doic mienh aah! Meih mbuo za'gengh maiv sienx! Yie oix zuqc caux meih mbuo yiem ndongc haaix lauh? Yie oix zuqc nyienz meih mbuo taux haaix zanc? Dorh wuov dauh dorn daaih yie naaiv maah!”" 
Mark9:20 Ninh mbuo ziouc dorh wuov dauh dorn daaih. Mienv yietv buatc Yesu, ziouc liemh zeih muoqv wuov dauh dorn ciou king njiec ndau mingh, njangx tin njangx deic nyei, yaac cuotv wuom-nzuih mbiaauz." 
Mark9:21 Yesu naaic wuov dauh dorn nyei die, “Ninh hnangv naaiv nor benx daaih ndongc haaix lauh?” Wuov dauh die dau, “Yiem faix nyei ziangh hoc benx daaih aqv." 
Mark9:22 Ziex nzunc wuov dauh hieh guaiv mienv muoqv ninh king bieqc douz-nzauc fai ndortv wuom, oix bun ninh daic. Se gorngv fin-saeng haih nor, tov korv-lienh yie mbuo, tengx yie mbuo maah!”" 
Mark9:23 Yesu gorngv, “Meih naaic, ‘Se gorngv meih haih?’ Da'faanh haaix dauh sienx, ninh nyungc-nyungc zoux duqv nyei.”" 
Mark9:24 Wuov dauh dorn nyei die liemh zeih heuc jienv gorngv, “Yie sienx nyei, mv baac dongh yie sienx maiv taux nyei, tov meih tengx yie haih sienx.”" 
Mark9:25 Yesu buatc zuangx mienh mbengx jienv daaih fatv haic ziouc hatc wuov dauh hieh guaiv mienv. Ninh gorngv, “Meih naaic dauh m'normh ndung, ga'naaiv-hngongx mienv aah! Yie hatc meih cuotv naaiv dauh dorn daaih, yietc liuz maiv dungx muoqv ninh aqv.”" 
Mark9:26 Mienv waiz-waiz nyei heuc, aengx muoqv wuov dauh dorn ciou kouv haic, ziang naaic cuotv mi'aqv. Buatc wuov dauh dorn hnangv janx-daic nor. Mienh camv ziouc gorngv, “Ninh daic mi'aqv loh!”" 
Mark9:27 Mv baac Yesu nanv jienv ninh nyei buoz, ken jiez sin daaih. Ninh ziouc souv jienv aqv." 
Mark9:28 Nqa'haav Yesu bieqc biauv, sai-gorx mbuo bingx jienv naaic ninh, “Yie mbuo weic haaix diuc zunc wuov dauh mienv maiv cuotv?”" 
Mark9:29 Yesu dau, “Oix zuqc daux gaux cingx daaih haih zunc duqv naaiv nyungc mienv cuotv. Maiv maaih ganh nyungc za'eix aqv.”" 
Mark9:30 Yesu mbuo leih nqoi wuov norm dorngx aengx jiex Gaa^li^li Saengv. Yesu maiv oix haaix dauh hiuv duqv ninh yiem haaix," 
Mark9:31 weic zuqc ninh njaaux jienv ninh nyei sai-gorx. Ninh gorngv mbuox sai-gorx mbuo, “Yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, zungv oix zuqc jiu bun mienh. Ninh mbuo oix daix yie mv baac nqa'haav buo hnoi yie oix nangh daaih.”" 
Mark9:32 Mv baac sai-gorx mbuo maiv mengh baeqc naaiv joux waac nyei eix leiz yaac gamh nziex maiv naaic Yesu. 
Mark9:33 Ninh mbuo mingh taux Kaa^be^naa^um Mungv. Bieqc biauv mingh, Yesu ziouc naaic ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo, “Gan jauv daaih wuov zanc, meih mbuo nzaeng haaix nyungc?”" 
Mark9:34 Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv ko lo weic zuqc gan jauv daaih wuov zanc ninh mbuo nzaeng haaix dauh zoux gauh hlo jiex. 
Mark9:35 Yesu ziouc zueiz njiec, heuc ninh nyei ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx daaih zunv ziouc mbuox ninh mbuo, “Haaix dauh oix zoux hlo jiex, wuov dauh oix zuqc bun ganh zoux faix jiex yaac zoux zuangx mienh nyei bou.”"
