Luke13:2 Yesu dau ninh mbuo, “Naaiv deix Gaa^li^li Mienh hnangv naaiv nor zuqc daix, meih mbuo laaic ninh mbuo nyei zuiz gauh hlo Gaa^li^li nyei wuov deix zuangx mienh nyei zuiz fai?" 
Luke13:3 Maiv zeiz lorqc. Yie mbuox meih mbuo, se gorngv meih mbuo maiv goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz, meih mbuo yaac fih hnangv nyei oix zuqc mietc." 
Luke13:4 Caux Si^lo^am fanh taapv mbaang, ndapv daic wuov deix ziepc betv laanh ni? Meih mbuo laaic ninh mbuo dorngc gauh ndo Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei zuangx mienh fai?" 
Luke13:5 Zungv maiv zeiz. Yie mbuox meih mbuo, se gorngv meih mbuo maiv goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz, meih mbuo yaac hnangv ninh mbuo nor, oix zuqc daic.”" 
Luke13:6 Yesu gorngv naaiv diuh waac-beiv bun ninh mbuo muangx. “Maaih laanh mienh maaih zungh ngongh nyorx ndiangx yiem ninh nyei a'ngunc huingx. Ninh mingh taux wuov lorz biouv yaac lorz maiv duqv yietc norm. 
Luke13:7 Ninh ziouc mbuox tengx ninh goux huingx nyei mienh, ‘Mangc gaax! Duqv buo hnyangx yie daaih lorz naaiv zungh ngongh nyorx ndiangx nyei biouv yaac maiv duqv yietc norm. Gunv goix guangc aqv. Kungx yiem naaiv torngv ndau hnangv.’" 
Luke13:8 Goux huingx nyei mienh gorngv, ‘Domh Gorx aah! Tov meih aengx liouh hnyangx. Yie oix wetv nie yuang jienv gorn, an jienv buonx." 
Luke13:9 Da'nyeic hnyangx ziangh biouv nor, longx aqv. Maiv ziangh nor, gunv goix guangc aqv.’+”" 
Luke13:10 Maaih norm Dingh Gong Hnoi, Yesu yiem norm wuic dorngh njaaux mienh." 
Luke13:11 Yiem wuov maaih dauh m'sieqv dorn maaih mienv yiem ninh nyei sin bun ninh butv ziepc betv hnyangx baengc, muoqv ninh nyei jaaiv jutv mingh, souv maiv zaqc." 
Luke13:12 Yesu buatc ziouc heuc ninh daaih fatv deix mbuox ninh, “Nyaam aac, meih nyei baengc longx dangx gorn aqv.”" 
Luke13:13 Yesu dorh buoz maan jienv ninh, ninh ziouc liemh zeih souv zaqc daaih yaac ceng Tin-Hungh." 
Luke13:14 Goux wuic dorngh wuov dauh mienh gox buatc Yesu longc Dingh Gong Hnoi zorc baengc, maiv horpc ninh nyei hnyouv yietc deix. Ninh ziouc mbuox zuangx mienh, “Maaih juqv hnoi zoux gong niaa. Meih mbuo longc naaiv deix juqv hnoi zorc baengc maah! Maiv dungx longc Dingh Gong Hnoi daaih zorc saa.”" 
Luke13:15 Ziouv dau ninh, “Meih mbuo beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh aah! Dingh Gong Hnoi meih mbuo haaix dauh yaac bungx ngongh bungx lorh cuotv laanh, ken mingh hopv wuom maiv zeiz?" 
Luke13:16 Naaiv dauh Apc^laa^ham nyei zeiv-fun zuqc Saadaan ndoh jienv duqv ziepc betv hnyangx. Longc Dingh Gong Hnoi jaiv ndutv, bungx ninh cuotv maiv horpc fai?”" 
Luke13:17 Yesu hnangv naaiv nor dau, caux ninh zoux win-wangv wuov deix ziouc haiz nyaiv haic. Mv baac zuangx mienh a'hneiv haic Yesu zoux nyei yietc zungv mbuoqc horngh haic nyei sic." 
Luke13:18 Yesu naaic gaax, “ Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh hnangv haaix nor? Yie oix zuqc dorh haaix nyungc daaih beiv?" 
Luke13:19 Oix zuqc beiv norm lai-jaaix nyim. Maaih laanh mienh dorh mingh zuangx ninh nyei huingx. Nyim cuotv, hlo daaih benx yietc zungh ndiangx, norqc yaac zoux lauz yiem ninh nyei nquaah.”" 
Luke13:20 Yesu aengx naaic gaax, “Oix zuqc longc haaix nyungc beiv Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh?" 
Luke13:21 Se hnangv bingv nor. Maaih dauh m'sieqv dorn zorqv deix bingv qouv buo tongv mbuonv. Naaiv deix mbuonv ziouc butv nzengc mi'aqv.” 
Luke13:22 Yesu mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh. Mingh wuov zanc ninh zueih mungv zueih laangz njaaux mienh. 
Luke13:23 Maaih laanh mienh naaic gaax, “Fin-Saeng aah! Duqv njoux nyei mienh zoqc nyei fai?” Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo," 
Luke13:24 “Oix zuqc mbengx jienv bieqc hepc nyei gaengh. Yie mbuox meih mbuo, maaih mienh camv nyei oix bieqc yaac bieqc maiv duqv." 
Luke13:25 Biauv-ziouv jiez sin mingh guon jienv gaengh, meih mbuo oix zuqc yiem ga'nyiec heuc, ‘Domh Gorx aah! Tov koi gaengh bun yie mbuo bieqc maah!’ “Mv baac ninh oix dau, ‘Yie maiv hiuv duqv meih mbuo yiem haaix daaih.’" 
Luke13:26 “Meih mbuo ziouc dau, ‘Yie mbuo caux meih juangc nyanc, juangc hopv jiex. Meih yaac yiem yie mbuo nyei jaai-horngc njaaux jiex nyei.’" 
Luke13:27 “Mv baac ninh aengx gorngv, ‘Yie mbuox meih mbuo, yie maiv hiuv duqv meih mbuo yaac maiv hiuv duqv meih mbuo yiem haaix daaih. Mienh waaic mienh aah! Biaux nqoi maah!’" 
Luke13:28 “Wuov zanc meih mbuo duqv buatc Apc^laa^ham, I^sakc, Yaakopv caux yietc zungv douc waac mienh yiem Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv, mv baac meih mbuo ganh zuqc zunc guangc yiem ga'nyiec bungx-sing bungx-qiex nyei nyiemv, ngaatc jienv nyaah diev." 
Luke13:29 Mienh oix yiem dong naamh fai baqv bung daaih yiem Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv juangc dieh nyanc hnaangx. 
Luke13:30 Wuov zanc yiem nqa'haav maaih deix duqv yiem wuov ndaangc, yiem wuov ndaangc maaih deix zungv oix zuqc yiem nqa'haav.”" 
Luke13:31 Wuov zanc maaih deix Faa^li^si Mienh daaih mbuox Yesu, “Meih oix zuqc simv nqoi mingh ganh norm dorngx aqv. Helotv Hungh oix daix meih.”" 
Luke13:32 Yesu dau, “Mingh mbuox wuov dauh hieh juv, ih hnoi caux njang hnoi yie zunc mienv cuotv yaac zorc baengc. Hnaang hnoi zoux ziangx yie nyei gong aqv." 
Luke13:33 Mv baac hnangv haaix yie ih hnoi, njang hnoi, hnaang hnoi oix zuqc gan jienv jauv mingh aqv, weic zuqc haaix dauh douc waac mienh maiv horpc zuqc yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh ga'nyiec maengx nyei dorngx zuqc daix." 
Luke13:34 “Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh aah! Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh! Meih daix douc waac mienh yaac zorqv la'bieiv zong daic Tin-Hungh paaiv mingh meih naaic nyei mienh. Mbu'ziex nzunc yie oix hlorv zunv meih nyei mienh hnangv jai-nyeiz buoc dorn yiem ndaatv-ndiev nor. Mv baac meih maiv kangv bun yie zoux. 
Luke13:35 Mangc maah! Meih nyei biauv zungv zuqc guangc benx biauv-huaang. Yie mbuox meih mbuo, yiem naaiv mingh meih mbuo maiv duqv buatc yie. Zuov meih mbuo gorngv, ‘Tov Tin-Hungh ceix fuqv dengv Ziouv nyei mbuox daaih wuov dauh’ cingx duqv buatc yie.”" 
Luke14:1 Maaih norm Dingh Gong Hnoi, Yesu mingh dauh zoux hlo nyei Faa^li^si Mienh nyei biauv nyanc hnaangx. Mienh yaac longx-longx nyei mangc jienv ninh." 
Luke14:2 Maaih dauh mienh butv baengc-fouh daaih lorz Yesu. 
Luke14:3 Yesu naaic gaax Faa^li^si Mienh caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng, “Longc Dingh Gong Hnoi zorc baengc, dorngc mbuo nyei leiz fai maiv dorngc?”" 
Luke14:4 Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv ko lo. Yesu ziouc zorc longx wuov dauh mienh, mbuox ninh mingh aqv." 
Luke14:5 Yesu naaic gaax ninh mbuo, “Se gorngv Dingh Gong Hnoi meih mbuo haaix dauh maaih dauh lorh fai maaih dauh ngongh caqv-bouc ndortv kuotv, meih mbuo maiv zeiz liemh zeih mingh zorqv cuotv fai?”" 
Luke14:6 Mv baac maiv maaih haaix dauh maaih waac dau. 
Luke14:7 Yesu buatc cingv daaih nyei kaeqv mienh kungx ginv zueiz jiex maengx bung dieh, ninh ziouc gorngv naaiv diuh waac-beiv bun ninh mbuo muangx." 
Luke14:8 Ninh gorngv, “Mienh cingv meih mingh cing-jaa-yinh maiv dungx mingh zueiz dieh gorn. Nziex biauv-ziouv cingv daaih nyei kaeqv maaih dauh gauh hlo meih mv bei." 
Luke14:9 Biauv-ziouv cingv meih mbuo i laanh daaih ninh ziouc oix zuqc daaih mbuox meih, ‘Oix zuqc simv nqoi bun naaiv laanh mienh zueiz naaiv.’ Meih ziouc nyaiv haic aqv. Oix zuqc suiv mingh zueiz ndiev maengx bung." 
Luke14:10 Bieqc yinh wuov zanc, meih oix zuqc zueiz ndiev maengx bung. Hnangv naaic biauv-ziouv oix mbuox meih, ‘Gorx aac, faaux jiex maengx bung zueiz oc.’ Caux meih zoux kaeqv wuov deix ziouc taaih meih aqv." 
Luke14:11 Haaix dauh taaih ninh ganh zoux hlo, wuov dauh oix zuqc zoux faix. Haaix dauh nyiemc ganh zoux faix, wuov dauh oix duqv zoux hlo.”" 
Luke14:12 Yesu mbuox cingv ninh daaih wuov dauh biauv-ziouv, “Meih haaix zanc cingv kaeqv daaih nyanc hnaangx, maiv dungx cingv meih nyei loz-gaeng doic, muoz-doic, cien-ceqv fai laangz zaangc nyei butv-zoih mienh. M'nziex ninh mbuo oix cingv meih mingh winh meih nyei en-zingh." 
Luke14:13 Meih mbenc hnaangx cingv kaeqv, oix zuqc cingv mienh jomc mienh, zaux mbai, buoz-zaux waaic caux m'zing maengh m'zing mbuov nyei mienh." 
Luke14:14 Hnangv naaic meih ziouc duqv njien-youh aqv. Weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv haih winh bun meih. Zuov kuv mienh nangh daaih wuov hnoi, Tin-Hungh oix winh bun meih.”" 
Luke14:15 Maaih laanh mienh caux Yesu juangc dieh nyanc hnaangx haiz naaiv deix waac ninh ziouc mbuox Yesu, “Haaix dauh duqv yiem Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv nyanc wuov norm yinh nyei hnaangx, wuov dauh maaih njien-youh aqv.”" 
Luke14:16 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh, “Maaih laanh mienh mbenc norm yinh hlo nyei yaac cingv kaeqv camv." 
Luke14:17 “Taux nyanc nyei ziangh hoc, ninh heuc ninh nyei bou mingh mbuox cingv liuz nyei kaeqv mienh, ‘Daaih aqv oc. Nyungc-nyungc mbenc ziangx aqv.’" 
Luke14:18 “Mv baac wuov deix mienh yietc zungv kungx gorngv tuix zingh waac. Da'yietv dauh gorngv, ‘Yie maaiz nzong ndeic, oix zuqc mingh mangc dangh. Meih nzuonx mingh mbuox meih nyei ziouv, yie maiv duqv mingh mv baac laengz zingh aqv. Mbenc sung longx aqv.’" 
Luke14:19 “Aengx maaih dauh gorngv, ‘Yie maaiz duqv biaa doix ngongh oix zuqc dorh mingh seix mangc gaax. Meih nzuonx mingh mbuox meih nyei ziouv, yie maiv duqv mingh mv baac laengz zingh aqv. Mbenc sung longx aqv.’" 
Luke14:20 “Aengx maaih dauh gorngv, ‘Yie coqv hoqc longc jienv auv, maiv haih mingh aqv.’" 
Luke14:21 “Bou nzuonx mingh zorqv naaiv deix jauv-louc mbuox ninh nyei ziouv. Biauv-ziouv qiex jiez haic. Ninh mbuox ninh nyei bou, ‘Gaanv mingh mungv zaangc domh jaai fiuv-horngc lorz mienh jomc mienh, waaic fangx nyei, m'zing maengh m'zing mbuov nyei, caux zaux mbai nyei mienh.’" 
Luke14:22 “Maiv lauh wuov dauh bou nzuonx daaih gorngv, ‘Domh Gorx aac, yie ei meih nyei waac zoux liuz aqv. Mv baac corc maaih dorngx kungx nyei.’" 
Luke14:23 “Ziouv aengx mbuox wuov dauh bou, ‘Oix zuqc cuotv mingh zueih domh jauv fiuv-jauv lorz jienv mingh. Buatc haaix dauh oix zuqc aapv jienv ninh mbuo daaih, ziouc duqv mienh buangv yie nyei biauv aqv." 
Luke14:24 Yie mbuox meih mbuo, dongh yie cingv ndaangc wuov deix mienh, maiv maaih yietc laanh haih duqv seix yie nyei lai-hnaangx nyei mueix.’+”" 
Luke14:25 Mienh camv nyei gan jienv Yesu mingh. Yesu ziouc huin nzuonx mbuox ninh mbuo," 
Luke14:26 “Haaix dauh daaih lorz yie yaac maiv hnamv yie gauh camv hnamv ninh nyei diex maac, ninh nyei auv caux fu'jueiv caux muoz-doic, liemh ninh ganh nyei maengc, wuov dauh maiv haih zoux yie nyei sai-gorx." 
Luke14:27 Haaix dauh maiv ndaam jienv ninh ganh nyei ziepc nzaangc jaax gan jienv mingh, wuov dauh yaac zoux maiv duqv yie nyei sai-gorx." 
Luke14:28 “Se gorngv meih mbuo maaih dauh oix gomv norm biauv, ninh maiv zeiz jaa-ndaangc zueiz jienv funx mangc gaax nyaanh gaux zoux duqv ziangx fai maiv ziangx?" 
Luke14:29 Ninh maiv funx ndaangc nor, zoux gau taux ndaamv-jauv ndaamv-jung ziouc guangc jienv. Haaix dauh buatc yaac jatv ninh." 
Luke14:30 Ninh mbuo oix gorngv, ‘Naaiv dauh lov jiez gorn gomv yaac maiv maaih banh zeic gomv maiv ziangx.’" 
Luke14:31 “Fai se gorngv maaih dauh hungh oix mingh caux ganh dauh hungh mborqv jaax, ninh maiv zeiz oix zueiz jienv funx mangc gaax ninh nyei yietc waanc baeng haih mborqv duqv wuov dauh nyei i waanc baeng hingh fai maiv hingh?" 
Luke14:32 Funx daaih mborqv maiv hingh nor, wuov deix i waanc corc yiem go nyei, ninh oix zuqc paaiv mienh mingh ndaangc tov gorngv horpc." 
Luke14:33 Fih hnangv nyei, meih mbuo haaix dauh maiv siev jienv guangc meih maaih nyei yietc zungv, maiv haih zoux maiv duqv yie nyei sai-gorx." 
Luke14:34 “Nzauv se longx nyei. Mv baac se gorngv nzauv nyei mueix tuix zaamv mingh, hnangv haaix nor noic duqv nzaaih daaih?" 
Luke14:35 Zoux buonx an ndeic yaac maiv lamh longc. Dox guangc ngongh nqaiv ndui zoux buonx yaac maiv duqv. Oix zuqc guangc hnangv. “Haaix dauh maaih m'normh oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx longx.” 
Luke15:1 Maaih nzunc maaih siou nzou-zinh nyei mienh caux mengh dauh waaic nyei mienh daaih fatv Yesu, oix muangx ninh njaaux leiz." 
Luke15:2 Faa^li^si Mienh caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng ziouc ngopv Yesu. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Naaiv laanh mienh a'hneiv zipv naaic deix mengh dauh waaic nyei mienh, corc aengx caux ninh mbuo nyanc hnaangx.”" 
Luke15:3 Yesu ziouc gorngv naaiv diuh waac-beiv bun ninh mbuo muangx. 
Luke15:4 “Se gorngv meih mbuo haaix dauh maaih yietc baeqv dauh ba'gi yungh, maaih dauh dingx laaih mingh, ninh hnangv haaix nor zoux? Ninh maiv zeiz guangc jienv wuov deix juov ziepc juov dauh yiem wuov miev-ciangv, mingh lorz taux buatc dingx laaih wuov dauh fai?" 
Luke15:5 Lorz buatc daaih ninh a'hneiv haic, ziouc zorqv yungh daapv jienv mba'dauh nzuonx." 
Luke15:6 “Taux biauv ninh heuc ninh nyei gorx-youz caux laangz zaangc mienh daaih, mbuox ninh mbuo, ‘Oix zuqc lomh nzoih tengx yie a'hneiv. Weic zuqc yie nyei ba'gi yungh, dingx laaih mingh wuov dauh, yie lorz buatc daaih aqv.’" 
Luke15:7 “Yie mbuox meih mbuo, fih hnangv nyei. Maaih laanh mienh goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz nor, yiem tin-dorngh wuov deix a'hneiv haic, zungv gauh a'hneiv maaih juov ziepc juov laanh kuv mienh maiv qiemx zuqc goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz." 
Luke15:8 “Fai se gorngv maaih dauh m'sieqv dorn maaih ziepc norm zinh, dingx laaih yietc norm, ninh hnangv haaix nor zoux? Ninh maiv zeiz diemv dang daaih ziux jienv, puotv ninh nyei biauv longx-longx nyei lorz norm-norm dorngx, lorz taux buatc fai?" 
Luke15:9 Lorz buatc daaih, ninh ziouc heuc mienh muoz-doic caux laangz zaangc mienh daaih, gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, ‘Lomh nzoih tengx yie a'hneiv oc. Weic zuqc yie nyei zinh, dingx laaih wuov norm, yie lorz buatc daaih aqv.’" 
Luke15:10 “Yie mbuox meih mbuo, se gorngv maaih dauh zuiz-mienh goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz, Tin-Hungh nyei fin-mienh fih hnangv nyei a'hneiv haic aqv.”" 
Luke15:11 Yesu aengx gorngv, “Maaih laanh mienh maaih i dauh dorn." 
Luke15:12 Dorn-faix gorngv mbuox ninh nyei die, ‘Aa Die aah! Die paaiv bun yie nyei buonc jaa-dingh tov ih zanc bun yie oc.’ Ninh nyei die ziouc zorqv ninh nyei jaa-dingh ga'naaiv daaih bun nqoi ninh mbuo i muoz mi'aqv." 
Luke15:13 “Nqa'haav i ziex hnoi hnangv, dorn-faix ziouc zorqv ninh nyei buonc maaic benx nyaanh daaih gapv zunv dorh jienv cuotv deic-bung go-go nyei mingh. Taux norm deic-bung, ninh yiem wuov la'guaih zaaux nzengc ninh nyei nyaanh." 
Luke15:14 Zaaux nzengc nyaanh wuov zanc yaac doix jienv ninh yiem wuov norm deic-bung buangh zuqc domh huaang domh ngorc. Ninh nyei nyaanh yaac dangx nzengc mi'aqv. 
Luke15:15 Ninh ziouc gan dauh wuov norm deic-bung nyei mienh zoux gong. Wuov dauh mienh paaiv ninh mingh ndeic goux dungz. 
Luke15:16 “Goux gau dungz, buatc dungz nyanc dopc kuqv, ninh za'gengh oix nyanc haic aqv. Mv baac maiv maaih haaix dauh bun haaix nyungc ninh nyanc." 
Luke15:17 “Zoux gau, ninh hnamv-nzuonx. ‘Jangx zuqc yie nyei die nyei bou mbuo. Lungh donx ninh mbuo nyanc liuz hopv liuz, zungv corc maaih zengc nyei. Yie yiem naaiv oix zuqc ngorc daic." 
Luke15:18 Yie oix nzuonx mingh mbuox yie nyei die, “Aa Die aah! Yie ziqc zuiz Tin-Hungh yaac ziqc zuiz die." 
Luke15:19 Yangh naaiv jiex yie maiv puix die nyiemc yie zoux dorn aqv. Yie tov meih funx yie se hnangv yietc dauh meih nyei bou nor oc.”+’ 
Luke15:20 Ninh ziouc jiez sin cuotv jauv nzuonx ninh nyei die wuov. “Nzuonx gau, corc leih go deix nyei, ninh nyei die buatc, zieqv duqv ninh nyei dorn aqv. Za'gengh korv-lienh haic ziouc tiux mingh taux, qam jienv ninh nyei dorn zom." 
Luke15:21 “Ninh nyei dorn gorngv, ‘Aa Die aah! Yie ziqc zuiz Tin-Hungh yaac ziqc zuiz die. Ih zanc yie zungv maiv puix die nyiemc yie zoux dorn aqv.’" 
Luke15:22 “Mv baac ninh nyei die heuc ninh nyei bou mbuo, ‘Nqongh mingh zorqv nzueic jiex wuov deix lui-ndaauv daaih tengx ninh zuqv jienv. Aengx zorqv buoz-ndoqv-nzaeng daaih tengx ninh dangh jienv. Heh yaac zorqv daaih tengx ninh daapc jienv." 
Luke15:23 Oix zuqc aengx mingh zorqv junc jiex wuov dauh ngongh dorn daix daaih, mbenc daaih nyanc houc ninh." 
Luke15:24 Weic zuqc yie naaiv dauh dorn daic mingh aengx nangh daaih. Dingx laaih mingh aengx lorz buatc daaih.’ Zuangx mienh ziouc jiez gorn houc ninh aqv. 
Luke15:25 “Wuov zanc dorn-hlo yiem wuov ndeic. Nzuonx taux biauv-hlen haiz biomv nzatc, mborqv lorh, mborqv nzoz, cangx heix nyei qiex mbui." 
Luke15:26 Ninh ziouc heuc dauh bou daaih naaic, ‘Wuov biauv ninh mbuo zoux haaix nyungc?’" 
Luke15:27 Bou gorngv, ‘Meih nyei youz nzuonx daaih aqv. Meih nyei die heuc zorqv junc jiex wuov dauh ngongh dorn daix daaih nyanc houc meih nyei youz, weic zuqc meih nyei die duqv ninh nyei dorn nzuonx daaih longx nyei.’" 
Luke15:28 “Dorn-hlo qiex jiez haic ziouc maiv kangv bieqc biauv aqv. Ninh nyei die ziouc cuotv daaih kuinx ninh bieqc. 
Luke15:29 Dorn-hlo gorngv, ‘Mangc gaax! Yie hnangv nouh gauv nor tengx meih zoux gong taux ih zanc aqv. Maiv maaih yietc nzunc yie maiv muangx meih nyei waac niaa. Meih bun jiex haaix nyungc yie? Liemh yietc dauh yungh dorn zungv maiv bun jiex yie weic caux yie nyei gorx-youz nyanc zoux jorm yietc nzunc niaa." 
Luke15:30 Meih naaic dauh dorn aeqv, la'guaih maaiz sieqv hienx, zorqv meih nyei jaa-dingh ga'naaiv zaaux njang nzengc nzuonx daaih. Meih corc se aengx zorqv junc jiex wuov dauh ngongh dorn daix daaih houc ninh!’" 
Luke15:31 “Ninh nyei die dau, ‘Dorn aac, meih haaix zanc yaac caux yie yiem. Yie nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv se meih nyei." 
Luke15:32 Mv baac yie mbuo oix zuqc zoux jorm njien-youh nyei houc, weic zuqc meih nyei naaiv dauh youz daic mingh aengx nangh daaih, dingx laaih mingh aengx nzuonx daaih aqv.’+”" 
Luke16:1 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx, “Maaih dauh butv-zoih mienh, mienh aengx daaih gox ninh gorngv, ninh nyei gunv gong mienh la'guaih zaaux ninh nyei zinh nyaanh." 
Luke16:2 Ninh ziouc heuc ninh nyei gunv gong mienh daaih naaic, ‘Yie haiz mienh gorngv meih naaiv deix sic hnangv haaix nor? Zorqv nzengc meih gunv gong nyei zaeqv-daan daaih bun yie mangc gaax maah! Yiem naaiv mingh meih maiv duqv zoux yie nyei gunv gong mienh aqv.’" 
Luke16:3 “Wuov dauh gunv gong mienh yiem hnyouv hnamv, ‘Yie oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor zoux? Yie nyei ziouv maiv longc yie zoux gong aqv. Yie wetv ndau, youc maiv maaih qaqv. Tov nyanc, yie yaac diev maiv duqv nyaiv." 
Luke16:4 Aa, yie hiuv duqv horpc zuqc hnangv haaix nor zoux. Nqa'haav naaiv nyungc gong yie maiv duqv zoux mv baac corc haih maaih deix mienh zipv yie yiem ninh mbuo nyei biauv.’" 
Luke16:5 “Ninh ziouc heuc qiemx ninh nyei ziouv nyei zaeqv wuov deix zoqc dauh, zoqc dauh nyei daaih. Ninh naaic gaax da'yietv dauh, ‘Meih qiemx yie nyei ziouv nyei zaeqv mbu'ziex?’" 
Luke16:6 “Wuov dauh dau, ‘Qiemx yietc baeqv tongv ga'lanv youh.’ “Gunv gong mienh mbuox ninh, ‘Naaiv meih nyei zaeqv-daan. Nqongh zueiz njiec fiev hmz ziepc tongv hnangv.’" 
Luke16:7 “Ninh aengx naaic da'nyeic dauh, ‘Meih ni? Qiemx mbu'ziex?’ “Wuov dauh dau, ‘Yietc baeqv mbuoqc cuqv.’ “Gunv gong mienh gorngv, ‘Naaiv meih nyei zaeqv-daan. Fiev betv ziepc mbuoqc hnangv.’" 
Luke16:8 “Wuov dauh butv-zoih mienh ziouc ceng hnyouv maiv zingx wuov dauh gunv gong mienh zoux duqv guai haic. Weic zuqc yiem naaiv lungh ndiev nyei mienh caux ninh mbuo ganh nyei wuov doic mienh zoux gauh guai jiex yiem njang zong wuov jauv mienh.” 
Luke16:9 Yesu aengx gorngv, “Yie mbuox meih mbuo, oix zuqc longc baamh gen maiv baengh fim nyei zinh nyaanh ziu gorx-youz. Taux zinh nyaanh nzengc mi'aqv, meih mbuo ziouc duqv Tin-Hungh zipv mingh yiem yietc liuz nyei biauv." 
Luke16:10 “Haaix dauh yiem faix-fiuv sic zoux duqv zingx, yiem hlo nyei sic yaac zoux duqv zingx. Se gorngv faix-fiuv sic zoux maiv zingx, hlo nyei sic yaac zoux maiv zingx aqv." 
Luke16:11 Se gorngv baamh gen nyei zinh nyaanh meih mbuo goux maiv zingx, haaix dauh oix bun meih mbuo goux zien zinh zoih?" 
Luke16:12 Se gorngv meih mbuo goux ganh dauh nyei ga'naaiv maiv zingx, meih mbuo ganh horpc zuqc duqv nyei ga'naaiv, haaix dauh oix bun meih mbuo?" 
Luke16:13 “Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih zoux duqv i dauh ziouv nyei bou. Hnangv naaic ninh oix nzorng naaiv dauh, oix hnamv wuov dauh. Maiv zei aeqv, ninh oix taaih naaiv dauh, oix mangc piex wuov dauh. Meih mbuo maiv haih dongh dangh zoux Tin-Hungh nyei bou yaac zoux nyaanh nyei bou.”" 
Luke16:14 Faa^li^si Mienh hnamv nyaanh, ninh mbuo haiz Yesu gorngv naaiv deix waac ninh mbuo ziouc kuh jatv haic Yesu aqv." 
Luke16:15 Yesu ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo zoux nyei sic bun mienh laaic meih mbuo zoux duqv horpc, mv baac Tin-Hungh hiuv duqv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv. Weic zuqc baamh mienh funx jaaix nyei, ei Tin-Hungh mangc se maiv zic zinh." 
Luke16:16 “Mose nyei Leiz caux Tin-Hungh nyei Douc Waac Mienh fiev daaih nyei Sou mienh zunh jienv daaih taux Yo^han. Yiem naaic daaih, zunh Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv nyei kuv fienx. Mienh yaac caangv jienv bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv." 
Luke16:17 Lungh caux ndau jiex nzengc corc gauh hungh hec Leiz-Latc ndortv yietc dimv yietc waeqc nzaangc. 
Luke16:18 “Haaix dauh leih ninh nyei auv aengx mingh longc siang-auv, ninh se hienx auv hnangv. Haaix dauh longc auv-leih zoux auv, wuov dauh se kungx hienx auv hnangv." 
Luke16:19 “Maaih dauh domh butv-zoih mienh zuqv ciouh zuqv dunc nyei lui-houx hnangv. Hnoi-hnoi nyanc orv hopv diuv njien-youh haic. 
Luke16:20 “Aengx maaih dauh ndortv naanc mienh, mbuox heuc Laa^saa^latv, butv faang butv laaix buangv nzengc yietc sin. Mienh zanc-zanc dorh ninh mingh taux wuov dauh butv-zoih mienh nyei gaengh ndaangc" 
Luke16:21 zuov hnaangx-hmeiv-ndortv nyanc. Juv yaac daaih mbiec ninh nyei faang. 
Luke16:22 “Zoux gau, naaiv dauh ndortv naanc mienh daic mi'aqv. Fin-mienh dorh ninh mingh caux ninh nyei ong-taaix-ngaeqv, Apc^laa^ham, yiem. “Butv-zoih mienh yaac daic mi'aqv, biopv jienv." 
Luke16:23 Ninh mingh yiem yiemh gen zuqc diev mun diev kouv. Ninh ziouc cau hmien buatc Apc^laa^ham yiem go nyei, yaac buatc Laa^saa^latv caux Apc^laa^ham yiem wuov." 
Luke16:24 Ninh ziouc heuc Apc^laa^ham, ‘Ong aah! Tov korv-lienh yie, mbuox Laa^saa^latv daaih longc buoz-ndoqv coqv wuom daaih ndiepv yie nyei mbietc laangh deix, weic zuqc yiem naaiv douz buov jienv yie mun haic, kouv haic.’" 
Luke16:25 “Apc^laa^ham dau ninh, ‘Fun aac, meih oix zuqc jangx taux meih yiem seix zaangc wuov zanc meih nyungc-nyungc yaac duqv longx haic. Laa^saa^latv yaac kungx duqv waaic nyei hnangv. Ih zanc Laa^saa^latv duqv longx, njien-youh haic aqv. Daaux nzuonx meih ih zanc zuqc siouc kouv." 
Luke16:26 Corc aengx maaih nyungc. Maaih diuh domh zuonx maanc zungx ndo nqaeqv jienv. Haaix dauh yiem naaiv bung oix jiex meih mbuo wuov bung, jiex maiv duqv. Haaix dauh yiem wuov bung oix jiex yie mbuo naaiv bung yaac jiex maiv duqv.’" 
Luke16:27 “Butv-zoih mienh aengx gorngv, ‘Ong aac, wuov nyungc tov meih paaiv Laa^saa^latv mingh taux yie nyei die nyei biauv." 
Luke16:28 Yie corc maaih biaa muoz-dorn yiem wuov. Tov bun Laa^saa^latv mingh kuinx ninh mbuo maiv dungx daaih naaiv siouc kouv nyei dorngx.’ 
Luke16:29 “Apc^laa^ham dau, ‘Ninh mbuo zungv maaih Mose caux Tin-Hungh nyei Douc Waac Mienh nyei Sou niaa. Meih nyei muoz-doic oix zuqc muangx ninh mbuo nyei waac.’" 
Luke16:30 “Butv-zoih mienh aengx dau Apc^laa^ham, ‘Ong aac, mbuoqc naaiv maiv gaux. Se gorngv maaih laanh mienh daic mingh aengx nangh daaih mingh taux yie nyei muoz-doic wuov, muoz-doic zungv oix goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz.’" 
Luke16:31 “Apc^laa^ham gorngv, ‘Se gorngv ninh mbuo maiv muangx Mose caux Tin-Hungh nyei Douc Waac Mienh nyei waac nor, maiv gunv maaih laanh mienh daic mingh aengx nangh daaih, ninh mbuo yaac maiv muangx lorqc.’+”" 
Luke17:1 Yesu gorngv mbuox sai-gorx mbuo, “Nduov mienh zoux dorngc nyei sic ndongc haaix zungv oix maaih. Mv baac nduov mienh zoux dorngc wuov dauh oix zuqc kouv aqv." 
Luke17:2 Zorqv morc ndiux jienv ninh nyei jaang bungx njiec koiv gauh longx bun ninh nduov yietc dauh naaiv deix fu'jueiv-faix baamz zuiz. 
Luke17:3 Meih mbuo oix zuqc faix fim. “Se gorngv meih nyei gorx-youz zoux dorngc meih, meih oix zuqc kuinx ninh. Ninh goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz nor, oix zuqc guangc bun ninh." 
Luke17:4 Gorngv hnangv ninh yietc hnoi dorngc meih siec nzunc, mouz nzunc daaih nyiemc gorngv, ‘Yie laengz dorngc aqv,’ meih zungv oix zuqc guangc bun ninh.”" 
Luke17:5 Gong-zoh mbuo mbuox Ziouv, “Tov bun yie mbuo sienx gauh henv deix oc.”" 
Luke17:6 Ziouv dau, “Se gorngv meih mbuo maaih sienx fim lomh yietc norm lai-jaaix nyim nor, meih mbuo haih mbuox naaiv diuh saeng-forng ndiangx, ‘Liemh nzungh baeng cuotv suiv mingh zuangx wuov koiv gu'nyuoz maah!’ Ndiangx zungv oix zuqc muangx meih nyei waac." 
Luke17:7 “Se gorngv meih mbuo haaix dauh maaih dauh bou cuotv mingh laih lingh fai bungx ba'gi yungh. Yiem ndeic nzuonx daaih meih ziouc mbuox ninh, ‘Meih gunv zueiz jienv nyanc hnaangx aqv’ fai?" 
Luke17:8 Maiv zeiz lorqc. Meih zungv oix mbuox ninh, ‘Zouv zuoqc lai-hnaangx mbenc daaih bun yie nyanc, yaac oix zuqc tengx yie dinh lai-hnaangx. Zuov yie nyanc beuv hopv beuv meih m'daaih nqa'haav nyanc.’" 
Luke17:9 Bou ei jienv ziouv paaiv nyei waac zoux, ziouv oix zuqc laengz zingh ninh fai?" 
Luke17:10 Meih mbuo yaac fih hnangv nyei. Meih mbuo zoux ziangx paaiv daaih nyei gong oix zuqc gorngv, ‘Yie mbuo zoux bou hnangv. Naaiv deix gong m'daaih horpc zuqc yie mbuo zoux.’+”" 
Luke17:11 Yesu mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh ninh yangh Saa^maa^lie Deic caux Gaa^li^li deic nyei gapv-jaaix mingh. 
Luke17:12 Bieqc norm laangz wuov zanc, maaih ziepc dauh butv gomh huv baengc nyei mienh buangh zuqc Yesu. Ninh mbuo souv jienv go deix nyei" 
Luke17:13 heuc, “Yesu aah! Ziouv aah! Korv-lienh deix yie mbuo maah!”" 
Luke17:14 Yesu buatc ziouc gorngv, “Mingh bun sai mienh zaah mangc meih mbuo nyei sin oc.” Ninh mbuo gan jienv jauv mingh wuov zanc, baengc ziouc longx mi'aqv." 
Luke17:15 Maaih dauh buatc ninh ganh longx nzengc ziouc liemh zeih daaux nqaang nzuonx, longc qiex hlo nyei ceng jienv Tin-Hungh daaih." 
Luke17:16 Taux Yesu wuov, ninh ziouc mbaapv njiec ndau laengz zingh haic Yesu. Naaiv dauh mienh se Saa^maa^lie Janx." 
Luke17:17 Yesu gorngv, “Maaih ziepc dauh zorc longx nzengc maiv zeiz? Wuov deix nduoh dauh ni?" 
Luke17:18 Cuotv liuz naaiv dauh ganh fingx mienh, maiv maaih haaix dauh daaux nqaang daaih ceng Tin-Hungh fai?”" 
Luke17:19 Yesu aengx gorngv mbuox wuov laanh mienh, “Jiez sin daaih nzuonx aqv oc. Weic meih sienx kaux yie, meih nyei baengc longx nzengc mi'aqv.”" 
Luke17:20 Maaih deix Faa^li^si Mienh naaic gaax Yesu, “Tin-Hungh taux haaix zanc cingx daaih zoux Ziouv gunv mienh?” Yesu dau, “ Tin-Hungh daaih zoux Ziouv gunv mienh maiv zeiz m'zing mangc duqv buatc." 
Luke17:21 Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih gorngv, ‘Mangc maah! Yiem naaiv!’ fai ‘Mangc maah! Yiem wuov!’ weic zuqc Tin-Hungh ih zanc yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx zoux Ziouv.”" 
Luke17:22 Yesu aengx mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo, “Hnoi-nyieqc oix taux, meih mbuo oix duqv buatc yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, nyei yietc norm hnoi, mv baac meih mbuo maiv duqv buatc." 
Luke17:23 Mienh oix mbuox meih mbuo, ‘Mangc maah! Yiem wuov!’ fai ‘Mangc maah! Yiem naaiv!’ Mv baac maiv dungx cuotv mingh gan ninh mbuo." 
Luke17:24 Yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, daaih wuov norm hnoi oix hnangv borngz mba'lingc yiem naaiv bung lungh taux wuov bung lungh." 
Luke17:25 Mv baac yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, oix zuqc siouc ziex nyungc kouv ndaangc, yaac zuqc ih jaax nyei mienh nqemh." 
Luke17:26 “Noyaa nyei lungh ndiev hnangv haaix nor, yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, daaih wuov deix hnoi yaac hnangv wuov nor." 
Luke17:27 Noyaa nyei lungh ndiev, mienh nyanc yaac hopv, bungx sieqv gorngv auv, zoux cing-jaa, taux Noyaa bieqc nzangv wuov hnoi. Yiem nzangv ga'nyiec nyei yietc zungv zuqc mbiungc-suiv-imx yiemx daic nzengc." 
Luke17:28 “Lotv nyei lungh ndiev yaac fih hnangv nyei. Mienh yaac nyanc yaac hopv, maaiz maaic, zuangx ga'naaiv, gomv biauv." 
Luke17:29 Mv baac Lotv cuotv So^ndom Zingh wuov hnoi, maaih douz caux hungh yiem wuov lungh ndortv njiec daaih buov mietc nzengc ninh mbuo yietc zungv." 
Luke17:30 Yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, hinc cuotv wuov hnoi yaac oix hnangv wuov nor." 
Luke17:31 “Wuov hnoi haaix dauh yiem biauv-ngorh njiec, liemh maiv dungx bieqc biauv zorqv yiem biauv nyei ga'naaiv. Haaix dauh yiem ndeic yaac maiv dungx nzuonx mingh zorqv haaix nyungc." 
Luke17:32 Jangx jienv Lotv nyei auv! 
Luke17:33 Haaix dauh hnamv njoux ganh nyei maengc, wuov dauh ziouc zuqc guangc maengc. Haaix dauh nyunc guangc ninh ganh nyei maengc, wuov dauh ziouc duqv ninh nyei maengc cuotv." 
Luke17:34 Yie mbuox meih mbuo, maaih i dauh mienh juangc coux bueix, oix zipv dauh mingh, guangc dauh yiem wuov." 
Luke17:35 Maaih i dauh m'sieqv dorn morc maeqc, oix zipv dauh mingh, guangc dauh yiem wuov." 
Luke17:36 Maaih i dauh mienh yiem ndeic, oix zipv dauh mingh, guangc dauh yiem wuov.”" 
Luke17:37 Sai-gorx mbuo naaic gaax, “Sai-Diex aah! Naaiv deix sic oix zuqc yiem haaix cuotv?” Yesu dau, “Ga'naaiv-daic yiem haaix, domh jaangv-ngongh yaac yiem wuov.”" 
Luke18:1 Yesu aengx longc naaiv diuh waac-beiv njaaux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo oix zuqc zanc-zanc daux gaux, maiv dungx hnyouv namx." 
Luke18:2 Ninh gorngv, “Maaih norm mungv maaih dauh siemv zuiz jien. Ninh maiv gamh nziex Tin-Hungh, yaac maiv mangc haaix dauh nyei hmien." 
Luke18:3 Yiem wuov norm mungv maaih dauh auv-guaav zanc-zanc daaih lorz wuov dauh siemv zuiz jien gorngv, ‘Maaih mienh gox yie, tov longc baengh fim nyei leiz tengx yie mbenc sung.’" 
Luke18:4 “Tov lauh haic aqv, siemv zuiz jien yaac maiv kangv tengx. Zoux gau, ninh yiem hnyouv hnamv, ‘Yie maiv gamh nziex Tin-Hungh yaac maiv mangc haaix dauh nyei hmien." 
Luke18:5 Mv baac naaiv dauh auv-guaav ba'laqc daaih ceux-faanh yie haic. Maiv haih fungc zoux, oix zuqc tengx ninh baengh fim nyei mbenc. Maiv tengx nor, ninh ziouc zanc-zanc daaih la'nyauv yie kouv haic.’+”" 
Luke18:6 Ziouv aengx gorngv, “Muangx gaax, naaiv dauh maiv baengh fim nyei siemv zuiz jien nyei waac." 
Luke18:7 Tin-Hungh maiv zeiz oix baengh fim nyei tengx ninh ginv daaih nyei yaac ziangh hnoi ziangh muonz jouh ninh wuov deix mienh fai? Tin-Hungh oix ngaih lauh cingx daaih tengx ninh mbuo fai? 
Luke18:8 Yie mbuox meih mbuo, ninh zungv oix siepv-siepv nyei tengx baengh fim nyei mbenc sung. Mv baac yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, aengx daaih wuov zanc, yie duqv buatc yiem lungh ndiev maaih mienh sienx nyei fai?”" 
Luke18:9 Maaih deix mienh ceng ninh mbuo ganh zoux kuv mienh, mangc piex ga'hlen mienh. Yesu ziouc gorngv naaiv diuh waac-beiv bun naaiv deix mienh muangx." 
Luke18:10 Ninh gorngv, “Maaih i laanh mienh mingh zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv daux gaux. Maaih laanh Faa^li^si Mienh, maaih laanh tengx Lomaa hungh jaa siou nzou-zinh nyei mienh." 
Luke18:11 Faa^li^si Mienh souv jienv wuov daux gaux gorngv, ‘Tin-Hungh aah! Yie laengz zingh haic meih weic zuqc yie maiv hnangv ga'nyiec nyei mienh. Yie maiv mauv ga'naaiv, yaac maiv zoux hnyouv pien, yaac maiv hienx auv. Maaih deix mienh zoux naaiv deix jauv mv baac maiv zeiz yie. Yie yaac laengz zingh haic meih, yie maiv hnangv naaiv dauh siou nzou-zinh nyei mienh." 
Luke18:12 Yietc norm leiz-baaix yie zei maiv nyanc haaix nyungc i nzunc. Yie duqv haaix nyungc, ziepc gouv yie bun yietc gouv meih.’" 
Luke18:13 “Mv baac siou nzou-zinh wuov dauh souv jienv wuov maengx go deix nyei. Ninh liemh maiv cau hmien mangc gu'nguaaic lungh. Ninh za'gengh haiz hnyouv nzauh haic ziouc sung buoz nzuei la'kuotv gorngv, ‘Tin-Hungh aah! Yie baamz zuiz camv haic aqv. Tov korv-lienh yie maah!’+”" 
Luke18:14 Yesu aengx gorngv, “Yie mbuox meih mbuo, siou nzou-zinh nyei mienh nzuonx nyei ziangh hoc ninh duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv. Mv baac wuov dauh Faa^li^si Mienh maiv duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv. Haaix dauh taaih ganh zoux hlo, Tin-Hungh oix bun wuov dauh zoux faix. Haaix dauh nyiemc ganh zoux faix, Tin-Hungh oix bun wuov dauh zoux hlo.”" 
Luke18:15 Maaih deix mienh yaac dorh ninh mbuo nyei gu'nguaaz daaih oix Yesu maan. Sai-gorx mbuo buatc mienh hnangv naaiv nor zoux, sai-gorx mbuo ziouc gorngv ninh mbuo aqv." 
Luke18:16 Mv baac Yesu heuc fu'jueiv daaih. Ninh gorngv, “Gunv bun fu'jueiv daaih lorz yie, maiv dungx laanh ninh mbuo saa. Weic zuqc haaix dauh longc Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv ninh se hnangv naaiv deix fu'jueiv nor." 
Luke18:17 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, haaix dauh maiv kangv hnangv dauh fu'jueiv longc Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv ninh, wuov dauh yietc liuz maiv duqv bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv.”" 
Luke18:18 Maaih dauh zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh naaic Yesu, “Baengh Fim nyei Fin-Saeng aah! Yie oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor zoux cingx duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc?”" 
Luke18:19 Yesu naaic ninh, “Meih weic haaix diuc heuc yie zoux baengh fim mienh? Cuotv liuz Tin-Hungh, maiv maaih haaix dauh baengh fim." 
Luke18:20 Meih yaac hiuv duqv leiz-latc gorngv, ‘Maiv dungx hienx auv hienx nqox. Maiv dungx daix mienh. Maiv dungx zoux zaqc. Maiv dungx zoux jaav zorng-zengx. Oix zuqc tongx nimc diex maac.’+”" 
Luke18:21 Wuov laanh mienh gorngv, “Naaiv deix leiz yietc zungv yie faix-faix nyei fiou taux ih zanc.”" 
Luke18:22 Yesu haiz hnangv naaiv gorngv, ninh ziouc mbuox wuov laanh mienh, “Aengx maaih yietc nyungc meih corc maiv gaengh zoux. Oix zuqc mingh maaic nzengc meih maaih nyei ga'naaiv, zorqv wuov deix nyaanh bun nqoi mienh jomc mienh. Hnangv naaiv meih ziouc maaih jaaix nyei ga'naaiv siou jienv tin-dorngh. Zoux liuz, daaih gan yie oc.”" 
Luke18:23 Wuov laanh mienh haiz naaiv deix waac ninh ziouc nzauh, weic zuqc ninh butv zoih haic." 
Luke18:24 Yesu buatc ninh nzauh haic ziouc gorngv, “Butv-zoih mienh aqc duqv bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv." 
Luke18:25 Lorh torh cunx jiex sim-mbiuic corc gauh hungh hec butv-zoih mienh bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv.” 
Luke18:26 Maaih deix mienh haiz Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv ziouc naaic gaax, “Hnangv naaic wuov nyungc, haaix dauh haih duqv njoux?”" 
Luke18:27 Yesu dau, “Baamh mienh maiv haih zoux nyei, Tin-Hungh haih zoux.”" 
Luke18:28 Bide ziouc gorngv, “Mangc gaax, yie mbuo guangc jienv yie mbuo nyei jaa-dingh daaih gan Sai-Diex.”" 
Luke18:29 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, haaix dauh weic Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv guangc biauv fai auv fai muoz-doic fai diex maac fai fu'jueiv," 
Luke18:30 yiem naaiv seix ninh oix duqv gauh camv jiex ziex gouv. Nqa'haav hingv yaac oix duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc.” 
Luke18:31 Yesu dorh jienv wuov deix ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx mingh pien deix mbuox ninh mbuo, “Mbuo ih zanc mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh. Douc waac mienh fiev jienv gorngv yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, nyei yietc zungv sic ziouc cuotv daaih doix-diuc nzengc." 
Luke18:32 Taux wuov yie oix zuqc mienh zorqv jiu bun Janx, zuqc mienh jatv, gorngv doqc ki, tuiv wuom-nzuih naetv yie." 
Luke18:33 Ninh mbuo oix longc biaav-bin mborqv yaac zorqv yie daix guangc, mv baac nqa'haav buo hnoi yie aengx nangh daaih.”" 
Luke18:34 Yesu gorngv naaiv deix waac, sai-gorx mbuo maiv hiuv duqv gorngv haaix nyungc. Naaiv deix waac nyei eix leiz se hnangv meiv jienv nor, sai-gorx mbuo cingx daaih maiv bieqc hnyouv." 
Luke18:35 Yesu mingh aav lamh taux Ye^li^ko Zingh, maaih dauh m'zing maengh nyei mienh zueiz wuov jauv-hlen tov nyanc." 
Luke18:36 Haiz mienh camv jiex jauv ninh naaic gaax, “Mienh zoux haaix nyungc?”" 
Luke18:37 Mienh mbuox ninh, “Naa^saa^letv Mungv nyei Yesu jiex naaiv.”" 
Luke18:38 Wuov dauh m'zing maengh mienh ziouc heuc, “Ndaawitv Hungh nyei Zeiv-Fun, Yesu aah! Korv-lienh yie maah!”" 
Luke18:39 Mingh ndaangc wuov deix hemx ninh, “Maiv dungx ko lo maah!” Mv baac ninh jaa heuc gauh mbui deix, “Ndaawitv nyei Zeiv-Fun aah! Korv-lienh yie maah!”" 
Luke18:40 Yesu ziouc dingh jienv wuov mbuox mienh dorh ninh daaih. Taux fatv deix, Yesu naaic gaax ninh," 
Luke18:41 “Meih oix yie tengx haaix nyungc meih?” Ninh dau, “Domh Gorx aah! Yie oix mangc duqv buatc.”" 
Luke18:42 Yesu mbuox ninh, “Ih zanc meih mangc duqv buatc aqv. Laaix meih sienx yie, meih nyei m'zing ziouc longx.”" 
Luke18:43 Ninh liemh zeih haih mangc duqv buatc ziouc gan jienv Yesu mingh, ceng jienv Tin-Hungh mingh. Zuangx mienh buatc naaiv deix sic, ninh mbuo yietc zungv ziouc ceng Tin-Hungh." 
Luke19:1 Yesu bieqc Ye^li^ko Zingh, oix yangh zingh jiex." 
Luke19:2 Yiem wuov maaih dauh mienh zoux siou nzou-zinh nyei bieiv zeiv, mbuox heuc Sakc^kietv. Ninh yaac butv-zoih mienh." 
Luke19:3 Ninh oix mangc gaax Yesu hnangv haaix nor, mv baac Sakc^kietv aiv haic. Mienh camv torngv jienv ninh, ninh mangc maiv buatc Yesu." 
Luke19:4 Ninh ziouc caangv jiex ndaangc faaux ngongh nyorx ndiangx, yiem wuov zuov jienv mangc Yesu, weic zuqc Yesu oix yangh naaiv diuh jauv jiex." 
Luke19:5 Yesu jiex taux ndiangx-gorn ziouc cau hmien gorngv mbuox Sakc^kietv, “Sakc^kietv aac, gaanv njiec daaih maah! Ih hnoi yie oix zuqc mingh hitv meih nyei biauv.”" 
Luke19:6 Sakc^kietv huaang-huaang zaang-zaang nyei njiec daaih, a'hneiv nyei zipv Yesu." 
Luke19:7 Zuangx mienh buatc naaiv deix sic ninh mbuo ziouc ngopv gorngv, “Naaic laanh mienh mingh zoux zuiz-mienh nyei kaeqv aqv loh!”" 
Luke19:8 Sakc^kietv souv jiez daaih gorngv mbuox Ziouv, “Ziouv aah! Yie maaih nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv yie oix zorqv yietc buonc bun mienh jomc mienh. Se gorngv yie pienx haaix dauh nyei haaix nyungc, yietc gouv yie oix buih biei gouv ninh mbuo.”" 
Luke19:9 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh, “Ih hnoi njoux en daaih taux naaiv buonc mienh. Naaiv laanh mienh yaac zoux Apc^laa^ham nyei zeiv-fun." 
Luke19:10 Yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, daaih lorz yaac njoux dingx laaih nyei mienh.”" 
Luke19:11 Zuangx mienh corc muangx jienv naaiv deix waac, Yesu aengx gorngv diuh waac-beiv. Wuov zanc ninh aav lamh deix taux Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh, mienh laaic Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei ziangh hoc taux aqv mv bei." 
Luke19:12 Yesu ziouc gorngv, “Maaih dauh jien oix cuotv mingh go nyei guoqv zipv lingc zoux hungh. Zipv liuz ninh aengx nzuonx daaih." 
Luke19:13 Oix mingh wuov zanc ninh heuc ninh nyei ziepc dauh bou daaih, yietc dauh bun diuh nyaanh. Ninh gorngv, ‘Dorh naaiv deix nyaanh mingh zoux saeng-eix taux yie nzuonx.’" 
Luke19:14 “Wuov dauh jien nyei baeqc fingx nzorng haic ninh ziouc paaiv mienh gan nqaang mingh gorngv, ‘Yie mbuo maiv oix longc naaiv laanh mienh zoux yie mbuo nyei hungh.’" 
Luke19:15 “Mv baac wuov dauh jien duqv lingc zoux hungh aengx nzuonx daaih aqv. Ninh ziouc heuc dongh ninh bun nyaanh wuov deix bou, daaih mangc gaax ninh mbuo zornc duqv mbu'ziex." 
Luke19:16 “Da'yietv dauh bou daaih gorngv, ‘Ziouv aah! Meih bun yie wuov diuh nyaanh yie zornc duqv ziepc diuh.’" 
Luke19:17 “Ziouv dau, ‘Longx aqv. Meih za'gengh hnyouv zingx nyei bou. Deix baav faix-fiuv sic meih zungv goux ndongc naaic longx, yie bun meih gunv ziepc norm zingh.’" 
Luke19:18 “Da'nyeic dauh bou daaih gorngv, ‘Ziouv aah! Meih bun yie wuov diuh nyaanh yie aengx zornc duqv biaa diuh.’" 
Luke19:19 “Ziouv mbuox ninh, ‘Yie bun meih gunv biaa norm zingh.’" 
Luke19:20 “Aengx maaih dauh bou daaih gorngv, ‘Ziouv aah! Naaiv! Meih bun yie wuov diuh nyaanh. Yie longc siqc jaauv beu jienv siou longx nyei." 
Luke19:21 Yie gamh nziex haic meih. Yie hiuv duqv meih maiv sie haaix dauh. Maiv zeiz meih ganh nyei ga'naaiv meih yaac zorqv. Meih ganh maiv zuqc ndortv qaqv zuangx mv baac meih yaac siou.’ 
Luke19:22 “Ziouv gorngv mbuox ninh, ‘Meih waaic haic nyei bou aah! Yie longc meih ganh nyei waac dingc meih nyei zuiz. Meih hiuv duqv yie maiv sie haaix dauh? Meih yaac hiuv duqv maiv zeiz yie nyei ga'naaiv yie yaac zorqv? Maiv zeiz yie ndortv qaqv zuangx yie yaac siou?" 
Luke19:23 Hnangv naaic meih zoux haaix nyungc maiv dorh yie nyei nyaanh mingh dapv nyaanh lamz? Yie nzuonx daaih yie duqv buonv-zinh yaac duqv deix leic zinh caux jienv niaa.’ 
Luke19:24 “Ziouv aengx mbuox souv ga'hlen wuov deix mienh, ‘Zorqv ninh wuov diuh nyaanh bun maaih ziepc diuh wuov dauh maah!’" 
Luke19:25 “Wuov deix gorngv, ‘Ziouv aah! Ninh zungv maaih ziepc diuh niaa.’" 
Luke19:26 “Wuov dauh hungh dau, ‘Yie mbuox meih mbuo, haaix dauh maaih nyei, oix jaa bun ninh maaih gauh camv. Haaix dauh maiv maaih, liemh ninh maaih deix baav, zungv oix zuqc zorqv mingh." 
Luke19:27 Mv baac maiv oix yie zoux hungh wuov deix win-wangv dorh daaih naaiv yiem yie nyei nza'hmien daix guangc.’+” 
Luke19:28 Yesu gorngv liuz naaiv deix waac ninh ziouc mingh ndaangc. Sai-gorx mbuo gan jienv mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh. 
Luke19:29 Mingh taux Ga'lanv Mbong, leih Mbetc^faa^yi caux Mbe^taa^ni Laangz maiv go, ninh paaiv i dauh sai-gorx mingh ndaangc." 
Luke19:30 Ninh gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo mingh taux nza'hmien maengx wuov norm laangz. Bieqc laangz mingh ziouc buatc dauh maaz-li dorn ndoh jienv wuov, mienh maiv gaengh geh jiex. Jaiv ken jienv daaih oc." 
Luke19:31 Se gorngv maaih mienh naaic, ‘Meih mbuo jaiv maaz-li dorn zoux haaix nyungc?’ Oix zuqc mbuox ninh mbuo, ‘Ziouv qiemx zuqc longc.’+”" 
Luke19:32 Ninh mbuo ziouc mingh ndaangc, buatc nyungc-nyungc doix Yesu gorngv nyei waac." 
Luke19:33 Ninh mbuo jaiv maaz-li dorn wuov zanc, maaz-li nyei ziouv naaic gaax, “Meih mbuo jaiv maaz-li dorn zoux haaix nyungc?”" 
Luke19:34 Ninh mbuo dau, “Ziouv qiemx zuqc longc.”" 
Luke19:35 Ninh mbuo ziouc ken maaz-li dorn mingh Yesu wuov, aengx zorqv ganh nyei domh lui dimc jienv, yaac baav Yesu faaux mingh geh jienv maaz-li nyei diqc daanz." 
Luke19:36 Geh jienv mingh wuov zanc, zuangx mienh zorqv ninh mbuo nyei domh lui dimc jienv wuov jauv." 
Luke19:37 Yesu taux fatv Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh, njiec Ga'lanv Mbong wuov zanc, zuangx sai-gorx ziouc lomh nzoih njien-youh nyei longc qiex hlo nyei ceng Tin-Hungh weic ninh mbuo buatc jiex yietc zungv mbuoqc horngh haic nyei sic. Ninh mbuo ziouc heuc," 
Luke19:38 “Tov Tin-Hungh ceix fuqv dengv Ziouv nyei mbuox daaih naaiv dauh hungh. Tin-dorngh maaih baengh orn. Yiem hlang jiex nyei dorngx maaih njang-laangc.” 
Luke19:39 Yiem wuov maaih deix Faa^li^si Mienh gorngv mbuox Yesu, “Fin-Saeng aah! Hatc meih nyei sai-gorx mbuo sekv maah!”" 
Luke19:40 Yesu dau, “Yie mbuox meih mbuo, se gorngv ninh mbuo maiv ko lo, la'bieiv zungv oix zuqc heuc jiez daaih.”" 
Luke19:41 Yesu mingh aav lamh taux Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh. Mangc buatc zingh ninh ziouc weic wuov norm zingh nyiemv. 
Luke19:42 Ninh yaac gorngv, “Feix duqv ih hnoi meih hiuv duqv haaix nyungc haih bun meih maaih baengh orn. Mv baac ih zanc naaiv deix sic gem jienv, meih nyei m'zing mangc maiv buatc." 
Luke19:43 Ziangh hoc oix taux, meih nyei win-wangv oix wetv nie-ndui huing gormx meih. Ninh mbuo oix weic jienv biei bung kuonx jienv meih." 
Luke19:44 Liemh meih ganh caux yiem meih nyei zingh laatc gu'nyuoz nyei mienh yietc zungv ninh mbuo oix mietc nzengc, maiv liouh yietc kuaaiv la'bieiv lapv jienv, weic zuqc meih zieqv maiv duqv Tin-Hungh daaih njoux meih nyei ziangh hoc.”" 
Luke19:45 Yesu bieqc zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv mingh ziouc zunc maaiz maaic nyei mienh cuotv mingh," 
Luke19:46 yaac mbuox ninh mbuo, “Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv, ‘Yie nyei biauv oix zuqc zoux daux gaux nyei biauv,’ mv baac meih mbuo longc zoux ‘Janx-zaqc bingx nyei kuotv.’+”" 
Luke19:47 Yesu hnoi-hnoi yiem wuov zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv njaaux mienh. Sai mienh bieiv caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux gunv baeqc fingx nyei bieiv oix daix Yesu," 
Luke19:48 mv baac ninh mbuo lorz maiv duqv qangx weic zuqc zuangx mienh a'hneiv muangx Yesu njaaux, yaac maiv oix bungx ndortv yietc joux ninh nyei waac." 
Luke20:1 Maaih hnoi Yesu yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv njaaux mienh yaac zunh kuv fienx. Sai mienh bieiv caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux mienh gox daaih gorngv," 
Luke20:2 “Mbuox yie mbuo oc. Meih maaih haaix nyungc leiz zoux naaiv deix sic? Naaiv nyungc leiz haaix dauh bun meih?” 
Luke20:3 Yesu dau, “Yie yaac oix naaic joux meih mbuo. Mbuox yie oc." 
Luke20:4 Haaix dauh bun Yo^han maaih leiz tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz, Tin-Hungh fai baamh mienh?”" 
Luke20:5 Ninh mbuo ziouc laanh caux laanh caangh laangh, “Mbuo horpc zuqc hnangv haaix nor gorngv? Se gorngv mbuo gorngv, ‘Tin-Hungh bun daaih,’ ninh oix gorngv, ‘Wuov nyungc meih mbuo weic haaix diuc maiv sienx Yo^han?’" 
Luke20:6 Mv baac se gorngv mbuo gorngv, ‘Mienh bun daaih,’ zuangx mienh oix zorqv la'bieiv zong daic mbuo weic zuqc ninh mbuo funx dingc Yo^han se douc waac mienh.”" 
Luke20:7 Ninh mbuo ziouc dau, “Yie mbuo maiv hiuv duqv haaix dauh bun ninh maaih leiz zoux.”" 
Luke20:8 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Hnangv naaic yie yaac maiv mbuox meih mbuo yie maaih haaix nyungc leiz zoux naaiv deix sic.”" 
Luke20:9 Yesu aengx gorngv waac-beiv bun mienh muangx. Ninh gorngv, “Maaih laanh mienh zuangx nzong a'ngunc biouv, yaac gouv bun mienh. Ninh ganh aeqv, cuotv deic-bung mingh lauh nyei." 
Luke20:10 Taux biouv zuoqc nyei ziangh hoc, ninh paaiv dauh bou mingh lorz gouv huingx nyei mienh, weic siou ninh nyei buonc gouv huingx nyei biouv. Mv baac gouv huingx mienh mborqv wuov dauh bou, zunc ninh kungx-buoz baeqc zaux nyei nzuonx." 
Luke20:11 Huingx-ziouv ziouc aengx paaiv dauh bou mingh, mv baac gouv huingx mienh aengx mborqv ninh, zoux doqc bun ninh nyaiv, yaac zunc ninh kungx-buoz baeqc zaux nyei nzuonx." 
Luke20:12 Huingx-ziouv aengx paaiv da'faam dauh mingh. Gouv huingx nyei mienh aengx mborqv duqv ninh siang haic, tor guangc ga'nyiec ziqc huingx mingh." 
Luke20:13 “Huingx-ziouv ziouc gorngv, ‘Aa, yie oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor zoux ni? Yie paaiv yie ganh nyei dorn-hnamv mingh, m'nziex ninh mbuo oix taaih ninh mv bei.’" 
Luke20:14 “Mv baac gouv huingx mienh buatc ninh, laanh mbuox laanh, ‘Nzipc naaiv norm huingx se dongh naaiv dauh aqv. Mbuo zorqv ninh daix guangc mingh. Ninh nzipc nyei jaa-dingh ziouc benx mbuo nyei aqv.’" 
Luke20:15 Ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv ninh tor cuotv ga'nyiec ziqc huingx daix guangc mi'aqv.” Yesu naaic gaax, “Hnangv naaic huingx-ziouv oix hnangv haaix nor zoux bun gouv huingx mienh?" 
Luke20:16 Ninh oix mingh daix guangc ninh mbuo aengx bun ganh deix mienh gouv wuov norm huingx.” Zuangx mienh haiz liuz naaiv deix waac, ninh mbuo gorngv, “Cin-maanc maiv dungx bun maaih hnangv naaic.”" 
Luke20:17 Yesu mangc jienv ninh mbuo naaic gaax, “Ging-Sou fiev jienv naaiv joux waac maaih haaix nyungc eix leiz? ‘Gomv biauv zaangc nqemh cuotv wuov norm la'bieiv, zungv benx an biauv-gorqv gauh longc jienv jiex wuov norm.’" 
Luke20:18 Haaix dauh ndorpc, zong zuqc naaiv norm la'bieiv, wuov dauh ziouc huv benx ziex deix mi'aqv. Naaiv norm la'bieiv ndortv, zong zuqc haaix dauh, wuov dauh ziouc muonc nzengc mi'aqv.”" 
Luke20:19 Njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux sai mienh bieiv hiuv duqv Yesu gorngv naaiv diuh waac-beiv ziqv zuqc ninh mbuo. Wuov norm ziangh hoc ninh mbuo oix zorqv Yesu haic aqv, mv baac ninh mbuo gamh nziex zuangx mienh." 
Luke20:20 Njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux sai mienh bieiv ziouc zanc-zanc cienh mangc jienv Yesu. Ninh mbuo paaiv mienh mingh zoux sic hnangv kuv mienh, mv baac ninh mbuo oix nduov Yesu gorngv dorngc ziouc haih zorqv ninh jiu bun yiem Lomaa Zungx nyei buoz-ndiev." 
Luke20:21 Ninh mbuo ziouc naaic gaax Yesu, “Fin-Saeng aah! Yie mbuo hiuv duqv meih gorngv nyei waac caux njaaux nyei leiz se horpc nyei. Meih yaac maiv mangc haaix dauh nyei hmien. Tin-Hungh nyei jauv meih yaac njaaux duqv zien." 
Luke20:22 Wuov nyungc meih mbuox yie mbuo oc. Mbuo cuotv nzou-zinh bun Lomaa Hungh se dorngc mbuo nyei leiz fai?” 
Luke20:23 Yesu hiuv duqv ninh mbuo nyei mbienv-mbeux ziouc gorngv," 
Luke20:24 “Zorqv norm nyaanh daaih bun yie mangc gaax. Naaiv haaix dauh nyei fangx caux haaix dauh nyei mbuox?” Ninh mbuo dau, “Lomaa Hungh nyei.”" 
Luke20:25 Yesu ziouc gorngv, “Haaix nyungc Lomaa Hungh nyei, oix zuqc bun Lomaa Hungh. Haaix nyungc Tin-Hungh nyei, oix zuqc bun Tin-Hungh.”" 
Luke20:26 Dorng jienv zuangx mienh ninh mbuo maiv buatc Yesu gorngv dorngc haaix nyungc. Ninh mbuo mbuoqc horngh haic ninh dau nyei waac ziouc maiv ko lo aqv. 
Luke20:27 Maaih deix Saa^ndu^si Mienh daaih lorz Yesu. Saa^ndu^si wuov jauv mienh gorngv mienh daic mingh maiv haih nangh aqv. 
Luke20:28 Ninh mbuo naaic Yesu, “Fin-Saeng aah! Mose weic mbuo fiev naaiv diuh leiz, ‘Se gorngv maaih laanh mienh longc jienv auv, maiv gaengh maaih fu'jueiv mv baac ninh daic mi'aqv, ninh nyei youz oix zuqc longc nyaam zoux auv weic duqv fu'jueiv funx gorx nyei buonc.’" 
Luke20:29 Zinh ndaangc maaih siec muoz-dorn. Dorn-hlo dorng jienv jaa, maiv maaih fu'jueiv, ninh daic mi'aqv." 
Luke20:30 Da'naix longc nyaam-guaav aengx daic mi'aqv. Maiv maaih fu'jueiv. 
Luke20:31 Lauv Saan aengx longc gau, daic mi'aqv. Naaiv deix siec muoz longc jiex nzengc, yaac fih hnangv nyei maiv maaih fu'jueiv, ziang naaic daic mi'aqv." 
Luke20:32 Zoux gau, nqa'haav wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn yaac daic mi'aqv." 
Luke20:33 Hnangv naaic, mienh daic mingh, taux nangh daaih wuov hnoi, wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn funx haaix dauh nyei auv? Weic zuqc ninh mbuo siec muoz yietc zungv longc jiex ninh.”" 
Luke20:34 Yesu dau ninh mbuo, “Naaiv seix mienh longc auv longc nqox, bungx sieqv zoux cing-jaa." 
Luke20:35 Mv baac daic mingh puix duqv nangh daaih yiem nqa'haav wuov seix m'jangc m'sieqv maiv longc auv longc nqox, maiv bungx sieqv zoux cing-jaa." 
Luke20:36 Ninh mbuo yaac maiv haih daic weic zuqc ninh mbuo hnangv fin-mienh nor. Ninh mbuo zoux Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz weic zuqc ninh mbuo daic mingh aengx nangh daaih. 
Luke20:37 Mose yaac bun cing mienh daic mingh aengx nangh daaih weic zuqc ninh gorngv douz zieqc ndiangx-dorn-fomv wuov diuh jauv. Ninh heuc Ziouv zoux ‘Apc^laa^ham nyei Tin-Hungh, I^sakc nyei Tin-Hungh caux Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh.’" 
Luke20:38 Tin-Hungh se mienh nangh mienh nyei Tin-Hungh, maiv zeiz daic mingh nyei mienh nyei Tin-Hungh, weic zuqc ei Tin-Hungh mangc, yietc zungv se ziangh jienv nyei.”" 
Luke20:39 Maaih deix njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng gorngv, “Fin-Saeng aac, meih dau duqv horpc haic.”" 
Luke20:40 Gorngv liuz ninh mbuo maiv gaamv naaic haaix nyungc ninh aqv. 
Luke20:41 Yesu ziouc naaic ninh mbuo, “Mienh hnangv haaix nor haih gorngv Giduc zoux Ndaawitv Hungh nyei Zeiv-Fun?" 
Luke20:42 Weic zuqc yiem Singx Nzung Sou Ndaawitv ganh fiev, ‘Ziouv gorngv mbuox yie nyei Ziouv, “Zueiz jienv yie nyei mbiaauc maengx bung" 
Luke20:43 zuov yie bun meih nyei win-wangv zoux meih lorngx zaux nyei dorngx.”+’ 
Luke20:44 Ndaawitv heuc ninh zoux Ziouv. Wuov nyungc, Giduc hnangv haaix nor haih zoux Ndaawitv nyei zeiv-fun?”" 
Luke20:45 Zuangx mienh muangx Yesu gorngv wuov zanc, Yesu mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo," 
Luke20:46 “Oix zuqc faix fim njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng. Ninh mbuo a'hneiv zuqv lui-ndaauv mingh mingh daaih daaih, mingh wuov hei-horngc oix mienh taaih, zorqv yieqv bun ninh mbuo. Mingh wuic dorngh ninh mbuo ginv longx jiex nyei dorngx zueiz. Bieqc yinh ninh mbuo kungx oix zueiz dieh gorn hnangv." 
Luke20:47 Ninh mbuo nduov auv-guaav nyei jaa-dingh nyanc yaac duqv-eix daux gaux ndaauv nyei nduov mienh. Dongh naaiv nyungc mienh oix zuqc dingc zuiz gauh hniev jiex.” 
Luke21:1 Yesu cau hmien buatc butv-zoih mienh dapv nyaanh zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv wuov norm siou nyaanh nyei faang. 
Luke21:2 Ninh yaac buatc dauh auv-guaav-jomc daaih dapv i norm dongh zinh siqv. 
Luke21:3 Yesu gorngv, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, naaiv dauh auv-guaav-jomc fongc horc nyei nyaanh gauh camv jiex dauh dauh nyei." 
Luke21:4 Weic zuqc wuov deix mienh nyaanh camv, ninh mbuo fongc horc deix baav hnangv. Mv baac naaiv dauh auv-guaav ndongc naaic jomc, liemh ninh nyei yungz maengc nyaanh ninh fongc horc nzengc mi'aqv.”" 
Luke21:5 Maaih deix mienh ceng zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zorng duqv nzueic haic. Longc la'bieiv-nzueic zoux daaih, yaac longc mienh fongc horc nyei zingh nyeic zorng nzueic. Yesu gorngv," 
Luke21:6 “Meih mbuo buatc naaiv deix ga'naaiv, maaih norm hnoi yietc zungv zuqc caeqv nzengc. Maiv maaih yietc kuaaiv la'bieiv lapv jienv aqv.”" 
Luke21:7 Ninh mbuo naaic Yesu, “Sai-Diex aah! Tov mbuox yie mbuo oc. Naaiv deix sic haaix zanc oix cuotv? Sic oix cuotv wuov zanc maaih haaix nyungc jangx-hoc bun cing ziangh hoc taux?”" 
Luke21:8 Yesu gorngv, “Oix zuqc faix fim oc. Maiv dungx muangx haaix dauh nduov meih mbuo. Maaih mienh camv oix longc yie nyei mbuox daaih gorngv, ‘Yie dongh Giduc aqv,’ yaac gorngv, ‘Ziangh hoc taux aqv.’ Maiv dungx gan ninh mbuo." 
Luke21:9 Meih mbuo haiz mborqv domh jaax caux deic-bung lunc nyei fienx, maiv dungx gamh nziex. Naaiv deix sic ndongc haaix yaac oix cuotv ndaangc. Mv baac setv mueiz nyei hnoi-nyieqc liemh zeih maiv gaengh taux.”" 
Luke21:10 Yesu aengx gorngv, “Naaiv fingx caux wuov fingx oix mborqv jaax. Naaiv norm guoqv caux wuov norm guoqv oix mborqv domh jaax." 
Luke21:11 Aengx maaih deix dorngx ndau yaac dongz duqv seix haic. Maaih deix dorngx buangh domh ngorc, maaih deix butv domh wuon-baengc. Yaac maaih gamh nziex haic nyei sic, caux domh jangx-hoc yiem wuov lungh cuotv." 
Luke21:12 “Naaiv deix sic maiv gaengh cuotv nyei hnoi-nyieqc, mienh oix zorqv meih mbuo yaac zoux doqc hoic. Ninh mbuo oix zorqv meih mbuo jiu bun wuic dorngh yaac bun meih mbuo zuqc wuonx jienv loh. Meih mbuo weic yie nyei mengh aengx zuqc dorh mingh yiem hungh diex caux zungx nyei nza'hmien." 
Luke21:13 ziouc maaih qangx gorngv weic kuv fienx zoux zorng-zengx. 
Luke21:14 Oix zuqc jaa-ndaangc dingc hnyouv maiv dungx nzauh taux wuov zanc hnangv haaix nor dau. 
Luke21:15 Weic zuqc yie oix bun meih mbuo maaih nzuih maaz, maaih cong-mengh, bun meih mbuo nyei win-wangv nzaeng maiv hingh yaac maiv maaih waac gorngv aqv." 
Luke21:16 Meih mbuo nyei diex maac, muoz-doic, cien-ceqv, gorx-youz yaac oix maaic meih mbuo. Maaih deix meih mbuo yaac oix zuqc ninh mbuo daix daic." 
Luke21:17 Laaix yie, zuangx mienh oix nzorng meih mbuo." 
Luke21:18 Mv baac meih mbuo nyei mba'biei yietc diuh zungv maiv zuqc mietc. 
Luke21:19 Meih mbuo diev duqv taux daauh nor, ziouc njoux duqv meih mbuo nyei maengc aqv." 
Luke21:20 “Meih mbuo buatc baeng weih jienv Ye^lu^saa^lem wuov zanc, meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv zingh zuqc baaic huaang nyei ziangh hoc taux fatv aqv." 
Luke21:21 Wuov zanc yiem Yu^ndie Saengv wuov deix oix zuqc biaux faaux mbong. Yiem zingh nyei mienh oix zuqc biaux cuotv. Yiem ga'nyiec ziqc zingh wuov deix maiv dungx bieqc zingh aqv. 
Luke21:22 Weic zuqc naaiv se dingc zuiz nyei hnoi-nyieqc, oix bun nyungc-nyungc cuotv daaih doix nzengc Ging-Sou fiev jienv nyei waac." 
Luke21:23 Yiem wuov deix hnoi-nyieqc, maaih jienv sin caux maaih gu'nguaaz hopv nyorx nyei m'sieqv dorn za'gengh kouv aqv. Naaiv norm deic-bung oix zuqc domh zeqc naanc yaac zuqc Tin-Hungh nouz, ziouc dingc naaiv deix mienh nyei zuiz." 
Luke21:24 Maaih deix zuqc nzuqc ndaauv daix. Maaih deix zuqc caangv mingh taux maanc guoqv. Janx oix caaiv jienv Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh taux Janx nyei ziangh hoc buangv soux mouc. 
Luke21:25 “Wuov zanc hleix, hlaax, mba'hnoi oix cuotv jangx-hoc. Lungh ndiev maanc fingx oix nzauh taux ndoqv yaac hnamv maiv mengh baeqc weic zuqc koiv jiex domh laangc yaac ba'laqc mbui duqv seix haic." 
Luke21:26 Mienh gamh nziex gau, ziouc meih muangv nzengc. Ninh mbuo gamh nziex haic yiem naaiv lungh ndiev oix cuotv daaih nyei sic, weic zuqc yiem lungh maaih qaqv nyei ga'naaiv zungv zuqc ndanc dongz." 
Luke21:27 Taux wuov zanc ninh mbuo ziouc buatc yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, maaih qaqv caux domh njang-laangc yiem dorv mbuonx njiec daaih." 
Luke21:28 Buatc naaiv deix sic jiez gorn cuotv, oix zuqc souv jiez daaih cau hmien mangc jienv lungh, weic zuqc zuoqc meih mbuo nyei ziangh hoc taux fatv aqv.”" 
Luke21:29 Yesu aengx gorngv naaiv diuh waac-beiv bun ninh mbuo muangx. Ninh gorngv, “Mangc gaax ngongh nyorx ndiangx caux nyungc-nyungc ndiangx!" 
Luke21:30 Buatc cuotv normh lunx ziouc hiuv duqv oix bieqc haac gueix aqv. 
Luke21:31 Naaiv fih hnangv nyei. Meih mbuo buatc naaiv deix sic cuotv, meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei hnoi-nyieqc taux fatv aqv." 
Luke21:32 “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, naaiv doic mienh jiex seix maiv gaengh nzengc, naaiv deix yietc zungv sic ziouc cuotv daaih aqv." 
Luke21:33 Lungh ndau oix jiex nzengc mv baac yie nyei waac yietc liuz maiv jiex. 
Luke21:34 “Oix zuqc ging hnyouv mbungh jienv, maiv dungx laaix hnamv oix nyanc beuv hopv nquin yaac laaix seix zaangc nyei jauv kuonx hnyouv. Gamh nziex wuov norm hnoi liemh zeih taux, hnangv zaeng hlaang hlopv jienv meih mbuo nor." 
Luke21:35 Weic zuqc wuov norm hnoi za'gengh oix taux lungh ndiev norm-norm dorngx nyei mienh. 
Luke21:36 Oix zuqc zanc-zanc ging hnyouv zuov jienv, daux gaux tov Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo maaih qaqv haih diev duqv yietc zungv oix cuotv daaih nyei sic, yaac duqv souv jienv yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, nyei nza'hmien.”" 
Luke21:37 Yesu hnoi-hnoi mingh zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv njaaux mienh. Hmuangx deix ninh ziouc cuotv zingh mingh ziangh muonz yiem Ga'lanv Mbong. 
Luke21:38 Ndorm-ndorm nziouv nyei zuangx mienh mingh zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv oix muangx Yesu. 
Luke22:1 Maiv an bingv nyei Njuov nyei Zipv, aengx maaih norm mbuox heuc Siex Maengc Zipv, aav lamh taux aqv." 
Luke22:2 Sai mienh bieiv caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng oix bingx jienv lorz qangx daix Yesu, weic zuqc ninh mbuo gamh nziex zuangx mienh." 
Luke22:3 Wuov zanc Saadaan bieqc Yu^ndaatc nyei hnyouv. Wuov dauh Yu^ndaatc, mienh yaac heuc I^saa^kaa^li^otc. Ninh zoux Yesu nyei ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx nyei yietc dauh." 
Luke22:4 Yu^ndaatc ziouc mingh sai mienh bieiv caux goux zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei baeng-bieiv wuov caangh laangh hnangv haaix nor haih zorqv Yesu jiu bun ninh mbuo. 
Luke22:5 Wuov deix mienh a'hneiv haic yaac laengz bun nyaanh ninh. 
Luke22:6 Yu^ndaatc ziouc laengz aqv. Ziouc lorz qangx, dongh zuangx mienh maiv yiem nyei ziangh hoc, zorqv Yesu jiu bun ninh mbuo." 
Luke22:7 Jiex Maiv An Bingv nyei Njuov nyei Zipv, dongh oix zuqc daix yungh dorn nyanc Siex Maengc Zipv wuov donx nyanc hopv nyei hnoi taux aqv." 
Luke22:8 Yesu paaiv Bide caux Yo^han, mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo oix zuqc mingh mbenc Siex Maengc Zipv wuov donx nyanc hopv daaih bun mbuo lomh nzoih nyanc.”" 
Luke22:9 Ninh mbuo naaic gaax Yesu, “Sai-Diex oix yie mbuo mingh haaix mbenc?”" 
Luke22:10 Ninh dau, “Meih mbuo bieqc zingh wuov zanc ziouc maaih dauh mienh ndaam norm dapv jienv wuom nyei nie-ha'louh daaih buangh meih mbuo. Ninh bieqc haaix norm biauv, meih mbuo gan jienv ninh bieqc." 
Luke22:11 Yaac naaic gaax biauv-ziouv, ‘Sai-Diex naaic, ninh caux ninh nyei sai-gorx oix zuqc yiem haaix qongx biauv nyanc Siex Maengc Zipv wuov donx nyanc hopv?’" 
Luke22:12 Biauv-ziouv ziouc dorh meih mbuo faaux mingh mangc gu'nguaaic wuov nzangh biauv, maaih qongx jangv nyei. Nyungc-nyungc maaih nzoih nzengc. Meih mbuo yiem naaic mbenc aqv.”" 
Luke22:13 Ninh mbuo ziouc mingh buatc nyungc-nyungc doix Yesu gorngv nyei waac. Ninh mbuo ziouc yiem wuov mbenc Siex Maengc Zipv nyei hnaangx. 
Luke22:14 Taux nyanc nyei ziangh hoc, Yesu caux ninh nyei gong-zoh mbuo faaux dieh nyanc hnaangx." 
Luke22:15 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie maiv gaengh zuqc siouc kouv, yie za'gengh oix caux meih mbuo nyanc naaiv donx Siex Maengc Zipv nyei hnaangx ndaangc." 
Luke22:16 Yie mbuox meih mbuo, yangh naaiv jiex yie maiv nyanc Siex Maengc Zipv nyei hnaangx. Zuov taux naaiv donx hnaangx nyei zien eix leiz dunh yunh nzengc, se dongh Tin-Hungh daaih zoux Ziouv gunv mienh nyei ziangh hoc, yie cingx daaih aengx duqv nyanc.”" 
Luke22:17 Gorngv liuz, Yesu zorqv zaanv a'ngunc diuv daaih laengz zingh Tin-Hungh yaac gorngv, “Zipv naaiv norm zaanv mingh bun nqoi yietc laanh hopv deix." 
Luke22:18 Yie mbuox meih mbuo, yangh naaiv jiex yie maiv hopv a'ngunc diuv. Zuov taux Tin-Hungh daaih zoux Ziouv gunv mienh cingx daaih aengx hopv.”" 
Luke22:19 Yesu zorqv njuov daaih laengz zingh liuz Tin-Hungh, ziouc maeqv nqoi bun sai-gorx mbuo, yaac gorngv, “Naaiv yie nyei sin, se weic meih mbuo siev nyei. Meih mbuo oix zuqc hnangv naaiv zoux weic jangx yie.”" 
Luke22:20 Nyanc liuz hnaangx, Yesu aengx zorqv zaanv a'ngunc diuv daaih gorngv, “Naaiv norm zaanv se longc yie nyei nziaamv liepc jiez nyei siang-ngaengc waac, se weic meih mbuo liouc cuotv daaih.”" 
Luke22:21 “Mangc maah! Oix maaic yie wuov dauh nyei buoz caux yie nyei buoz juangc dieh lorngx jienv. 
Luke22:22 Yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, oix zuqc ei Tin-Hungh jaa-ndaangc dingc daaih nyei guei seix, mv baac maaic yie wuov dauh zungv zuqc kouv aqv.”" 
Luke22:23 Sai-gorx mbuo ziouc laanh naaic laanh ninh mbuo haaix dauh oix zoux cuotv naaiv deix sic. 
Luke22:24 Sai-gorx nzaeng jiez daaih gorngv, yiem ninh mbuo mbu'ndongx, oix zuqc funx ninh mbuo haaix dauh zoux hlo jiex." 
Luke22:25 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Janx nyei hungh gunv jienv baeqc fingx. Zoux jien-fouv wuov deix, baeqc fingx heuc, ‘Nzie mienh nyei gorx-youz.’" 
Luke22:26 Mv baac meih mbuo maiv horpc zuqc hnangv naaic. Meih mbuo haaix dauh zoux gauh hlo jiex, wuov dauh oix zuqc zoux hnangv gauh lunx jiex wuov dauh. Haaix dauh zoux bieiv, wuov dauh oix zuqc zoux hnangv bou nor." 
Luke22:27 Haaix dauh zoux gauh hlo? Zueiz jienv nyanc wuov dauh fai liuc leiz wuov dauh? Zueiz jienv wuov dauh zoux gauh hlo maiv zeiz? Mv baac yie yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx hnangv fu-sux nyei mienh nor. 
Luke22:28 Yie buangh zuqc kouv meih mbuo caux yie yiem, maiv guangc yie." 
Luke22:29 Yie nyei Die hnangv haaix nor zorqv norm guoqv bun yie, yie ziouc hnangv wuov nor zorqv norm jiu bun meih mbuo." 
Luke22:30 Se weic bun meih mbuo yiem yie nyei guoqv caux yie juangc dieh nyanc juangc dieh hopv. Meih mbuo yaac duqv zueiz weic, siemv wuov deix ziepc nyeic fingx I^saa^laa^en Mienh." 
Luke22:31 “Simon aah! Simon! Muangx oc. Saadaan duqv Tin-Hungh nqoi nzuih seix meih mbuo yietc zungv hnangv mienh nyomx cuqv nor. 
Luke22:32 Mv baac yie zungv weic meih daux gaux tov Tin-Hungh bun meih sienx wuonv, maiv tuix. Meih aengx nzuonx daaih lorz yie, meih oix zuqc tengx meih nyei gorx-youz henv jiez daaih.”" 
Luke22:33 Bide dau, “Ziouv aah! Maiv gunv bieqc loh, maiv gunv daic, yie ziangh yaac caux meih yietc ndui. Daic yaac caux meih yietc kuotv.”" 
Luke22:34 Yesu gorngv, “Bide aah! Yie mbuox meih, ih hnoi jai maiv gaengh nqaaix, meih oix gorngv buo nzunc meih maiv hiuv duqv yie.”" 
Luke22:35 Yesu aengx naaic gaax ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo, “Yie paaiv meih mbuo mingh wuov zanc, yie mbuox meih mbuo maiv dungx dorh nyaanh mbuoqc, yaac maiv dungx dorh mbuoqc dapv ga'naaiv fai dorh heh, meih mbuo caa haaix nyungc fai?” Ninh mbuo dau, “Maiv caa haaix nyungc.”" 
Luke22:36 Yesu gorngv, “Mv baac ih zanc haaix dauh maaih nyaanh mbuoqc fai dapv ga'naaiv nyei mbuoqc oix zuqc dorh jienv mingh. Haaix dauh maiv maaih nzuqc ndaauv oix zuqc maaic ninh nyei domh lui maaiz zung." 
Luke22:37 Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv, ‘Ninh zuqc funx caux zuiz-mienh fih hnangv.’ Yie mbuox meih mbuo, naaiv joux waac oix yiem yie cuotv daaih, zungv cuotv jienv aqv.”" 
Luke22:38 Sai-gorx mbuo gorngv, “Ziouv aah! Mangc gaax naaiv! Maaih i zung nzuqc ndaauv.” Yesu dau, “Naaiv gaux aqv.”" 
Luke22:39 Yesu cuotv zingh mingh yaac hnangv yietc gau nor, mingh Ga'lanv Mbong. Sai-gorx mbuo gan jienv mingh." 
Luke22:40 Taux wuov norm dorngx, Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo oix zuqc tov Tin-Hungh tengx meih mbuo maiv zuqc buangh seix hnyouv nyei sic.”" 
Luke22:41 Gorngv liuz, ninh ganh aengx mingh norm dorngx go deix nyei, ndongc zoi yietc lau la'bieiv go nyei dorngx, yiem wuov gueic njiec caux Tin-Hungh gorngv waac." 
Luke22:42 Ninh gorngv, “Aa Die aah! Se gorngv ei Die nyei eix nor, tov zorqv nqoi yie oix zuqc hopv naaiv norm zaanv. Mv baac maiv dungx ei yie nyei eix. Oix zuqc ei Die ganh nyei eix hnangv.”" 
Luke22:43 Maaih dauh fin-mienh yiem tin-dorngh daaih hinc cuotv tengx qaqv Yesu. 
Luke22:44 Yesu ba'laqc nzauh duqv kouv haic ziouc jaa longc qaqv daux gaux. Ninh cuotv hanc yietc norm yietc norm hlo nyei, hnangv nziaamv nor ndiepv njiec ndau." 
Luke22:45 Yesu daux gaux baac, jiez sin daaih taux sai-gorx mbuo wuov, buatc ninh mbuo laaix nzauh duqv kouv haic, m'njormh mi'aqv." 
Luke22:46 Ninh gorngv mbuox sai-gorx mbuo, “Meih mbuo fungc hnangv naaiv nor m'njormh? Jiez sin tov Tin-Hungh tengx meih mbuo maiv zuqc buangh seix hnyouv nyei sic maah!”" 
Luke22:47 Yesu gorngv waac zungv maiv gaengh setv, maaih guanh mienh daaih. Ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx nyei yietc dauh, mbuox heuc Yu^ndaatc, yaac dorh jienv ninh mbuo daaih. Yu^ndaatc mingh fatv nyei oix zom Yesu." 
Luke22:48 Mv baac Yesu naaic, “Yu^ndaatc aac, meih zom yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, weic zorqv yie maaic fai?”" 
Luke22:49 Caux Yesu yiem wuov deix sai-gorx buatc oix maaih haaix nyungc sic cuotv, ninh mbuo ziouc naaic gaax, “Ziouv aah! Baeng nzuqc ndaauv hngaqv ninh mbuo duqv nyei saah?”" 
Luke22:50 Maaih dauh zungv hngaqv domh sai mienh nyei nouh ziouc pai zuqc nouh nyei mbiaauc bung m'normh ndutv mi'aqv. 
Luke22:51 Mv baac Yesu gorngv, “Maiv dungx zoux maah!” Ninh ziouc hluo wuov dauh nouh nyei m'normh zorc longx mi'aqv." 
Luke22:52 Yesu gorngv mbuox daaih zorqv ninh wuov deix sai mienh bieiv caux goux hungh dinc nyei baeng-bieiv caux mienh gox, “Meih mbuo buatc yie hnangv zaqc baeng cingx daaih dorh jienv nzuqc ndaauv caux ndiangx-ndonx daaih zorqv yie?" 
Luke22:53 Yie hnoi-hnoi caux meih mbuo yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv, meih mbuo yaac maiv zorqv. Mv baac ih zanc se meih mbuo nyei ziangh hoc aqv. Hmuangx nyei qaqv yaac gunv jienv.”" 
Luke22:54 Ninh mbuo zorqv Yesu dorh mingh domh sai mienh nyei biauv. Bide yaac gan jienv mingh mv baac leih go deix nyei. 
Luke22:55 Yiem laatc gu'nyuoz, mbu'ndongx wuov norm dorngx, ninh mbuo buov jienv douz zueiz jienv. Bide yaac caux ninh mbuo zueiz wuov." 
Luke22:56 Maaih dauh m'sieqv bou buatc Bide zueiz douz-nzauc hlen, douz aengv zuqc Bide. Wuov dauh bou nuqv-nuqv nyei mangc yaac gorngv, “Naaiv dauh yaac caux wuov laanh mienh yiem.”" 
Luke22:57 Mv baac Bide maiv nyiemc. Ninh gorngv, “Meih naaiv dauh m'sieqv dorn aah! Yie maiv hiuv duqv ninh niaa.”" 
Luke22:58 Aav dangh aengx maaih dauh mienh buatc Bide ziouc gorngv, “Meih yaac dongh yietc dauh wuov guanh mienh niaa.” Mv baac Bide dau, “Meih naaic dauh mienh aah! Yie maiv zeiz lorqc.”" 
Luke22:59 Nqa'haav yietc norm ziangh hoc nyei dorngx, aengx maaih dauh mienh daaih dic jienv gorngv, “Naaiv dauh ndongc haaix zungv zoux yietc dauh ninh nyei mienh, weic zuqc ninh se Gaa^li^li Mienh.”" 
Luke22:60 Mv baac Bide dau, “Meih naaic dauh mienh aah! Yie zungv maiv hiuv duqv meih gorngv haaix nyungc.” Bide gorngv naaiv deix waac maiv gaengh setv, jai ziouc nqaaix aqv." 
Luke22:61 Ziouv huin nzuonx mangc jienv Bide, Bide ziouc jangx zuqc zinh ndaangc Ziouv gorngv nyei waac, “Ih muonz jai zungv maiv gaengh nqaaix, meih maiv nyiemc yie buo nzunc.”" 
Luke22:62 Bide ziouc cuotv mingh qaqv nyiemv duqv kouv haic. 
Luke22:63 Goux Yesu wuov deix mienh guatc doqc jatv Yesu yaac mborqv ninh. 
Luke22:64 Ninh mbuo buang jienv ninh nyei m'zing naaic ninh, “Cai gaax! Haaix dauh mborqv meih?”" 
Luke22:65 Ninh mbuo yaac gorngv waac camv nyei huotv Yesu. 
Luke22:66 Lungh njang wuov zanc, Yiutai Mienh nyei mienh gox caux sai mienh bieiv caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng gapv zunv aengx dorh Yesu mingh yiem ninh mbuo nyei Gunv Sic Wuic nza'hmien." 
Luke22:67 Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Se gorngv meih za'gengh Giduc, mbuox yie mbuo maah!” Yesu dau, “Se gorngv yie mbuox meih mbuo nor, meih mbuo yaac maiv sienx." 
Luke22:68 Se gorngv yie naaic joux waac meih mbuo, meih mbuo yaac maiv dau." 
Luke22:69 Mv baac yangh naaiv jiex, yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, ziouc zueiz jienv maaih qaqv nyei Tin-Hungh nyei mbiaauc maengx.”" 
Luke22:70 Ninh mbuo yietc zungv gorngv, “Wuov nyungc, meih zoux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn?” Yesu dau ninh mbuo, “Yie dongh haaix dauh meih mbuo ganh gorngv liuz aqv.”" 
Luke22:71 Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Yie mbuo maiv zuqc aengx longc haaix nyungc zoux zorng-zengx aqv. Yie mbuo zungv haiz ninh ganh nyei nzuih gorngv liuz aqv.”" 
Luke23:1 Gunv Sic Wuic nyei mienh yietc zungv ziouc jiez sin dorh Yesu mingh Bilaatv Zungx wuov. 
Luke23:2 Yiem wuov ninh mbuo gox Yesu. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Yie mbuo buatc naaiv laanh mienh nduov yie mbuo nyei baeqc fingx zoux dorngc. Ninh yaac mbuox ninh mbuo maiv zuqc cuotv nzou-zinh bun Lomaa Domh Ziuh Hungh, yaac gorngv ninh ganh zoux Giduc yaac zoux dauh hungh.”" 
Luke23:3 Bilaatv ziouc naaic gaax Yesu, “Meih gengh zoux Yiutai Mienh nyei hungh fai?” Yesu dau, “Se hnangv meih gorngv nor.”" 
Luke23:4 Bilaatv ziouc gorngv mbuox sai mienh bieiv yaac mbuox zuangx mienh, “Yie zaah maiv cuotv naaiv laanh mienh maaih haaix nyungc zuiz.”" 
Luke23:5 Mv baac ninh mbuo njiec qaqv jaa gorngv, “Naaiv laanh mienh njaaux nyei leiz bun zuangx mienh lunc nzengc. Ninh njaaux gormx Yu^ndie Deic, yiem wuov Gaa^li^li Saengv jiez gorn, ih zanc zungv njaaux taux naaiv daaih aqv.”" 
Luke23:6 Bilaatv haiz ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor gorngv ninh ziouc naaic gaax, “Naaiv dauh se Gaa^li^li Mienh?”" 
Luke23:7 Bilaatv hiuv duqv Yesu zoux Helotv Hungh nyei baeqc fingx, ninh ziouc fungx Yesu mingh taux Helotv wuov. Wuov zanc Helotv yaac yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh." 
Luke23:8 Helotv buatc Yesu ziouc a'hneiv haic aqv, weic zuqc kungx haiz mienh gorngv hnangv. Maiv gaengh duqv buatc yietc nzunc. Ninh yaac oix buatc Yesu zoux deix mbuoqc horngh nyei sic." 
Luke23:9 Helotv ziouc naaic camv-nyungc nyei mv baac Yesu maiv dau yietc joux. 
Luke23:10 Sai mienh bieiv caux njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng souv jienv wuov, qaqv gox Yesu." 
Luke23:11 Helotv caux ninh nyei baeng mangc piex, huotv ninh, zoux doqc bun ninh. Ninh mbuo zorqv deix nzueic haic nyei lui tengx ninh zuqv jienv aengx fungx ninh nzuonx Bilaatv wuov." 
Luke23:12 Zinh ndaangc Bilaatv caux Helotv zoux win-jaa. Mv baac dongh naaic hnoi ninh mbuo zoux longx daav loz-gaeng. 
Luke23:13 Bilaatv heuc sai mienh bieiv caux jien-fouv caux baeqc fingx daaih gapv zunv 
Luke23:14 gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo dorh naaiv laanh mienh taux yie naaiv gox ninh. Meih mbuo gorngv ninh coqv baeqc fingx lunc nzengc. Ih zanc yiem naaiv meih mbuo nyei nza'hmien yie zaah liuz. Dongh meih mbuo gox ninh wuov deix sic, yie maiv buatc ninh dorngc haaix nyungc." 
Luke23:15 Helotv yaac fih hnangv nyei maiv buatc ninh maaih haaix nyungc dorngc nyei dorngx, weic zuqc ninh fungx Yesu daaux nqaang nzuonx mbuo naaiv. Mangc gaax, naaiv laanh mienh maiv dorngc haaix nyungc zuiz zic duqv daix lorqc." 
Luke23:16 Hnangv naaic, yie bun baeng mborqv liuz ziouc bungx ninh aqv.”" 
Luke23:17 Hnyangx-hnyangx taux Siex Maengc Zipv, Bilaatv oix zuqc bungx dauh zuiz-mienh cuotv bun baeqc fingx." 
Luke23:18 Zuangx mienh yietc zungv nauc jienv kih kungx kaatv nyei gorngv, “Daix naaiv dauh aqv. Bungx Mbaa^lapv^mbatc bun yie mbuo.”" 
Luke23:19 Naaiv dauh Mbaa^lapv^mbatc ceux lunc zingh gu'nyuoz yaac daix jiex mienh cingx daaih zuqc wuonx jienv loh. 
Luke23:20 Bilaatv maaih hnyouv oix bungx Yesu, ninh ziouc gorngv hlo nyei mbuox zuangx mienh." 
Luke23:21 Mv baac ninh mbuo aengx nih nungx nauc nyei heuc jienv gorngv, “Dorh ninh mingh ding jienv! Dorh ninh mingh ding jienv ziepc nzaangc jaax!”" 
Luke23:22 Bilaatv aengx gorngv da'faam nzunc, “Wuov nyungc, ninh zoux dorngc haaix nyungc zuiz? Yie gengh maiv buatc ninh dorngc haaix nyungc zic duqv daix ninh lorqc. Yie ziouc bun yie nyei baeng mborqv liuz, bungx nqoi ninh aqv.”" 
Luke23:23 Mv baac zuangx mienh yietc zei kih kungx kaatv nyei gorngv oix zuqc dorh Yesu mingh ding jienv ziepc nzaangc jaax. Zuangx mienh heuc taux hingh. 
Luke23:24 Bilaatv ziouc dingc ei ninh mbuo tov nyei zoux. 
Luke23:25 Ninh bungx ninh mbuo tov wuov dauh, dongh laaix ceux lunc zingh gu'nyuoz daix jiex mienh, zuqc wuonx jienv loh wuov dauh. Ninh aengx zorqv Yesu jiu bun ninh mbuo, sueih ninh mbuo zoux." 
Luke23:26 Ninh mbuo dorh Yesu cuotv jauv wuov zanc, buangh zuqc dauh Sailin Mienh, mbuox heuc Simon, yiem wuov naah daaih oix bieqc zingh. Baeng ziouc caa daaih zorqv ziepc nzaangc jaax lorngx jienv Simon nyei mba'dauh, aapv ninh ndaam gan jienv Yesu mingh." 
Luke23:27 Mienh camv nyei yaac gan jienv Yesu mingh. Maaih deix m'sieqv dorn yaac nyiemv duqv kouv haic weic zuqc ninh mbuo korv-lienh haic Yesu. 
Luke23:28 Yesu huin nzuonx daaih gorngv, “Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei m'sieqv dorn aah! Meih mbuo maiv dungx weic yie nyiemv oc. Oix zuqc weic meih mbuo ganh caux meih mbuo nyei fu'jueiv nyiemv hnangv." 
Luke23:29 Weic zuqc ziangh hoc oix taux, mienh oix gorngv, ‘Maiv haih maaih saeng-yungz nyei wuov deix, caux maiv gaengh yungz jiex gu'nguaaz wuov deix, aengx caux maiv bun gu'nguaaz hopv jiex nyorx wuov deix m'sieqv dorn maaih njien-youh aqv.’" 
Luke23:30 Taux wuov zanc mienh oix gorngv mbuox domh zorng, ‘Mbaang daaih ndapv yie mbuo maah!’ Aengx heuc fiuv-mbong, ‘Biopv jienv yie mbuo aqv.’" 
Luke23:31 Se gorngv ndiangx nyiemz nyei ziangh hoc ninh mbuo zungv hnangv naaiv zoux, ndiangx-kou-nqaai oix hnangv haaix nor?”" 
Luke23:32 Ninh mbuo aengx dorh i dauh zuiz-mienh mingh caux Yesu yietc jauv daix. 
Luke23:33 Ninh mbuo mingh taux norm dorngx mbuox heuc M'nqorngv-Korqv Dorngx, zorqv Yesu ding jienv ziepc nzaangc jaax. Aengx ding wuov deix i dauh zuiz-mienh yiem Yesu nyei ga'hlen. Maaih dauh yiem mbiaauc maengx, maaih dauh yiem zaaix maengx." 
Luke23:34 Yesu gorngv, “Aa Die aah! Tov Die guangc nqoi ninh mbuo nyei zuiz, weic zuqc ninh mbuo zoux nyei ninh mbuo maiv hiuv.” Ninh mbuo yaac zorqv Yesu nyei lui-houx daaih ndouv mangc weic bun nqoi." 
Luke23:35 Zuangx mienh souv jienv wuov mangc. Mv baac zoux hlo wuov deix Yiutai Mienh jatv ninh. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Ninh njoux duqv mienh. Se gorngv ninh dongh Tin-Hungh Ginv Daaih nyei Giduc, bun ninh njoux ninh ganh maah!”" 
Luke23:36 Baeng yaac fih hnangv nyei huotv Yesu, aengx mingh fatv deix zorqv a'ngunc diuv-sui cunv bun ninh" 
Luke23:37 yaac gorngv, “Se gorngv meih za'gengh Yiutai Mienh nyei hungh nor, njoux meih ganh maah!”" 
Luke23:38 Yiem Yesu gu'nguaaic fiev jienv naaiv deix waac, “Naaiv dauh se Yiutai Mienh nyei hungh.”" 
Luke23:39 Caux Yesu ding jienv wuov deix i dauh zuiz-mienh maaih dauh gorngv doqc ki Yesu, “Meih zoux Giduc maiv zeiz? Njoux meih ganh yaac njoux yie mbuo maah!”" 
Luke23:40 Mv baac wuov dauh zuiz-mienh baav ninh gorngv, “Meih maiv gamh nziex Tin-Hungh? Mbuo lomh nzoih zuqc dingc zuiz daic." 
Luke23:41 Weic mbuo se horpc nyei, puix duqv mbuo zoux nyei. Mv baac naaiv dauh maiv zoux dorngc haaix nyungc.”" 
Luke23:42 Ninh aengx gorngv mbuox Yesu, “Yesu aah! Meih daaih zoux hungh nyei ziangh hoc, tov jangx deix yie oc.”" 
Luke23:43 Yesu dau ninh, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih, ih hnoi meih duqv caux yie yiem orn-lorqc huingx.”" 
Luke23:44 Wuov zanc aav lamh ziangx aanx nyei ziangh hoc, wuov norm deic-bung hmuangx nzengc taux njiec aanx buo norm ziangh hoc." 
Luke23:45 Mba'hnoi yaac hmuangx mingh. Yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv wuov kuaaiv mbaeqc gaengh ndie yaac mbaaix zoux i maengx. 
Luke23:46 Yesu heuc qiex hlo nyei gorngv, “Aa Die aah! Yie nyei lingh wuonh yie jiu yiem Die nyei buoz.” Hnangv naaiv gorngv liuz ziouc dangx qiex mi'aqv." 
Luke23:47 Maaih dauh baeng-bieiv buatc naaiv deix sic cuotv ziouc ceng Tin-Hungh yaac gorngv, “Naaiv laanh mienh za'gengh! kuv mienh.”" 
Luke23:48 Gapv zunv mangc naaiv deix sic nyei zuangx mienh buatc sic hnangv naaiv nor cuotv, ninh mbuo ziouc nzauh haic, nzuei jienv la'kuotv nzuonx." 
Luke23:49 Caux Yesu jiu zuoqc wuov deix mienh aengx caux yiem Gaa^li^li gan Yesu daaih wuov deix m'sieqv dorn souv jienv go deix nyei mangc naaiv deix sic. 
Luke23:50 Maaih dauh Yu^ndie Saengv, Aa^li^maa^tie Mungv nyei mienh, mbuox heuc Yosepv. Ninh zoux dauh kuv mienh, gan longx Tin-Hungh nyei leiz yaac zanc-zanc zuov jienv Tin-Hungh daaih zoux Ziouv nyei hnoi taux. Ninh yaac zoux dauh Gunv Sic Wuic nyei mienh. Mv baac wuov deix gunv sic mienh caangh laangh dingc hnangv haaix nor zoux wuov zanc, Yosepv maiv tengx ninh mbuo gorngv." 
Luke23:51  
Luke23:52 Yosepv mingh lorz Bilaatv tov Yesu nyei sei. 
Luke23:53 Tov liuz ziouc mingh zorqv sei njiec daaih, longc la'maah ndie beu jienv fungx mingh zangx norm zuqc daaih nyei la'bieiv-zouv. Naaiv norm zouv maiv gaengh zangx jiex yietc dauh janx-daic." 
Luke23:54 Wuov hnoi se liuc leiz jiex Dingh Gong nyei Hnoi, Dingh Gong Hnoi oix taux aqv." 
Luke23:55 Yiem Gaa^li^li gan Yesu daaih wuov deix m'sieqv dorn gan jienv Yosepv mingh mangc zouv, yaac mangc ninh mbuo hnangv haaix nor an Yesu nyei sei." 
Luke23:56 Mangc liuz ninh mbuo ziouc nzuonx mingh mbenc jienv ndaang nyei ndie, ndaang nyei youh, oix dorh mingh hietv Yesu nyei sei. Taux Dingh Gong Hnoi, ninh mbuo ziouc ei leiz-latc dingh gong." 
Luke24:1 Taux wuov norm leiz-baaix nyei da'yietv hnoi lungh ndorm nziouv nyei, lungh mbiouz-mbiouz njang hnangv, wuov deix m'sieqv dorn dorh jienv ninh mbuo mbenc daaih nyei ndie-ndaang mingh Yesu nyei zouv." 
Luke24:2 Taux wuov buatc mbaeqc zouv-gaengh wuov kuaaiv la'bieiv tui nqoi mi'aqv. 
Luke24:3 Ninh mbuo ziouc bieqc mingh mangc, maiv buatc Ziouv Yesu nyei sei." 
Luke24:4 Ninh mbuo souv jienv wuov hnamv maiv mengh baeqc. Liemh zeih maaih i laanh mienh zuqv jienv lui-houx zaengh zaengh nyei souv jienv ninh mbuo nyei ga'hlen. 
Luke24:5 Wuov deix m'sieqv dorn gamh nziex haic ziouc puoqv njiec ndau. Naaiv deix i laanh mienh naaic ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc daaih naaiv janx-daic yiem nyei dorngx lorz mienh nangh mienh?" 
Luke24:6 Ninh maiv yiem naaiv lorqc. Ninh nangh daaih aqv. Meih mbuo oix zuqc jangx taux ninh yiem Gaa^li^li wuov zanc gorngv mbuox meih mbuo wuov deix waac. 
Luke24:7 Ninh gorngv, ‘Yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, oix zuqc jiu bun mienh waaic mienh dorh mingh ding ziepc nzaangc jaax. Mv baac da'faam hnoi yie aengx nangh daaih’ wuov deix waac.”" 
Luke24:8 Wuov deix m'sieqv dorn ziouc jangx zuqc Yesu nyei waac aqv. 
Luke24:9 Yiem zouv nzuonx mingh, ninh mbuo zorqv naaiv deix yietc zungv sic mbuox wuov deix ziepc yietv dauh gong-zoh caux ga'hlen nyei zuangx mienh." 
Luke24:10 Mbuox gong-zoh mbuo wuov deix m'sieqv dorn, dongh Makv^ndaa^laa Mungv wuov dauh Maa^li^yaa caux Yo^an^naa caux Yaagorpc nyei maa, Maa^li^yaa, aengx caux ninh mbuo daaih wuov deix m'sieqv dorn." 
Luke24:11 Mv baac gong-zoh mbuo maiv sienx. Laaic naaiv deix m'sieqv dorn la'guaih gorngv hnangv. 
Luke24:12 Mv baac Bide jiez sin tiux jienv mingh taux zouv, ndoqv njiec ciepv mangc, kungx buatc ndie-damh hnangv. Ninh ziouc daaux nqaang nzuonx, yaac hnamv maiv mengh baeqc naaiv deix sic." 
Luke24:13 Dongh naaic hnoi maaih i dauh Yesu nyei sai-gorx mingh norm laangz heuc Em^maa^utc, yiem nitv Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh leih maiv go ziepc yietv gilo jauv." 
Luke24:14 Gan jauv mingh wuov zanc, ninh mbuo gorngv jienv koqv hoqc cuotv liuz nyei sic mingh." 
Luke24:15 Doix ninh mbuo gorngv jienv wuov zanc, Yesu ganh daaih fatv caux jienv ninh mbuo mingh." 
Luke24:16 Ninh mbuo buatc nyei mv baac weic haaix diuc mv bei, ninh mbuo zieqv maiv duqv ninh." 
Luke24:17 Yesu naaic gaax ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo gan jienv jauv mingh meih mbuo gorngv haaix nyungc?” Ninh mbuo ziouc dingh jienv, hmien nzauh nzauh wuov." 
Luke24:18 Maaih dauh, mbuox heuc Ken^o^batc, naaic Yesu, “Kungx meih ganh nduqc dauh kaeqv yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh maiv hiuv duqv naaiv deix i ziex hnoi cuotv daaih nyei sic?”" 
Luke24:19 Yesu aengx naaic, “Haaix nyungc sic?” Ninh mbuo dau, “Naa^saa^letv Mungv nyei Yesu nyei sic. Ninh zoux dauh douc waac mienh. Yiem Tin-Hungh caux zuangx mienh nyei nza'hmien ninh gorngv nyei waac caux zoux nyei sic maaih domh qaqv." 
Luke24:20 Yie mbuo nyei sai mienh bieiv caux jien-fouv zorqv ninh jiu bun Janx dingc zuiz daix ninh ziouc dorh ninh mingh ding ziepc nzaangc jaax daic. 
Luke24:21 Yie mbuo yaac hnamv jienv dongh naaiv dauh oix zuoqc I^saa^laa^en Mienh nzuonx. Yaac maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv hnangv. Naaiv deix sic cuotv liuz duqv buo hnoi aqv. 
Luke24:22 Mv baac yiem yie mbuo wuov maaih deix m'sieqv dorn zoux bun yie mbuo hnamv maiv mengh baeqc. Ninh mbuo a'ndorm nziouv nyei mingh wuov zouv mangc. 
Luke24:23 Maiv buatc ninh nyei sei mi'aqv. Ninh mbuo nzuonx daaih gorngv ninh mbuo buatc fin-mienh hinc cuotv daaih mbuox ninh mbuo, Yesu ziangh jienv nyei." 
Luke24:24 Yie mbuo maaih deix mingh mangc yaac buatc hnangv naaiv deix m'sieqv dorn gorngv nor. Mv baac ninh mbuo maiv buatc Yesu.” 
Luke24:25 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo mienh hngongx mienh aah! Douc waac mienh gorngv nyei yietc zungv waac meih mbuo weic haaix diuc sienx ndongc naaic ndanh?" 
Luke24:26 Giduc oix zuqc siouc liuz naaic deix kouv nyei sic cingx daaih bieqc ninh nyei njang-laangc maiv zeiz?” 
Luke24:27 Yesu ziouc gorngv mengh Ging-Sou ziangv jienv ninh ganh gorngv nyei joux-joux waac bun ninh mbuo muangx, yiem Mose nyei Leiz-Latc Sou jiez gorn aengx gorngv nzengc Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx Douc Waac Mienh nyei Sou." 
Luke24:28 Mingh aav lamh taux ninh mbuo oix mingh wuov norm laangz, Yesu zoux hnangv oix baeng zaqc nyei jiex." 
Luke24:29 Mv baac ninh mbuo qaqv liouh ninh gorngv, “Ih zanc aav lamh hmuangx aqv. Mba'hnoi oix muotv aqv. Caux yie mbuo bueix muonz naaiv maah!” Yesu ziouc bieqc biauv caux ninh mbuo hitv wuov." 
Luke24:30 Yesu caux ninh mbuo juangc dieh nyanc hnaangx wuov zanc, ninh aengx zorqv njuov daaih laengz zingh liuz Tin-Hungh ziouc maeqv nqoi bun ninh mbuo." 
Luke24:31 Tin-Hungh bun ninh mbuo i laanh liemh zeih zieqv duqv Yesu, ziang naaic maiv buatc ninh mi'aqv."
