Luke24:32 Laanh mbuox laanh, “Mbuo gan jauv daaih wuov zanc, ninh caux mbuo gorngv waac yaac porv mengh Ging-Sou, mbuo haiz jorm hnyouv haic hnangv maaih douz zieqc jienv nor orqc?”" 
Luke24:33 Ninh mbuo liemh zeih jiez sin nzuonx Ye^lu^saa^lem. Ninh mbuo buatc wuov deix ziepc yietv dauh sai-gorx caux deix ninh mbuo nyei doic gapv zunv wuov," 
Luke24:34 haiz ninh mbuo gorngv, “Ziouv za'gengh nangh daaih aqv. Ninh hinc bun Simon buatc liuz aqv.”" 
Luke24:35 Wuov deix i laanh yaac gorngv ninh mbuo yiem jauv zaangc buangh nyei sic yaac gorngv Yesu maeqv njuov wuov zanc ninh mbuo zieqv duqv ninh aqv. 
Luke24:36 Wuov deix i laanh gorngv jienv naaiv deix jauv wuov zanc, Ziouv Yesu ganh liemh zeih hinc daaih souv jienv ninh mbuo zuangx mienh nyei mbu'ndongx gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo baengh orn aqv oc.”" 
Luke24:37 Ninh mbuo laaic buatc janx-daic njoiz mv bei, ziouc haeqv ninh mbuo gamh nziex haic, hnyouv huaang nzengc." 
Luke24:38 Mv baac Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc nzauh faanh? Zoux haaix nyungc maaih hnyouv mbungh mbienv?" 
Luke24:39 Samx mangc gaax yie nyei buoz-zaux! Hluo mangc, meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv dongh yie aqv. Janx-daic njoiz maiv maaih orv, maiv maaih mbungv hnangv meih mbuo buatc yie maaih nor.”" 
Luke24:40 Ninh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv yaac bun ninh mbuo mangc ninh nyei buoz-zaux. 
Luke24:41 Mangc liuz ninh mbuo a'hneiv haic, mbuoqc horngh haic, mv baac corc maiv gaengh sienx. Yesu naaic ninh mbuo, “Yiem naaiv maaih nyanc nyei ga'naaiv nyei fai?”" 
Luke24:42 Ninh mbuo zorqv deix ziqv daaih nyei mbiauz bun ninh. 
Luke24:43 Ninh zipv daaih ziouc dorng jienv ninh mbuo nyanc. 
Luke24:44 Nyanc liuz, ninh mbuox ninh mbuo, “Naaiv deix sic se yie caux meih mbuo yiem wuov zanc yie mbuox jiex meih mbuo. Yiem Mose nyei Leiz-Latc Sou caux Tin-Hungh nyei Douc Waac Mienh nyei Sou caux Singx Nzung ziangv jienv yie wuov deix waac yietc zungv, oix zuqc cuotv daaih doix-diuc nzengc.”" 
Luke24:45 Yesu ziouc porv nqoi ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv bun ninh mbuo mengh baeqc Ging-Sou. 
Luke24:46 Ninh yaac gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Ging-Sou fiev jienv hnangv naaiv nor gorngv Giduc oix zuqc siouc kouv. Daic mingh taux da'faam hnoi aengx nangh daaih." 
Luke24:47 Oix zuqc dengv ninh nyei mbuox mingh zunh mbuox mienh goiv hnyouv guangc zuiz ziouc duqv Tin-Hungh guangc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz. Oix zuqc yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh jiez gorn zunh cuotv buangv maanc guoqv maanc fingx. 
Luke24:48 Meih mbuo zoux naaiv deix sic nyei zorng-zengx mienh. 
Luke24:49 Dongh yie nyei Die laengz bun nyei, yie ganh oix paaiv daaih caux meih mbuo yiem. Mv baac meih mbuo oix zuqc yiem naaiv zingh zuov taux yiem gu'nguaaic daaih nyei qaqv njiec taux meih mbuo.”" 
Luke24:50 Yesu dorh ninh mbuo cuotv mingh taux Mbe^taa^ni Laangz-hlen ziouc cau jienv buoz buang waac ninh mbuo. 
Luke24:51 Buang gau waac, ninh ziouc leih nqoi ninh mbuo, faaux tin-dorngh mi'aqv." 
Luke24:52 Ninh mbuo ziouc yiem wuov baaix ninh, njien-youh a'hneiv nyei nzuonx Ye^lu^saa^lem," 
Luke24:53 yaac zanc-zanc yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv ceng Tin-Hungh. 
John1:1 Dongh cor maiv gaengh zeix lungh zeix ndau wuov zanc, Doz zungv yiem nyei. Doz caux Tin-Hungh yiem yaac dongh Tin-Hungh." 
John1:2 Zinh ndaangc yiem gorn wuov zanc, Doz caux Tin-Hungh yiem." 
John1:3 Tin-Hungh longc ninh zeix cuotv maanc muotc. Maiv maaih yietc nyungc Tin-Hungh maiv longc Doz zeix. 
John1:4 Doz zoux ziangh maengc nyei gorn-nyuonh. Naaiv nyungc maengc dorh njang daaih ziux baamh mienh. 
John1:5 Njang ziux bieqc hmuangx nyei dorngx, hmuangx yaac maiv haih hingh njang." 
John1:6 Tin-Hungh paaiv dauh mienh daaih, mbuox heuc Yo^han." 
John1:7 Ninh daaih tengx njang zoux zorng-zengx bun maanc mienh haih sienx. 
John1:8 Ninh ganh maiv zeiz zoux naaiv njang. Ninh kungx tengx njang zoux zorng-zengx hnangv. 
John1:9 Naaiv njang se zien haic nyei njang yaac bieqc baamh gen ziux njang lungh ndiev mienh maanh. 
John1:10 Naaiv Doz yiem baamh gen. Tin-Hungh longc ninh zeix baamh gen, mv baac baamh mienh zieqv maiv duqv ninh." 
John1:11 Ninh daaih taux ninh ganh nyei deic-bung, ninh ganh nyei mienh yaac maiv zipv ninh." 
John1:12 Mv baac zipv ninh yaac sienx kaux ninh wuov deix, ninh bun maaih leiz benx Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz." 
John1:13 Ninh mbuo benx Tin-Hungh nyei naamh nyouz se maiv zeiz ei baamh mienh nyei nziaamv-fei fai ei baamh mienh nyei eix yungz. Tin-Hungh ganh zoux ninh mbuo nyei die. 
John1:14 Doz benx dauh baamh mienh yiem mbuo mbu'ndongx. Ninh maaih en-ceix caux zien leiz buangv nzengc. Yie mbuo duqv buatc ninh nyei njang-laangc, se weic zuqc ninh zoux Zaangc Diex nyei ndoqc Dorn duqv daaih nyei njang-laangc." 
John1:15 Yo^han tengx ninh zoux zorng-zengx. Ninh heuc jienv gorngv, “Yie gorngv jiex nyei wuov dauh se dongh naaiv dauh aqv. Yie daaih ndaangc, ninh nqa'haav daaih mv baac ninh zoux gauh hlo yie, weic zuqc yie maiv gaengh cuotv seix ninh zungv yiem nyei.”" 
John1:16 Ninh nyei en hlo haic ziouc zanc-zanc ceix fuqv bun mbuo. 
John1:17 Tin-Hungh longc Mose bun mbuo duqv leiz-latc, mv baac longc Yesu Giduc bun mbuo duqv ninh nyei en caux zien leiz." 
John1:18 Maiv maaih haaix dauh buatc jiex Tin-Hungh. Kungx maaih ninh nyei ndoqc Dorn, dongh yiem Zaangc Diex nyei ga'hlen wuov dauh, bun mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh hnangv." 
John1:19 Yo^han zoux nyei zorng-zengx se hnangv naaiv. Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh paaiv deix sai mienh caux Lewi Mienh mingh naaic ninh, “Meih dongh haaix dauh?”" 
John1:20 Yo^han maiv bingx, ninh gorngv zaqc nyei. “Yie maiv zeiz Giduc.”" 
John1:21 Ninh mbuo aengx naaic, “Wuov nyungc, meih dongh haaix dauh? Meih dongh E^li^yaa fai?” Yo^han dau, “Maiv zeiz.” Ninh mbuo aengx naaic, “Hnangv naaic, meih dongh wuov dauh Douc Waac Mienh fai?” Yo^han dau, “Maiv zeiz lorqc.”" 
John1:22 Ninh mbuo aengx gorngv, “Wuov nyungc, meih dongh haaix dauh? Mbuox yie mbuo maah! Yie mbuo oix zuqc nzuonx mingh mbuox paaiv yie mbuo daaih wuov deix. Meih ganh gorngv meih zoux haaix nyungc mienh?”" 
John1:23 Yo^han longc douc waac mienh, I^saa^yaa, nyei waac dau ninh mbuo. Ninh gorngv, “Yie dongh yiem deic-bung-huaang qiex hlo nyei heuc jienv gorngv, ‘Oix zuqc koi jauv zaqc nyei liuc leiz zipv Ziouv.’+”" 
John1:24 Faa^li^si Mienh paaiv daaih wuov deix mienh 
John1:25 ziouc naaic Yo^han, “Se gorngv meih maiv zeiz Giduc, yaac maiv zeiz E^li^yaa, yaac maiv zeiz wuov dauh Douc Waac Mienh, meih weic haaix diuc tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz?”" 
John1:26 Yo^han dau, “Yie longc wuom tengx mienh jiex leiz. Mv baac aengx maaih dauh yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx, meih mbuo yaac maiv hiuv duqv ninh." 
John1:27 Yie daaih ndaangc, ninh nqa'haav daaih, mv baac yie liemh maiv puix tengx ninh jaiv heh hlaang.”" 
John1:28 Naaiv deix yietc zungv sic yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih nyei dong bung maengx, Mbe^taa^ni Laangz cuotv, dongh Yo^han tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov norm dorngx." 
John1:29 Da'nyeic hnoi Yo^han buatc Yesu hungx jienv ninh daaih ziouc gorngv, “Mangc maah! Tin-Hungh nyei Ba'gi Yungh Dorn, dongh teix baamh mienh nyei zuiz wuov dauh." 
John1:30 Dongh naaiv dauh yie gorngv jiex mbuox meih mbuo, ‘Yie daaih ndaangc, maaih dauh nqa'haav daaih mv baac ninh zoux gauh hlo yie, weic zuqc yie maiv gaengh cuotv seix, ninh zungv yiem nyei.’" 
John1:31 Yie ganh maiv hiuv duqv ninh dongh haaix dauh, mv baac yie daaih tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz weic bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh hiuv duqv ninh.”" 
John1:32 Yo^han aengx zoux zorng-zengx gorngv, “Yie buatc Singx Lingh hnangv norqc nqo yiem wuov lungh njiec daaih yiem ninh nyei sin." 
John1:33 Yie yaac maiv hiuv ninh dongh haaix dauh, mv baac paaiv yie daaih longc wuom tengx mienh jiex leiz wuov dauh mbuox yie, ‘Meih buatc Singx Lingh njiec daaih yiem haaix dauh nyei sin, dongh naaiv dauh oix longc Singx Lingh tengx mienh jiex leiz.’" 
John1:34 Yie buatc liuz aqv, ziouc zoux zorng-zengx mbuox meih mbuo, naaiv dauh se Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn.”" 
John1:35 Da'nyeic hnoi Yo^han caux i dauh ninh nyei sai-gorx aengx souv jienv wuov. 
John1:36 Buatc Yesu jiex jauv, Yo^han ziouc gorngv, “Mangc maah! Tin-Hungh nyei Ba'gi Yungh Dorn.”" 
John1:37 Wuov deix i dauh sai-gorx haiz Yo^han hnangv naaiv nor gorngv, ninh mbuo ziouc gan jienv Yesu mingh." 
John1:38 Yesu huin nzuonx buatc ninh mbuo gan jienv daaih ziouc naaic, “Meih mbuo lorz haaix nyungc?” Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Lapv^mbi aac, meih hitv haaix norm dorngx?” (Lapv^mbi wuov joux waac nyei eix leiz se Sai-Diex.)" 
John1:39 Yesu dau, “Daaih mangc maah!” Wuov zanc njiec aanx leih maiv go biei norm ziangh hoc. Ninh mbuo ziouc gan jienv Yesu mingh taux ninh hitv nyei dorngx yaac caux ninh yiem wuov taux hmuangx." 
John1:40 Haiz Yo^han gorngv ziouc gan jienv Yesu mingh wuov deix i dauh, maaih dauh zoux Simon Bide nyei youz, An^ndaa^lu." 
John1:41 An^ndaa^lu liemh zeih mingh lorz ninh nyei gorx, Simon Bide, mbuox ninh, “Yie mbuo buatc Me^si^yaa aqv loh!” (Me^si^yaa wuov joux waac nyei eix leiz se Giduc.)" 
John1:42 An^ndaa^lu ziouc dorh Simon mingh taux Yesu wuov. Yesu mangc jienv Simon ziouc gorngv, “Meih se Yo^han nyei dorn, Simon. Yangh naaiv jiex meih nyei mbuox oix zuqc heuc Kefaatv.” (Kefaatv faan daaih gorngv Bide.)" 
John1:43 Da'nyeic hnoi Yesu dingc hnyouv mingh Gaa^li^li Saengv. Ninh buatc Filipv ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh, “Daaih gan yie oc.”" 
John1:44 Filipv se Mbetc^sai^ndaa Mungv nyei mienh hnangv An^ndaa^lu caux Simon nor. 
John1:45 Filipv lorz buatc Naa^taa^naa^en ziouc gorngv, “Dongh Mose fiev jienv wuov Leiz-Latc Sou, caux Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx douc waac mienh fiev nyei sou ziangv jienv gorngv wuov laanh mienh, yie mbuo duqv buatc aqv. Se Yosepv nyei dorn, Naa^saa^letv Mungv nyei Yesu.”" 
John1:46 Naa^taa^naa^en naaic gaax, “Haih maaih haaix nyungc longx nyei yiem Naa^saa^letv Mungv cuotv fai?” Filipv gorngv, “Daaih mangc maah!”" 
John1:47 Yesu buatc Naa^taa^naa^en daaih lorz ninh ziouc gorngv, “Naaiv dauh za'gengh zien I^saa^laa^en Mienh. Ninh maiv maaih guv guaix nyei hnyouv.”" 
John1:48 Naa^taa^naa^en naaic Yesu, “Meih hnangv haaix nor hiuv duqv yie?” Yesu dau, “Filipv maiv gaengh heuc meih wuov zanc, meih yiem wuov ngongh nyorx ndiangx-gorn, yie buatc liuz meih aqv.”" 
John1:49 Naa^taa^naa^en gorngv, “Sai-Diex aah! Meih za'gengh Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn. Meih zoux I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei Hungh.”" 
John1:50 Yesu gorngv, “Weic zuqc yie gorngv yie buatc meih yiem ngongh nyorx ndiangx-gorn meih cingx daaih sienx? Meih zungv oix duqv buatc sic gauh hlo jiex naaiv.”" 
John1:51 Yesu aengx gorngv mbuox Naa^taa^naa^en, “Yie mbuox zien meih mbuo, meih mbuo oix buatc lungh gaengh nqoi, yaac buatc Tin-Hungh nyei fin-mienh yiem yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, gu'nguaaic faaux-faaux njiec-njiec.”" 
John2:1 Da'faam hnoi yiem Gaa^li^li Deic-Bung, Kaanaa Laangz, maaih norm cing-jaa-yinh. Yesu nyei maa yaac yiem wuov nyei." 
John2:2 Mienh yaac cingv Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo mingh wuov norm yinh. 
John2:3 Zoux gau, a'ngunc diuv nzengc mi'aqv. Yesu nyei maa gorngv mbuox Yesu, “Ninh mbuo nyei a'ngunc diuv nzengc mi'aqv.”" 
John2:4 Yesu dau, “Aa Maa aah! Weic haaix diuc bun naaiv deix jauv paanx taux yie? Yie nyei ziangh hoc maiv gaengh taux.”" 
John2:5 Yesu nyei maa gorngv mbuox wuov deix bou, “Ninh mbuox meih mbuo zoux haaix nyungc, oix zuqc ei jienv zoux oc.”" 
John2:6 Yiutai Mienh ei jienv leiz nzaaux buoz-zaux nyei uix. Weic naaiv, yiem wuov norm yinh maaih juqv norm la'bieiv-ongx, yietc norm dapv duqv biaa juqv tongv wuom." 
John2:7 Yesu mbuox wuov deix bou, “Ndamv wuom dapv buangv wuov deix ongx maah!” Ninh mbuo ziouc ndamv wuom dapv buangv taux baengh ongx-nzuih." 
John2:8 Yesu aengx mbuox ninh mbuo, “Ih zanc ndamv deix naaiv ongx nyei wuom dorh mingh bun cing-suiv oc.” Ninh mbuo ziouc ndamv dorh mingh." 
John2:9 Cing-suiv seix naaiv deix wuom benx daaih nyei a'ngunc diuv. Ninh maiv hiuv duqv naaiv deix diuv yiem haaix daaih, (Mv baac ndamv wuom wuov deix bou hiuv nyei.) Ninh ziouc heuc siang-laangh daaih" 
John2:10 gorngv mbuox ninh, “Yietc gau mienh cingv kaeqv ninh mbuo bun diuv-kuv hopv ndaangc. Zuov mienh hopv camv cingx bun maiv kuv nyei diuv. Mv baac meih liouh kuv wuov nyungc taux ih zanc.”" 
John2:11 Yesu zoux cuotv naaiv daauh nzunc mbuoqc horngh nyei jangx-hoc, yiem Gaa^li^li Saengv, Kaanaa Laangz zoux. Ninh hnangv naaiv zoux biux mengh ninh nyei njang-laangc. Ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo yaac sienx kaux ninh." 
John2:12 Nqa'haav Yesu caux ninh nyei maa, ninh nyei youz mbuo, caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo mingh Kaa^be^naa^um Mungv yiem i ziex hnoi wuov." 
John2:13 Wuov zanc aav lamh taux Siex Maengc Zipv. Yesu ziouc mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh. 
John2:14 Yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv ninh buatc mienh maaic ngongh, maaic yungh, maaic baeqc gopv, yaac maaih mienh zueiz jienv tiuv nyaanh." 
John2:15 Yesu ziouc longc hlaang gitv diuh hlaang-bin daaih zunc yietc zungv, liemh ngongh, liemh yungh, cuotv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv yaac bungx king tiuv nyaanh nyei dieh, dox guangc nzengc ninh mbuo nyei nyaanh." 
John2:16 Ninh yaac mbuox maaic baeqc gopv wuov deix mienh, “Bienh meih mbuo nyei norqc cuotv mingh maah! Maiv dungx longc yie nyei Die nyei biauv zoux hei.”" 
John2:17 Sai-gorx mbuo ziouc jangx zuqc Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv, “O Tin-Hungh aah! Yie weic meih nyei biauv jorm hnyouv, hnangv douz zieqc jienv yie nor.”" 
John2:18 Zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh naaic ninh, “Meih oix zoux haaix nyungc jangx-hoc bun yie mbuo mangc, bun cing meih maaih leiz hnangv naaiv nor zoux?”" 
John2:19 Yesu dau, “Caeqv naaiv norm zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv maah! Buo hnoi gu'nyuoz yie aengx ceix jiez daaih.”" 
John2:20 Ninh mbuo naaic, “Buo hnoi meih haih zoux duqv ziangx nyei? Naaiv norm zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zoux feix ziepc luoqc hnyangx cingx daaih ziangx.”" 
John2:21 Yesu gorngv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv mv baac za'gengh gorngv beiv ninh ganh nyei sin. 
John2:22 Nqa'haav Yesu daic mingh aengx nangh daaih, ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo jangx zuqc ninh gorngv naaiv joux waac ziouc sienx Ging-Sou yaac sienx Yesu gorngv nyei waac." 
John2:23 Yesu yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh jiex Siex Maengc Zipv. Maaih mienh camv nyei sienx kaux ninh weic zuqc ninh mbuo buatc ninh zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei jangx-hoc. 
John2:24 Mv baac Yesu maiv bungx hnyouv ninh mbuo weic zuqc ninh hiuv duqv maanc mienh. 
John2:25 Yesu maiv qiemx zuqc haaix dauh mbuox ninh baamh mienh hnangv haaix nor, weic zuqc ninh ganh hiuv duqv mienh nyei hnyouv." 
John3:1 Maaih dauh Faa^li^si Mienh, mbuox heuc Ni^ko^nde^matv. Ninh se yietc dauh zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh." 
John3:2 Maaih muonz ninh daaih lorz Yesu gorngv, “Fin-Saeng aah! Yie mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh paaiv meih daaih zoux Fin-Saeng. Se gorngv maiv zeiz Tin-Hungh caux yiem, maiv maaih haaix dauh haih zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei jangx-hoc hnangv meih zoux.”" 
John3:3 Yesu dau, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih. Haaix dauh maiv ganh siang-yungz jiex, maiv haih duqv buatc Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv.”" 
John3:4 Ni^ko^nde^matv naaic gaax, “Mienh gox nzengc, hnangv haaix nor haih siang-yungz jiex? Maiv haih bieqc maa nyei ga'sie ganh yungz nzunc saah?”" 
John3:5 Yesu dau, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih. Haaix dauh maiv yiem wuom caux Singx Lingh ganh siang-yungz jiex, wuov dauh maiv duqv bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv." 
John3:6 Baamh mienh yungz nyei se baamh mienh nyei sin. Singx Lingh yungz nyei se lingh wuonh. 
John3:7 Meih maiv dungx weic yie gorngv, ‘Meih mbuo oix zuqc ganh siang-yungz jiex’ naaiv joux waac hnamv maiv mengh baeqc." 
John3:8 Nziaaux oix buonc haaix, ninh ziouc buonc wuov. Meih haiz nziaaux nyei qiex mv baac maiv hiuv duqv ninh yiem haaix daaih, yaac maiv hiuv duqv oix mingh taux haaix. Singx Lingh bun haaix dauh ganh siang-yungz jiex se hnangv naaiv nor.”" 
John3:9 Ni^ko^nde^matv naaic ninh, “Naaiv deix sic fungc haih hnangv naaiv nor?”" 
John3:10 Yesu dau, “Meih se zoux dauh I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei domh fin-saeng, meih corc maiv mengh baeqc naaiv deix sic?" 
John3:11 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih, yie mbuo hiuv nyei, yie mbuo gorngv. Yie mbuo buatc jiex nyei, yie mbuo yaac zoux zorng-zengx. Mv baac meih mbuo maiv sienx yie mbuo zoux nyei zorng-zengx." 
John3:12 Se gorngv yie gorngv baamh gen nyei jauv meih mbuo zungv maiv sienx, yie dorh tin-dorngh nyei jauv daaih gorngv, meih mbuo fungc haih sienx?" 
John3:13 Maiv gaengh maaih haaix dauh duqv faaux jiex tin-dorngh cuotv liuz yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, dongh yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih wuov dauh." 
John3:14 “Loz-hnoi Mose yiem deic-bung-huaang hnangv haaix nor zorqv dongh naang an wuov dongc liepc faaux hlang, yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, yaac oix hnangv wuov nor zuqc mienh zorqv liepc faaux hlang," 
John3:15 bun haaix dauh sienx kaux yie ziouc duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc. 
John3:16 “Tin-Hungh ndongc naaic hnamv lungh ndiev mienh cingx zorqv ninh nyei ndoqc Dorn ceix bun ninh mbuo. Haaix dauh sienx kaux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn maiv zuqc mietc mv baac duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc. 
John3:17 Tin-Hungh paaiv ninh nyei Dorn njiec taux baamh gen maiv zeiz weic dingc baamh mienh nyei zuiz. Kungx oix bun baamh mienh duqv njoux hnangv. 
John3:18 “Haaix dauh sienx kaux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn, wuov dauh maiv zuqc dingc zuiz. Haaix dauh maiv sienx kaux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn nor, Tin-Hungh zungv dingc jienv wuov dauh nyei zuiz, laaix ninh maiv sienx kaux Tin-Hungh nyei ndoqc Dorn." 
John3:19 “Siemv zuiz nyei gorn se hnangv naaiv. Njang daaih bieqc baamh gen. Mienh maiv oix longc njang, kungx oix longc hmuangx hnangv, weic zuqc ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic se waaic haic." 
John3:20 Haaix dauh zoux waaic sic, wuov dauh nzorng njang yaac maiv oix mingh lorz njang. Nzauh heix ninh zoux nyei waaic sic oix biux mengh cuotv daaih." 
John3:21 Mv baac haaix dauh ei jienv zien leiz zoux, wuov dauh daaih lorz njang. Njang ziouc bun cing ninh zoux nyei sic se kaux Tin-Hungh zoux.”" 
John3:22 Naaiv deix sic cuotv liuz, nqa'haav Yesu caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo mingh Yu^ndie Saengv yiem caamx wuov yaac tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz." 
John3:23 Wuov zanc Yo^han yaac tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz. Ninh yiem Aainon Mungv, leih Saax^lim Mungv maiv nangc go, weic zuqc wuov norm dorngx maaih wuom camv. Mienh yaac mingh wuov jiex wuom nyei leiz." 
John3:24 (Wuov zanc Yo^han maiv gaengh zuqc wuonx loh.) 
John3:25 Maaih deix Yo^han nyei sai-gorx caux dauh Yiutai Mienh nzaeng saax uix nyei leiz. 
John3:26 Wuov deix sai-gorx ziouc mingh mbuox Yo^han, “Sai-Diex aah! Meih jangx duqv nyei fai? Zinh ndaangc caux meih yiem Jor^ndaen Ndaaih nyei dong bung maengx, dongh meih zoux zorng-zengx gorngv mbuox jiex yie mbuo wuov laanh mienh. Ih zanc ninh tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz. Zuangx mienh kungx mingh lorz ninh hnangv aqv.”" 
John3:27 Yo^han dau, “Maiv zeiz Tin-Hungh bun nor, maiv maaih haaix dauh haih duqv haaix nyungc." 
John3:28 Meih mbuo ganh haih tengx yie zoux zorng-zengx, hiuv duqv yie gorngv jiex, ‘Yie maiv zeiz zoux Giduc wuov dauh. Mv baac Giduc maiv gaengh daaih, Tin-Hungh paaiv yie daaih ndaangc.’" 
John3:29 Longc siang-mbuangz wuov dauh m'daaih siang-laangh. Kaeqv-lorngh zuov jienv muangx siang-laangh nyei qiex. Yietv haiz siang-laangh gorngv waac ninh ziouc njien-youh haic. Weic naaiv yie ih zanc duqv naaiv nyungc orn-lorqc taux daauh aqv. 
John3:30 “Ninh oix zuqc zoux hlo jienv faaux, yie oix zuqc zoux faix jienv njiec." 
John3:31 “Yiem tin-dorngh daaih wuov dauh zoux gauh hlo jiex yietc zungv. Yiem baamh gen daaih wuov dauh guei baamh gen, yaac gorngv baamh gen nyei jauv hnangv. Mv baac yiem tin-dorngh daaih wuov dauh zoux gauh hlo jiex yietc zungv." 
John3:32 Ninh zoux zorng-zengx gorngv ninh buatc jiex, haiz jiex nyei sic mv baac maiv maaih haaix dauh zipv ninh nyei waac." 
John3:33 Haaix dauh zipv ninh nyei waac se hnangv nqaapv jienv yienx nor, bun cing Tin-Hungh se zien nyei." 
John3:34 Tin-Hungh paaiv daaih wuov dauh gorngv Tin-Hungh nyei waac, weic zuqc Tin-Hungh ceix Singx Lingh bun ninh, yaac maiv maaih soux mouc." 
John3:35 Zaangc Diex hnamv ninh nyei Dorn, zorqv maanc muotc jiu bun yiem ninh nyei buoz-ndiev." 
John3:36 Haaix dauh sienx kaux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn, wuov dauh maaih yietc liuz nyei maengc. Mv baac haaix dauh maiv muangx Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn nyei waac nor, maiv haih duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc yaac zuqc Tin-Hungh dingc jienv ninh nyei zuiz.”" 
John4:1 Faa^li^si Mienh haiz gorngv Yesu duqv sai-gorx gauh camv yaac tengx sai-gorx jiex wuom nyei leiz gauh camv Yo^han. 
John4:2 Mv baac zien sic se maiv zeiz Yesu tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz. Kungx ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo tengx hnangv. 
John4:3 Yesu hiuv duqv mienh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv, ninh ziouc cuotv Yu^ndie Saengv aengx nzuonx Gaa^li^li." 
John4:4 Ninh haiz hnangv haaix oix zuqc yangh Saa^maa^lie Saengv nzuonx. 
John4:5 Gan Saa^maa^lie Saengv mingh gau, taux norm mungv heuc Sikaa, leih Yaakopv bun ninh nyei dorn, Yosepv, wuov nzong ndau maiv go." 
John4:6 Yaakopv nyei wuom-kuotv yaac yiem wuov norm dorngx. Yesu yangh gau jauv, kouv haic, ziouc zueiz njiec wuom-kuotv hlen. Wuov zanc lungh aav lamh deix aanx aqv." 
John4:7 Maaih dauh Saa^maa^lie Janx-muangz mingh wuov wuom-kuotv zaangh wuom. Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh, “Dorc aac, tov meih bun deix wuom yie hopv oc.”" 
John4:8 (Doix jienv wuov norm ziangh hoc sai-gorx mbuo bieqc mungv maaiz ga'naaiv nyanc.) 
John4:9 Wuov dauh Saa^maa^lie muangz gorngv, “Meih Yiutai Mienh fungc tov yie Saa^maa^lie m'sieqv dorn bun wuom meih hopv?” (Weic zuqc Yiutai Mienh maiv caux Saa^maa^lie Janx jiu tong.)" 
John4:10 Yesu dau, “Se gorngv meih hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh bun nyei zingh nyeic, yaac hiuv duqv tengx meih tov wuom hopv se dongh haaix dauh, meih ziouc tov ninh, ninh yaac oix bun yungz maengc nyei wuom meih hopv.”" 
John4:11 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn gorngv, “Domh Gorx aah! Meih liemh maiv maaih haaix nyungc cie wuom. Wuom-kuotv yaac ndo nyei. Yungz maengc nyei wuom meih mingh haaix lorz daaih?" 
John4:12 Yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix-ngaeqv, Yaakopv, zorqv naaiv norm wuom-kuotv liouh yie mbuo longc. Ninh ganh caux ninh nyei dorn-jueiv, saeng-kuv yietc zungv yaac hopv naaiv norm wuom-kuotv nyei wuom. Meih zoux gauh hlo jiex Yaakopv fai?”" 
John4:13 Yesu dau, “Haaix dauh hopv naaiv norm wuom-kuotv nyei wuom, nqa'haav jaang aengx haih nqaatv nyei." 
John4:14 Mv baac haaix dauh hopv yie bun nyei wuom, jaang yietc liuz maiv haih nqaatv. Yie oix bun wuov nyungc wuom yiem ninh nyei hnyouv hnangv yietc zingv wuom baetv cuotv daaih nor, bun ninh duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc.”" 
John4:15 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn aengx gorngv, “Domh Gorx aah! Tov bun deix naaic nyungc wuom yie hopv maah! Yie ziouc yietc liuz jaang maiv nqaatv yaac maiv zuqc daaih naaiv zaangh wuom.”" 
John4:16 Yesu mbuox ninh, “Nzuonx mingh heuc meih nyei nqox caux jienv daaih naaiv maah!”" 
John4:17 Wuov dauh Janx-muangz dau, “Yie maiv maaih nqox.” Yesu gorngv, “Meih gorngv maiv maaih nqox gengh zeiz nyei." 
John4:18 Meih longc jiex biaa torngx nqox mi'aqv. Ih zanc longc jienv naaiv dauh yaac maiv zeiz meih nyei nqox. Meih nyei waac gengh zien nyei.” 
John4:19 Janx-muangz gorngv, “Domh Gorx aah! Yie buatc meih zoux dauh douc waac mienh." 
John4:20 Yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix yiem naaiv norm mbong zaangc Tin-Hungh, mv baac meih mbuo Yiutai Mienh gorngv horpc zuqc yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh zaangc Tin-Hungh.”" 
John4:21 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh, “Dorc aah! Sienx yie nyei waac maah! Ziangh hoc oix taux, meih mbuo maiv yiem naaiv norm mbong yaac maiv yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem baaix Zaangc Diex." 
John4:22 Meih mbuo Saa^maa^lie Mienh maiv hiuv duqv meih mbuo zaangc haaix dauh. Mv baac yie mbuo Yiutai Mienh zaangc haaix dauh yie mbuo hiuv nyei, weic zuqc njoux en yiem Yiutai Mienh daaih." 
John4:23 Wuov norm ziangh hoc oix taux, zungv taux daaih aqv. Zien-zien buoqc zaangc Zaangc Diex wuov deix, oix longc Singx Lingh yaac longc zien leiz zaangc, weic zuqc Zaangc Diex lorz naaiv nyungc mienh zaangc ninh." 
John4:24 Tin-Hungh se Singx Lingh. Zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei mienh oix zuqc longc Singx Lingh caux zien leiz zaangc.” 
John4:25 Wuov dauh Janx-muangz gorngv mbuox ninh, “Yie hiuv duqv Me^si^yaa, dongh mbuox heuc Giduc wuov dauh, oix daaih. Taux daaih wuov zanc ninh zungv oix mbuox nzengc nyungc-nyungc yie mbuo.”" 
John4:26 Yesu gorngv, “Dongh ih zanc caux meih gorngv jienv waac naaiv dauh se dongh wuov dauh aqv.”" 
John4:27 Wuov zanc sai-gorx mbuo nzuonx daaih buatc Yesu caux wuov dauh Janx-muangz gorngv waac ziouc hnamv maiv mengh baeqc. Mv baac maiv maaih haaix dauh naaic wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn, “Meih daaih lorz haaix nyungc?” fai naaic Yesu, “Zoux haaix nyungc caux ninh gorngv waac?”" 
John4:28 Wuov dauh Janx-muangz ziouc guangc jienv ninh nyei nie-ha'louh wuov, nzuonx mungv mingh mbuox yiem mungv nyei mienh," 
John4:29 “Meih mbuo daaih mangc gaax, maaih dauh mienh ninh gorngv nzengc yie zoux jiex nyei nyungc-nyungc sic. Naaiv dauh maiv zeiz Giduc fai?”" 
John4:30 Zuangx mienh ziouc cuotv mungv mingh mangc Yesu. 
John4:31 Janx-muangz nzuonx mingh wuov zanc, sai-gorx mbuo heuc Yesu, “Sai-Diex aah! Nyanc hnaangx aqv.”" 
John4:32 Mv baac Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Nyanc hopv yie maaih nyei. Dongh yie maaih nyei wuov nyungc nyanc hopv meih mbuo maiv hiuv.”" 
John4:33 Sai-gorx mbuo laanh naaic laanh, “Maaih mienh dorh hnaangx daaih bun ninh nyanc fai ni?”" 
John4:34 Yesu dau, “Yie nyei nyanc hopv se yie ei jienv paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh nyei za'eix zoux, yaac zoux ziangx ninh nyei gong." 
John4:35 Meih mbuo maaih joux waac gorngv, ‘Aengx maaih biei hlaax nyieqc siou gaeng-zuangx nyei ziangh hoc taux aqv.’ Yie mbuox meih mbuo longx-longx nyei mangc wuov ndeic. Cun-gaeng zuoqc, siou duqv aqv." 
John4:36 Ih zanc siou gaeng-zuangx nyei mienh duqv ninh mbuo nyei gong-zinh yaac siou gaeng-zuangx weic bun duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc. Zuangx nyei mienh caux siou nyei mienh ziouc lomh nzoih a'hneiv. 
John4:37 Weic zuqc mienh gorngv, ‘Maaih dauh zuangx, maaih dauh siou,’ wuov joux waac za'gengh zien." 
John4:38 Yie paaiv meih mbuo mingh siou dongh meih mbuo maiv ndortv qaqv zuangx nyei. Ganh dauh ndortv qaqv zuangx mv baac meih mbuo baeqc baeqc duqv ninh nyei qaqv.” 
John4:39 Wuov norm mungv nyei Saa^maa^lie Mienh camv nyei sienx Yesu weic zuqc wuov dauh Saa^maa^lie Janx-muangz zoux zorng-zengx gorngv, “Ninh gorngv cuotv nzengc yie zoux jiex nyei nyungc-nyungc sic.”" 
John4:40 Hnangv naaic, Saa^maa^lie Mienh daaih lorz Yesu wuov zanc, ninh mbuo tov Yesu caux ninh mbuo yiem wuov. Yesu ziouc caux ninh mbuo yiem i hnoi." 
John4:41 Weic Yesu gorngv nyei waac aengx maaih mienh camv nyei sienx ninh. 
John4:42 Naaiv deix mienh gorngv mbuox wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn, “Ih zanc yie mbuo maiv zeiz weic meih gorngv nyei waac sienx. Yie mbuo ganh haiz ninh gorngv yaac hiuv duqv naaiv laanh mienh za'gengh zoux baamh mienh nyei Njoux Ziouv.”" 
John4:43 Jiex liuz wuov deix i hnoi, Yesu cuotv jauv mingh Gaa^li^li Saengv." 
John4:44 Yesu ganh gorngv jiex, “Douc waac mienh yiem ganh nyei deic-bung, ganh nyei mienh maiv taaih ninh.”" 
John4:45 Taux Gaa^li^li Saengv, Gaa^li^li Mienh zipv ninh, weic zuqc ninh mbuo yaac mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem jiex Siex Maengc Zipv ziouc duqv buatc Yesu zoux nyei yietc zungv sic." 
John4:46 Yesu aengx nzuonx Gaa^li^li Saengv, Kaanaa Laangz, dongh zinh ndaangc ninh longc wuom zoux benx a'ngunc diuv wuov norm laangz. Maaih dauh hungh nyei domh jien, ninh nyei dorn yiem Kaa^be^naa^um Mungv butv baengc mi'aqv." 
John4:47 Domh jien haiz gorngv Yesu yiem Yu^ndie Saengv daaih taux Gaa^li^li, ninh ziouc mingh lorz, tov Yesu mingh Kaa^be^naa^um zorc ninh nyei dorn. Ninh nyei dorn butv baengc oix daic haic aqv." 
John4:48 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh, “Se gorngv meih mbuo maiv duqv buatc yie zoux jangx-hoc caux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic, meih mbuo zungv maiv sienx yie.”" 
John4:49 Domh jien gorngv, “Domh Gorx aah! Tov meih gan yie mingh maah! Nzauh heix yie nyei dorn haih daic.”" 
John4:50 Yesu gorngv, “Meih gunv nzuonx aqv. Meih nyei dorn longx aqv.” Wuov dauh jien sienx Yesu nyei waac ziouc nzuonx mi'aqv." 
John4:51 Nzuonx gau, buatc ninh nyei bou mbuo daaih mbuox ninh, “Ih zanc meih nyei dorn longx mi'aqv.”" 
John4:52 Ninh naaic ninh nyei bou, “Yie nyei dorn ziangh haaix longx?” Ninh mbuo dau, “A'hnoi nqa'haav aanx yietc norm ziangh hoc sin laangh mi'aqv.”" 
John4:53 Wuov dauh dorn nyei die ziouc jangx zuqc za'gengh doix Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh, “Meih nyei dorn longx aqv,” wuov norm ziangh hoc. Ninh caux ninh nyei yietc biauv mienh ziouc sienx Yesu nzengc." 
John4:54 Naaiv se Yesu yiem Yu^ndie Saengv mingh Gaa^li^li Saengv zoux da'nyeic nzunc mbuoqc horngh haic nyei jangx-hoc. 
John5:1 Nqa'haav Yesu mingh Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh jiex Yiutai Mienh nyei yietc norm zipv. 
John5:2 Yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem maaih dauh gaengh heuc Ba'gi Yungh Gaengh. Gaengh ga'hlen maaih norm wuom-domh, Hipv^lu waac heuc Mbetc^saa^taa. Wuom-domh hlen yaac maaih biaa norm bingx laangh nyei liuh." 
John5:3 Butv-baengc mienh camv nyei bueix wuov. M'zing maengh, m'zing mbuov yaac maaih, zaux waaic nyei yaac maaih, butv baengc-mbai maiv haih dongz nyei yaac maaih. Ninh mbuo zuov wuom dongz," 
John5:4 weic zuqc maaih deix ziangh hoc maaih dauh Ziouv nyei fin-mienh njiec daaih muoqv wuom dongz. Wuom dongz liuz, haaix dauh njiec mingh ziemx ndaangc, maiv gunv butv haaix nyungc baengc, baengc ziouc longx nzengc aqv." 
John5:5 Yiem wuov maaih dauh mienh butv faah ziepc betv hnyangx baengc. 
John5:6 Yesu buatc ninh bueix wuov yaac hiuv duqv ninh butv baengc lauh haic, ziouc naaic gaax ninh, “Meih oix baengc longx nyei fai?”" 
John5:7 Wuov dauh baengc mienh dau, “Domh Gorx aac, wuom dongz nyei ziangh hoc maiv maaih haaix dauh dorh yie njiec wuom. Yie ganh mingh maiv gaengh taux, mienh bieqc ndaangc mi'aqv.”" 
John5:8 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh, “Jiez sin daaih, dorh jienv meih nyei jiuc yangh jauv mingh aqv.”" 
John5:9 Wuov dauh mienh liemh zeih longx daaih ziouc dorh jienv ninh nyei jiuc yangh jauv mingh mi'aqv. Wuov hnoi se doix zuqc Dingh Gong Hnoi. 
John5:10 Yiutai Mienh ziouc gorngv mbuox baengc longx wuov dauh, “Dingh Gong Hnoi meih dorh jienv jiuc mingh haaix ndau se dorngc mbuo nyei leiz.”" 
John5:11 Ninh dau, “Zorc yie longx wuov dauh mienh heuc yie dorh jienv jiuc yangh jauv mingh aqv.”" 
John5:12 Wuov deix mienh aengx naaic ninh, “Heuc meih dorh jienv jiuc mingh wuov dauh se haaix dauh?”" 
John5:13 Mv baac baengc longx wuov dauh mienh maiv hiuv duqv zorc ninh longx wuov dauh dongh haaix dauh, weic zuqc mienh camv haic, Yesu yaac leih nqoi mingh mi'aqv." 
John5:14 Nqa'haav Yesu aengx buatc ninh zorc longx wuov dauh mienh yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh, “Mangc gaax, meih nyei baengc zorc longx nzengc. Yangh naaiv jiex maiv dungx baamz zuiz aqv oc. Nziex meih aengx haih buangh gauh kouv jiex nyei naanc zingh.”" 
John5:15 Wuov dauh mienh nzuonx mingh gorngv mbuox zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh, “Zorc yie longx wuov dauh se dongh Yesu.”" 
John5:16 Weic zuqc Yesu longc Dingh Gong Hnoi zoux naaiv deix sic, Yiutai Mienh cingx daaih zoux doqc ninh." 
John5:17 Mv baac Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie nyei Die zanc-zanc zoux gong taux ih zanc. Yie yaac zoux gong aqv.”" 
John5:18 Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv, zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh gauh fatv oix daix ninh, weic zuqc ninh maiv daan dorngc Dingh Gong Hnoi nyei leiz hnangv. Ninh yaac gorngv Tin-Hungh zoux ninh nyei Die, ziouc taaih ninh ganh caux Tin-Hungh fih ndongc hlo." 
John5:19 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, Zaangc Diex nyei Dorn maiv haih sueih ganh nyei hnyouv zoux haaix nyungc. Dorn buatc Die zoux haaix nyungc, ninh ziouc kungx zoux wuov nyungc hnangv. Die zoux haaix nyungc, ninh nyei Dorn ziouc zoux wuov nyungc." 
John5:20 Zaangc Diex hnamv ninh nyei Dorn, ziouc zorqv ganh zoux nyei yietc zungv sic bun ninh nyei Dorn mangc. Ninh zungv oix zoux gauh hlo naaiv deix sic bun ninh nyei Dorn mangc, meih mbuo ziouc mbuoqc horngh haic." 
John5:21 Zaangc Diex hnangv haaix nor bun daic mingh nyei mienh nangh daaih ziangh jienv, ninh nyei Dorn yaac hnangv wuov nor bun dongh ninh oix bun wuov deix duqv ziangh jienv." 
John5:22 Zaangc Diex ganh maiv siemv haaix dauh nyei zuiz. Ninh zorqv lingc jiu bun ninh nyei Dorn siemv yietc zungv zuiz," 
John5:23 weic bun mienh taaih ninh nyei Dorn hnangv ninh mbuo taaih Zaangc Diex nor. Haaix dauh maiv taaih ninh nyei Dorn, wuov dauh maiv taaih Zaangc Diex, dongh paaiv ninh nyei Dorn daaih wuov dauh." 
John5:24 “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, haaix dauh muangx yie nyei waac yaac sienx kaux paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh, ziouc duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc, yaac maiv zuqc dingc zuiz. Ninh biaux ndutv daic nyei jauv duqv ziangh maengc." 
John5:25 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, ziangh hoc oix taux, zungv taux aqv, daic mingh nyei mienh haiz Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn nyei qiex, ziouc nangh daaih ziangh jienv." 
John5:26 Zaangc Diex hnangv haaix nor zoux ziangh maengc nyei gorn-nyuonh, ninh yaac jiu bun ninh nyei Dorn hnangv wuov nor zoux ziangh maengc nyei gorn-nyuonh." 
John5:27 Zaangc Diex yaac bun ninh nyei Dorn maaih lingc siemv zuiz weic zuqc ninh nyei Dorn zoux Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn. 
John5:28 “Meih mbuo maiv dungx weic naaiv deix sic hnamv maiv mengh baeqc. Ziangh hoc oix taux, yiem zouv nyei yietc zungv duqv haiz ninh nyei qiex" 
John5:29 ziouc yiem zouv cuotv daaih. Zoux longx wuov deix duqv nangh daaih ziangh jienv. Zoux waaic wuov deix nangh daaih zuqc dingc zuiz. 
John5:30 “Yie maiv haih ei yie ganh nyei hnyouv zoux haaix nyungc. Tin-Hungh hnangv haaix nor mbuox yie, yie ziouc hnangv wuov nor siemv. Yie yaac baengh fim nyei siemv, weic zuqc yie maiv zeiz oix ei yie ganh nyei eix zoux. Kungx oix ei paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh nyei eix hnangv." 
John5:31 Se gorngv yie weic yie ganh zoux zorng-zengx, mienh ziouc funx maiv zien." 
John5:32 Mv baac aengx maaih dauh tengx yie zoux zorng-zengx. Yie hiuv duqv ninh nyei zorng-zengx waac za'gengh zien nyei. 
John5:33 “Meih mbuo paaiv mienh mingh Yo^han wuov, ninh yaac weic zien leiz zoux zorng-zengx." 
John5:34 Yie maiv zeiz qiemx zuqc mienh tengx yie zoux zorng-zengx. Yie kungx hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic bun meih mbuo duqv njoux hnangv. 
John5:35 Yo^han beiv norm dang, diemv zieqc njang nyei. Meih mbuo yaac njien-youh a'hneiv yiem caamx ninh nyei njang." 
John5:36 “Yie yaac maaih nyungc zoux zorng-zengx gauh hlo jiex Yo^han zoux nyei. Se dongh Zaangc Diex paaiv yie zoux ziangx nyei nyungc-nyungc gong. Se ih zanc yie zoux jienv naaiv deix gong bun cing Zaangc Diex ganh paaiv yie daaih. 
John5:37 Zaangc Diex paaiv yie daaih, ninh ganh yaac tengx yie zoux zorng-zengx. Mv baac meih mbuo maiv haiz jiex ninh nyei qiex yaac maiv buatc jiex ninh nyei fangx zeiv." 
John5:38 Meih mbuo nyei hnyouv maiv zaangh ninh nyei waac, weic zuqc meih mbuo maiv sienx ninh paaiv daaih wuov dauh." 
John5:39 Meih mbuo qaqv zaah Ging-Sou, laaic Ging-Sou haih tengx meih mbuo duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc. Naaiv Ging-Sou tengx yie zoux zorng-zengx" 
John5:40 mv baac meih mbuo maiv kangv daaih lorz yie duqv ziangh maengc. 
John5:41 “Yie maiv zeiz lorz mienh ceng yie. 
John5:42 Yie hiuv duqv meih mbuo, yaac hiuv duqv yiem meih mbuo nyei hnyouv meih mbuo maiv hnamv Tin-Hungh." 
John5:43 Yie ndaam yie nyei Die nyei mengh daaih mv baac meih mbuo maiv zipv yie. Se gorngv maaih dauh ndaam jienv ninh ganh nyei mengh daaih, meih mbuo oix zipv ninh nyei." 
John5:44 Meih mbuo a'hneiv duqv mienh ceng, mv baac meih mbuo maiv lorz nduqc dauh wuov dauh Tin-Hungh ceng meih mbuo. Wuov nyungc meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor haih sienx yie?" 
John5:45 “Meih mbuo maiv dungx hnamv yie oix yiem Zaangc Diex nyei nza'hmien gox meih mbuo. Oix gox meih mbuo wuov dauh se Mose, dongh meih mbuo maaih lamh hnamv wuov dauh." 
John5:46 Se gorngv meih mbuo za'gengh sienx Mose, meih mbuo ziouc sienx yie, weic zuqc ninh fiev nyei gorngv taux yie." 
John5:47 Mv baac meih mbuo maiv sienx Mose fiev nyei nor, meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor haih sienx yie nyei waac?”" 
John6:1 Nqa'haav Yesu jiex wuov ngaanc ziqc Gaa^li^li Koiv-Dorn (aengx maaih ganh norm mbuox heuc Ti^mbe^lietv). 
John6:2 Mienh camv nyei gan jienv ninh mingh weic zuqc ninh mbuo buatc ninh zoux jiex mbuoqc horngh nyei sic zorc longx butv-baengc mienh. 
John6:3 Yesu ziouc faaux mbong-aiv mingh caux ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo zueiz jienv wuov. 
John6:4 Wuov zanc aav lamh deix taux Yiutai Mienh jiex Siex Maengc Zipv aqv. 
John6:5 Yesu cau hmien mangc, buatc mienh camv nyei daaih ninh wuov ziouc naaic gaax Filipv, “Mbuo oix zuqc mingh haaix maaiz ga'naaiv gaux bun naaiv deix zuangx mienh nyanc?”" 
John6:6 Yesu kungx hnangv naaiv nor naaic weic seix Filipv. Ninh ganh oix hnangv haaix nor zoux ninh zungv hiuv mi'aqv. 
John6:7 Filipv dau, “Longc nyic baeqv hnoi nyei gong-zinh maaiz nyanc nyei ga'naaiv zungv maiv gaux yietc dauh duqv diqv dien.”" 
John6:8 Maaih dauh Yesu nyei sai-gorx, dongh Simon Bide nyei youz, An^ndaa^lu, gorngv," 
John6:9 “Yiem naaiv maaih dauh dorn maaih biaa norm longc mbiauh mbaali zoux daaih nyei njuov caux i dauh mbiauz. Mv baac mienh ndongc naaic camv hnangv haaix nor haih bun duqv nqoi?” 
John6:10 Yesu gorngv, “Mbuox zuangx mienh zueiz njiec maah!” Wuov deix dorngx miev camv nyei. Zuangx mienh ziouc zueiz njiec. Daan m'jangc dorn maaih leih maiv go biaa cin dauh." 
John6:11 Yesu ziouc zorqv wuov deix njuov daaih daux gaux, laengz zingh liuz Tin-Hungh, ziouc bun nqoi zueiz jienv wuov deix zuangx mienh nyanc. Mbiauz yaac fih hnangv nyei bun nqoi, ziux gorqv-mienh oix camv fai zoqc." 
John6:12 Zuangx mienh ziouc nyanc beuv nzengc. Yesu mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx mbuo, “Mingh siou nyanc zengc wuov deix daaih, maiv dungx guangc yietc aax.”" 
John6:13 Dongh wuov deix biaa norm njuov zuangx mienh nyanc beuv nzengc, mv baac sai-gorx mbuo aengx siou zengc wuov deix dapv buangv ziepc nyeic norm ndaan." 
John6:14 Zuangx mienh buatc Yesu zoux naaiv nyungc mbuoqc horngh nyei sic, ninh mbuo gorngv, “Naaiv se oix daaih taux baamh gen wuov dauh Douc Waac Mienh aqv.”" 
John6:15 Yesu hiuv duqv mienh oix daaih zorqv ninh, aapv ninh zoux hungh, ninh ganh ziouc simv nqoi aengx faaux wuov jiex mbong mi'aqv." 
John6:16 Lungh maanz-hmuangx deix, Yesu nyei sai-gorx mbuo njiec taux koiv-hlen," 
John6:17 bieqc nzangv hungx jienv mingh wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv, Kaa^be^naa^um Mungv. Wuov zanc, zungv hmuangx aqv. Yesu yaac maiv gaengh taux ninh mbuo wuov." 
John6:18 Wuov zanc borngz gorng domh nziaaux buonc koiv jiez laangc. 
John6:19 Sai-gorx mbuo nzaeng nzangv mingh biaa juqv gilo nyei dorngx, buatc Yesu yangh wuom-minc daaih nitv fatv ninh mbuo nyei nzangv, haeqv ninh mbuo gamh nziex haic." 
John6:20 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Maiv dungx gamh nziex. Se dongh yie aqv.”" 
John6:21 Sai-gorx mbuo ziouc a'hneiv zipv ninh bieqc nzangv. Nzangv liemh zeih taux ninh mbuo oix mingh wuov norm dorngx mi'aqv. 
John6:22 Da'nyeic hnoi corc yiem wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv wuov deix zuangx mienh hiuv duqv yiem wuov kungx maaih nduqc poux nzangv hnangv. Yesu yaac maiv zeiz caux ninh nyei sai-gorx bieqc wuov poux nzangv, kungx sai-gorx mbuo ganh mingh hnangv." 
John6:23 Maaih deix nzangv yiem Ti^mbe^lietv Mungv daaih dingh jienv wuov koiv-hlen, nitv Ziouv zorqv njuov laengz zingh liuz Tin-Hungh ziouc bun zuangx mienh nyanc wuov norm dorngx." 
John6:24 Zuangx mienh buatc Yesu caux sai-gorx mbuo maiv yiem naaic, ninh mbuo ziouc bieqc wuov deix nzangv mingh Kaa^be^naa^um Mungv lorz Yesu." 
John6:25 Zuangx mienh lorz buatc Yesu yiem wuov ngaanc ziqc koiv ninh mbuo naaic, “Fin-Saeng aah! Ziangh haaix daaih taux naaiv?”" 
John6:26 Yesu dau, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, meih mbuo lorz yie maiv zeiz laaix buatc yie zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei jangx-hoc, se weic zuqc meih mbuo duqv njuov nyanc beuv." 
John6:27 Meih mbuo maiv dungx cuotv qaqv lorz haih waaic nyei nyanc hopv. Oix zuqc lorz bun mienh duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc wuov nyungc nyanc hopv. Yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, oix bun naaiv nyungc nyanc hopv meih mbuo, weic zuqc yie nyei Die, Tin-Hungh, jiu hatc maaz bun yie, hnangv mborqv jienv yienx nor, bun cing yie horpc nzengc ninh nyei hnyouv.”" 
John6:28 Ninh mbuo ziouc naaic Yesu, “Yie mbuo oix zuqc zoux haaix nyungc cingx funx Tin-Hungh nyei gong?”" 
John6:29 Yesu dau, “Tin-Hungh oix meih mbuo zoux nyei gong se oix zuqc sienx ninh paaiv daaih wuov dauh.”" 
John6:30 Ninh mbuo ziouc mbuox Yesu, “Wuov nyungc meih oix zoux haaix nyungc mbuoqc horngh nyei jangx-hoc bun yie mbuo buatc ziouc haih sienx meih? Meih oix hnangv haaix nor zoux?" 
John6:31 Yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix yiem deic-bung-huaang duqv nyanc maa^naa hnangv Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv, ‘Ninh bun yiem lungh daaih nyei nyanc hopv ninh mbuo nyanc.’+”" 
John6:32 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, se maiv zeiz Mose bun yiem lungh daaih wuov nyungc zien nyanc hopv. Se yie nyei Die zorqv yiem lungh nyei zien nyanc hopv jiu bun meih mbuo." 
John6:33 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh nyei nyanc hopv se dongh yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih bun baamh mienh duqv ziangh jienv wuov dauh.” 
John6:34 Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Fin-Saeng aah! Tov zanc-zanc bun naaiv nyungc nyanc hopv yie mbuo maah!”" 
John6:35 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie ganh se yungz maengc nyei nyanc hopv. Haaix dauh daaih lorz yie, wuov dauh yietc liuz maiv ngorc. Haaix dauh sienx yie, wuov dauh yietc liuz maiv nqaatv." 
John6:36 Mv baac hnangv yie mbuox jiex meih mbuo nor, meih mbuo buatc jiex yie yaac maiv sienx." 
John6:37 Da'faanh yie nyei Die ceix bun yie nyei mienh yietc zungv oix daaih lorz yie. Haaix dauh daaih lorz yie, yie yietc liuz maiv guangc." 
John6:38 Weic zuqc yie yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih mv baac maiv zeiz sueih yie ganh nyei eix zoux. Yie daaih zoux ei paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh nyei eix hnangv. 
John6:39 Paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh nyei eix se hnangv naaiv. Dongh ninh ceix bun yie wuov deix mienh, ninh maiv oix yie bun laaih zitc yietc dauh. Taux nqa'haav laai wuov hnoi, oix yie bun ninh mbuo yietc zungv nangh daaih." 
John6:40 Weic zuqc yie nyei Die nyei eix se hnangv naaiv. Haaix dauh buatc ninh nyei Dorn, yaac sienx kaux ninh nyei Dorn, wuov dauh ziouc duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc. Taux nqa'haav laai wuov hnoi yie yaac oix bun ninh nangh daaih.”" 
John6:41 Yiutai Mienh ziouc ngopv Yesu weic zuqc ninh gorngv, “Yie se yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih nyei nyanc hopv.”" 
John6:42 Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Naaiv dauh se Yosepv nyei dorn, Yesu, maiv zeiz? Ninh nyei diex maac mbuo hiuv duqv nyei. Ninh hnangv haaix nor haih gorngv ninh yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih?”" 
John6:43 Yesu dau ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo maiv dungx ngih ngungx ngopv nyei maah!" 
John6:44 Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih daaih lorz yie cuotv liuz Zaangc Diex, dongh paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh, yuoqc ninh daaih. Haaix dauh daaih lorz yie, taux nqa'haav laai wuov hnoi yie ziouc bun ninh nangh daaih." 
John6:45 Douc Waac Mienh nyei Sou fiev jienv gorngv, ‘Tin-Hungh ganh oix njaaux ninh mbuo yietc zungv.’ Haaix dauh haiz Zaangc Diex nyei waac yaac hoqc hiuv nyei, ninh mbuo yietc zungv oix daaih lorz yie." 
John6:46 Naaiv maiv zeiz gorngv maaih haaix dauh duqv buatc jiex Zaangc Diex. Kungx yiem Tin-Hungh daaih wuov dauh duqv buatc jiex Zaangc Diex hnangv. 
John6:47 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, haaix dauh sienx yie, wuov dauh maaih yietc liuz nyei maengc." 
John6:48 Yie zoux yungz maengc nyei nyanc hopv. 
John6:49 Meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix-ngaeqv yiem deic-bung-huaang nyanc maa^naa mv baac ninh mbuo daic mi'aqv. 
John6:50 Haaix dauh nyanc yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih nyei nyanc hopv maiv zuqc daic. 
John6:51 Yie zoux ziangh jienv nyei nyanc hopv yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih. Haaix dauh nyanc naaiv nyungc nyanc hopv, wuov dauh duqv yietc liuz ziangh jienv. Yie bun nyei nyanc hopv se dongh yie ganh nyei orv weic bun baamh mienh duqv ziangh jienv.”" 
John6:52 Yiutai Mienh haiz naaiv deix waac ziouc nzaeng jiez jaax daaih gorngv, “Naaiv laanh mienh hnangv haaix nor haih bun ninh nyei orv mbuo nyanc?”" 
John6:53 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, se gorngv meih mbuo maiv nyanc Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn nyei orv, yaac maiv hopv ninh nyei nziaamv, yiem meih mbuo gu'nyuoz maiv maaih ziangh maengc aqv." 
John6:54 Haaix dauh nyanc yie nyei orv, hopv yie nyei nziaamv, wuov dauh maaih yietc liuz nyei maengc. Nqa'haav laai wuov hnoi yie yaac oix bun ninh nangh daaih." 
John6:55 Weic zuqc yie nyei orv caux yie nyei nziaamv se zien nyanc hopv. 
John6:56 Haaix dauh nyanc yie nyei orv yaac hopv yie nyei nziaamv, wuov dauh caux yie juangc maengc ziangh. Yie yaac caux wuov dauh juangc maengc ziangh." 
John6:57 Ziangh jienv nyei Zaangc Diex paaiv yie daaih, yie yaac weic ninh duqv ziangh jienv. Hnangv naaic, haaix dauh nyanc yie nyei orv, wuov dauh yaac weic yie duqv ziangh jienv." 
John6:58 Naaiv se yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih nyei nyanc hopv. Se maiv hnangv mbuo nyei ong-taaix nyanc nyei maa^naa. Nyanc liuz corc haih daic nyei. Mv baac haaix dauh nyanc yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih nyei nyanc hopv ziouc duqv yietc liuz ziangh jienv.” 
John6:59 Yesu gorngv naaiv deix waac wuov zanc ninh yiem Kaa^be^naa^um Mungv nyei wuic dorngh njaaux mienh. 
John6:60 Yesu nyei sai-gorx camv nyei haiz liuz naaiv deix waac ziouc gorngv, “Naaiv deix njaaux nyei waac za'gengh aqc duqv haic. Haaix dauh haih muangx duqv laeh?”" 
John6:61 Yesu hiuv duqv ninh nyei sai-gorx hnangv naaiv nor ngopv naaiv deix waac ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Laaix yie gorngv naaiv deix waac meih mbuo haiz oix tuix bouc fai?" 
John6:62 Wuov nyungc se gorngv meih mbuo buatc yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, faaux taux zinh ndaangc yiem nyei dorngx, meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor?" 
John6:63 Se Singx Lingh bun mienh maaih ziangh maengc. Baamh mienh maiv haih bun mienh maaih ziangh maengc. Yie gorngv nyei waac haih bun meih mbuo duqv Singx Lingh. Singx Lingh yaac bun meih mbuo duqv ziangh maengc. 
John6:64 Mv baac meih mbuo maaih deix maiv sienx.” Weic zuqc Yesu yiem gorn m'daaih hiuv duqv wuov deix mienh haaix dauh maiv sienx ninh, haaix dauh oix maaic ninh." 
John6:65 Ninh ziouc gorngv, “Weic naaiv yie gorngv jiex mbuox meih mbuo nyei, cuotv liuz Zaangc Diex bun daaih wuov deix, maiv maaih haaix dauh haih daaih lorz yie.”" 
John6:66 Yiem naaic daaih Yesu nyei sai-gorx camv nyei tuix bouc, maiv gan Yesu aqv." 
John6:67 Yesu ziouc naaic gaax wuov deix ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx, “Meih mbuo yaac oix guangc yie fai?”" 
John6:68 Simon Bide dau, “Ziouv aah! Yie mbuo oix zuqc mingh gan haaix dauh? Se dongh meih ganh nyei waac haih bun mienh duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc." 
John6:69 Yie mbuo sienx yaac hiuv duqv meih zoux Tin-Hungh nyei Cing-Nzengc Mienh.” 
John6:70 Yesu dau, “Yie ginv meih mbuo ziepc nyeic dauh maiv zeiz? Mv baac meih mbuo maaih dauh zoux hieh guaiv mienv.”" 
John6:71 Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv se gorngv zuqc Simon I^saa^kaa^li^otc nyei dorn, Yu^ndaatc. Maiv gunv ninh zoux wuov deix ziepc nyeic dauh sai-gorx nyei yietc dauh, nqa'haav ninh maaic Yesu." 
John7:1 Nqa'haav Yesu youh jienv Gaa^li^li Saengv mingh. Ninh dingc hnyouv maiv mingh Yu^ndie Saengv weic zuqc ninh hiuv duqv yiem wuov zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh oix lorz qangx daix ninh. 
John7:2 Wuov zanc aav lamh taux Mbiorv Liuh nyei Zipv aqv. 
John7:3 Yesu nyei youz mbuo ziouc gorngv mbuox ninh, “Gorx aah! Meih cuotv naaiv norm dorngx mingh Yu^ndie Saengv maah! Oix zuqc bun meih nyei sai-gorx mbuo buatc meih zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic." 
John7:4 Haaix dauh oix duqv mengh dauh, ninh maiv bingx ninh zoux nyei sic. Meih zoux jienv naaiv deix sic, oix zuqc mingh bun lungh ndiev mienh mangc meih maah!”" 
John7:5 Liemh Yesu ganh nyei youz mbuo yaac maiv sienx ninh. 
John7:6 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie nyei ziangh hoc maiv gaengh taux, mv baac meih mbuo haaix norm ziangh hoc yaac mingh duqv nyei." 
John7:7 Baamh mienh maiv maaih dorngx nzorng meih mbuo mv baac ninh mbuo nzorng yie, weic zuqc yie zoux zorng-zengx gorngv ninh mbuo zoux nyei waaic sic." 
John7:8 Meih mbuo gunv mingh jiex Zipv aqv. Yie maiv gaengh mingh weic zuqc yie horpc zuqc mingh nyei ziangh hoc maiv gaengh taux.” 
John7:9 Yesu caux ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor gorngv liuz, ninh corc yiem Gaa^li^li Saengv." 
John7:10 Yesu nyei youz mbuo mingh jiex Zipv mi'aqv. Yesu nqa'haav mingh mv baac ninh maiv dorng zuangx mingh, kungx bingx jienv mingh hnangv." 
John7:11 Yiem wuov zipv nyei yinh gu'nyuoz, zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh lorz Yesu yaac naaic mienh, “Wuov laanh mienh yiem haaix?”" 
John7:12 Yiem wuov jiex zipv nyei zuangx mienh sih sungx sapv nyei gorngv Yesu. Maaih deix gorngv, “Ninh gengh zoux kuv mienh.” Maaih deix gorngv, “Maiv zeiz! Ninh kungx nduov mienh hnangv.”" 
John7:13 Mv baac haaix dauh yaac maiv gaamv dorng zuangx gorngv taux Yesu, weic zuqc ninh mbuo gamh nziex haic zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh." 
John7:14 Jiex Zipv taux ndaamv-dingh, Yesu mingh zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv njaaux mienh." 
John7:15 Zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh mbuoqc horngh haic yaac gorngv, “Naaiv laanh mienh maiv duqv doqc sou hlang. Ninh fungc haih ndongc naaic hiuv?”" 
John7:16 Yesu ziouc dau ninh mbuo, “Yie njaaux nyei waac se maiv zeiz yie ganh hnamv cuotv daaih njaaux. Se dongh paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh nyei waac." 
John7:17 Haaix dauh dingc hnyouv ei Tin-Hungh nyei eix zoux, wuov dauh ziouc hiuv duqv yie njaaux nyei waac yiem Tin-Hungh daaih fai yie ganh hnamv cuotv daaih njaaux." 
John7:18 Haaix dauh ei ninh ganh nyei za'eix hnamv cuotv daaih njaaux, wuov dauh kungx oix mienh taaih ninh hnangv. Mv baac haaix dauh oix mienh taaih paaiv ninh daaih wuov dauh, ninh kungx gorngv zien waac hnangv. Maiv haih gorngv-baeqc." 
John7:19 Mose bun leiz-latc meih mbuo maiv zeiz? Mv baac meih mbuo yaac maiv maaih yietc dauh gan leiz-latc. Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc lorz qangx daix yie?” 
John7:20 Zuangx mienh gorngv, “Mienv muoqv meih maiv nzang mbor lorh! Maaih haaix dauh oix daix meih laeh?”" 
John7:21 Yesu gorngv, “Yie zoux nzunc sic meih mbuo yaac mbuoqc horngh haic." 
John7:22 Mose heuc meih mbuo tengx mienh jiex gaatv nyei leiz. (Mv baac naaiv nyungc leiz maiv zeiz yiem Mose daaih, se yiem meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix-ngaeqv daaih.) Dingh Gong Hnoi meih mbuo yaac tengx mienh jiex gaatv nyei leiz." 
John7:23 Se gorngv meih mbuo doix Dingh Gong Hnoi tengx mienh jiex gaatv nyei leiz weic maiv oix dorngc Mose nyei leiz, wuov nyungc yie longc Dingh Gong Hnoi zorc dauh mienh longx nzengc, meih mbuo weic haaix diuc qiex jiez yie?" 
John7:24 Maiv dungx mangc beih zaangc siemv, oix zuqc baengh fim nyei siemv.”" 
John7:25 Weic naaiv maaih deix Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh nyei mienh gorngv, “Ninh mbuo oix daix wuov dauh mienh dongh naaiv dauh saah?" 
John7:26 Mangc gaax, ninh dorng zuangx mienh gorngv waac mv baac ninh mbuo maiv gorngv yietc nyungc bun ninh. Zoux hlo nyei mienh za'gengh hiuv dingc ninh zoux Giduc mv bei?" 
John7:27 Mv baac naaiv laanh mienh yiem haaix daaih mbuo hiuv nyei. Giduc yiem haaix daaih maiv maaih haaix dauh hiuv. ” 
John7:28 Yesu yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv njaaux mienh wuov zanc ninh longc qiex hlo nyei gorngv, “Meih mbuo za'gengh hiuv duqv yie yaac hiuv yie yiem haaix daaih. Yie maiv zeiz sueih yie ganh nyei eix daaih. Mv baac paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh se zien nyei. Meih mbuo yaac maiv hiuv duqv ninh." 
John7:29 Mv baac yie hiuv duqv ninh nyei, weic zuqc yie yiem ninh wuov daaih, ninh yaac paaiv yie daaih.”" 
John7:30 Ninh mbuo ziouc oix zorqv ninh haic aqv, mv baac maiv maaih haaix dauh njiec buoz zorqv weic zuqc ninh nyei ziangh hoc maiv gaengh taux." 
John7:31 Yiem wuov nyei zuangx mienh corc maaih camv nyei sienx ninh. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Giduc daaih wuov zanc ninh haih zoux duqv mbuoqc horngh nyei jangx-hoc gauh camv naaiv dauh fai?”" 
John7:32 Faa^li^si Mienh haiz zuangx mienh sih sungx sapv nyei gorngv Yesu nyei jauv, ninh mbuo caux sai mienh bieiv ziouc paaiv goux zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv nyei baeng mingh zorqv Yesu." 
John7:33 Yesu gorngv, “Yie aengx caux meih mbuo yiem dangh baav hnangv. Nqa'haav ziouc nzuonx taux paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh." 
John7:34 Meih mbuo oix lorz yie yaac lorz maiv buatc, weic zuqc yie mingh yiem nyei dorngx meih mbuo mingh maiv duqv.”" 
John7:35 Zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh, laanh naaic laanh, “Aa, naaiv laanh mienh oix mingh haaix mbuo cingx lorz maiv buatc? Ninh oix mingh mbuo Yiutai Mienh nzaanx mingh yiem wuov deix Janx-Gikc nyei zingh njaaux Janx-Gikc fai?" 
John7:36 Ninh gorngv mbuo oix lorz ninh yaac lorz maiv buatc, yaac gorngv ninh mingh nyei dorngx mbuo mingh maiv duqv. Naaiv haaix nyungc eix leiz mv bei?”" 
John7:37 Zipv nyei nqa'haav laai wuov hnoi, se gauh hlo jiex nyei hnoi, Yesu souv jiez daaih gorngv hlo nyei, “Haaix dauh jaang nqaatv oix zuqc daaih yie naaiv hopv." 
John7:38 Hnangv Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv nor, ‘Haaix dauh sienx yie, yungz maengc nyei wuom ziouc yiem wuov dauh nyei hnyouv liouc cuotv daaih hnangv camv-diuh ndaaih nor.’+”" 
John7:39 Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv se gorngv taux Singx Lingh, dongh sienx ninh nyei mienh oix duqv zipv. Mv baac wuov zanc Tin-Hungh maiv gaengh bun Singx Lingh mienh, weic zuqc Yesu maiv gaengh duqv njang-laangc." 
John7:40 Zuangx mienh haiz ninh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv, maaih deix ziouc gorngv, “Naaiv dauh za'gengh dongh mbuo zuov wuov dauh Douc Waac Mienh aqv.”" 
John7:41 Aengx maaih deix gorngv, “Ninh zoux Giduc aqv.” Mv baac maaih deix gorngv, “Giduc fungc haih yiem Gaa^li^li daaih?" 
John7:42 Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv, Giduc zoux Ndaawitv Hungh nyei Zeiv-Fun yaac yiem Ndaawitv Hungh nyei buonv-mungv, Mbetc^le^hem, daaih maiv zeiz?”" 
John7:43 Weic naaiv mienh ziouc laaix Yesu bun nqoi. 
John7:44 Maaih deix oix zorqv Yesu mv baac maiv maaih haaix dauh njiec buoz zorqv. 
John7:45 Mingh zorqv Yesu wuov deix baeng nzuonx daaih, sai mienh bieiv caux Faa^li^si Mienh naaic ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo zoux haaix nyungc maiv zorqv jienv ninh daaih?”" 
John7:46 Wuov deix baeng dau, “Maiv maaih jiex yietc dauh mienh gorngv waac hnangv naaic dauh.”" 
John7:47 Faa^li^si Mienh gorngv, “Meih mbuo yaac zuqc ninh nduov mi'aqv saah?" 
John7:48 Maaih haaix dauh zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh fai Faa^li^si Mienh sienx jiex ninh nyei fai? 
John7:49 Maiv maaih lorqc. Mv baac naaiv guanh mienh maiv hiuv duqv Mose nyei Leiz-Latc ziouc zuqc Tin-Hungh zioux ninh mbuo.” 
John7:50 Maaih dauh wuov deix Faa^li^si Mienh, dongh zinh ndaangc mingh lorz Yesu wuov dauh Ni^ko^nde^matv, naaic," 
John7:51 “Ei mbuo nyei leiz, mbuo maiv gaengh haiz mienh gorngv, maiv hiuv duqv ninh nyei gorn-baengx, mbuo haih dingc ninh nyei zuiz fai?”" 
John7:52 Ninh mbuo dau, “Wuov nyungc meih yaac yiem Gaa^li^li daaih? Dimv mangc Ging-Sou maah! Meih ziouc hiuv duqv maiv maaih yietc dauh douc waac mienh yiem Gaa^li^li cuotv daaih niaa.”" 
John7:53 Jiex zipv nyei wuic nzaanx, gorqv-mienh nzuonx gorqv-mienh nyei biauv." 
John8:1 Mv baac Yesu mingh wuov Ga'lanv Mbong. 
John8:2 Da'nyeic ndorm nziouv nyei, Yesu aengx mingh zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv. Zuangx mienh daaih gapv zunv ninh wuov. Ninh ziouc zueiz jienv njaaux ninh mbuo." 
John8:3 Maaih deix njaaux leiz nyei fin-saeng caux Faa^li^si Mienh dorh dauh hienx jienv nqox zorqv daaih nyei m'sieqv dorn, bun ninh souv jienv zuangx mienh nyei nza'hmien." 
John8:4 Ninh mbuo gorngv mbuox Yesu, “Fin-Saeng aah! Naaiv dauh m'sieqv dorn hienx jienv nqox wuov zanc mienh zorqv daaih." 
John8:5 Mose nyei Leiz-Latc hatc mbuo oix zuqc longc la'bieiv zong naaiv nyungc mienh daic. Meih ni? Hnangv haaix nor gorngv?” 
John8:6 Ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor naaic se oix nduov Yesu gorngv dorngc ziouc haih lorz gorn-baengx gox ninh. Mv baac Yesu ndoqv njiec longc buoz-ndoqv fiev ga'ndiev ndau. 
John8:7 Wuov deix mienh maiv dingh liouh nyei naaic. Yesu ziouc cau jiez daaih gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo haaix dauh maiv baamz jiex zuiz, gunv zorqv la'bieiv zong ndaangc maah!”" 
John8:8 Gorngv liuz, Yesu aengx ndoqv njiec longc buoz-ndoqv fiev ndau." 
John8:9 Ninh mbuo haiz Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv, ninh mbuo ziouc zoqc dauh zoqc dauh nyei cuotv. Gauh gox wuov deix cuotv ndaangc, cuotv nzengc aqv. Kungx Yesu ganh yiem wuov hnangv. Mv baac wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn corc souv jienv wuov nyei." 
John8:10 Yesu aengx cau jiez daaih naaic wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn, “Dorc aah! Wuov deix mienh jiex haaix nzengc mi'aqv. Maiv maaih haaix dauh dingc meih nyei zuiz?”" 
John8:11 Wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn dau, “Domh Gorx aah! Maiv maaih haaix dauh aqv.” Yesu gorngv, “Yie yaac maiv dingc meih nyei zuiz. Gunv mingh aqv. Yangh naaiv jiex maiv dungx aengx baamz zuiz oc.”" 
John8:12 Yesu aengx njaaux zuangx mienh. Ninh gorngv, “Yie se njang ziux baamh gen. Haaix dauh gan yie, wuov dauh yietc liuz maiv zuqc yangh hmuangx gu'nyuoz, zungv duqv njang ziux ninh nyei maengc.”" 
John8:13 Faa^li^si Mienh aengx gorngv, “Meih tengx meih ganh zoux zorng-zengx, meih gorngv nyei waac se maiv zien.”" 
John8:14 Yesu dau, “Maiv gunv yie tengx yie ganh zoux zorng-zengx, yie nyei waac za'gengh zien nyei, weic zuqc yie hiuv duqv yie yiem haaix daaih yaac hiuv duqv yie oix mingh haaix. Mv baac meih mbuo maiv hiuv duqv yie yiem haaix daaih yaac oix mingh haaix." 
John8:15 “Meih mbuo ei baamh mienh nyei za'eix siemv mienh. Yie maiv siemv haaix dauh. 
John8:16 Mv baac se gorngv yie siemv mienh nor, yie siemv duqv horpc, weic zuqc maiv zeiz yie ganh siemv. Zaangc Diex paaiv yie daaih yaac caux yie siemv." 
John8:17 Meih mbuo ganh nyei Leiz-Latc fiev jienv gorngv, ‘Maaih i laanh mienh zoux zorng-zengx, gorngv nyei waac doix nor, sienx duqv aqv.’" 
John8:18 Yie tengx yie ganh zoux zorng-zengx. Aengx maaih yie nyei Die, dongh paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh, yaac tengx yie zoux zorng-zengx.”" 
John8:19 Ninh mbuo naaic, “Meih nyei die yiem haaix?” Yesu dau, “Meih mbuo maiv hiuv yie, yaac maiv hiuv yie nyei Die. Se gorngv meih mbuo hiuv duqv yie nor, meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv yie nyei Die.”" 
John8:20 Yesu yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv, nitv mienh fongc horc nyaanh wuov deix faang nyei dorngx njaaux mienh wuov zanc, ninh gorngv naaiv deix waac. Yaac maiv maaih haaix dauh zorqv ninh weic zuqc ninh nyei ziangh hoc maiv gaengh taux." 
John8:21 Yesu aengx gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie oix mingh aqv. Meih mbuo oix lorz yie, mv baac meih mbuo daic meih mbuo corc maaih jienv zuiz nyei. Yie mingh nyei dorngx meih mbuo maiv haih mingh.”" 
John8:22 Zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh gorngv, “Ninh oix daix ninh ganh daic fai? Weic zuqc ninh gorngv ninh mingh nyei dorngx mbuo mingh maiv duqv.”" 
John8:23 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Meih mbuo benx lungh ndiev nyei, yie benx tin-dorngh nyei. Meih mbuo guei baamh gen, yie maiv guei baamh gen." 
John8:24 Weic naaiv yie gorngv mbuox jiex meih mbuo, taux daic wuov zanc meih mbuo corc maaih jienv zuiz nyei. Se gorngv meih mbuo maiv sienx yie zoux dongh yie gorngv yie zoux wuov dauh nor, meih mbuo daic mv baac corc maaih jienv zuiz nyei.”" 
John8:25 Ninh mbuo naaic Yesu, “Meih dongh haaix dauh laeh?” Yesu dau, “Zinh ndaangc yie mbuox jiex meih mbuo yie dongh haaix dauh, yie se dongh wuov dauh aqv." 
John8:26 Yie aengx maaih camv-nyungc jauv gorngv meih mbuo, dingc meih mbuo nyei zuiz. Mv baac paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh se zien nyei. Yie haiz ninh gorngv jiex nyei waac, yie yaac gorngv mbuox baamh mienh.”" 
John8:27 Wuov deix mienh maiv mengh baeqc Yesu gorngv taux Zaangc Diex. 
John8:28 Yesu ziouc gorngv, “Meih mbuo liepc yie, Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn, faaux hlang wuov zanc, meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv yie se yietc liuz ziangh jienv wuov dauh. Wuov zanc meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv yie maiv zeiz sueih eix zoux haaix nyungc. Zaangc Diex njaaux yie hnangv haaix nor gorngv, yie ziouc hnangv wuov nor gorngv." 
John8:29 Paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh yaac caux yie yiem. Ninh maiv guangc bun yie ganh yiem weic zuqc yie zanc-zanc zoux horpc ninh nyei hnyouv.” 
John8:30 Mienh camv nyei haiz Yesu gorngv naaiv deix waac ziouc sienx ninh. 
John8:31 Yesu gorngv mbuox sienx ninh wuov deix Yiutai Mienh, “Se gorngv meih mbuo zanc-zanc ei jienv yie njaaux nyei waac zoux, meih mbuo za'gengh zoux yie nyei sai-gorx." 
John8:32 Meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv zien leiz. Zien leiz yaac oix bungx nqoi meih mbuo.” 
John8:33 Ninh mbuo dau, “Yie mbuo zoux Apc^laa^ham nyei zeiv-fun, yietc liuz maiv tengx haaix dauh zoux jiex nouh. Wuov nyungc, meih fungc gorngv yie mbuo duqv bungx nqoi?”" 
John8:34 Yesu dau ninh mbuo, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, haaix dauh baamz zuiz, wuov dauh zoux zuiz nyei nouh." 
John8:35 Zoux nouh nyei mienh maiv haih yietc liuz caux biauv-ziouv yiem. Kungx cien dorn duqv yietc liuz yiem hnangv. 
John8:36 Se gorngv Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn bungx nqoi meih mbuo, meih mbuo za'gengh benx bungx nqoi nyei mienh." 
John8:37 Yie hiuv duqv meih mbuo zoux Apc^laa^ham nyei zeiv-fun. Mv baac meih mbuo corc oix daix yie weic zuqc yie njaaux nyei leiz meih mbuo maiv muangx. 
John8:38 Yie gorngv nyei se yiem Zaangc Diex wuov buatc jiex nyei sic. Meih mbuo zoux nyei se meih mbuo nyei die mbuox meih mbuo zoux.” 
John8:39 Ninh mbuo dau, “Yie mbuo nyei die se Apc^laa^ham.” Yesu aengx dau ninh mbuo, “Se gorngv meih mbuo za'gengh zoux Apc^laa^ham nyei zeiv-fun nor, meih mbuo zoux nyei sic ziouc hnangv Apc^laa^ham zoux nyei." 
John8:40 Yie kungx gorngv dongh yie haiz Tin-Hungh gorngv jiex nyei zien leiz mbuox meih mbuo, mv baac meih mbuo oix daix yie. Apc^laa^ham maiv hnangv naaic zoux." 
John8:41 Meih mbuo kungx zoux hnangv meih mbuo nyei Die nor zoux.” Ninh mbuo dau, “Yie mbuo se maiv zeiz gu'nguaaz-toi. Yie mbuo maaih nduqc dauh die hnangv, se Tin-Hungh.”" 
John8:42 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Se gorngv Tin-Hungh za'gengh zoux meih mbuo nyei Die nor, meih mbuo ziouc hnamv yie weic zuqc yie yiem ninh daaih, ih zanc yie yiem naaiv. Yie maiv zeiz ei yie ganh nyei eix daaih. Ninh paaiv yie daaih." 
John8:43 Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc maiv mengh baeqc yie gorngv nyei waac? Se weic zuqc meih mbuo maiv haih muangx yie nyei doz. 
John8:44 Meih mbuo nyei die se mienv nyei hungh. Meih mbuo kungx oix ei jienv meih mbuo nyei die nyei eix zoux hnangv. Yiem gorn wuov ninh m'daaih daix mienh. Ninh yietc liuz maiv a'hneiv zien leiz, weic zuqc yiem ninh ganh maiv maaih zien leiz. Ninh gorngv-baeqc weic zuqc ninh ei ninh ganh nyei fiem-fingx m'daaih gorngv-baeqc. Ninh kungx gorngv-baeqc hnangv yaac zoux gorngv-baeqc nyei die." 
John8:45 Mv baac yie gorngv zien nyei, meih mbuo cingx daaih maiv sienx yie." 
John8:46 Meih mbuo haaix dauh haih zaah duqv cuotv yie maaih zuiz? Wuov nyungc, se gorngv yie gorngv zien leiz, meih mbuo weic haaix diuc maiv sienx yie?" 
John8:47 Haaix dauh yiem Tin-Hungh daaih, wuov dauh zungv muangx Tin-Hungh nyei waac. Meih mbuo maiv zeiz yiem Tin-Hungh daaih cingx daaih maiv muangx ninh nyei waac.”" 
John8:48 Wuov deix Yiutai Mienh dau Yesu, “Naaiv yie mbuo gorngv duqv zuqc nyei saah? Yie mbuo gorngv meih se Saa^maa^lie Janx yaac maaih mienv yiem meih nyei sin.”" 
John8:49 Yesu dau, “Yie maiv zeiz maaih mienv yiem yie nyei sin. Yie taaih yie nyei Die, mv baac meih mbuo mangc piex yie." 
John8:50 Yie maiv zeiz lorz mienh taaih yie, mv baac maaih dauh tengx yie lorz, yaac dongh naaiv dauh oix tengx yie siemv." 
John8:51 Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, haaix dauh ei jienv yie njaaux nyei waac zoux, wuov dauh yietc liuz maiv daic.”" 
John8:52 Yiutai Mienh gorngv mbuox ninh, “Ih zanc yie mbuo za'gengh hiuv duqv meih maaih mienv yiem meih nyei sin. Apc^laa^ham daic mi'aqv. Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx douc waac mienh yaac daic nzengc mi'aqv. Mv baac meih gorngv haaix dauh ei jienv meih njaaux nyei waac zoux, wuov dauh yietc liuz maiv daic." 
John8:53 Mbuo nyei ong-taaix-ngaeqv, Apc^laa^ham, zungv daic mi'aqv. Meih zoux gauh hlo jiex ninh fai? Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx douc waac mienh yaac daic mi'aqv. Meih gorngv meih ganh zoux haaix dauh?”" 
John8:54 Yesu dau ninh mbuo, “Se gorngv yie ganh taaih yie ganh nor, naaiv maiv maaih haaix nyungc eix leiz. Taaih yie wuov dauh se yie nyei Die, dongh meih mbuo gorngv zoux meih mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh wuov dauh." 
John8:55 Meih mbuo yietc liuz maiv hiuv duqv ninh, mv baac yie hiuv duqv ninh nyei. Se gorngv yie gorngv yie maiv hiuv duqv ninh nor, yie ziouc hnangv meih mbuo nor gorngv-baeqc. Mv baac yie hiuv duqv ninh, yaac ei jienv ninh nyei waac zoux." 
John8:56 Meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix, Apc^laa^ham, a'hneiv oix duqv buatc yie daaih nyei hnoi-nyieqc. Ninh duqv buatc liuz ziouc orn-lorqc haic.”" 
John8:57 Ninh mbuo aengx gorngv ninh, “Aa, meih zungv maiv gaengh duqv hmz ziepc hnyangx. Meih buatc jiex Apc^laa^ham nyei?”" 
John8:58 Yesu dau, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, Apc^laa^ham maiv gaengh cuotv seix, yie zungv yiem nyei.”" 
John8:59 Ninh mbuo haiz naaiv deix waac ziouc zorqv la'bieiv oix zong ninh, mv baac ninh bingx jienv cuotv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv mi'aqv." 
John9:1 Yesu yangh jienv jauv mingh, buatc dauh yiem-toi m'zing maengh nyei mienh." 
John9:2 Sai-gorx mbuo naaic Yesu, “Sai-Diex aah! Naaiv dauh mienh cuotv seix daaih m'zing maengh se laaix ninh ganh nyei zuiz fai laaix ninh nyei diex maac nyei zuiz?”" 
John9:3 Yesu dau, “Ninh m'zing maengh maiv zeiz laaix ninh ganh nyei zuiz fai ninh diex maac nyei zuiz. Ninh nyei m'zing maengh se weic bun Tin-Hungh zoux nyei sic yiem naaiv dauh mienh nyei sin biux mengh cuotv daaih." 
John9:4 Maiv gaengh hmuangx, mbuo oix zuqc zoux paaiv yie daaih wuov dauh nyei gong. Hmuangx yietv taux, maiv maaih haaix dauh zoux duqv gong." 
John9:5 Yie corc yiem jienv baamh gen nyei ziangh hoc yie zoux njang ziux baamh gen.” 
John9:6 Yesu gorngv liuz naaiv deix waac, ninh tuiv wuom-nzuih wuov ndau, caix benx wuom-bamc daaih, nzaatv jienv wuov dauh mienh nyei m'zing," 
John9:7 mbuox ninh, “Mingh wuov norm Si^lo^am Wuom-Domh nzaaux oc.” (Si^lo^am wuov norm mbuox nyei eix leiz se “Paaiv Mingh.”) Wuov dauh mienh mingh nzaaux liuz, nzuonx daaih ziouc mangc duqv buatc aqv." 
John9:8 Ninh nyei laangz zaangc mienh caux aah loc buatc ninh tov nyaanh wuov deix, laanh naaic laanh, “Naaiv dauh mienh dongh aah loc zueiz jienv tov nyaanh wuov dauh maiv zeiz?”" 
John9:9 Maaih deix gorngv, “Zeiz nyei, dongh naaiv dauh aqv.” Maaih deix gorngv, “Maiv zeiz. Se hnangv ninh hnangv.” Wuov dauh mienh ganh ziouc gorngv, “Zeiz nyei. Dongh yie aqv.”" 
John9:10 Wuov deix mienh ziouc naaic ninh, “Aav, wuov nyungc meih nyei m'zing hnangv haaix nor haih longx, mangc duqv buatc?”" 
John9:11 Ninh dau, “Maaih dauh mienh, mbuox heuc Yesu, caix wuom-bamc nzaatv yie nyei m'zing aengx heuc yie mingh Si^lo^am Wuom-Domh nzaaux. Yie ziouc mingh. Nzaaux liuz, mangc duqv buatc daaih aqv.”" 
John9:12 Wuov deix mienh aengx naaic, “Wuov dauh mienh yiem haaix?” Ninh gorngv, “Yie maiv hiuv.”" 
John9:13 Ninh mbuo ziouc dorh m'zing maengh longx daaih wuov dauh mienh mingh Faa^li^si Mienh wuov. 
John9:14 Dongh Yesu caix wuom-bamc tengx ninh nzaatv jienv m'zing njang daaih wuov hnoi se Dingh Gong Hnoi. 
John9:15 Wuov deix Faa^li^si Mienh yaac naaic ninh, “Meih nyei m'zing hnangv haaix nor haih longx, mangc duqv buatc?” Ninh gorngv, “Yesu zorqv wuom-bamc nzaatv yie nyei m'zing. Yie nzaaux liuz ziouc mangc duqv buatc daaih aqv.”" 
John9:16 Maaih deix Faa^li^si Mienh gorngv, “Tengx m'zing mangc duqv buatc wuov dauh mienh maiv zeiz yiem Tin-Hungh daaih, weic zuqc ninh maiv ei Dingh Gong Hnoi nyei leiz zoux.” Mv baac maaih deix gorngv, “Baamz zuiz nyei mienh hnangv haaix nor haih zoux naaiv deix mbuoqc horngh haic nyei jangx-hoc?” Hnangv naaic ninh mbuo ziouc bun nqoi mi'aqv." 
John9:17 Faa^li^si Mienh aengx naaic nzunc wuov dauh mienh, “Ninh tengx meih nyei m'zing longx, haih mangc duqv buatc. Wuov nyungc, meih gorngv ninh se haaix nyungc mienh?” Wuov dauh mienh dau, “Ninh zoux dauh douc waac mienh.”" 
John9:18 Zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh corc maiv sienx ninh zinh ndaangc m'zing maengh, ih zanc haih mangc duqv buatc. Ninh mbuo ziouc heuc ninh nyei diex maac daaih" 
John9:19 naaic ninh mbuo, “Naaiv dauh mienh meih mbuo nyei dorn? Meih mbuo gorngv ninh yiem-toi m'zing maengh dongh naaiv dauh fai? Wuov nyungc, ninh ih zanc hnangv haaix nor haih mangc duqv buatc?”" 
John9:20 Wuov dauh mienh nyei diex maac dau, “Yie mbuo hiuv duqv ninh zoux yie mbuo nyei dorn, yaac hiuv duqv ninh cuotv seix daaih m'zing maengh mi'aqv." 
John9:21 Mv baac yie mbuo maiv hiuv duqv ninh hnangv haaix nor haih mangc duqv buatc, yaac maiv hiuv duqv haaix dauh zorc ninh nyei m'zing njang. Meih mbuo ganh naaic gaax ninh maah! Ninh hlo aqv. Ninh ganh haih gorngv ninh ganh nyei jauv.”" 
John9:22 Ninh nyei diex maac hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic zuqc ninh mbuo gamh nziex zoux hlo nyei Yiutai Mienh. Zoux hlo nyei wuov deix zungv gorngv liuz, haaix dauh nyiemc Yesu zoux Giduc, ninh mbuo oix zunc cuotv wuic dorngh." 
John9:23 Weic naaiv ninh nyei diex maac cingx daaih gorngv, “Ninh hlo aqv. Meih mbuo naaic gaax ninh ganh maah!”" 
John9:24 Faa^li^si Mienh heuc m'zing maengh zorc longx wuov dauh mienh aengx daaih da'nyeic nzunc yaac mbuox ninh, “Meih oix zuqc dorng jienv Tin-Hungh laengz meih kungx gorngv zien hnangv. Yie mbuo hiuv duqv zorc meih nyei m'zing wuov dauh se zuiz-mienh aqv.”" 
John9:25 Wuov dauh mienh dau, “Ninh zoux zuiz-mienh zeiz fai maiv zeiz, yie maiv hiuv. Yie kungx hiuv duqv yietc nyungc hnangv. Zinh ndaangc yie m'zing maengh, ih zanc yie haih mangc duqv buatc.”" 
John9:26 Ninh mbuo aengx naaic, “Ninh zoux haaix nyungc bun meih? Ninh hnangv haaix nor zorc meih nyei m'zing longx, mangc duqv buatc?”" 
John9:27 Ninh dau, “Yie mbuox jiex meih mbuo, meih mbuo yaac maiv muangx. Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc aengx oix muangx nzunc? Meih mbuo yaac oix zoux ninh nyei sai-gorx fai?”" 
John9:28 Ninh mbuo ziouc gorngv doqc ninh. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Meih zoux wuov dauh lov nyei sai-gorx. Yie mbuo zoux Mose nyei sai-gorx." 
John9:29 Yie mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh caux Mose gorngv waac. Mv baac wuov dauh lov yie mbuo liemh maiv hiuv duqv ninh yiem haaix daaih.” 
John9:30 Wuov dauh mienh dau, “Naaiv za'gengh mbuoqc horngc haic. Meih mbuo maiv hiuv duqv ninh yiem haaix daaih. Mv baac ninh zorc yie nyei m'zing mangc duqv buatc." 
John9:31 Mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh maiv muangx baamz zuiz mienh nyei waac. Mv baac haaix dauh taaih Tin-Hungh, ei jienv ninh nyei eix zoux, ninh muangx wuov dauh." 
John9:32 Yiem zeix lungh zeix ndau cuotv daaih taux ih zanc, maiv maaih haaix dauh haiz jiex maaih haaix dauh zorc yiem-toi m'zing maengh nyei mienh longx, haih mangc duqv buatc." 
John9:33 Se gorngv naaiv dauh mienh maiv zeiz yiem Tin-Hungh daaih nor, ninh maiv haih zoux haaix nyungc.”" 
John9:34 Zoux hlo nyei wuov deix dau, “Meih zuiz-mienh cuotv seix daaix jienv zuiz hlo daaih, mv baac meih oix njaaux yie mbuo?” Ninh mbuo ziouc zunc ninh cuotv wuic dorngh mi'aqv." 
John9:35 Yesu haiz gorngv ninh mbuo zunc naaiv dauh mienh cuotv wuic dorngh. Ninh ziouc mingh lorz buatc yaac naaic ninh, “Meih sienx Baamh Mienh nyei Dorn fai?”" 
John9:36 Wuov dauh mienh dau, “Domh Gorx aah! Ninh dongh haaix dauh? Tov meih mbuox yie oc. Yie ziouc haih sienx ninh.”" 
John9:37 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh, “Meih buatc jiex ninh nyei. Dongh ih zanc caux meih gorngv waac wuov dauh.”" 
John9:38 Wuov dauh mienh gorngv, “Ziouv aah! Yie sienx aqv.” Ninh ziouc gueic njiec baaix Yesu." 
John9:39 Yesu gorngv, “Yie njiec baamh gen weic siemv zuiz, bun m'zing maengh nyei mienh haih mangc duqv buatc, yaac bun mangc duqv buatc wuov deix m'zing maengh mingh.”" 
John9:40 Maaih deix Faa^li^si Mienh caux Yesu yiem wuov haiz ninh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv ziouc naaic, “Hnangv naaic, yie mbuo yaac m'zing maengh nyei fai?”" 
John9:41 Yesu dau, “Se gorngv meih mbuo m'zing maengh nor, meih mbuo maiv maaih zuiz aqv. Mv baac meih mbuo gorngv, ‘Yie mbuo mangc duqv buatc nyei.’ Hnangv naaic meih mbuo corc maaih zuiz nyei.”" 
John10:1 Yesu gorngv, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, haaix dauh bieqc ba'gi yungh laatc, maiv yangh laatc gaengh bieqc, kungx nyorng yangh ganh norm dorngx bieqc, ninh zoux janx-zaqc nimc yungh, caangv yungh hnangv." 
John10:2 Mv baac yangh gaengh bieqc wuov dauh se goux ba'gi yungh nyei mienh. 
John10:3 Zuov gaengh nyei mienh tengx ninh koi gaengh. Ba'gi yungh yaac muangx ninh nyei qiex. Ninh ei dauh dauh ba'gi yungh nyei mbuox ziaaux, ziouc dorh ninh mbuo cuotv laatc mingh." 
John10:4 Bungx ninh ganh nyei ba'gi yungh cuotv nzengc daaih, ninh mingh ndaangc. Ba'gi yungh yaac gan jienv ninh mingh weic zuqc ninh mbuo zieqv duqv ninh nyei qiex." 
John10:5 Ganh dauh mienh yungh maiv gan. Kungx oix biaux hnangv, weic zuqc zieqv maiv duqv ninh nyei qiex.”" 
John10:6 Yesu gorngv naaiv diuh waac-beiv mbuox ninh mbuo mv baac ninh mbuo maiv mengh baeqc eix leiz. 
John10:7 Yesu ziouc aengx gorngv mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie gorngv zien mbuox meih mbuo, yie se naaiv deix ba'gi yungh nyei laatc gaengh." 
John10:8 Daaih ndaangc yie wuov deix yietc zungv zoux janx-zaqc nimc yungh, caangv yungh hnangv. Mv baac ba'gi yungh maiv muangx ninh mbuo." 
John10:9 Yie se laatc gaengh. Haaix dauh yangh yie naaiv dauh gaengh bieqc oix duqv njoux yaac bieqc bieqc cuotv-cuotv lorz nyanc. 
John10:10 Janx-zaqc daaih kungx oix nimc, oix daix, oix mietc, mv baac yie daaih weic bun baamh mienh duqv ziangh maengc, zungv oix bun ninh mbuo duqv dunh yunh nyei maengc." 
John10:11 “Yie se goux ba'gi yungh longx nyei ziouv. Goux ba'gi yungh longx wuov dauh nyunc weic ba'gi yungh siev ninh nyei maengc. 
John10:12 Cingv daaih nyei gong-mienh maiv zeiz zien goux ba'gi yungh nyei ziouv. Ba'gi yungh yaac maiv zeiz ninh ganh nyei. Buatc hieh juv daaih ziouc guangc jienv biaux. Hieh juv ziouc betv, haeqv ba'gi yungh guanh biaux nzaanx nzengc." 
John10:13 Cingv daaih nyei gong-mienh biaux mi'aqv, weic zuqc mienh cingv ninh hnangv, ninh maiv nzauh yungh." 
John10:14 “Yie se goux ba'gi yungh longx nyei ziouv. Yie hiuv duqv yie nyei ba'gi yungh, yie nyei ba'gi yungh yaac hiuv duqv yie," 
John10:15 hnangv Zaangc Diex hiuv duqv yie, yie yaac hiuv duqv Zaangc Diex. Yie yaac weic naaiv deix yungh siev yie nyei maengc." 
John10:16 Yie aengx ganh maaih ba'gi yungh, se maiv zeiz yiem naaiv norm laatc nyei ba'gi yungh. Yie oix zuqc dorh ninh mbuo daaih. Ninh mbuo ziouc muangx yie nyei qiex, yaac caux naaiv deix benx yietc guanh, maaih yietc dauh ziouv goux ninh mbuo hnangv." 
John10:17 “Zaangc Diex hnamv yie weic zuqc yie siev yie ganh nyei maengc daic. Yie siev yie nyei maengc weic aengx duqv maengc nzuonx. 
John10:18 Maiv maaih haaix dauh zorqv yie nyei maengc, yie ganh siev yie nyei maengc. Yie maaih leiz siev yie nyei maengc yaac maaih leiz aengx duqv yie nyei maengc nzuonx. Yie nyei Die paaiv yie hnangv naaiv nor zoux.”" 
John10:19 Laaix naaiv deix waac Yiutai Mienh aengx bun nqoi mi'aqv. 
John10:20 Maaih camv nyei gorngv, “Ninh zuqc mienv muoqv. Ninh butv ndin mi'aqv. Muangx ninh nyei waac zoux haaix nyungc laeh!”" 
John10:21 Mv baac maaih deix gorngv, “Haaix dauh zuqc mienv muoqv maiv haih gorngv naaiv nyungc waac lorqc. Mienv haih bun m'zing maengh nyei mienh mangc duqv buatc nyei?”" 
John10:22 Wuov zanc yiem Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh jiex Houc Zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei Biauv nyei Zipv se dong-gen hnoi. 
John10:23 Yesu yiem zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv, Saa^lo^morn nyei bingx laangh dorngx, jiex mingh jiex daaih nyei." 
John10:24 Yiutai Mienh daaih gapv zunv ninh wuov yaac naaic, “Meih oix bun yie mbuo hnyouv lunc taux haaix zanc? Se gorngv meih za'gengh Giduc, mbuox zaqc yie mbuo maah!”" 
John10:25 Yesu dau, “Yie mbuox jiex meih mbuo, meih mbuo yaac maiv sienx ni! Yie dengv yie nyei Die nyei mbuox zoux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Wuov deix sic tengx yie zoux zorng-zengx." 
John10:26 Mv baac meih mbuo maiv sienx weic zuqc meih mbuo maiv zeiz yie nyei ba'gi yungh. 
John10:27 Yie nyei ba'gi yungh muangx yie nyei qiex. Yie yaac hiuv duqv ninh mbuo, ninh mbuo yaac gan jienv yie mingh." 
John10:28 Yie bun ninh mbuo maaih yietc liuz nyei maengc, yietc liuz maiv zuqc daic. Ninh mbuo yiem yie nyei buoz, maiv maaih haaix dauh haih caangv duqv cuotv." 
John10:29 Yie nyei Die zorqv ninh mbuo jiu bun yie. Die yaac gauh hlo jiex maanc muotc. Ninh mbuo yiem yie nyei Die nyei buoz, maiv maaih haaix dauh haih caangv duqv cuotv." 
John10:30 Yie caux yie nyei Die benx yietc dauh hnangv.” 
John10:31 Yiutai Mienh aengx zorqv la'bieiv oix zong Yesu haic aqv. 
John10:32 Yesu mbuox ninh mbuo, “Yie ei yie nyei Die paaiv yie zoux kuv sic camv nyei bun meih mbuo buatc. Laaix haaix nzunc kuv sic meih mbuo zorqv la'bieiv oix zong yie daic?”" 
John10:33 Ninh mbuo dau, “Yie mbuo maiv zeiz laaix meih zoux nyei kuv sic oix zong meih, se laaix meih ki Tin-Hungh. Meih se baamh mienh hnangv mv baac ceng meih ganh zoux Tin-Hungh.”" 
John10:34 Yesu dau, “Meih mbuo ganh nyei Leiz-Latc fiev jienv gorngv naaiv joux waac maiv zeiz? ‘Yie gorngv, meih mbuo se zienh.’" 
John10:35 Mbuo hiuv duqv Ging-Sou nyei waac yietc liuz maiv haih goiv yienc. Se gorngv zipv Tin-Hungh nyei waac wuov deix mienh Tin-Hungh heuc zienh nor," 
John10:36 wuov nyungc, Zaangc Diex ginv daaih paaiv njiec baamh gen wuov dauh ni? Yie gorngv yie zoux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn, meih mbuo weic haaix diuc gorngv yie ki Tin-Hungh?" 
John10:37 Se gorngv yie maiv ei yie nyei Die nyei za'eix zoux nor, maiv dungx sienx yie." 
John10:38 Mv baac se gorngv yie ei jienv zoux, maiv gunv meih mbuo maiv sienx yie, meih mbuo corc oix zuqc sienx yie zoux nyei sic. Meih mbuo ziouc haih hiuv duqv Zaangc Diex yiem yie gu'nyuoz. Yie yaac yiem Zaangc Diex gu'nyuoz.”" 
John10:39 Wuov deix mienh aengx oix zorqv Yesu, mv baac Yesu yiem ninh mbuo nyei buoz-ndiev biaux cuotv mi'aqv." 
John10:40 Yesu aengx nzuonx wuov ngaanc ziqc Jor^ndaen Ndaaih, dongh zinh ndaangc Yo^han tengx mienh jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov norm dorngx, yiem caamx wuov." 
John10:41 Maaih mienh camv nyei daaih lorz ninh. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Yo^han maiv zoux jiex haaix nyungc mbuoqc horngh nyei jangx-hoc. Mv baac Yo^han gorngv haaix nyungc taux naaiv laanh mienh yietc zungv se zien nyei.”" 
John10:42 Yiem wuov maaih mienh camv nyei ziouc sienx Yesu. 
John11:1 Maaih dauh mienh, mbuox heuc Laa^saa^latv, butv baengc mi'aqv. Ninh yiem Mbe^taa^ni Laangz, dongh Maa^li^yaa caux ninh nyei dorc, Maataa, yiem wuov norm laangz." 
John11:2 (Naaiv dauh Maa^li^yaa se dongh longc ndaang nyei youh dox Ziouv nyei zaux, yaac longc ninh ganh nyei mba'biei sortv. Butv baengc wuov dauh Laa^saa^latv se Maa^li^yaa nyei nauz.)" 
John11:3 Maataa mbuo i muoz-sieqv ziouc bun waac mingh mbuox Yesu, “Ziouv aah! Dongh meih hnamv wuov dauh butv baengc mi'aqv.”" 
John11:4 Yesu haiz naaiv deix waac ninh gorngv, “Laa^saa^latv butv naaiv norm baengc mv baac setv mueiz ninh maiv daic. Ninh butv weic bun mienh taaih Tin-Hungh. Naaiv norm baengc yaac oix bun mienh taaih Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn.”" 
John11:5 Yesu hnamv haic Maataa mbuo i muoz-sieqv caux Laa^saa^latv. 
John11:6 Ninh haiz mienh gorngv Laa^saa^latv butv jienv baengc, ninh corc yiem ninh yiem wuov norm dorngx i hnoi liuz" 
John11:7 cingx daaih gorngv mbuox ninh nyei sai-gorx, “Mbuo aengx mingh Yu^ndie Saengv aqv.”" 
John11:8 Sai-gorx mbuo dau, “Sai-Diex aah! Jiex daaih maiv gaengh maaih mbu'ziex hnoi, yiem wuov nyei Yiutai Mienh oix zorqv la'bieiv zong meih niaa. Meih corc aengx oix mingh wuov?”" 
John11:9 Yesu dau, “Yietc hnoi maaih ziepc nyeic norm ziangh hoc nyei njang maiv zeiz? Haaix dauh lungh hnoi zanc yangh jauv, ninh maiv ndiqv zuqc ndorpc weic zuqc ninh mangc duqv buatc baamh gen nyei njang." 
John11:10 Mv baac se gorngv ninh lungh muonz zanc yangh jauv nor, ninh ndiqv zuqc ndorpc weic zuqc maiv maaih njang ziux ninh.”" 
John11:11 Yesu hnangv naaiv nor gorngv liuz ninh aengx gorngv, “Mbuo nyei doic Laa^saa^latv m'njormh mi'aqv, mv baac yie oix mingh heuc ninh nyie daaih.”" 
John11:12 Sai-gorx mbuo dau, “Ziouv aah! Se gorngv ninh m'njormh nor, ninh haih longx nyei.”" 
John11:13 Yesu gorngv nyei eix leiz se Laa^saa^latv daic mi'aqv. Mv baac sai-gorx mbuo laaic Laa^saa^latv kungx m'njormh hnangv. 
John11:14 Yesu ziouc gorngv zaqc mbuox ninh mbuo, “Laa^saa^latv daic mi'aqv." 
John11:15 Mv baac weic tengx meih mbuo sienx yie, yie a'hneiv yie maiv duqv caux ninh yiem. Mbuo mingh ninh wuov orqc?”" 
John11:16 Tomatv, dongh mienh heuc Sung-Gu'nguaaz wuov dauh, gorngv mbuox yiem wuov nyei sai-gorx, “Mbuo lomh nzoih gan jienv Sai-Diex mingh orqc? Mbuo ziouc duqv caux ninh daic.”" 
John11:17 Yesu mingh taux Mbe^taa^ni Laangz wuov zanc, haiz mienh gorngv Laa^saa^latv zangx jienv duqv biei hnoi aqv." 
John11:18 Mbe^taa^ni Laangz leih Ye^lu^saa^lem Zingh buo gilo jauv nyei dorngx. 
John11:19 Yiutai Mienh camv nyei daaih mangc Maataa caux Maa^li^yaa, tengx ninh mbuo jaiv nzauh weic zuqc ninh mbuo nyei nauz daic." 
John11:20 Maataa haiz gorngv Yesu daaih aqv, ninh ziouc cuotv mingh zipv. Mv baac Maa^li^yaa corc yiem wuov biauv." 
John11:21 Maataa gorngv mbuox Yesu, “Ziouv aah! Se gorngv meih yiem naaiv nor, yie nyei nauz maiv daic." 
John11:22 Mv baac, yie hiuv duqv ih zanc meih tengx Tin-Hungh tov haaix nyungc, Tin-Hungh oix bun wuov nyungc meih.”" 
John11:23 Yesu gorngv mbuox ninh, “Meih nyei nauz aengx oix nangh daaih.”"
