Galatians5:21 hanc mienh, diuv nquin, gapv zunv zoux waaic sic lo haaix. Naaiv deix waac yie gorngv mbuox jiex meih mbuo nyei, ih zanc yie aengx gorngv nzunc. Haaix dauh zoux naaiv nyungc sic, maiv haih duqv Tin-Hungh zoux Ziouv gunv ninh mbuo." 
Galatians5:22 Mv baac Singx Lingh bun nyei se, bun mienh maaih hnyouv hnamv mienh, bun mienh maaih njien-youh, maaih baengh orn, maaih noic, maaih hnyouv korv-lienh mienh, zoux longx nyei sic, maaih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv," 
Galatians5:23 zoux hnyouv suonc, haih gunv duqv ganh. Naaiv deix yietc zungv jauv leiz-latc maiv haangh." 
Galatians5:24 Za'gengh zoux Giduc Yesu nyei mienh wuov deix, zorqv ninh mbuo baamh mienh nyei eix, dongh ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv oix zoux nyei caux hnyouv hanc zoux nyei yietc zungv ding liuz ziepc nzaangc jaax mi'aqv." 
Galatians5:25 Mbuo kaux Singx Lingh ziangh jienv, ziouc oix zuqc bun Singx Lingh dorh mbuo." 
Galatians5:26 Maiv dungx taaih ganh hlo, laanh cuoqv laanh, laanh hanc laanh." 
Galatians6:1 Zuangx gorx-youz aac, se gorngv zorqv duqv haaix dauh dorngc haaix nyungc zuiz, meih mbuo ei Singx Lingh zoux nyei mienh oix zuqc longc suonc hnyouv dorh ninh nzuonx daaih zoux horpc. Mv baac meih mbuo oix zuqc faix fim. Nziex ganh yaac zuqc nduov zoux dorngc." 
Galatians6:2 Haaix dauh maaih haaix nyungc sic oix zuqc laanh tengx laanh ndaam. Hnangv naaic meih mbuo ziouc ei jienv Giduc nyei lingc zoux. 
Galatians6:3 Haaix dauh maiv zeiz longc jienv nyei mienh mv baac taaih ganh zoux longc jienv nyei mienh nor, wuov dauh kungx nduov ganh hnangv." 
Galatians6:4 Gorqv-mienh oix zuqc zaah ganh zoux nyei sic. Zoux duqv longx, ninh ziouc haih a'hneiv ganh yaac maiv zuqc dorh mingh beiv ganh dauh zoux nyei." 
Galatians6:5 Weic zuqc gorqv-mienh maaih gorqv-mienh nyei buonc oix zuqc ndaam. 
Galatians6:6 Haaix dauh duqv mienh njaaux Giduc nyei doz, ninh maaih nyei nyungc-nyungc longx nyei ga'naaiv oix zuqc bun njaaux ninh wuov dauh duqv juangc jienv longc." 
Galatians6:7 Maiv dungx nduov ganh. Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih nduov duqv Tin-Hungh. Mienh zuangx haaix nyungc ziouc siou duqv wuov nyungc. 
Galatians6:8 Se gorngv mienh sueih ganh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux se hnangv zuangx nyim njiec ndau nor, siou daaih nyei se bun ninh zuqc daic. Mv baac mienh ei Singx Lingh zuangx, Singx Lingh ziouc bun ninh siou daaih nyei se yietc liuz nyei maengc." 
Galatians6:9 Zoux kuv sic, maiv dungx hnyouv namx. Se gorngv mbuo maiv tuix nor, taux ziangh hoc mbuo ziouc maaih siou-sengh." 
Galatians6:10 Hnangv naaic, haaix zanc maaih qangx, mbuo oix zuqc zoux kuv sic tengx zuangx mienh. Lengc jeiv nyei oix zuqc tengx weic sienx Yesu benx yietc biauv mienh wuov deix." 
Galatians6:11 Meih mbuo mangc gaax! Yie longc yie ganh nyei buoz fiev nzaangc ndongc naaiv hlo bun meih mbuo. 
Galatians6:12 Dongh oix douh ganh duqv hmien-minc wuov deix oix aapv meih mbuo jiex gaatv nyei leiz. Ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor zoux se weic zuqc maiv oix weic Giduc nyei ziepc nzaangc jaax zuqc mienh zoux doqc ninh mbuo. 
Galatians6:13 Maiv gunv ninh mbuo ganh jiex gaatv nyei leiz, ninh mbuo zungv maiv ei leiz-latc zoux. Ninh mbuo kungx oix meih mbuo jiex gaatv nyei leiz weic bungx waac-maux gorngv meih mbuo jiex gaatv nyei leiz mi'aqv hnangv." 
Galatians6:14 Mv baac yie ganh zungv maiv oix bungx waac-maux, cuotv liuz bungx waac-maux gorngv mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei ziepc nzaangc jaax. Se laaix ziepc nzaangc jaax baamh gen zuqc ding daic, baamh gen nyei yietc zungv ziouc guen maiv zuqc yie. Yie yaac zuqc ding daic ziouc guen maiv zuqc baamh gen." 
Galatians6:15 Jiex gaatv nyei leiz fai maiv jiex se maiv longc jienv. Longc jienv nyei se zoux siang-zeix daaih nyei mienh. 
Galatians6:16 Tov Tin-Hungh ceix baengh orn yaac korv-lienh yietc zungv gan naaiv nyungc leiz nyei mienh, aengx caux Tin-Hungh nyei zien I^saa^laa^en Mienh." 
Galatians6:17 Setv mueiz yie oix gorngv, yangh naaiv jiex maiv dungx bun haaix dauh la'nyauv yie, weic zuqc yie nyei sin maaih naanx hnangv maaih yienx bun cing yie zoux Yesu nyei nouh." 
Galatians6:18 Gorx-youz aac, tov mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en bun meih mbuo zuangx mienh. Aamen." 
Ephesians1:1 Yie, Baulo, ei Tin-Hungh nyei za'eix zoux Giduc Yesu nyei gong-zoh. Yie fiev fienx bun yiem E^fe^so Zingh, Tin-Hungh nyei mienh, dongh ziepc zuoqv nyei sienx Giduc Yesu wuov deix." 
Ephesians1:2 Tov mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh caux Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en ceix baengh orn bun meih mbuo. 
Ephesians1:3 Ceng mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei Die, Tin-Hungh, weic zuqc mbuo caux Giduc juangc maengc ziangh Tin-Hungh ziouc bun Singx Lingh ceix tin-dorngh nyei nyungc-nyungc fuqv bun mbuo." 
Ephesians1:4 Yiem maiv gaengh zeix lungh zeix ndau wuov zanc, Tin-Hungh zungv ginv mbuo daaih bun mbuo kaux Giduc benx ninh nyei mienh, yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien cing-nzengc, maiv lamh gorngv dorngx." 
Ephesians1:5 Tin-Hungh hnamv mbuo ziouc jaa-ndaangc dingc ziangx longc Yesu Giduc bun mbuo benx ninh nyei naamh nyouz. Naaiv se ei ninh ganh nyei za'eix yaac horpc ninh nyei hnyouv. 
Ephesians1:6 Mbuo oix zuqc ceng Tin-Hungh weic ninh hlo haic nyei en, dongh ninh longc ninh nyei Dorn-hnamv baeqc baeqc ceix bun mbuo, nyei en." 
Ephesians1:7 Mbuo kaux Giduc nyei nziaamv zuoqc mbuo nzuonx daaih, guangc mbuo nyei zuiz. Naaiv se Tin-Hungh hlo haic nyei en," 
Ephesians1:8 dongh ninh ei ninh nyei cong-mengh caux ninh hiuv maanc sic camv-camv nyei ceix bun mbuo. 
Ephesians1:9 Tin-Hungh bun mbuo hiuv duqv ninh jaa-ndaangc dingc longc Giduc zoux ziangx nyei za'eix, dongh maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh nyei za'eix." 
Ephesians1:10 Ninh nyei za'eix se hnangv naaiv. Zuov dingc daaih nyei nyutc zeiv buangv, Tin-Hungh oix zorqv yietc zungv yiem tin-dorngh, yiem baamh gen nyei maanc muotc gapv jienv guei Giduc gunv." 
Ephesians1:11 Yietc zungv sic cuotv daaih ei Tin-Hungh nyei za'eix yaac ei ninh dingc ziangx. Tin-Hungh weic ninh ganh nyei za'eix ginv mbuo, bun mbuo caux Giduc juangc maengc ziangh, benx ninh nyei mienh. Ninh hnangv naaiv zoux se ei ninh jaa-ndaangc dingc ziangx zoux." 
Ephesians1:12 Weic naaiv, yie mbuo kaux Giduc zoux daauh baan maaih lamh hnamv nyei mienh ziouc oix zuqc ceng Tin-Hungh nyei njang-laangc." 
Ephesians1:13 Meih mbuo haiz zien leiz nyei doz wuov zanc, dongh bun meih mbuo duqv njoux nyei kuv fienx, meih mbuo yaac sienx Giduc aqv. Tin-Hungh ziouc ei ninh laengz nyei waac bun Singx Lingh meih mbuo hnangv nqaapv jienv yienx nor, bun cing meih mbuo benx ninh nyei mienh." 
Ephesians1:14 Singx Lingh zoux hnangv dingc-zinh dingc jienv mbuo, zuov ninh zuoqc nzengc ninh nyei mienh nzuonx, ziouc duqv Tin-Hungh laengz bun ninh nyei mienh siouc nyei jaa-dingh. Mbuo oix zuqc ceng ninh nyei njang-laangc." 
Ephesians1:15 Weic naaiv, yiem yie haiz liuz meih mbuo sienx Ziouv Yesu yaac hnamv Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx mienh," 
Ephesians1:16 yie maiv dingh liouh nyei weic meih mbuo laengz zingh Tin-Hungh. Haaix zanc daux gaux yaac jangx taux meih mbuo. 
Ephesians1:17 Yie tov mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei Tin-Hungh, njang-laangc nyei Zaangc Diex, ceix Singx Lingh bun meih mbuo, ziouc bun meih mbuo maaih cong-mengh yaac laauc yaangh bun meih mbuo zien-zien hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh." 
Ephesians1:18 Yie tov Zaangc Diex koi nqoi meih mbuo nyei hnyouv bun meih mbuo haih hiuv duqv ninh nyei njang, ziouc hiuv duqv ninh heuc meih mbuo daaih bun meih mbuo maaih lamh hnamv oix duqv haaix nyungc, yaac bun meih mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh laengz bun ninh nyei mienh siouc nyei jaa-dingh ndongc haaix hlo, ndongc haaix njang-laangc," 
Ephesians1:19 yaac bun meih mbuo hiuv duqv ninh nyei qaqv weic mbuo sienx ninh nyei mienh za'gengh hlo haic. Naaiv nyungc qaqv se fih hnangv 
Ephesians1:20 Giduc daic mingh mv baac Tin-Hungh longc bun Giduc nangh daaih yaac bun yiem tin-dorngh zueiz jienv ninh nyei mbiaauc maengx wuov nyungc domh qaqv. 
Ephesians1:21 Ninh bun Giduc zungv gauh hlang jiex yietc zuangx gunv ndaamv-lungh nyei, maaih lingc maaih qaqv nyei, zoux hlo gunv sic wuov deix yietc zungv. Yaac bun ninh maaih mengh hoc gauh hlo jiex, maiv daan yiem naaiv gitv lungh ndiev hnangv, yaac yiem da'nyeic gitv." 
Ephesians1:22 Tin-Hungh yaac zorqv maanc muotc hietv Giduc nyei zaux-ndiev, paaiv ninh zoux jiu-baang nyei m'nqorngv gunv jiu-baang nyei nyungc-nyungc." 
Ephesians1:23 Jiu-baang se Giduc nyei sin yaac zoux bun Giduc dunh yunh nzengc. Giduc se dongh bun nyungc-nyungc dunh yunh nzengc wuov dauh. 
Ephesians2:1 Zinh ndaangc laaix meih mbuo maiv muangx Tin-Hungh nyei waac yaac baamz zuiz, meih mbuo se dorngx daic mi'aqv." 
Ephesians2:2 Wuov zanc meih mbuo kungx gan baamh gen orqv haic nyei za'eix hnangv. Meih mbuo muangx gunv ndaamv-lungh wuov dauh, dongh ih zanc yiem maiv muangx Tin-Hungh nyei waac wuov deix mienh nyei hnyouv zoux gong wuov dauh mienv." 
Ephesians2:3 Zinh ndaangc mbuo yietc zungv yiem wuov deix mienh mbu'ndongx kungx ei mbuo nyei hnyouv hanc zoux, sueih ganh nyei sin, ganh nyei hnyouv oix zoux nyei ziouc zoux aqv. Weic naaiv, ziux mbuo nyei fiem-fingx mbuo m'daaih hnangv wuov deix nor, zuqc Tin-Hungh nouz mbuo." 
Ephesians2:4 Mv baac Tin-Hungh za'gengh korv-lienh haic mienh yaac ndongc naaic hnamv mbuo," 
Ephesians2:5 maiv gunv mbuo laaix maiv muangx Tin-Hungh nyei waac dorngx daic mi'aqv, ninh bun mbuo caux Giduc nangh daaih ziangh jienv. Meih mbuo duqv njoux se weic Tin-Hungh nyei en." 
Ephesians2:6 Tin-Hungh bun mbuo caux Giduc Yesu juangc maengc nangh daaih yaac caux ninh zueiz jienv wuov tin-dorngh. 
Ephesians2:7 Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv zoux weic nqa'haav gitv-gitv lungh ndiev ninh haih biux mengh ninh hlo! haic nyei en, dongh ninh longc Giduc Yesu biux mengh ninh ndongc haaix hnamv mbuo." 
Ephesians2:8 Meih mbuo duqv njoux se weic Tin-Hungh nyei en, weic zuqc meih mbuo sienx kaux ninh. Se maiv zeiz meih mbuo ganh zoux nyei, se Tin-Hungh ceix bun nyei zingh nyeic." 
Ephesians2:9 Mienh duqv njoux se maiv zeiz kaux ganh zoux nyei sic, weic maiv bun haaix dauh haih bungx waac-maux." 
Ephesians2:10 Se Tin-Hungh nyei buoz-dauh zeix mbuo daaih, bun mbuo caux Giduc Yesu juangc maengc ziangh, weic yiem seix zaangc zoux kuv sic, dongh Tin-Hungh jaa-ndaangc liuc leiz ziangx oix mbuo zoux nyei kuv sic." 
Ephesians2:11 Meih mbuo oix zuqc jangx jienv meih mbuo zinh ndaangc hnangv haaix nor. Meih mbuo cuotv seix daaih m'daaih Janx, dongh Yiutai Mienh heuc “Maiv jiex gaatv nyei leiz nyei mienh.” Yiutai Mienh heuc ganh zoux “Jiex gaatv nyei leiz nyei mienh.” (Naaiv gorngv zuqc mienh hnangv haaix nor zoux bun ganh nyei sin.)" 
Ephesians2:12 Oix zuqc jangx jienv, wuov zanc meih mbuo maiv caux Giduc jiu tong, maiv duqv zoux I^saa^laa^en baeqc fingx. Tin-Hungh liepc ngaengc waac daaih laengz bun nyei, maiv maaih meih mbuo nyei buonc. Meih mbuo yiem naaiv baamh gen maiv lamh hnamv dorngx yaac maiv maaih Tin-Hungh." 
Ephesians2:13 Zinh ndaangc meih mbuo leih Tin-Hungh go mv baac ih zanc meih mbuo kaux Giduc Yesu nyei nziaamv duqv nitv fatv Tin-Hungh. 
Ephesians2:14 Weic zuqc Giduc ganh bun i bung horpc hnyouv daaih, bun Yiutai Mienh caux Janx benx yietc fingx. Ninh longc ninh ganh nyei sin mietc nzengc nqenx jienv bun ninh mbuo i bung maaih win nyei laatc." 
Ephesians2:15 Ninh longc ninh ganh nyei sin guangc Yiutai Mienh nyei leiz-latc, dongh ninh mbuo nyei lingc caux leiz, weic bun i bung kaux ninh gapv jienv benx yietc dauh siang-mienh mi'aqv. Hnangv naaic bun i bung horpc hnyouv daaih." 
Ephesians2:16 Yesu yiem ziepc nzaangc jaax daic weic mietc nzengc ninh mbuo i bung nyei win, bun i bung caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv ziouc benx yietc fingx." 
Ephesians2:17 Giduc daaih zunh baengh orn nyei kuv fienx mbuox meih mbuo, dongh leih Tin-Hungh go nyei Janx, yaac zunh mbuox yiem nitv Tin-Hungh fatv nyei Yiutai Mienh." 
Ephesians2:18 Weic zuqc Giduc bun mbuo yietc zungv, Yiutai Mienh caux Janx, duqv juangc nduqc dauh Singx Lingh mingh duqv taux Zaangc Diex nyei nza'hmien." 
Ephesians2:19 Hnangv naaic, meih mbuo Janx ih zanc maiv zeiz zoux ganh fingx fai ganh norm deic-bung daaih nyei kaeqv. Meih mbuo ih zanc caux Tin-Hungh nyei mienh benx yietc fingx mi'aqv, yaac zoux Tin-Hungh nyei hmuangv doic." 
Ephesians2:20 Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo bangc zuangx gong-zoh caux Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx douc waac mienh liepc daaih nyei gorn-ndoqv ceix jiez daaih. Giduc Yesu ganh zoux biauv-gorqv gauh longc jienv jiex wuov kuaaiv la'bieiv. 
Ephesians2:21 Giduc bun wuov norm biauv nyei nyungc-nyungc bangc ninh daaux jienv, yaac ceix jiez daaih benx Ziouv nyei singx dinc." 
Ephesians2:22 Meih mbuo kaux ninh ziouc duqv caux yietc zungv kaux ninh nyei mienh ceix jiez benx norm Tin-Hungh nyei Singx Lingh yiem nyei dorngx. 
Ephesians3:1 Weic naaiv yie, Baulo, weic Giduc Yesu yaac weic meih mbuo Janx zuqc wuonx jienv loh." 
Ephesians3:2 Yie hnamv daaih meih mbuo zungv haiz gorngv Tin-Hungh ceix en bun yie maaih naaiv nyungc gong zoux weic tengx meih mbuo Janx. 
Ephesians3:3 Tin-Hungh laauc yaangh ninh maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh nyei za'eix bun yie hiuv, hnangv zinh ndaangc yie fiev cou nyei mbuox meih mbuo wuov nor." 
Ephesians3:4 Meih mbuo doqc liuz wuov deix waac meih mbuo ziouc hiuv duqv yie hnangv haaix nor bieqc hnyouv gorngv taux Giduc naaiv deix mbiaangx yaangh nyei sic. 
Ephesians3:5 Zinh ndaangc Tin-Hungh maiv bun mienh hiuv naaiv deix sic mv baac ih zanc ninh longc Singx Lingh laauc yaangh bun ninh nyei cing-nzengc gong-zoh caux douc waac mienh hiuv. 
Ephesians3:6 Se hnangv naaiv. Kuv fienx bun Janx maaih buonc juangc Tin-Hungh laengz bun Yiutai Mienh siouc nyei jaa-dingh, duqv juangc norm sin yaac duqv zipv buonc ei Tin-Hungh longc Giduc Yesu laengz daaih nyei waac." 
Ephesians3:7 Yie duqv zoux naaiv kuv fienx nyei bou se weic Tin-Hungh nyei en-zingh hnangv, dongh ninh longc ninh nyei domh qaqv ceix bun yie nyei en." 
Ephesians3:8 Beiv Tin-Hungh nyei yietc zungv mienh, gauh faix jiex wuov dauh, yie corc gauh faix ninh. Mv baac Tin-Hungh ceix en bun yie haih zunh kuv fienx gorngv Giduc ndongc haaix longx, zungv gorngv maiv zaaic nyei en, mbuox maanc fingx Janx." 
Ephesians3:9 Yie yaac gorngv mengh bun zuangx mienh hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh zinh ndaangc maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh nyei za'eix hnangv haaix nor zoux ziangx. Zinh ndaangc yiem zeix lungh zeix ndau daaih, dongh zeix maanc muotc nyei Tin-Hungh, muangh jienv naaiv deix sic." 
Ephesians3:10 Mv baac ih zanc Tin-Hungh oix longc jiu-baang bun yiem ndaamv-lungh maaih lingc maaih qaqv nyei wuov deix hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh nyei nyungc-nyungc cong-mengh. 
Ephesians3:11 Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv nor zoux se ei ninh yietc liuz nyei za'eix, dongh ninh longc mbuo nyei Ziouv Giduc Yesu zoux ziangx nyei za'eix." 
Ephesians3:12 Mbuo sienx Giduc, duqv caux ninh juangc maengc ziangh ziouc bungx laangc nyei haih mingh taux Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien, maiv zuqc gamh nziex." 
Ephesians3:13 Hnangv naaic, yie tov meih mbuo maiv dungx hnyouv namx, laaix yie weic meih mbuo siouc kouv. Naaiv yietc zungv se weic tengx meih mbuo duqv longx hnangv." 
Ephesians3:14 Weic naaiv yie gueic njiec Zaangc Diex nyei nza'hmien," 
Ephesians3:15 yiem tin-dorngh caux yiem baamh gen maiv gunv haaix fingx haaix nyungc mienh, gorngv die wuov joux waac se yiem Zaangc Diex wuov joux cuotv daaih." 
Ephesians3:16 Yie tov Zaangc Diex ei ninh hlo haic nyei domh njang-laangc longc ninh nyei Singx Lingh ceix qaqv bun meih mbuo nyei hnyouv gu'nyuoz henv jiez daaih. 
Ephesians3:17 Yaac tov Giduc, weic zuqc meih mbuo sienx ninh, yiem meih mbuo nyei hnyouv gu'nyuoz. Tov bun meih mbuo hnamv ninh yaac hnamv mienh hnangv njiec nzungh ziangh duqv wuonv nor." 
Ephesians3:18 Hnangv naaic, meih mbuo ziouc maaih qaqv caux yietc zungv sienx nyei mienh haih mengh baeqc Giduc hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv ndongc haaix jangv, ndongc haaix ndaauv, ndongc haaix hlang, ndongc haaix ndo." 
Ephesians3:19 Yie tov Zaangc Diex bun meih mbuo mengh baeqc Giduc hnamv meih mbuo ndongc haaix camv, maiv gunv maiv maaih haaix dauh haih hiuv duqv nzengc. Hnangv naaic, maaih dunh yunh nyei Tin-Hungh nyei fiem-fingx yiem buangv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv aqv." 
Ephesians3:20 Tin-Hungh, ei ninh longc ninh nyei domh qaqv yiem mbuo nyei hnyouv gu'nyuoz zoux gong, zungv haih zoux gauh camv mbuo haih tov nyei fai hnamv duqv taux nyei." 
Ephesians3:21 Yie ziouc tov ninh longc Giduc Yesu yiem jiu-baang bun mienh yietc liuz ceng ninh taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Aamen. 
Ephesians4:1 Yie, Baulo, weic Ziouv Yesu zuqc wuonx jienv loh. Yie kuinx meih mbuo, yiem seix zaangc oix zuqc yiem puix Tin-Hungh heuc meih mbuo daaih wuov zanc, oix meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor yiem." 
Ephesians4:2 Oix zuqc yiem maanc sic nyiemc ganh zoux faix, longc suonc hnyouv, longc noic, zoux hnyouv ndaauv laanh hnamv laanh." 
Ephesians4:3 Oix zuqc longc hnyouv laanh caux laanh baengh orn nyei yiem weic beu jienv Singx Lingh ceix bun horpc fim dongh eix nyei hnyouv. 
Ephesians4:4 Maaih nduqc norm sin yaac maaih nduqc dauh Singx Lingh, hnangv Tin-Hungh heuc meih mbuo daaih maaih nduqc nyungc maaih lamh hnamv." 
Ephesians4:5 Maaih nduqc dauh Ziouv, nduqc nyungc doz sienx, maaih nduqc nyungc wuom nyei leiz jiex." 
Ephesians4:6 Yaac maaih nduqc dauh Tin-Hungh, dongh maanc mienh nyei Zaangc Diex. Ninh zoux maanc mienh nyei Ziouv, longc maanc mienh zoux ei ninh nyei za'eix, yaac yiem maanc mienh gu'nyuoz." 
Ephesians4:7 Mbuo gorqv-mienh duqv nyei en se ziux Giduc ganh bun nqoi zingh nyeic gorqv-mienh. 
Ephesians4:8 Hnangv Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv, “Ninh faaux hlang jiex nyei dorngx wuov zanc, ninh dorh zuqc caangv nyei mienh camv gan jienv mingh, yaac fungx zingh nyeic bun baamh mienh.”" 
Ephesians4:9 “Ninh faaux hlang” wuov joux waac nyei eix leiz hnangv haaix nor? Eix leiz se ninh njiec taux baamh gen gauh aiv nyei dorngx ndaangc. 
Ephesians4:10 Njiec daaih wuov dauh se dongh faaux gu'nguaaic zungv gauh hlang jiex zuangx lungh weic yiem buangv maanc muotc wuov dauh. 
Ephesians4:11 Dongh naaiv dauh fungx zingh nyeic bun maanc mienh. Maaih deix duqv zingh nyeic zoux gong-zoh. Maaih deix duqv zoux douc waac mienh, maaih deix duqv zoux zunh kuv fienx nyei mienh, maaih deix duqv zoux goux jiu-baang nyei mienh, maaih deix duqv zoux fin-saeng." 
Ephesians4:12 Ninh hnangv naaiv nor zoux weic liuc leiz ziangx Tin-Hungh nyei mienh zoux Giduc nyei gong weic ceix jiez Giduc nyei sin. 
Ephesians4:13 Zuov taux mbuo yietc zungv dongh diuc hnyouv sienx longx, hiuv Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn, mbuo ziouc ei lingh wuonh nyei jauv benx domh mienh, yaac dunh yunh hnangv nzengc Giduc." 
Ephesians4:14 Taux wuov zanc mbuo ziouc maiv zeiz fu'jueiv aqv. Maiv zuqc guv guaix nyei mienh njaaux naaiv njaaux wuov nduov mbuo hnangv zuqc nziaaux buonc mingh buonc daaih, mietv mingh mietv daaih nor. Ninh mbuo longc mbienv-mbeux fai longc guv guaix nyei sic nduov mienh gan jaav doz-leiz." 
Ephesians4:15 Daaux nzuonx, mbuo oix zuqc longc hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv gorngv zien hnangv. Mbuo ziouc ei diuc-diuc jauv hlo daaih benx domh mienh hnangv Giduc, dongh zoux m'nqorngv wuov dauh." 
Ephesians4:16 Giduc gunv jienv sin zaangc nyei nyungc-nyungc, bun sin daaux duqv horpc, yietc hlamx yietc hlamx bangc nyatv daaux jienv ziouc gapv jienv benx yietc norm sin. Sin zaangc nyei nyungc-nyungc zoux horpc ninh ganh nyei gong wuov zanc, laanh ziouc hnamv laanh, sin yaac manc-manc hlo, ceix ganh jiez daaih." 
Ephesians4:17 Weic naaiv yie dengv Ziouv Yesu nyei mbuox kuinx meih mbuo, yangh naaiv jiex maiv dungx yiem hnangv maiv sienx nyei mienh yiem wuov nor. Ninh mbuo hnamv nyei sic maiv lamh longc." 
Ephesians4:18 Ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv hmuangx, maiv mengh baeqc Tin-Hungh ceix bun nyei maengc yaac maiv maaih ninh mbuo nyei buonc weic zuqc ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv ngaengc haic ziouc hngongx mi'aqv." 
Ephesians4:19 Ninh mbuo hmien-beih hoz, maiv hiuv duqv nyaiv, sueih binc ei ganh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux nyungc-nyungc maiv cing-nzengc nyei sic." 
Ephesians4:20 Mv baac meih mbuo zuotc Giduc nyei nyungc se maiv zeiz hnangv naaic. 
Ephesians4:21 Meih mbuo ndongc haaix zungv haiz gorngv jiex ninh nyei jauv-louc yaac gan ninh ziouc hoqc jiex ninh njaaux nyei zien leiz. 
Ephesians4:22 Oix zuqc guangc nqoi ganh nyei loz-maengc, dongh bun meih mbuo yiem hnangv zinh ndaangc meih mbuo yiem wuov nyungc loz-maengc. Meih mbuo nyei loz-maengc zuqc nduov ei ganh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux, manc-manc ziouc waaic nzengc mi'aqv." 
Ephesians4:23 Oix zuqc bun Tin-Hungh goiv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv, yienc meih mbuo nyei eix, benx siang nyei daaih." 
Ephesians4:24 Yaac oix zuqc duqv siang-maengc. Naaiv nyungc maengc Tin-Hungh zeix daaih zuangv ninh ganh, meih mbuo ziouc zien-zien nyei zoux duqv horpc yaac cing-nzengc nyei." 
Ephesians4:25 Hnangv naaic, meih mbuo oix zuqc guangc, maiv dungx gorngv-baeqc nduov mienh. Laanh caux laanh kungx oix zuqc gorngv zien waac hnangv, weic zuqc mbuo dauh dauh benx Giduc nyei sin nyei yietc nyungc." 
Ephesians4:26 Se gorngv “Meih mbuo qiex jiez, maiv dungx qiex jiez daaih baamz zuiz.” Yaac maiv dungx ziangh hnoi qiex jiez taux mba'hnoi ndortv." 
Ephesians4:27 Yaac maiv dungx bun mienv nyei hungh maaih qangx bieqc. 
Ephesians4:28 Zinh ndaangc zoux zaqc nimc ga'naaiv wuov deix oix zuqc guangc, maiv dungx aengx nimc. Daaux nzuonx oix zuqc longc ganh nyei buoz zoux maaih lamh longc nyei gong yungz ganh nyei maengc yaac nzie mienh jomc mienh." 
Ephesians4:29 Maiv dungx bun meih nyei nzuih gorngv cuotv maiv benx nyei waac. Oix zuqc gorngv haih tengx mienh nyei waac hnangv, dongh haih ceix mienh puix ninh mbuo qiemx zuqc weic bun muangx nyei mienh duqv longx." 
Ephesians4:30 Yaac maiv dungx bun Tin-Hungh nyei Singx Lingh nzauh. Tin-Hungh bun Singx Lingh meih mbuo, hnangv nqaapv jienv yienx nor, zuov Tin-Hungh oix zuoqc meih mbuo nzuonx nyei hnoi-nyieqc taux." 
Ephesians4:31 Oix zuqc guangc im nyei hnyouv, maiv dungx nouz mienh, maiv dungx qiex jiez, maiv dungx nauc-nauc nyei nzaeng jaax, maiv dungx gorngv doqc mienh. Yaac oix zuqc guangc nzengc nyungc-nyungc nzorng mienh nyei sic." 
Ephesians4:32 Daaux nzuonx, laanh oix zuqc zoux longx bun laanh, laanh korv-lienh laanh, yaac oix zuqc guangc laanh zoux dorngc laanh nyei sic hnangv Tin-Hungh longc Giduc guangc meih mbuo nyei zuiz wuov nor." 
Ephesians5:1 Weic zuqc meih mbuo zoux Tin-Hungh hnamv haic nyei naamh nyouz oix zuqc zuotc ninh nyei nyungc zoux. 
Ephesians5:2 Meih mbuo zoux nyungc-nyungc sic oix zuqc hnamv mienh hnangv Giduc hnamv mbuo, weic mbuo siev maengc, hnangv zorqv ndaang nyei ga'naaiv fongc horc ziec bun Tin-Hungh nor." 
Ephesians5:3 Meih mbuo zoux Tin-Hungh nyei mienh ziouc yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx maiv dungx zoux, liemh maiv dungx gorngv taux buangh liouh nyei sic, fai maiv cing-nzengc nyei sic, fai mauv ga'naaiv nyei sic." 
Ephesians5:4 Meih mbuo yaac maiv horpc zuqc kuanv tien gorngv waac-zaanc, fai waac-cou fai haaix nyungc pa'li pa'laaix nyei waac. Horpc zuqc gorngv waac laengz zingh Tin-Hungh gauh longx." 
Ephesians5:5 Meih mbuo oix zuqc hiuv dingc, haaix dauh zoux buangh liouh nyei sic, fai zoux maiv cing-nzengc nyei sic, fai mauv ga'naaiv, (weic zuqc mauv ga'naaiv se dorngx baaix miuc-fangx), wuov dauh zungv maiv maaih buonc yiem Giduc caux Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv." 
Ephesians5:6 Maiv dungx bun haaix dauh longc kungx-waac nduov meih mbuo. Se laaix naaiv nyungc sic Tin-Hungh nouz haic, maiv muangx ninh nyei waac wuov deix mienh." 
Ephesians5:7 Weic naaiv, maiv dungx caux naaiv nyungc mienh zoux doic." 
Ephesians5:8 Zinh ndaangc meih mbuo yiem hmuangx mv baac ih zanc meih mbuo sienx Ziouv meih mbuo ziouc yiem njang gu'nyuoz. Hnangv naaic, meih mbuo oix zuqc zoux puix yiem njang nyei mienh," 
Ephesians5:9 weic zuqc yiem njang cuotv nyei se nyungc-nyungc longx nyei, horpc nyei, caux zien nyei sic hnangv." 
Ephesians5:10 Meih mbuo oix zuqc samx mangc gaax haih zoux haaix nyungc weic bun Ziouv a'hneiv. 
Ephesians5:11 Maiv dungx caux yiem hmuangx nyei mienh zoux ninh mbuo maiv lamh longc nyei sic. Daaux nzuonx oix zuqc bun naaiv deix sic cuotv yaangh daaih," 
Ephesians5:12 weic zuqc liemh gorngv taux ninh mbuo bingx jienv zoux nyei sic zungv nyaiv haic aqv. 
Ephesians5:13 Njang ziux jienv haaix nyungc, wuov nyungc ziouc buatc duqv zien," 
Ephesians5:14 weic zuqc njang ziux haaix nyungc, wuov nyungc ziouc njang aqv. Weic naaiv maaih joux waac gorngv, “M'njormh nyei mienh aah! Nyie daaih maah! Daic mingh nyei mienh nangh daaih maah! Giduc ziouc ziux jienv njang meih.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Hnangv naaic, meih mbuo yiem seix zaangc oix zuqc faix fim meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor yiem. Maiv dungx hnangv mienh hngongx mienh, oix zuqc hnangv cong-mengh nyei mienh wuov nor." 
Ephesians5:16 Oix zuqc longc duqv horpc ziangh hoc, weic zuqc ih zanc nyei nyutc zeiv se orqv haic." 
Ephesians5:17 Maiv dungx zoux mienh hngongx mienh. Oix zuqc mengh baeqc Ziouv nyei za'eix hnangv haaix nor. 
Ephesians5:18 Maiv dungx hopv diuv nquin. Diuv se bun mienh zoux waaic sic. Daaux nzuonx oix zuqc bun Singx Lingh yiem buangv hnyouv. 
Ephesians5:19 Oix zuqc longc singx nzung, ceng Tin-Hungh nyei nzung, caux Singx Lingh bun mienh benx cuotv nyei nzung, laanh caux laanh gorngv. Yaac oix zuqc longc hnyouv baaux nzung ceng Ziouv." 
Ephesians5:20 Yaac oix zuqc dengv mbuo Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei mbuox zanc-zanc weic maanc sic laengz zingh Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh. 
Ephesians5:21 Meih mbuo oix zuqc laanh mbuoqc laanh weic zuqc meih mbuo lomh nzoih taaih Giduc. 
Ephesians5:22 Meih mbuo zoux auv nyei mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix zuqc mbuoqc ganh nyei nqox hnangv meih mbuo mbuoqc Ziouv Yesu wuov nor. 
Ephesians5:23 Weic zuqc nqox zoux auv nyei m'nqorngv hnangv Giduc zoux jiu-baang nyei m'nqorngv wuov nor. Jiu-baang zoux Giduc nyei sin, Giduc yaac zoux jiu-baang nyei Njoux Ziouv." 
Ephesians5:24 Jiu-baang hnangv haaix nor mbuoqc Giduc, auv yaac oix zuqc hnangv wuov nor yiem maanc sic mbuoqc ninh nyei nqox." 
Ephesians5:25 Zoux nqox nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc hnamv ganh nyei auv hnangv Giduc hnamv jiu-baang, yaac weic jiu-baang siev ninh nyei maengc" 
Ephesians5:26 weic bun jiu-baang cing-nzengc daaih. Ninh longc wuom yaac longc ninh nyei doz nzaaux jiu-baang 
Ephesians5:27 weic zorqv jiu-baang fungx bun ninh ganh, benx njang-laangc nyei jiu-baang, maiv laih hlopv, maiv nyauc, maiv waaic fangx, mv baac cing-nzengc nyei, maiv lamh daanh dorngx nyei jiu-baang." 
Ephesians5:28 Fih hnangv nyei, nqox oix zuqc hnamv ganh nyei auv hnangv hnamv ganh nyei sin nor. Haaix dauh hnamv ganh nyei auv ziouc hnamv ninh ganh aqv." 
Ephesians5:29 Maiv maaih haaix dauh nzorng ganh nyei sin, zungv uix longx yaac goux jienv hnangv Giduc goux jiu-baang wuov nor." 
Ephesians5:30 Weic zuqc mbuo dauh dauh zoux Giduc nyei sin nyei yietc nyungc. 
Ephesians5:31 Hnangv Ging-Sou fiev jienv gorngv naaiv joux waac, “Weic naaiv m'jangc dorn dorng jaa, leih ninh nyei diex maac, caux jienv ninh nyei auv benx yietc dauh mi'aqv.”" 
Ephesians5:32 Yiem naaiv deix waac gu'nyuoz maaih diuh hlo haic nyei zien leiz ih zanc mbiaangx yaangh cuotv daaih aqv. Ei yie ganh mengh baeqc nor, naaiv deix waac gorngv zuqc Giduc caux jiu-baang." 
Ephesians5:33 Mv baac naaiv deix waac yaac gorngv zuqc meih mbuo. Meih mbuo dauh dauh zoux nqox nyei mienh oix zuqc hnamv ganh nyei auv hnangv hnamv ganh nor. Auv yaac oix zuqc taaih ganh nyei nqox. 
Ephesians6:1 Fu'jueiv aac, weic zuqc meih mbuo sienx Ziouv Yesu, meih mbuo oix zuqc muangx diex maac nyei waac. Hnangv naaiv zoux se horpc nyei." 
Ephesians6:2 “Oix zuqc tongx nimc meih mbuo nyei diex maac.” Naaiv se da'yietv diuh lingc maaih laengz nyei waac caux jienv. 
Ephesians6:3 Hnangv naaiv, “Weic bun meih mbuo duqv longx yaac ziangh duqv siouc nyuonh ndaauv yiem baamh gen.”" 
Ephesians6:4 Zoux die nyei mienh aah! Maiv dungx cuoqv meih mbuo nyei fu'jueiv qiex jiez. Oix zuqc ei Ziouv nyei leiz dorh longx fu'jueiv, njaaux ninh mbuo muangx waac." 
Ephesians6:5 Zoux nouh nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc gamh nziex, sin zinx jienv muangx meih mbuo naaiv baamh gen nyei ziouv. Yaac oix zuqc longc ziepc zuoqv nyei hnyouv muangx hnangv muangx Giduc nor." 
Ephesians6:6 Maiv dungx kungx dorng ziouv yiem nyei ziangh hoc zoux longx weic bun ninh mbuo a'hneiv hnangv. Oix zuqc hnangv Giduc nyei nouh nor, longc hnyouv ei Tin-Hungh nyei za'eix zoux." 
Ephesians6:7 Zoux gong oix zuqc njang hmien njang mueic nyei zoux, hnangv tengx Ziouv zoux nor, maiv zeiz tengx baamh mienh." 
Ephesians6:8 Weic zuqc meih mbuo hiuv duqv, maiv gunv zoux nouh fai zoux bungx nqoi nyei mienh, haaix dauh zoux haaix nyungc longx nyei sic, Ziouv Yesu ziouc winh zingh nyeic bun ninh." 
Ephesians6:9 Zoux ziouv nyei mienh aah! Meih mbuo yaac oix zuqc fih hnangv nyei zoux bun meih mbuo nyei nouh. Maiv dungx gorngv haeqv ninh mbuo weic zuqc meih mbuo hiuv duqv meih mbuo caux ninh mbuo juangc dauh yiem tin-dorngh nyei Ziouv. Ninh yaac maiv mangc haaix dauh nyei hmien. 
Ephesians6:10 Setv mueiz yie kuinx meih mbuo, meih mbuo oix zuqc kaux Ziouv Yesu yaac longc ninh nyei domh qaqv benx mienh henv mienh." 
Ephesians6:11 Oix zuqc zorqv Tin-Hungh bun nyei yietc zungv mborqv jaax nyei wuoqc ginc zorng jienv. Meih mbuo ziouc haih souv duqv wuonv, ngaengc jienv mienv nyei hungh guv guaix nyei za'eix." 
Ephesians6:12 Weic zuqc mbuo maiv caux baamh mienh mborqv jaax. Se caux yiem ndaamv-lungh zoux hlo nyei, maaih lingc maaih qaqv gunv naaiv hmuangx haic nyei baamh gen wuov deix, caux yietc zungv waaic haic nyei mienv mborqv jaax." 
Ephesians6:13 Weic naaiv oix zuqc zorqv Tin-Hungh bun daaih mborqv jaax nyei yietc zungv wuoqc ginc zorng jienv. Taux wuov norm orqv haic nyei hnoi meih mbuo ziouc haih caux wuov deix win-wangv doix-dekc. Zoux liuz nyungc-nyungc meih mbuo corc haih yiem duqv wuonv nyei. 
Ephesians6:14 Hnangv naaic, souv wuonv maah! Longc zien leiz zoux houx-hlaang sai jienv jaaiv. Longc zoux horpc nyei jauv zoux hlieqv-jaapv buang jienv la'kuotv." 
Ephesians6:15 Yaac oix zuqc zanc-zanc liuc leiz ziangx zunh baengh orn nyei kuv fienx weic zoux heh daapc. 
Ephesians6:16 Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv. Oix zuqc longc sienx fim zoux torngv-baaih nanv jienv ziouc haih mietc hiuang orqv wuov dauh maaih douz nyei forng-cang. 
Ephesians6:17 Oix zuqc longc njoux en zoux hlieqv-muoc ndongx jienv. Yaac nanv jienv Singx Lingh nyei nzuqc ndaauv, se dongh Tin-Hungh nyei waac." 
Ephesians6:18 Oix zuqc kaux Singx Lingh zanc-zanc weic nyungc-nyungc jauv daux gaux tov Tin-Hungh. Weic naaiv oix zuqc ging jienv hnyouv daux gaux, maiv dungx guangc. Oix zuqc maiv dingh liouh nyei weic Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx mienh daux gaux." 
Ephesians6:19 Yaac weic yie daux gaux tov Tin-Hungh tengx yie taux gorngv nyei ziangh hoc haih maaih waac gorngv ziouc bungx laangc nyei zunh yaangh kuv fienx maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh nyei jauv. 
Ephesians6:20 Yie weic naaiv kuv fienx zoux douc fienx mienh yaac zuqc hlieqv-limc ndoh jienv. Tov meih mbuo tengx yie tov Tin-Hungh bun yie bungx laangc nyei zunh kuv fienx ziux yie horpc zuqc zunh nor. 
Ephesians6:21 Ziouv nyei ziepc zuoqv bou, mbuo hnamv nyei gorx-youz, Ti^ki^gatc, oix mbuox nyungc-nyungc meih mbuo, meih mbuo ziouc haih hiuv duqv yie hnangv haaix nor, yaac hiuv duqv yie zoux haaix nyungc." 
Ephesians6:22 Weic naaiv yie paaiv ninh mingh meih mbuo naaic, ninh ziouc haih bun meih mbuo hiuv duqv yie mbuo yiem naaiv hnangv haaix nor. Ninh yaac haih orn meih mbuo nyei hnyouv." 
Ephesians6:23 Tov Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh caux Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix baengh orn, bun zuangx gorx-youz maaih hnyouv hnamv mienh yaac maaih sienx fim." 
Ephesians6:24 Tov Tin-Hungh ceix en bun yietc zungv maaih hnyouv hnamv Ziouv Yesu Giduc taux daauh taux mueiz nyei mienh. 
Philippians1:1 Yie, Baulo, caux Ti^mo^tai zoux Giduc Yesu nyei bou. Yie mbuo fiev fienx bun Fi^lipv^poi Zingh sienx Giduc Yesu nyei yietc zungv mienh caux jiu-baang nyei mienh gox caux borng-buoz mienh." 
Philippians1:2 Tov mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh caux Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en ceix baengh orn bun meih mbuo. 
Philippians1:3 Yie haaix zanc jangx taux meih mbuo, yie weic meih mbuo laengz zingh yie nyei Tin-Hungh." 
Philippians1:4 Yie haaix zanc tengx meih mbuo zuangx mienh daux gaux, yie a'hneiv nyei tov Tin-Hungh tengx." 
Philippians1:5 Weic zuqc yie jangx zuqc yiem daauh hnoi taux ih zanc meih mbuo caux yie juangc jienv kuv fienx nyei gong zoux. 
Philippians1:6 Yie sienx dingc Tin-Hungh yiem meih mbuo nyei hnyouv jiez gorn zoux kuv gong, yaac oix zoux jienv mingh taux Giduc Yesu aengx daaih nyei hnoi ziouc zoux ziangx nzengc aqv." 
Philippians1:7 Yie yiem hnyouv haaix zanc yaac jangx zuqc meih mbuo zuangx mienh yaac hnamv meih mbuo. Yie hnangv naaiv nor haiz se horpc nyei, weic zuqc maiv gunv yie zuqc wuonx jienv naaiv loh, fai duqv cuotv mingh nzaeng hingh kuv fienx maiv bun ndortv, yaac bun mienh hiuv duqv kuv fienx se zien nyei, meih mbuo lomh nzoih duqv caux yie juangc Tin-Hungh nyei en." 
Philippians1:8 Tin-Hungh tengx yie zoux zorng-zengx gorngv yie za'gengh! hnamv meih mbuo zuangx mienh hnangv Giduc Yesu hnamv meih mbuo nor. 
Philippians1:9 Yie daux gaux tov Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv jaa camv jienv faaux, yaac bun meih mbuo maaih cong-mengh yaac haih samx duqv cuotv nyungc-nyungc." 
Philippians1:10 Hnangv naaiv, meih mbuo ziouc haih ginv zoux gauh horpc jiex cingx daaih taux Giduc aengx daaih wuov hnoi meih mbuo ziouc cing-nzengc, maiv maaih dorngx nqemh." 
Philippians1:11 Meih mbuo yiem seix zaangc kaux Yesu Giduc zoux nyungc-nyungc kuv sic weic bun mienh taaih Tin-Hungh, ceng Tin-Hungh." 
Philippians1:12 Zuangx gorx-youz aac, yie oix meih mbuo hiuv duqv yie buangh zuqc naaiv deix sic zungv bun kuv fienx hiaangx jangv jienv mingh." 
Philippians1:13 Weic zuqc yie yiem naaiv loh, yietc zungv zuov hungh dinc nyei baeng caux yiem naaiv nyei zuangx mienh hiuv duqv se weic Giduc yie cingx zuqc wuonx jienv." 
Philippians1:14 Yie zuqc wuonx jienv loh mv baac naaiv deix sic tengx duqv gorx-youz mbuo camv sienx Ziouv Yesu gauh wuonv ziouc bungx laangc nyei zunh Tin-Hungh nyei doz yaac maiv gamh nziex. 
Philippians1:15 Za'gengh maaih deix zunh Giduc nyei doz laaix ninh mbuo mueic jieqv oix nzaeng jaax. Mv baac maaih deix longc hnyouv zunh. 
Philippians1:16 Naaiv se weic ninh mbuo hnamv yie yaac hiuv duqv laaix yie nzaeng kuv fienx maiv bun ndortv yie cingx daaih zuqc wuonx jienv naaiv loh. 
Philippians1:17 Mueic jieqv nzaeng jaax wuov deix maiv longc hnyouv zunh Giduc nyei kuv fienx, kungx oix douh ganh duqv longx hnangv. Ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor zoux se ninh mbuo hnamv daaih oix bun yie yiem naaiv loh aengx zuqc gauh kouv." 
Philippians1:18 Mv baac maiv benx haaix nyungc. Maiv gunv ninh mbuo longc hnyouv zunh fai la'guaih zunh, da'faanh zunh Giduc nyei kuv fienx duqv aqv. Yie ziouc a'hneiv haic." 
Philippians1:19 Yie yietc zei oix jaa a'hneiv weic zuqc hiuv duqv meih mbuo tengx yie daux gaux, Yesu Giduc nyei Singx Lingh yaac tengx yie, yie ziouc oix duqv cuotv loh." 
Philippians1:20 Yie za'gengh! maaih lamh hnamv yie maiv maaih haaix nyungc bun yie zuqc nyaiv. Yie ih zanc yaac oix hnangv zinh ndaangc wuov nor, bungx laangc nyei gorngv. Hnangv naaic, maiv gunv yie ziangh fai daic, yie oix yie zoux nyei caux gorngv nyei yietc zungv bun mienh taaih Giduc." 
Philippians1:21 Yie ziangh jienv se ziangh weic Giduc. Daic mingh corc duqv gauh longx. 
Philippians1:22 Mv baac se gorngv yie ziangh jienv haih zoux duqv maaih lamh longc nyei gong gauh camv nor, yie yaac maiv hiuv duqv oix zuqc ginv haaix diuc gauh longx." 
Philippians1:23 Naaiv i diuc baeng jienv yie. Yie haiz oix mingh caux Giduc yiem. Gauh longx naaiv maiv maaih aqv. 
Philippians1:24 Mv baac yie ziangh jienv se weic meih mbuo gauh longc jienv jiex. 
Philippians1:25 Weic naaiv yie hiuv dingc yie corc oix zuqc yiem seix zaangc. Yie ziouc oix ziangh jienv weic tengx meih mbuo zuangx mienh gauh gan duqv longx meih mbuo sienx nyei jauv yaac gauh njien-youh. 
Philippians1:26 Wuov nyungc yie aengx nzuonx meih mbuo naaic, weic zuqc meih mbuo caux Giduc Yesu juangc maengc ziangh meih mbuo ziouc gauh a'hneiv yie." 
Philippians1:27 Gauh longc jienv jiex, meih mbuo yiem seix zaangc oix zuqc zoux nyungc-nyungc puix duqv Giduc nyei kuv fienx. Hnangv naaiv, maiv gunv yie duqv mingh meih mbuo naaic fai maiv duqv mingh, yie duqv haiz mienh gorngv meih mbuo sienx wuonv nyei, horpc fim dongh eix, dongh diuc hnyouv nzaeng jienv mbuo sienx nyei kuv fienx, maiv bun ndortv." 
Philippians1:28 Maiv dungx gamh nziex caux meih mbuo doix-dekc wuov deix. Meih mbuo maiv gamh nziex se zoux jangx-hoc bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv ninh mbuo oix zuqc mietc mv baac meih mbuo oix duqv njoux. Se Tin-Hungh oix njoux meih mbuo. 
Philippians1:29 Tin-Hungh ceix en bun meih mbuo fu-sux Giduc. Se maiv daan sienx ninh hnangv, yaac oix zuqc weic ninh siouc kouv." 
Philippians1:30 Ih zanc meih mbuo oix zuqc hnangv yie nor nzaeng kuv fienx, maiv bun ndortv. Meih mbuo zinh ndaangc buatc yie nzaeng jiex nyei, meih mbuo ih zanc haiz mienh gorngv yie corc nzaeng jienv yiem nyei." 
Philippians2:1 Se gorngv meih mbuo caux Giduc juangc maengc ziangh ziouc gauh jorm hnyouv, se gorngv hiuv duqv Giduc hnamv meih mbuo ziouc orn meih mbuo nyei hnyouv, se gorngv meih mbuo caux Singx Lingh maaih jiu tong, se gorngv meih mbuo laanh zoux longx bun laanh, laanh korv-lienh laanh nor," 
Philippians2:2 tov bun yie njien-youh taux daauh. Meih mbuo oix zuqc dongh diuc hnyouv, laanh hnamv laanh, yaac oix zuqc horpc fim dongh eix." 
Philippians2:3 Maiv dungx zoux haaix nyungc weic douh ganh duqv longx fai ceng ganh hlo. Oix zuqc laanh caux laanh nyiemc zoux faix, funx mienh gauh longx ganh." 
Philippians2:4 Maiv dungx kungx hnamv ganh nyei nza'hmien, oix zuqc maaih hnyouv jangx taux ga'nyiec nyei mienh." 
Philippians2:5 Meih mbuo oix zuqc maaih hnyouv hnangv Giduc Yesu nyei hnyouv. 
Philippians2:6 Giduc m'daaih maaih Tin-Hungh nyei fiem-fingx. Ninh caux Tin-Hungh fih hnangv nyei mv baac ninh maiv nzaeng zoux fih hnangv. 
Philippians2:7 Daaux nzuonx ninh maaih nyei nyungc-nyungc siev jienv guangc nzengc, zipv nouh nyei fiem-fingx, cuotv seix benx dauh baamh mienh." 
Philippians2:8 Za'gengh maaih mienh nyei fangx zeiv. Ninh ganh yaac laengz zoux faix, muangx Tin-Hungh nyei waac taux daic, taux zuqc yiem ziepc nzaangc jaax daic." 
Philippians2:9 Weic naaiv Tin-Hungh taaih ninh zoux gauh hlo jiex, yaac bun ninh maaih mbuox gauh hlang jiex maanc mbuox nyei mbuox." 
Philippians2:10 Hnangv naaiv, weic taaih Yesu nyei mbuox, yiem tin-dorngh, yiem yaangh gen, caux yiem yiemh gen nyei yietc zungv oix zuqc gueic njiec baaix." 
Philippians2:11 Dauh dauh oix nyiemc Yesu Giduc zoux Ziouv, ziouc taaih Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh." 
Philippians2:12 Hnamv nyei gorx-youz aac, weic naaiv, hnangv zinh ndaangc yie caux meih mbuo yiem, meih mbuo zanc-zanc muangx yie nyei waac. Ih zanc yie maiv caux meih mbuo yiem aqv, mv baac meih mbuo gauh oix zuqc muangx longx. Oix zuqc gamh nziex, sin zinx jienv longc qaqv zoux ziangx meih mbuo duqv njoux nyei gong," 
Philippians2:13 weic zuqc Tin-Hungh zanc-zanc yiem meih mbuo nyei hnyouv zoux gong, bun meih mbuo maaih hnyouv yaac maaih banh zeic ei jienv ninh longx nyei za'eix zoux." 
Philippians2:14 Zoux haaix nyungc maiv dungx ngopv yaac maiv dungx daux nzuih," 
Philippians2:15 meih mbuo ziouc zoux Tin-Hungh nyei cing-nzengc, maiv lamh guaix dorngx nyei naamh nyouz. Meih mbuo oix zuqc yiem baamh gen, hnyouv waaic, baamz zuiz mienh nyei dorngx mbu'ndongx ziux njang hnangv hleix yiem wuov lungh ziux jienv njang nor," 
Philippians2:16 zunh ziangh maengc nyei doz bun ninh mbuo. Meih mbuo hnangv naaiv nor zoux, taux Yesu Giduc aengx daaih wuov hnoi yie ziouc a'hneiv haic weic zuqc hiuv duqv yie cuotv qaqv zoux nyei gong maiv ndortv buonv aqv." 
Philippians2:17 Meih mbuo nyei sienx fim se hnangv ziec bun Tin-Hungh nyei ga'naaiv nor. Se gorngv yie zuqc daix dox nziaamv cuotv meih mbuo nyei sienx fim gu'nguaaic hnangv ciev ziec nyei ga'naaiv nor, yie ziouc orn-lorqc yaac caux meih mbuo zuangx mienh orn-lorqc." 
Philippians2:18 Fih hnangv nyei, meih mbuo oix zuqc orn-lorqc, yaac caux yie orn-lorqc." 
Philippians2:19 Se gorngv ei Ziouv Yesu nyei za'eix nor, yie oix siepv-siepv nyei paaiv Ti^mo^tai mingh taux meih mbuo naaic weic zuqc yie oix hiuv duqv meih mbuo nyei fienx, yie ziouc hnyouv longx aqv." 
Philippians2:20 Yie maiv maaih haaix dauh hnangv Ti^mo^tai nor, caux yie dongh hnyouv ziepc zuoqv nyei oix tengx meih mbuo." 
Philippians2:21 Dauh dauh kungx gunv ganh nyei nza'hmien hnangv, maiv hnamv taux Yesu Giduc oix ninh mbuo tengx zoux haaix nyungc." 
Philippians2:22 Ti^mo^tai nyei hnyouv meih mbuo hiuv nyei. Ninh caux yie zunh kuv fienx hnangv i dorn-diex juangc gong zoux nor. 
Philippians2:23 Yie yietv hiuv duqv yie ganh nyei jauv aengx maaih haaix nyungc sic cuotv, yie ziouc paaiv ninh mingh meih mbuo wuov." 
Philippians2:24 Yie yaac kaux Ziouv hnamv daaih maiv lauh yie ganh yaac duqv mingh meih mbuo naaic. 
Philippians2:25 Yie hnamv daaih oix zuqc paaiv dauh mbuo nyei gorx-youz E^baa^fo^ndi^tatv nzuonx meih mbuo naaic. Ninh caux yie juangc gong zoux, juangc nzaeng kuv fienx, maiv bun ndortv. Meih mbuo yaac paaiv ninh daaih liuc leiz yie qiemx longc nyei." 
Philippians2:26 Ninh za'gengh! jangx haic meih mbuo. Hnyouv yaac nzauh haic weic zuqc meih mbuo haiz gorngv ninh butv baengc. 
Philippians2:27 Ninh gengh butv kouv nyei, kaav deix daic mi'aqv. Mv baac Tin-Hungh korv-lienh ninh. Maiv daan korv-lienh ninh hnangv, yaac korv-lienh yie, maiv bun yie jaa nzauh." 
Philippians2:28 Weic naaiv yie gauh oix heuc ninh nzuonx. Meih mbuo aengx duqv buatc ninh ziouc hnyouv longx aqv. Yie ganh nyei you-nzauh yaac tuix deix mi'aqv. 
Philippians2:29 Ninh zoux dauh sienx Yesu nyei gorx-youz, meih mbuo ziouc oix zuqc njien-njien youh youh nyei zipv ninh. Yaac oix zuqc taaih naaiv nyungc mienh," 
Philippians2:30 weic zuqc ninh weic zoux Giduc nyei gong kaav deix daic mi'aqv. Meih mbuo maiv haih tengx yie zoux nyei, ninh maiv longc maengc nyei nzipc jienv tengx." 
Philippians3:1 Yie nyei gorx-youz aac, setv mueiz yie corc maaih deix waac gorngv. Meih mbuo caux Ziouv Yesu juangc maengc ziangh ziouc oix zuqc orn-lorqc aqv. Zinh ndaangc yie fiev jiex nyei waac yie aengx fiev nzunc se maiv la'nyauv yie, mv baac se weic beu jienv meih mbuo." 
Philippians3:2 Meih mbuo oix zuqc mbungh jienv wuov deix juv, dongh zoux orqv wuov deix mienh. Ninh mbuo kungx gaatv waaic sin hnangv." 
Philippians3:3 Jiex zien gaatv nyei leiz se dongh mbuo weic zuqc mbuo kaux Singx Lingh zaangc Tin-Hungh. Mbuo caux Giduc Yesu juangc maengc ziangh ziouc njien-youh haic. Mbuo yaac maiv kaux ganh haih zoux nyei haaix nyungc. 
Philippians3:4 Maiv gunv yie haih kaux ganh zoux nyei, yie yaac maiv kaux. Haaix dauh hnamv daaih haih kaux ganh zoux nyei, yie gauh haih kaux." 
Philippians3:5 Yie cuotv seix daaih buangv hietc hnoi ziouc jiex gaatv nyei leiz. Yie cuotv seix benx I^saa^laa^en Mienh, Mben^yaa^min Fingx, maaih Hipv^lu Mienh nyei nziaamv-fei hnangv. Ei gan Yiutai Mienh nyei leiz-latc yie se dongh Faa^li^si wuov jauv mienh." 
Philippians3:6 Yie yaac jorm hnyouv haic, zungv zoux doqc hoic jiu-baang. Gorngv taux ei jienv leiz zoux, yie zoux horpc nzengc, maiv maaih dorngx daanh." 
Philippians3:7 Mv baac zinh ndaangc yie funx zic zinh nyei, ih zanc yie weic Giduc funx maiv zic zinh aqv." 
Philippians3:8 Maiv daan naaiv. Yie funx nyungc-nyungc se maiv zic zinh weic duqv yietc nyungc gauh jaaix jiex. Jaaix jiex wuov nyungc se yie haih hiuv duqv yie nyei Ziouv Giduc Yesu. Yie guangc nyungc-nyungc funx benx ga'naaiv-guangc weic duqv Giduc," 
Philippians3:9 yaac weic duqv caux ninh juangc maengc ziangh. Yie gan Yiutai Mienh nyei leiz-latc zoux mv baac maiv duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv. Yie duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv se weic yie sienx Giduc. Se dongh Tin-Hungh ganh bun yie horpc ninh nyei hnyouv weic zuqc yie sienx Giduc. 
Philippians3:10 Yie kungx oix hiuv duqv Giduc, yaac hiuv duqv bun ninh nangh daaih nyei domh qaqv, yaac maaih buonc caux ninh siouc kouv, yaac hnangv ninh nor daic," 
Philippians3:11 weic zuqc yie maaih lamh hnamv se yie daic mingh mv baac Tin-Hungh zungv oix bun yie nangh daaih. 
Philippians3:12 Yie maiv zeiz gorngv yie duqv liuz naaiv deix yietc zungv. Yaac maiv zeiz gorngv yie dunh yunh nzengc. Yie njiec qaqv tiux jienv mingh weic oix zorqv duqv zingh nyeic. Se weic naaiv Giduc Yesu zungv zorqv yie ndaangc, benx ninh nyei mi'aqv." 
Philippians3:13 Gorx-youz aac, yie maiv zeiz funx yie zorqv duqv mi'aqv. Yie kungx zoux nduqc nyungc hnangv. Jiex daaih nyei sic yie la'kuqv nzengc mi'aqv, longc qaqv hungx jienv wuov ndaangc mingh," 
Philippians3:14 baeng zaqc tiux taux zorqv duqv zingh nyeic nyei dorngx, se dongh Tin-Hungh heuc yie kaux Giduc Yesu mingh yiem gu'nguaaic duqv nyei zingh nyeic." 
Philippians3:15 Mbuo haaix dauh ei lingh wuonh nyei jauv benx domh mienh oix zuqc maaih naaiv nyungc hnyouv. Se gorngv maaih deix ganh nyungc hnamv, Tin-Hungh ziouc bun meih mbuo hiuv duqv se ganh nyungc mi'aqv." 
Philippians3:16 Mv baac mbuo yangh Yesu nyei jauv taux haaix, oix zuqc ei jienv wuov yangh." 
Philippians3:17 Yie nyei gorx-youz aac, meih mbuo oix zuqc lomh nzoih zuotc yie nyei nyungc zoux. Yaac oix zuqc longx-longx mangc gan yie mbuo nyei nyungc zoux wuov deix mienh." 
Philippians3:18 Weic zuqc yie mbuox ziex nzunc meih mbuo, ih zanc wuom-mueic liouc jienv aengx mbuox nzunc, maaih mienh camv nyei laaix ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic se zoux Giduc nyei ziepc nzaangc jaax nyei win-wangv." 
Philippians3:19 Mv baac setv mueiz ninh mbuo zungv zuqc mietc weic zuqc ninh mbuo nyei zienh se ninh mbuo ganh nyei ga'sie. Horpc zuqc nyaiv nyei sic daaux nzuonx ninh mbuo dorh daaih zoux mengh dauh. Ninh mbuo kungx hnamv taux baamh gen nyei jauv hnangv. 
Philippians3:20 Mv baac mbuo zoux tin-dorngh nyei baeqc fingx yaac zuov jienv mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv yiem wuov tin-dorngh daaih, se Ziouv Yesu Giduc." 
Philippians3:21 Ninh oix longc ninh nyei domh qaqv, dongh ninh longc bun maanc muotc yiem ninh nyei buoz-ndiev nyei domh qaqv, zorqv mbuo mau haic, haih daic nyei sin goiv yienc ziouc hnangv ninh njang-laangc nyei sin nor." 
Philippians4:1 Yie nyei gorx-youz aac, yie za'gengh hnamv haic, jangx haic meih mbuo. Meih mbuo bun yie a'hneiv, bun yie orn-lorqc haic. Cien hnamv nyei gorx-youz aac, hnangv naaic meih mbuo oix zuqc kaux wuonv Ziouv." 
Philippians4:2 Yie tov! Yu^o^ndie caux Sinx^ti^ke, meih mbuo i dauh oix zuqc kaux Ziouv horpc fim dongh eix." 
Philippians4:3 Ziepc zuoqv juangc gong zoux nyei doic aah! Yie yaac tov meih tengx naaiv deix i dauh m'sieqv dorn, weic zuqc ninh mbuo caux yie qaqv zoux kuv fienx nyei gong, aengx maaih Kenmen caux zengc njiec nyei juangc gong zoux nyei mienh, dongh maaih mbuox faaux jienv ziangh maengc daan." 
Philippians4:4 Meih mbuo oix zuqc kaux Ziouv Yesu zanc-zanc maaih orn-lorqc. Yie aengx gorngv nzunc, oix zuqc orn-lorqc maah!" 
Philippians4:5 Oix zuqc bun mienh zieqv duqv meih mbuo zoux hnyouv suonc nyei mienh. Ziouv yiem fatv aqv. 
Philippians4:6 Maiv dungx weic haaix nyungc guaax hnyouv. Oix zuqc weic nyungc-nyungc sic daux gaux jouh Tin-Hungh, laengz zingh Tin-Hungh, ei meih mbuo qiemx longc nyei tov ninh tengx." 
Philippians4:7 Tin-Hungh nyei baengh orn, dongh baamh mienh zungv hnamv maiv zaaic nyei baengh orn, ziouc beu jienv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv caux hnamv nyei jauv, weic zuqc meih mbuo caux Giduc Yesu juangc maengc ziangh." 
Philippians4:8 Yie nyei gorx-youz aac, yie aengx gorngv deix setv mueiz waac. Haaix nyungc zien nyei, horpc zuqc taaih nyei, baengh fim nyei, cing-nzengc nyei, horpc zuqc hnamv nyei, mengh dauh longx nyei, naaiv deix longx haic, horpc zuqc ceng nyei yietc zungv oix zuqc zanx jienv hnyouv." 
Philippians4:9 Yie njaaux meih mbuo hoqc liuz yaac bun meih mbuo duqv zipv nyei, dongh meih mbuo haiz yie gorngv, yaac buatc yie zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc, meih mbuo oix zuqc ei jienv zoux. Hnangv naaic, ceix baengh orn nyei Tin-Hungh ziouc caux meih mbuo yiem aqv." 
Philippians4:10 Ziouv bun yie za'gengh orn-lorqc haic weic zuqc nqaeqv lauh deix mv baac ih zanc meih mbuo aengx jangx taux yie. Yie maiv zeiz gorngv meih mbuo maiv jangx, se meih mbuo maiv maaih qangx bun yie hiuv hnangv." 
Philippians4:11 Yie yaac maiv zeiz hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic zuqc yie qiemx zuqc haaix nyungc. Yie hoqc liuz ziouc hiuv duqv maiv gunv maaih camv fai zoqc yie buangv hnyouv aqv. 
Philippians4:12 Yie hiuv duqv buangh dangx-douh nyei ziangh hoc, yaac hiuv duqv buangh maaih mbienc nyei ziangh hoc. Yie hoqc liuz ziouc hiuv duqv haaix zanc, yiem haaix ndau, duqv nyanc beuv fai hnyouv sie jienv yiem, maaih zengc fai maiv gaux longc, yie buangv hnyouv aqv." 
Philippians4:13 Giduc bun yie maaih qaqv, nyungc-nyungc yie ziouc zoux duqv aqv." 
Philippians4:14 Mv baac yie maaih kuonx naanh nyei ziangh hoc meih mbuo tengx yie, naaiv se longx haic aqv." 
Philippians4:15 Meih mbuo Fi^lipv^poi Mienh hiuv duqv yie jiez gorn zunh kuv fienx, cuotv Maa^si^ndo^nie wuov zanc maiv maaih ganh norm jiu-baang fungx yie longc bieqc longc cuotv nyei nyaanh, kungx meih mbuo ganh nyei hnangv." 
Philippians4:16 Yie yiem Te^saa^lo^ni^gaa wuov zanc yie qiemx zuqc nyei meih mbuo juix daaih maiv zeiv yietc nzunc. 
Philippians4:17 Yie yaac maiv zeiz kungx oix zipv meih mbuo nyei zingh nyeic. Yie oix meih mbuo nyei zaeqv-daan duqv leic zinh camv jienv faaux. 
Philippians4:18 Meih mbuo fungx daaih nyei ga'naaiv yie duqv zipv nzoih mi'aqv, zungv gauh camv. E^baa^fo^ndi^tatv dorh meih mbuo juix nyei zingh nyeic taux, yie qiemx longc nyei ziouc gaux nzengc aqv. Meih mbuo nyei ga'naaiv se hnangv ziec nyei ga'naaiv nor, Tin-Hungh haiz ndaang nyei ziouc a'hneiv zipv." 
Philippians4:19 Yie nyei Tin-Hungh maaih nzoih nyungc-nyungc. Meih mbuo qiemx zuqc nyei yietc zungv, ziux ninh maaih nyei ninh ziouc longc Giduc Yesu ceix bun meih mbuo." 
Philippians4:20 Mbuo oix zuqc yietc liuz ceng mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Aamen. 
Philippians4:21 Tov mbuox sienx Giduc Yesu nyei zuangx mienh yie jangx taux ninh mbuo. Caux yie yiem naaiv nyei zuangx gorx-youz yaac jangx taux ninh mbuo. 
Philippians4:22 Yietc zuangx sienx Giduc nyei mienh, lengc jeiv Lomaa Hungh nyei biauv zong wuov deix, yaac jangx taux meih mbuo." 
Philippians4:23 Tov Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en bun meih mbuo. 
Colossians1:1 Yie, Baulo, ei Tin-Hungh nyei eix, zoux Giduc Yesu nyei gong-zoh. Yie caux mbuo nyei gorx-youz, Ti^mo^tai," 
Colossians1:2 fiev fienx bun meih mbuo yiem Ko^lo^si Zingh, Tin-Hungh nyei mienh, dongh ziepc zuoqv nyei sienx Giduc nyei gorx-youz. Tov mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh ceix en ceix baengh orn bun meih mbuo." 
Colossians1:3 Yie mbuo haaix zanc tengx meih mbuo daux gaux, yie mbuo zanc-zanc laengz zingh mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei Die, Tin-Hungh," 
Colossians1:4 weic zuqc yie mbuo haiz gorngv meih mbuo sienx longx Giduc Yesu yaac hnamv Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx mienh. 
Colossians1:5 Kuv fienx nyei zien doz taux meih mbuo naaic wuov zanc, meih mbuo haiz gorngv kuv fienx maaih lamh hnamv weic meih mbuo siou jienv wuov tin-dorngh. Weic naaiv meih mbuo cingx daaih sienx longx yaac hnamv mienh." 
Colossians1:6 Naaiv kuv fienx maaih mienh camv nyei sienx yaac hiaangx jienv mingh buangv lungh ndiev, hnangv yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx, meih mbuo haiz liuz kuv fienx wuov hnoi yaac mengh baeqc Tin-Hungh nyei en za'gengh hnangv haaix nor." 
Colossians1:7 Meih mbuo hiuv Tin-Hungh nyei en se meih mbuo yiem E^baa^faa hoqc daaih. E^baa^faa se yie mbuo hnamv haic juangc zoux bou nyei mienh, ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux Giduc nyei gong weic tengx yie mbuo." 
Colossians1:8 Ninh yaac mbuox yie mbuo, Singx Lingh bun meih mbuo za'gengh hnamv mienh." 
Colossians1:9 Weic naaiv, yiem yie mbuo haiz liuz meih mbuo nyei jauv-louc wuov hnoi, yie mbuo maiv dingh liouh nyei weic meih mbuo daux gaux, tov Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo maaih yiem Singx Lingh daaih nyei cong-mengh caux hnyouv-zoih haih hiuv nzengc Tin-Hungh nyei za'eix." 
Colossians1:10 Meih mbuo yiem seix zaangc ziouc zoux puix Ziouv, yaac zanc-zanc zoux horpc ninh nyei hnyouv, haih zoux duqv nyungc-nyungc kuv sic, yaac yietc zei hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh." 
Colossians1:11 Tov Tin-Hungh longc ninh njang-laangc nyei qaqv bun meih mbuo yiem nyungc-nyungc sic maaih qaqv henv jiez daaih, meih mbuo ziouc maaih noic diev duqv maanc sic, yaac njien-youh nyei" 
Colossians1:12 laengz zingh Zaangc Diex weic zuqc ninh bun meih mbuo puix duqv caux ninh nyei mienh maaih buonc yiem ninh njang haic nyei guoqv. 
Colossians1:13 Tin-Hungh njoux mbuo leih ndutv hmuangx nyei qaqv, suiv bieqc ninh Dorn-hnamv nyei guoqv." 
Colossians1:14 Ninh nyei Dorn zuoqc mbuo nzuonx daaih, se ninh guangc mbuo nyei zuiz." 
Colossians1:15 Yesu se dongh mangc maiv buatc nyei Tin-Hungh nyei fangx zeiv. Ninh zoux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn-hlo yaac gauh hlo jiex zeix daaih nyei maanc muotc. 
Colossians1:16 Tin-Hungh longc ninh zeix yiem lungh yiem ndau nyei maanc muotc daaih, maiv gunv mangc duqv buatc nyei fai mangc maiv buatc nyei, yiem ndaamv-lungh zueiz weic nyei, zoux ziouv nyei, maaih lingc maaih qaqv nyei. Tin-Hungh longc ninh nyei Dorn zeix maanc muotc daaih yaac zeix daaih weic ninh." 
Colossians1:17 Yesu yiem ndaangc maanc muotc. Yietc zungv yaac bangc ninh maaih yietc nyeic. 
Colossians1:18 Ninh zoux sin nyei m'nqorngv, se dongh jiu-baang nyei m'nqorngv, yaac zoux gorn bun sin ziangh jienv. Ninh dongh daic mingh aengx nangh daaih nyei daauh dauh, weic bun ninh yiem maanc muotc zoux da'yietv." 
Colossians1:19 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh ganh dingc bun ninh nyei Dorn maaih Tin-Hungh ganh nyei fiem-fingx dunh yunh nzengc," 
Colossians1:20 yaac longc ninh bun maanc muotc caux ninh horpc hnyouv, maiv gunv yiem lungh yiem ndau nyei. Ninh longc ninh nyei Dorn yiem ziepc nzaangc jaax liouc cuotv nyei nziaamv bun maanc muotc caux ninh horpc daaih maaih baengh orn." 
Colossians1:21 Zinh ndaangc meih mbuo zoux nyei caux hnamv nyei waaic sic bun meih mbuo leih Tin-Hungh go, caux ninh zoux win-wangv mi'aqv." 
Colossians1:22 Mv baac ih zanc Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo caux ninh horpc hnyouv se weic Giduc nyei orv sin zuqc daic, weic dorh meih mbuo mingh yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien cing-nzengc nyei, maiv maaih uix, maiv maaih dorngx daanh." 
Colossians1:23 Mv baac meih mbuo oix zuqc gan longx meih mbuo sienx nyei doz, liepc gorn-ndoqv wuonv, yaac maiv dungx bungx guangc dongh bun meih mbuo maaih lamh hnamv nyei kuv fienx. Naaiv se meih mbuo haiz nyei kuv fienx. Naaiv kuv fienx zungv zunh buangv lungh ndiev bun maanc mienh muangx. Yie, Baulo, yaac zoux kuv fienx nyei bou." 
Colossians1:24 Ih zanc yie orn-lorqc haic weic zuqc yie duqv weic meih mbuo siouc kouv. Giduc weic ninh nyei sin, dongh jiu-baang, siouc kouv. Yie nyei sin siouc kouv se weic tengx Giduc siouc nyei kouv dunh yunh nzengc." 
Colossians1:25 Tin-Hungh paaiv yie zoux jiu-baang nyei bou, bun yie maaih naaiv nyungc gong zoux weic tengx meih mbuo. Yie zoux nyei gong se oix zuqc zunh Tin-Hungh nyei doz nzoih nzengc." 
Colossians1:26 Naaiv doz se zinh ndaangc maanc gouv maanc doic Tin-Hungh maiv gaengh bun mbiaangx yaangh mv baac ih zanc mbiaangx yaangh cuotv daaih bun ninh nyei mienh hiuv. 
Colossians1:27 Tin-Hungh nyei za'eix se oix bun ninh nyei mienh hiuv duqv naaiv maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh nyei sic ndongc haaix jaaix, ndongc haaix njang-laangc, yaac oix biux mengh bun fingx-fingx Janx hiuv. Naaiv maiv gaengh mbiaangx yaangh nyei sic dongh naaiv aqv. Giduc yiem meih mbuo gu'nyuoz, se bun meih mbuo maaih lamh hnamv oix duqv buonc Tin-Hungh nyei njang-laangc." 
Colossians1:28 Yie mbuo ziouc zunh Giduc nyei jauv bun zuangx mienh muangx. Yie mbuo longc nyungc-nyungc cong-mengh kuinx mienh, njaaux mienh weic bun dauh dauh caux Giduc juangc maengc ziangh, ziouc dorh ninh mbuo taux Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien dunh yunh nzengc." 
Colossians1:29 Weic naaiv yie zoux gong kouv, longc nzengc Giduc bun nyei qaqv, dongh zanc-zanc yiem yie nyei hnyouv zoux gong nyei qaqv." 
Colossians2:1 Yie oix meih mbuo hiuv duqv yie weic meih mbuo caux Lau^ndi^sie Mienh caux yietc zungv maiv buatc jiex yie nyei hmien nyei mienh zoux gong ndongc haaix kouv. 
Colossians2:2 Yie hnangv naaiv nor zoux weic tengx ninh mbuo zungx qaqv, horpc fim dongh eix nyei laanh hnamv laanh, ziouc bun ninh mbuo haih sienx dingc, za'gengh bieqc hnyouv nzengc, hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh bun mbiaangx yaangh cuotv daaih nyei sic, se Giduc ganh." 
Colossians2:3 Tin-Hungh jaaix nyei cong-mengh caux hnyouv-zoih yaac gem jienv yiem Giduc gu'nyuoz. 
Colossians2:4 Yie hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic maiv bun nzuih mbiaangc nyei mienh gorngv kuh muangx nyei waac nduov meih mbuo. 
Colossians2:5 Weic zuqc maiv gunv yie nyei sin maiv caux meih mbuo yiem, yie nyei hnyouv caux meih mbuo yiem nyei. Buatc meih mbuo yiem duqv sung-saangv nyei yaac sienx wuonv Giduc, yie ziouc a'hneiv nyei." 
Colossians2:6 Weic naaiv, meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor zipv liuz Giduc Yesu zoux Ziouv, ziouc oix zuqc hnangv wuov nor caux ninh juangc maengc ziangh jienv." 
Colossians2:7 Oix zuqc yiem ninh gu'nyuoz hnangv njiec nzungh nor, ceix jiez daaih sienx duqv wuonv, hnangv mienh njaaux jiex meih mbuo nor. Yaac oix zuqc zanc-zanc laengz zingh Tin-Hungh." 
Colossians2:8 Oix zuqc faix fim, maiv dungx bun haaix dauh longc baamh mienh nyei cong-mengh hnamv cuotv daaih nyei leiz fai kungx-waac wakc meih mbuo. Se nduov meih mbuo gan baamh mienh nyei eih douh caux yiem gunv ndaamv-lungh nyei mienv daaih nyei leiz, maiv zeiz yiem Giduc daaih." 
Colossians2:9 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh nyei fiem-fingx yiem Giduc nyei sin nzoih nzengc," 
Colossians2:10 meih mbuo caux Giduc juangc maengc ziangh ziouc nyungc-nyungc maaih nzoih. Giduc yaac gunv yietc zungv yiem ndaamv-lungh maaih lingc maaih qaqv gunv sic wuov deix. 
Colossians2:11 Meih mbuo caux Giduc juangc maengc ziangh ziouc jiex liuz gaatv nyei leiz aqv. Maiv zeiz mienh nyei buoz gaatv, se Giduc ganh tengx meih mbuo gaatv weic bun meih mbuo jaiv ndutv meih mbuo baamz zuiz nyei sin." 
Colossians2:12 Meih mbuo jiex wuom nyei leiz wuov zanc, meih mbuo se caux Giduc juangc biopv, aengx caux ninh nangh daaih, weic zuqc meih mbuo sienx kaux Tin-Hungh nyei qaqv, dongh Yesu daic mingh mv baac bun ninh nangh daaih wuov dauh nyei qaqv." 
Colossians2:13 Zinh ndaangc laaix meih mbuo baamz zuiz, yaac laaix meih mbuo maiv jiex gaatv nyei leiz guangc baamz zuiz nyei fiem-fingx, meih mbuo se dorngx daic mi'aqv. Mv baac ih zanc Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo caux Giduc nangh daaih yaac guangc mbuo nyei yietc zungv zuiz." 
Colossians2:14 Ninh betv guangc dingc mbuo nyei zuiz nyei zaeqv-daan, dongh fiev jienv caux mbuo doix-dekc nyei leiz-latc. Ninh zorqv mingh ding jienv ziepc nzaangc jaax mi'aqv." 
Colossians2:15 Yiem ziepc nzaangc jaax Giduc hingh jiex yiem ndaamv-lungh maaih lingc maaih qaqv gunv sic wuov deix, aengx dorng zuangx dorh ninh mbuo mingh hnangv zuqc caangv nyei mienh nor, bun cing Giduc hingh mi'aqv." 
Colossians2:16 Weic naaiv maiv dungx bun haaix dauh weic meih mbuo nyanc nyei hopv nyei, fai jiex zipv nyei leiz, fai bieqc Siang-Hlaax nyei leiz, fai Dingh Gong Hnoi nyei leiz, daanh meih mbuo." 
Colossians2:17 Naaiv deix sic kungx zoux dongh linh biux mengh nqa'haav oix daaih nyei sic hnangv. Mv baac zien nyei se Giduc. 
Colossians2:18 Maaih deix mienh zoux eix leiz hnangv nyiemc ganh zoux faix, baaix fin-mienh. Kungx nzamc ninh mbuo buatc hinc yaangh nyei sic hnangv, yaac ei baamh mienh nyei eix ceng ganh hlo. Maiv dungx bun naaiv nyungc mienh nduov meih mbuo, bun meih mbuo nyei zingh nyeic ndortv." 
Colossians2:19 Wuov nyungc mienh yaac maiv kaux Giduc zoux m'nqorngv. M'nqorngv zoux gorn yungz sin bun sin daaux duqv horpc, nyatv daaux nyatv, jaan daaux jaan, ziangh sin ziouc ei Tin-Hungh nyei za'eix hlo daaih." 
Colossians2:20 Meih mbuo caux Giduc daic, leih ndutv gunv ndaamv-lungh nyei mienv mi'aqv. Wuov nyungc, meih mbuo weic haaix diuc corc hnangv guei baamh gen nyei mienh yiem? Meih mbuo weic haaix diuc gan baamh mienh liepc daaih nyei leiz?" 
Colossians2:21 Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Maiv dungx muoqv, maiv dungx ndiemv mueix, maiv dungx hluo.”" 
Colossians2:22 Mv baac naaiv deix yietc zungv ga'naaiv se longc liuz ziouc baac mi'aqv. Naaiv deix leiz kungx benx baamh mienh liepc daaih nyei leiz caux njaaux nyei waac hnangv. 
Colossians2:23 Mienh buatc hnangv maaih cong-mengh weic zuqc bun mienh ei gan hnamv cuotv nyei za'eix baaix, yaac zoux hnangv nyiemc ganh zoux faix, yaac zoux hoic ganh nyei sin. Mv baac naaiv deix leiz yietc zungv maiv lamh longc. Maiv tengx mienh gunv duqv sin zaangc hanc oix zoux nyei." 
Colossians3:1 Meih mbuo zungv duqv caux Giduc nangh daaih, meih mbuo ziouc oix zuqc lorz yiem gu'nguaaic nyei sic, dongh Giduc zueiz jienv ninh nyei Die nyei mbiaauc maengx bung wuov norm dorngx." 
Colossians3:2 Meih mbuo oix zuqc zunv hnyouv hnamv gu'nguaaic nyei sic, maiv zeiz yiem naaiv baamh gen nyei sic." 
Colossians3:3 Weic zuqc meih mbuo se dorngx daic mi'aqv. Meih mbuo nyei ziangh maengc caux Giduc bingx jienv yiem Tin-Hungh gu'nyuoz. 
Colossians3:4 Giduc dongh mbuo nyei zien ziangh maengc. Ninh hinc cuotv nyei ziangh hoc, mbuo yaac oix caux jienv ninh hinc cuotv yaac juangc ninh nyei njang-laangc." 
Colossians3:5 Weic naaiv oix zuqc mietc nzengc meih mbuo nyei sin zaangc hanc oix zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc waaic sic. Oix zuqc guangc buangh liouh nyei sic, maiv cing-nzengc nyei, hnyouv hanc sieqv hanc dorn nyei, hnyouv oix zoux nyei orqv sic, caux mauv ga'naaiv nyei, (mauv ga'naaiv se hnangv baaix miuc-fangx nor)." 
Colossians3:6 Laaix naaiv deix sic Tin-Hungh oix bun maiv muangx ninh nyei waac wuov deix zuqc ninh nouz jienv. 
Colossians3:7 Zinh ndaangc meih mbuo yaac hnangv naaiv nor zoux, dongh meih mbuo bun naaiv nyungc sic gunv meih mbuo wuov zanc." 
Colossians3:8 Mv baac ih zanc meih mbuo oix zuqc guangc naaiv deix yietc zungv sic. Maiv dungx nouz mienh, qiex jiez, nzorng mienh. Maiv dungx gorngv doqc mienh fai longc meih mbuo nyei nzuih gorngv haaix nyungc waac-cou." 
Colossians3:9 Laanh maiv dungx gorngv-baeqc nduov laanh, weic zuqc meih mbuo guangc meih mbuo nyei loz-maengc caux loz-maengc zoux nyei sic," 
Colossians3:10 aengx duqv siang-maengc. Naaiv nyungc siang-maengc, zeix maanc muotc nyei Tin-Hungh zanc-zanc zeix daaih siang nyei, gunv zoux gunv zuangv ninh nyei fangx zeiv, weic bun meih mbuo haih hiuv nzengc ninh ganh." 
Colossians3:11 Hnangv naaic, Janx caux Yiutai Mienh fih hnangv nyei, maiv ganh nyungc, jiex gaatv nyei leiz fai maiv jiex gaatv nyei, maiv gan Janx-Gikc nyei leiz fai yiem lomc nyei mienh, zoux nouh nyei fai maiv zoux nouh nyei, yietc zungv maiv ganh nyungc, mv baac Giduc se yietc zungv, yaac yiem yietc zungv." 
Colossians3:12 Tin-Hungh hnamv meih mbuo yaac ginv meih mbuo daaih benx ninh ganh nyei cing-nzengc mienh. Weic naaiv meih mbuo oix zuqc maaih hnyouv korv-lienh mienh, zoux longx bun mienh, nyiemc ganh zoux faix, suonc zingh suonc eix yaac maaih noic diev." 
Colossians3:13 Oix zuqc zoux hnyouv ndaauv, laanh nyaangc laanh. Se gorngv meih mbuo haaix dauh laanh caux laanh maaih sic, laanh oix zuqc guangc bun laanh. Ziouv Yesu hnangv haaix nor guangc meih mbuo zoux dorngc nyei sic, meih mbuo yaac oix zuqc hnangv wuov nor laanh guangc bun laanh." 
Colossians3:14 Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv, yaac oix zuqc jaa tipv hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv weic zuqc hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv bun naaiv deix yietc zungv sic dunh yunh nzengc." 
Colossians3:15 Oix zuqc longc Giduc bun daaih nyei baengh orn gunv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv. Se weic bun meih mbuo maaih naaiv nyungc baengh orn Tin-Hungh ginv meih mbuo daaih benx yietc norm sin. Yaac oix zuqc laengz zingh Tin-Hungh. 
Colossians3:16 Oix zuqc zaangh Giduc nyei doz buangv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv ziouc longc nyungc-nyungc cong-mengh laanh njaaux laanh, laanh kuinx laanh. Yaac oix zuqc baaux singx nzung, caux ceng Tin-Hungh nyei nzung, caux Singx Lingh bun mienh benx cuotv nyei nzung, longc hnyouv laengz zingh Tin-Hungh." 
Colossians3:17 Maiv gunv meih mbuo zoux haaix nyungc, fai gorngv haaix nyungc, oix zuqc dengv Ziouv Yesu nyei mbuox zoux. Yaac oix zuqc dengv ninh nyei mbuox laengz zingh Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh." 
Colossians3:18 Zoux auv nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc mbuoqc ganh nyei nqox. Hnangv naaiv zoux se puix sienx Ziouv nyei mienh. 
Colossians3:19 Zoux nqox nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc hnamv ganh nyei auv, yaac maiv dungx zoux doqc ninh." 
Colossians3:20 Fu'jueiv aah! Yiem maanc sic oix zuqc muangx diex maac weic zuqc naaiv se zoux horpc Ziouv nyei hnyouv. 
Colossians3:21 Zoux die nyei mienh aah! Maiv dungx cuoqv meih mbuo nyei fu'jueiv. Nzauh heix ninh mbuo hnyouv namx. 
Colossians3:22 Zoux nouh nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc yiem maanc sic muangx meih mbuo baamh gen nyei ziouv. Maiv dungx kungx dorng ziouv yiem nyei ziangh hoc zoux longx weic bun ninh a'hneiv hnangv. Oix zuqc hnyouv zingx nyei zoux weic zuqc meih mbuo taaih Tin-Hungh. 
Colossians3:23 Maiv gunv zoux haaix nyungc, oix zuqc buangv hnyouv zoux hnangv zoux weic Tin-Hungh, maiv zeiz zoux weic mienh." 
Colossians3:24 Meih mbuo hiuv duqv meih mbuo oix nzipc Ziouv weic ninh nyei mienh siou nyei jaa-dingh zoux zingh nyeic, weic zuqc meih mbuo fu-sux wuov dauh Ziouv se Giduc." 
Colossians3:25 Haaix dauh zoux waaic sic ziouc zuqc ei ninh zoux nyei winh bun ninh. Tin-Hungh yaac maiv mangc haaix dauh nyei hmien. 
Colossians4:1 Meih mbuo zoux ziouv nyei mienh aah! Meih mbuo oix zuqc zoux baengh fim yaac zoux hnyouv yuonh bun meih mbuo nyei nouh, weic zuqc meih mbuo hiuv duqv meih mbuo maaih dauh Ziouv yiem wuov tin-dorngh." 
Colossians4:2 Meih mbuo oix zuqc zanc-zanc jienh daux gaux, ging jienv hnyouv yaac laengz zingh Tin-Hungh." 
Colossians4:3 Yaac oix zuqc tengx yie mbuo daux gaux, tov Tin-Hungh bun yie mbuo maaih qangx bun yie mbuo zunh gorngv Giduc mbiaangx yaangh nyei sic. Yie ih zanc laaix zoux naaiv nyungc gong zuqc wuonx jienv loh." 
Colossians4:4 Oix zuqc tov Tin-Hungh tengx yie haih gorngv mengh naaiv deix mbiaangx yaangh nyei sic hnangv yie horpc zuqc gorngv nor. 
Colossians4:5 Oix zuqc longc cong-mengh caux maiv sienx nyei mienh jiu tong. Yaac oix zuqc maiv dungx guangc ziangh hoc. 
Colossians4:6 Meih mbuo oix zuqc gorngv waac kuh muangx yungz mienh, hnangv an nzauv bun ga'naaiv maaih mueix nor, weic bun meih mbuo hiuv duqv hnangv haaix nor dau duqv horpc dauh dauh mienh naaic nyei waac." 
Colossians4:7 Mbuo hnamv haic nyei gorx-youz, Ti^ki^gatc, oix gorngv nzengc yie nyei yietc zungv sic mbuox meih mbuo. Ninh se ziepc zuoqv fu-sux nyei mienh yaac caux yie juangc zoux Ziouv nyei bou." 
Colossians4:8 Se weic naaiv yie paaiv ninh mingh meih mbuo naaic, oix bun ninh mbuox meih mbuo, yie mbuo yiem naaiv hnangv haaix nor yaac bun ninh orn meih mbuo nyei hnyouv." 
Colossians4:9 Aengx maaih dauh hnamv haic, ziepc zuoqv nyei gorx-youz, se meih mbuo ganh nyei mienh, O^ne^si^matv, caux jienv ninh mingh. Ninh mbuo i laanh oix zorqv yie mbuo yiem naaiv nyei sic gorngv nzengc mbuox meih mbuo." 
Colossians4:10 Caux yie zuqc wuonx jienv loh wuov dauh Aa^litv^taa^katv jangx taux meih mbuo. Mbaa^naa^mbatc nyei baeqv-muoz dorn, Maako, yaac jangx taux meih mbuo. Yie yaac mbuox jiex meih mbuo, se gorngv Maako taux meih mbuo naaic, oix zuqc zipv longx ninh oc." 
Colossians4:11 Yesu, aengx maaih norm mbuox heuc Yu^saa^tatv wuov dauh, yaac jangx taux meih mbuo. Kungx maaih naaiv deix buo laanh sienx Yesu nyei Yiutai Mienh caux yie juangc Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv nyei gong zoux. Ninh mbuo yaac orn yie nyei hnyouv camv haic." 
Colossians4:12 E^baa^faa zoux meih mbuo ganh nyei mienh yaac zoux Giduc Yesu nyei bou. Ninh yaac jangx taux meih mbuo. E^baa^faa zanc-zanc weic meih mbuo njiec qaqv daux gaux tov Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo sienx duqv wuonv, ei sienx nyei jauv benx domh mienh, haih gan nzengc Tin-Hungh dunh yunh nyei za'eix." 
Colossians4:13 Yie tengx E^baa^faa zoux zorng-zengx ninh weic meih mbuo yaac weic Lau^ndi^sie caux Hi^e^laa^mbu^li Zingh nyei mienh zoux gong kouv. 
Colossians4:14 Mbuo hnamv haic nyei ndie-sai, Lugaa, caux Ndemaatv yaac jangx taux meih mbuo." 
Colossians4:15 Tov mbuox Lau^ndi^sie Zingh nyei gorx-youz caux Nimfaa aengx caux yiem ninh nyei biauv nyei jiu-baang, yie jangx taux ninh mbuo." 
Colossians4:16 Mienh doqc naaiv zeiv fienx bun meih mbuo muangx liuz, oix zuqc juix mingh bun Lau^ndi^sie Zingh nyei jiu-baang mienh doqc. Meih mbuo yaac oix zuqc doqc Lau^ndi^sie jiu-baang juix daaih nyei fienx." 
Colossians4:17 Yaac oix zuqc mbuox Aan^kipv^batc, “Oix zuqc jienv jienv zoux taux ziangx Ziouv paaiv meih zoux nyei gong.”" 
Colossians4:18 Yie ganh nanv batv fiev naaiv deix waac, “Yie, Baulo, jangx taux meih mbuo. Tov meih mbuo jangx jienv yie zuqc wuonx jienv naaiv loh. “Tov Tin-Hungh ceix en bun meih mbuo.”" 
1Thessalonians1:1 Yie, Baulo, caux Silaa caux Ti^mo^tai fiev fienx bun Te^saa^lo^ni^gaa Zingh nyei jiu-baang, dongh Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh caux Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei mienh. Tov Tin-Hungh ceix en ceix baengh orn bun meih mbuo." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Yie mbuo zanc-zanc weic meih mbuo zuangx mienh laengz zingh Tin-Hungh. Haaix zanc daux gaux yaac tih taux meih mbuo. 
1Thessalonians1:3 Yie mbuo yiem yie mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien zanc-zanc jangx meih mbuo weic sienx Yesu zoux nyei gong. Meih mbuo hnamv ninh ziouc zoux gong kouv, yaac kaux wuonv mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc maaih lamh hnamv." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Tin-Hungh hnamv nyei zuangx gorx-youz aah! Yie mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh ginv meih mbuo," 
1Thessalonians1:5 weic zuqc yie mbuo taux meih mbuo naaic zunh kuv fienx, yie mbuo maiv daan longc waac gorngv hnangv, yaac maaih Singx Lingh nyei qaqv bun meih mbuo hiuv dingc naaiv kuv fienx se za'gengh zien nyei. Meih mbuo ganh hiuv duqv, yie mbuo yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx wuov zanc, yie mbuo hnangv haaix nor yiem. Naaiv se weic bun meih mbuo duqv longx." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Meih mbuo zuotc yie mbuo nyei nyungc yaac zuotc Ziouv nyei nyungc. Maiv gunv meih mbuo zuqc siouc kouv camv, meih mbuo maaih Singx Lingh bun daaih nyei njien-youh zipv naaiv kuv fienx." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Weic naaiv meih mbuo zoux nyungc zeiv bun yiem Maa^si^ndo^nie caux Aa^kaa^yaa Saengv nyei sienx Yesu nyei zuangx mienh zuotc. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Ziouv nyei doz maiv daan yiem meih mbuo naaic zunh cuotv mingh gormx Maa^si^ndo^nie Saengv caux Aa^kaa^yaa Saengv hnangv, norm-norm dorngx nyei mienh yaac haiz gorngv meih mbuo sienx longx Tin-Hungh, yie mbuo ziouc maiv zuqc aengx gorngv haaix nyungc aqv." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Wuov deix zuangx mienh gorngv yie mbuo mingh meih mbuo naaic meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor zipv yie mbuo, yaac gorngv meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor guangc liuz miuc-fangx daaih lorz Tin-Hungh, weic fu-sux ziangh jienv nyei, zien nyei Tin-Hungh." 
1Thessalonians1:10 Ninh mbuo gorngv meih mbuo yaac zuov Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn yiem tin-dorngh njiec daaih, dongh daic mingh, Tin-Hungh bun nangh daaih nyei Yesu. Ninh yaac njoux mbuo leih ndutv, nqa'haav hingv maiv zuqc Tin-Hungh nouz." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Zuangx gorx-youz aac, meih mbuo ganh hiuv duqv, yie mbuo mingh meih mbuo naaic se maiv zeiz mingh maiv lamh longc." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Meih mbuo hiuv duqv zinh ndaangc maiv gaengh mingh wuov zanc, yie mbuo yiem Fi^lipv^poi Zingh zuqc siouc kouv, zuqc mienh zoux doqc, gorngv doqc bun yie mbuo zuqc nyaiv. Mv baac maiv gunv mienh caux yie mbuo doix-dekc ndongc naaic camv, yie mbuo kaux Tin-Hungh bun yie mbuo daamv hlo nyei zunh Tin-Hungh nyei kuv fienx bun meih mbuo." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Yie mbuo kuinx mienh sienx Yesu, yie mbuo maiv zeiz gorngv jaav fai hnamv cuotv maiv cing-nzengc nyei jauv, fai longc guv guaix nyei za'eix nduov mienh." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Daaux nzuonx Tin-Hungh seix liuz yie mbuo, buatc yie mbuo horpc ninh nyei hnyouv, ziouc jiu kuv fienx bun yie mbuo. Yie mbuo ziouc zunh kuv fienx maiv zeiz weic bun mienh a'hneiv. Yie mbuo oix zoux weic bun Tin-Hungh a'hneiv, dongh seix yie mbuo nyei hnyouv wuov dauh." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Meih mbuo yaac hiuv duqv, yie mbuo mingh meih mbuo naaic yie mbuo maiv gorngv waac gaam nduov jiex mienh, yaac maiv maaih ormh hnyouv mauv ga'naaiv. Naaiv Tin-Hungh ganh tengx yie mbuo zoux zorng-zengx." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Yie mbuo maiv lorz mienh ceng yie mbuo. Maiv lorz meih mbuo yaac maiv lorz haaix dauh ceng yie mbuo. 
1Thessalonians2:7 Maiv gunv yie mbuo zoux Giduc nyei gong-zoh ziouc maaih leiz feix luic meih mbuo, yie mbuo yiem meih mbuo naaic nyei ziangh hoc yie mbuo zoux suonc nyei, hnangv maa goux longx ganh nyei fu'jueiv nor." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Yie mbuo hnamv haic meih mbuo ziouc maiv daan zunh Tin-Hungh nyei kuv fienx bun meih mbuo, liemh yie mbuo ganh nyei maengc yaac a'hneiv bun meih mbuo, weic zuqc meih mbuo za'gengh! zoux yie mbuo hnamv haic nyei mienh." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Gorx-youz aac, meih mbuo zungv jangx duqv yie mbuo cuotv qaqv zoux gong kouv. Yie mbuo zunh Tin-Hungh nyei kuv fienx bun meih mbuo wuov zanc, yie mbuo hnoi-hnoi muonz-muonz yaac zoux gong kouv weic maiv oix feix luic meih mbuo haaix dauh." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Meih mbuo tengx yie mbuo zoux zorng-zengx, Tin-Hungh yaac tengx yie mbuo zoux zorng-zengx, se yie mbuo yiem meih mbuo sienx Yesu nyei mienh mbu'ndongx zoux cing-nzengc nyei, horpc nyei, maiv lamh daanh dorngx." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Meih mbuo hiuv duqv yie mbuo daaix meih mbuo hnangv die daaix ninh ganh nyei fu'jueiv nor. 
1Thessalonians2:12 Yie mbuo tengx meih mbuo zungx qaqv, nunz meih mbuo nyei hnyouv, zanc-zanc kuinx meih mbuo yiem seix zaangc oix zuqc yiem puix Tin-Hungh, dongh heuc meih mbuo daaih bieqc ninh nyei guoqv yaac juangc ninh nyei njang-laangc wuov dauh." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Aengx maaih yietc diuc bun yie mbuo zanc-zanc laengz zingh Tin-Hungh. Se weic zuqc yie mbuo zunh Tin-Hungh nyei doz, meih mbuo muangx liuz yaac zipv. Meih mbuo yaac hiuv duqv se maiv zeiz baamh mienh nyei doz, se za'gengh Tin-Hungh nyei doz, dongh yiem meih mbuo sienx Yesu nyei mienh gu'nyuoz zoux gong nyei doz." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Gorx-youz aac, meih mbuo buangh nyei sic se hnangv yiem Yiutai Saengv, Tin-Hungh nyei jiu-baang, dongh sienx Giduc Yesu wuov deix buangh nyei nor, weic zuqc meih mbuo zuqc ganh nyei buonv-fingx mienh zoux doqc hnangv ninh mbuo zuqc Yiutai Mienh zoux doqc wuov nor." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Yiutai Mienh daix Ziouv Yesu, yaac daix douc waac mienh, yaac zunc yie mbuo cuotv mingh. Ninh mbuo zoux maiv horpc Tin-Hungh, yaac caux maanc mienh maaih win." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Ninh mbuo dangv jienv maiv oix bun yie mbuo zunh doz bun Janx weic bun Janx duqv njoux. Hnangv naaic, ninh mbuo zanc-zanc baamz zuiz yaac baamz taux buangv soux mouc. Ih zanc ninh mbuo zungv zuqc Tin-Hungh nouz jienv aqv." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Zuangx gorx-youz aac, yie mbuo zuqc leih nqoi caamx baav meih mbuo wuov zanc, se sin leih hnangv, hnyouv maiv leih. Yie mbuo za'gengh! jangx haic meih mbuo yaac oix buatc haic meih mbuo nyei hmien." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Yie mbuo gengh oix mingh meih mbuo naaic. Yie, Baulo, zungv jiez yietc i nzunc hnyouv oix mingh, mv baac Saadaan dangv jienv yie mbuo." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Ziouv Yesu aengx daaih wuov zanc, haaix nyungc bun yie mbuo maaih lamh hnamv, yaac zoux bun yie mbuo orn-lorqc, yaac bun yie mbuo a'hneiv weic zoux yie mbuo nyei ningv? Se meih mbuo maiv zeiz?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Meih mbuo za'gengh! zoux yie mbuo nyei njang-laangc, yaac zoux yie mbuo nyei orn-lorqc." 
1Thessalonians3:1 Zoux gau, haiz zuov maiv duqv aqv, ziouc dingc yie mbuo ganh yiem Aaten Zingh hnangv," 
1Thessalonians3:2 aengx paaiv yie mbuo nyei youz, Ti^mo^tai, mingh meih mbuo naaic. Ninh zoux Tin-Hungh nyei gong-mienh, zunh Giduc nyei kuv fienx, tengx liepc wuonv meih mbuo nyei sienx fim yaac nunz meih mbuo nyei hnyouv," 
1Thessalonians3:3 weic zuqc maiv oix haaix dauh laaix zuqc mienh zoux doqc haih tuix bouc. Meih mbuo yaac hiuv duqv mbuo zuqc mienh zoux doqc se jaa-ndaangc dingc ziangx mbuo oix zuqc buangh nyei sic. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Yie mbuo corc caux meih mbuo yiem nyei ziangh hoc, yie mbuo jaa-ndaangc mbuox liuz meih mbuo, mbuo zungv oix zuqc buangh mienh zoux doqc. Meih mbuo yaac hiuv duqv sic za'gengh hnangv naaiv nor cuotv daaih zien nyei." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Weic naaiv yie haiz zuov maiv duqv gauh lauh, ziouc paaiv Ti^mo^tai mingh meih mbuo naaic, oix hiuv duqv meih mbuo nyei sienx fim hnangv haaix nor. Nzauh heix nduov mienh wuov dauh nduov zuqc meih mbuo, yie mbuo zoux nyei gong ziouc ndortv nzengc mi'aqv." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Ih zanc Ti^mo^tai mingh meih mbuo naaic nzuonx daaih aqv. Ninh dorh longx haic nyei fienx daaih mbuox yie mbuo meih mbuo corc sienx longx, hnamv Yesu. Ninh yaac gorngv meih mbuo a'hneiv zanc-zanc jangx taux yie mbuo, oix buatc haic yie mbuo, hnangv yie mbuo oix buatc meih mbuo nor." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Gorx-youz aac, yie mbuo buangh zuqc kuonx naanh yaac zuqc siouc kouv, mv baac yie mbuo haiz gorngv meih mbuo sienx longx, yie mbuo ziouc duqv orn hnyouv aqv." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Weic zuqc meih mbuo kaux wuonv Ziouv Yesu, yie mbuo nyei maengc ziouc haiz hnangv fingv jiez daaih nor." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Yie mbuo oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor weic meih mbuo laengz zingh Tin-Hungh? Yie mbuo laengz zingh ninh weic zuqc meih mbuo bun yie mbuo duqv yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien orn-lorqc haic. 
1Thessalonians3:10 Yie mbuo hnoi-hnoi muonz-muonz qaqv tov Tin-Hungh bun yie mbuo aengx duqv buatc meih mbuo nyei hmien. Meih mbuo nyei sienx fim caa zuqc haaix nyungc yie mbuo ziouc haih tipv bun meih mbuo. 
1Thessalonians3:11 Tov mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh yaac tov mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu koi jauv bun yie mbuo haih mingh taux meih mbuo naaic. 
1Thessalonians3:12 Yaac tov Ziouv Yesu bun meih mbuo laanh hnamv laanh yaac hnamv zuangx mienh camv jienv faaux, hnangv yie mbuo hnamv meih mbuo wuov nor." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Tov ninh liepc wuonv meih mbuo nyei hnyouv, zuov Ziouv Yesu caux yietc zungv benx ninh nyei mienh wuov deix aengx daaih wuov zanc, meih mbuo ziouc haih yiem mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien cing-nzengc, maiv lamh nqemh dorngx." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Gorx-youz aac, setv mueiz aengx maaih deix waac gorngv. Yie mbuo njaaux jiex meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor yiem seix zaangc zoux horpc Tin-Hungh nyei hnyouv. Se hnangv ih zanc meih mbuo yiem nor. Mv baac ih zanc yie mbuo weic Ziouv Yesu tov meih mbuo yaac kuinx meih mbuo oix zuqc zoux jaa camv jienv faaux." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Meih mbuo hiuv duqv yie mbuo longc Ziouv Yesu nyei hatc maaz hnangv haaix nor paaiv ziangx meih mbuo. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Tin-Hungh nyei eix se hnangv naaiv. Ninh oix meih mbuo zoux cing-nzengc, simv nqoi hienx nyei sic." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Meih mbuo gorqv-mienh oix zuqc hiuv duqv hnangv haaix nor longc cing-nzengc nyei, taaih nyei za'eix gunv ganh nyei sin." 
1Thessalonians4:5 Maiv dungx sueih ganh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux, hnangv maiv sienx Tin-Hungh nyei mienh zoux nor." 
1Thessalonians4:6 Hnangv naaic, yiem naaiv deix sic, haaix dauh maiv dungx zoux dorngc fai zoux jiex ndaangc horpc zuqc zoux nyei bun ninh nyei gorx-youz. Naaiv deix waac zinh ndaangc yie mbuox jiex meih mbuo, yaac hniev-hniev nyei kuinx meih mbuo, weic zuqc haaix dauh zoux naaiv deix sic, wuov dauh ziouc zuqc Ziouv dingc zuiz aqv." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Tin-Hungh heuc mbuo daaih maiv zeiz weic zoux maiv cing-nzengc. Ninh oix mbuo zoux cing-nzengc nyei. 
1Thessalonians4:8 Hnangv naaic, haaix dauh nqemh naaiv deix njaaux nyei waac, wuov dauh maiv zeiz nqemh baamh mienh se nqemh Tin-Hungh, dongh ceix Singx Lingh bun meih mbuo wuov dauh." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Gorngv taux hnamv gorx-youz nyei sic yie mbuo maiv zuqc fiev, weic zuqc meih mbuo ganh duqv Tin-Hungh njaaux liuz meih mbuo laanh oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor hnamv laanh." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Meih mbuo zungv hnangv naaiv nor hnamv yiem gormx Maa^si^ndo^nie Saengv nyei zuangx gorx-youz. Mv baac gorx-youz aac, yie mbuo kuinx meih mbuo oix zuqc jaa hnamv ninh mbuo camv jienv faaux." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Oix zuqc liepc dingc hnyouv zoux buonv-suonc mienh, goux ganh nyei nza'hmien yaac longc ganh nyei buoz zoux gong yungz maengc, hnangv zinh ndaangc yie mbuo mbuox meih mbuo wuov nor." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Hnangv naaiv nor zoux meih mbuo ziouc duqv ga'nyiec nyei mienh taaih meih mbuo, yaac maiv zuqc bangc haaix dauh duqv meih mbuo qiemx longc nyei ga'naaiv." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Zuangx gorx-youz aac, yie mbuo oix meih mbuo zien-zien nyei hiuv duqv daic mingh nyei mienh hnangv haaix nor, weic bun meih mbuo maiv zuqc nzauh hnangv wuov deix maiv lamh hnamv nyei mienh nzauh nor." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Yie mbuo sienx Yesu daic mingh aengx nangh daaih ziouc sienx Tin-Hungh yaac oix dorh yietc zungv sienx Yesu nyei mienh, dongh daic mingh wuov deix, caux jienv Yesu yietc jauv aengx daaih." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Ih zanc yie mbuo mbuox meih mbuo nyei se ziux Ziouv njaaux yie mbuo nyei waac. Ziouv aengx daaih wuov hnoi, mbuo corc ziangh jienv nyei mienh zungv maiv duqv mingh ndaangc daic mingh nyei mienh."
