1Thessalonians4:16 Wuov zanc Ziouv ganh ziouc yiem wuov tin-dorngh njiec daaih. Maaih qiex hatc mbui nyei, aengx maaih fin-mienh bieiv nyei qiex yaac maaih Tin-Hungh nyei nzatc mbui. Sienx liuz Giduc, daic mingh wuov deix, ziouc nangh ndaangc." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Nqa'haav mbuo corc ziangh jienv nyei mienh caux nangh daaih wuov deix ziouc faaux mingh yiem mbuonx gu'nyuoz buangh Ziouv yiem wuov ndaamv-lungh. Hnangv naaic, mbuo duqv yietc liuz caux Ziouv yiem." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Weic naaiv oix zuqc longc naaiv deix waac laanh orn laanh nyei hnyouv. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Zuangx gorx-youz aac, gorngv taux naaiv deix sic haaix norm ziangh hoc haaix norm nyutc zeiv oix cuotv maiv zuqc fiev mbuox meih mbuo," 
1Thessalonians5:2 weic zuqc meih mbuo mengh mengh nyei hiuv duqv Ziouv daaih nyei hnoi oix taux hnangv janx-zaqc lungh muonz zanc daaih wuov nor. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Zuangx mienh gorngv, “Taaix-baengh aqv loh! Maiv zuqc gamh nziex aqv,” wuov zanc ninh mbuo ziouc liemh zeih zuqc mietc, hnangv m'sieqv dorn liemh zeih mun gu'nguaaz nor. Maiv haih biaux maiv ndutv." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Gorx-youz aac, meih mbuo maiv zeiz yiem hmuangx gu'nyuoz. Hnangv naaic, wuov norm hnoi maiv horpc zuqc taux hnangv janx-zaqc daaih nor." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Meih mbuo yietc zungv zoux yiem njang nyei mienh yaac guei lungh hnoi zanc. Mbuo maiv zeiz guei lungh muonz zanc fai zoux yiem hmuangx nyei mienh. 
1Thessalonians5:6 Hnangv naaiv, mbuo maiv dungx hnangv nyiec nyei mienh m'njormh. Oix zuqc ging jienv hnyouv, gunv jienv ganh," 
1Thessalonians5:7 weic zuqc bueix m'njormh nyei mienh se lungh muonz zanc m'njormh. Diuv nquin nyei mienh lungh muonz zanc nquin. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Mv baac mbuo guei lungh hnoi zanc, ziouc oix zuqc gunv duqv ganh. Oix zuqc longc sienx Yesu nyei hnyouv caux hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv zoux hlieqv-jaapv buang jienv la'kuotv. Yaac oix zuqc maaih lamh hnamv oix duqv njoux weic zoux hlieqv-muoc ndongx jienv." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Tin-Hungh ginv mbuo daaih maiv zeiz weic oix bun mbuo zuqc ninh nouz. Ninh oix bun mbuo kaux Ziouv Yesu Giduc duqv njoux. 
1Thessalonians5:10 Giduc weic mbuo daic. Hnangv naaic, ninh aengx daaih wuov zanc, maiv gunv mbuo ziangh jienv fai daic mingh, ninh oix bun mbuo caux ninh yiem." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Weic naaiv oix zuqc laanh tengx laanh zungx qaqv, laanh tengx laanh ceix jiez daaih, hnangv ih zanc meih mbuo zoux nyei nor." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Zuangx gorx-youz aac, yie mbuo tov meih mbuo oix zuqc taaih yiem meih mbuo mbu'ndongx cuotv qaqv zoux gong nyei mienh, dongh weic Ziouv Yesu gunv meih mbuo, njaaux meih mbuo wuov deix." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Oix zuqc weic ninh mbuo zoux nyei gong longx-longx nyei taaih yaac hnamv ninh mbuo. Laanh yaac oix zuqc caux laanh baengh orn nyei yiem. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Zuangx gorx-youz aac, yie mbuo tov meih mbuo oix zuqc kuinx mienh lueic mienh, oix zuqc tengx daamv faix nyei mienh zungx daamv, oix zuqc tengx mau nyei mienh, yaac oix zuqc longc noic daaix zuangx mienh." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Oix zuqc faix fim, maiv dungx bun haaix dauh zoux orqv winh orqv. Mv baac laanh oix zuqc zanc-zanc lorz qangx zoux longx bun laanh yaac zoux longx bun zuangx mienh." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Oix zuqc zanc-zanc orn-lorqc. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Yaac oix zuqc maiv dingh liouh nyei daux gaux. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Yiem maanc sic oix zuqc laengz zingh Tin-Hungh. Meih mbuo caux Giduc Yesu juangc maengc ziangh, Tin-Hungh ziouc oix meih mbuo hnangv naaiv nor zoux." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Maiv dungx mborqv daic Singx Lingh nyei douz. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Maiv dungx mangc piex Singx Lingh bun mienh douc daaih nyei waac. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Oix zuqc seix mangc nyungc-nyungc. Longx nyei oix zuqc ei jienv zoux. 
1Thessalonians5:22 Nyungc-nyungc orqv nyei oix zuqc simv nqoi. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Tov ceix baengh orn nyei Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo cing-nzengc taux daauh, yaac beu jienv meih mbuo nyei lingh wuonh, meih mbuo nyei hnyouv, meih mbuo nyei sin, taux Ziouv Yesu Giduc aengx daaih wuov zanc ziouc maiv maaih dorngx nqemh." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Heuc meih mbuo daaih wuov dauh se ziepc zuoqv nyei. Ninh oix hnangv naaiv nor zoux ziangx. 
1Thessalonians5:25 Zuangx gorx-youz aac, tov meih mbuo tengx yie mbuo daux gaux." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Wuic buangh nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc zoux hnyouv cing-nzengc zom hmien naaic baengh orn. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Yie longc Ziouv nyei hatc maaz mbuox meih mbuo, meih mbuo oix zuqc doqc naaiv zeiv fienx bun zuangx gorx-youz muangx." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Tov Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en bun meih mbuo. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Yie, Baulo, caux Silaa caux Ti^mo^tai fiev fienx bun Te^saa^lo^ni^gaa Zingh nyei jiu-baang, dongh mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh caux Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei mienh." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Tov mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh caux Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en ceix baengh orn bun meih mbuo. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Zuangx gorx-youz aac, yie mbuo oix zuqc zanc-zanc weic meih mbuo laengz zingh Tin-Hungh. Hnangv naaiv laengz zingh se horpc nyei, weic zuqc meih mbuo gunv zoux gunv sienx henv jienv faaux. Meih mbuo gorqv-mienh laanh yaac hnamv laanh gunv zoux gunv camv jienv faaux." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Weic naaiv, yie mbuo yiem Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx jiu-baang bungx waac-maux ceng meih mbuo. Yie mbuo ceng gorngv, maiv gunv meih mbuo zuqc mienh zoux doqc, buangh zuqc kouv, meih mbuo longc noic diev yaac sienx duqv wuonv." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Naaiv deix yietc zungv sic bun cing Tin-Hungh baengh fim nyei siemv mienh yaac biux mengh meih mbuo puix duqv yiem Tin-Hungh nyei guoqv. Se weic naaiv norm guoqv meih mbuo ih zanc zuqc siouc kouv. 
2Thessalonians1:6 Tin-Hungh se baengh fim nyei. Hoic meih mbuo zuqc kuonx naanh wuov deix mienh, Tin-Hungh oix winh bun ninh mbuo zuqc kuonx naanh." 
2Thessalonians1:7 Ninh yaac oix bun meih mbuo buangh zuqc kuonx naanh nyei mienh caux yie mbuo lomh nzoih duqv baengh orn. Wuov zanc Ziouv Yesu caux jienv ninh maaih qaqv nyei fin-mienh yiem wuov lungh hinc cuotv, yiem hiaangx haic nyei douz gu'nyuoz." 
2Thessalonians1:8 Ziouv Yesu oix winh bun maiv nyiemc Tin-Hungh nyei mienh yaac maiv muangx Ziouv Yesu nyei kuv fienx wuov deix mienh zuqc dingc zuiz. 
2Thessalonians1:9 Ninh mbuo oix zuqc siouc zuiz, yietc liuz zuqc mietc, nqaeqv jienv Ziouv nyei nza'hmien caux ninh njang-laangc nyei domh qaqv," 
2Thessalonians1:10 dongh ninh daaih wuov hnoi weic bun ninh nyei zuangx mienh, se yietc zungv sienx ninh nyei mienh, ceng ninh, taaih ninh. Meih mbuo yaac oix caux jienv ninh mbuo ceng weic zuqc meih mbuo sienx yie mbuo zoux nyei zorng-zengx waac." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Weic naaiv yie mbuo zanc-zanc tengx meih mbuo daux gaux tov mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh bun meih mbuo puix duqv ninh ginv daaih nyei mienh. Yaac tov ninh longc ninh nyei qaqv bun meih mbuo zoux ziangx meih mbuo maaih hnyouv zoux nyei kuv sic, caux ei meih mbuo nyei sienx fim zoux nyei gong." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Hnangv naaic, mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu nyei mbuox ziouc duqv meih mbuo taaih, ninh yaac oix taaih meih mbuo. Naaiv se ziux mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh caux Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei en." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Zuangx gorx-youz aac, gorngv taux mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc aengx daaih yaac gorngv taux ninh oix siou zunv mbuo, bun mbuo caux ninh yiem, yie mbuo tov meih mbuo" 
2Thessalonians2:2 maiv dungx hnyouv huaang hnyouv lunc, weic zuqc maaih deix mienh gorngv Ziouv daaih nyei hnoi taux liuz aqv. Maiv gunv maaih mienh gorngv Singx Lingh bun yie mbuo douc waac, fai zunh daaih gorngv fai fiev fienx hnangv naaiv nor gorngv." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Maiv dungx bun haaix dauh longc haaix nyungc za'eix nduov meih mbuo. Wuov norm hnoi maiv gaengh taux, zungv oix zuqc maaih naaiv deix sic cuotv. Mienh oix ngaengc jienv Tin-Hungh, yaac maaih baamz leiz-latc wuov dauh hinc cuotv daaih, dongh zungv oix zuqc mietc wuov dauh." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Ninh oix ngaengc jienv yaac ceng ganh gauh hlo jiex dongh mienh heuc zienh caux mienh zaangc nyei yietc zungv. Ninh zungv oix zueiz jienv zaangc Tin-Hungh nyei biauv gu'nyuoz gorngv ninh ganh zoux Tin-Hungh. 
2Thessalonians2:5 Meih mbuo jangx maiv duqv fai? Yie caux meih mbuo yiem wuov zanc yie zungv zorqv naaiv deix sic mbuox meih mbuo mi'aqv. 
2Thessalonians2:6 Meih mbuo yaac hiuv duqv haaix nyungc dangv jienv maiv gaengh bun naaiv deix sic cuotv. Hnangv naaic, taux ziangh hoc, baamz leiz-latc wuov dauh ziouc hinc cuotv daaih aqv." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Ih zanc baamz leiz-latc nyei qaqv beic ndiev zoux gong, mv baac dangv jienv naaiv deix qaqv wuov dauh oix dangv jienv mingh taux Tin-Hungh dorh ninh cuotv mingh." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Taux wuov zanc baamz leiz-latc wuov dauh oix hinc cuotv daaih. Mv baac Ziouv Yesu aengx njiec daaih wuov zanc, Yesu ziouc longc yiem nzuih biomv cuotv nyei qiex daix wuov dauh, yaac longc njiec daaih wuov zanc maaih nyei njang-laangc mietc nzengc ninh." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Baamz leiz-latc wuov dauh daaih wuov zanc se ziux Saadaan zoux nyei gong, yaac maaih Saadaan nyei qaqv zoux nyungc-nyungc jaav nyei jangx-hoc caux mbuoqc horngh nyei sic." 
2Thessalonians2:10 Ninh yaac oix longc nyungc-nyungc guv guaix nyei orqv za'eix nduov oix zuqc mietc nyei mienh. Ninh mbuo zuqc mietc weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv hnamv zien leiz ziouc maiv duqv njoux. 
2Thessalonians2:11 Weic naaiv Tin-Hungh bun ninh mbuo zuqc nduov mienh zoux dorngc nyei qaqv gunv jienv, nduov ninh mbuo sienx jaav nyei." 
2Thessalonians2:12 Hnangv naaic, maiv sienx zien leiz, daaux nzuonx a'hneiv zoux zuiz nyei zuangx mienh, zungv oix zuqc dingc zuiz aqv." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Ziouv hnamv nyei zuangx gorx-youz aac, yie mbuo oix zuqc zanc-zanc weic meih mbuo laengz zingh Tin-Hungh, weic zuqc yiem gorn Tin-Hungh ginv meih mbuo weic bun meih mbuo duqv njoux. Meih mbuo duqv njoux se weic meih mbuo kaux Singx Lingh bun meih mbuo benx Tin-Hungh nyei cing-nzengc mienh, yaac weic meih mbuo sienx zien leiz." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Tin-Hungh longc yie mbuo zunh nyei kuv fienx heuc meih mbuo daaih sienx. Yaac heuc meih mbuo daaih weic duqv buonc mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei njang-laangc. 
2Thessalonians2:15 Gorx-youz aac, oix zuqc sienx wuonv, maiv dungx bungx ndortv yie mbuo njaaux nyei zien leiz, maiv gunv yie mbuo zunh nyei waac fai fiev fienx njaaux nyei waac." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Tov mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc ganh caux mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh, dongh hnamv mbuo, yaac ceix en yietc liuz orn mbuo nyei hnyouv, yaac bun longx haic nyei maaih lamh hnamv, wuov dauh," 
2Thessalonians2:17 orn meih mbuo nyei hnyouv yaac liepc wuonv meih mbuo weic zoux nyungc-nyungc kuv sic yaac gorngv nyungc-nyungc kuv waac. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Zuangx gorx-youz aac, setv mueiz aengx maaih deix waac. Tov meih mbuo tengx yie mbuo daux gaux weic bun Ziouv nyei doz siepv-siepv nyei zunh duqv nqoi yaac duqv mienh taaih hnangv meih mbuo taaih nor." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Yaac tov Tin-Hungh njoux yie mbuo leih ndutv waaic haic, orqv haic nyei mienh, weic zuqc maiv zeiz dauh dauh mienh maaih sienx fim." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Mv baac Ziouv se ziepc zuoqv nyei. Ninh oix tengx meih mbuo maaih qaqv yaac beu jienv maiv bun hiuang orqv wuov dauh hoic meih mbuo. 
2Thessalonians3:4 Ziouv bun yie mbuo haih bungx duqv hnyouv meih mbuo. Yie mbuo sienx dingc, dongh yie mbuo mbuox meih mbuo zoux nyei, meih mbuo za'gengh zoux yaac oix zoux jienv mingh." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Tov Ziouv yienz meih mbuo, bun meih mbuo maaih hnyouv hnamv Tin-Hungh, yaac bun meih mbuo maaih Giduc bun nyei noic." 
2Thessalonians3:6 Zuangx gorx-youz aac, yie mbuo dengv Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei mbuox hatc meih mbuo, haaix dauh gorx-youz lueic haic, maiv oix zoux gong yaac maiv gan yie mbuo njaaux jiex meih mbuo wuov deix waac, meih mbuo oix zuqc simv nqoi." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Meih mbuo ganh hiuv duqv meih mbuo oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor zuotc yie mbuo nyei nyungc zoux. Yie mbuo caux meih mbuo yiem wuov zanc yie mbuo maiv lueic. 
2Thessalonians3:8 Yie mbuo yaac maiv nyanc haaix dauh nyei baeqc hnaangx, maiv cuotv nyaanh. Daaux nzuonx yie mbuo hnoi-hnoi muonz-muonz zoux gong kouv haic weic maiv oix feix luic meih mbuo haaix dauh." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Yie mbuo hnangv naaiv nor zoux, maiv zeiz weic zuqc maiv maaih leiz heuc mienh juang yie mbuo, se yie mbuo oix zoux nyungc zeiv bun meih mbuo zuotc." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Yie mbuo caux meih mbuo yiem wuov zanc yie mbuo mbuox meih mbuo, “Se gorngv haaix dauh maiv kangv zoux gong, maiv dungx bun hnaangx ninh nyanc.”" 
2Thessalonians3:11 Yie mbuo hnangv naaiv nor gorngv weic zuqc yie mbuo haiz mienh gorngv, yiem meih mbuo naaic maaih deix mienh lueic haic, maiv zoux gong. Kungx mingh la'nyauv mienh zoux nyei sic hnangv." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Yie mbuo dengv Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei mbuox hatc naaiv nyungc mienh yaac kuinx ninh mbuo oix zuqc zoux suonc nyei, jienh zoux gong weic yungz ganh nyei maengc." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Gorx-youz aac, meih mbuo zoux kuv sic, maiv dungx hnyouv namx." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Se gorngv yiem meih mbuo naaic haaix dauh maiv muangx yie mbuo fiev naaiv zeiv fienx nyei waac, oix zuqc jangx jienv ninh, yaac maiv dungx caux ninh jiu tong weic bun ninh nyaiv." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Mv baac maiv dungx funx ninh zoux win-wangv. Daaux nzuonx oix zuqc kuinx ninh hnangv kuinx gorx-youz nor. 
2Thessalonians3:16 Tov ceix baengh orn nyei Ziouv ganh zanc-zanc yiem nyungc-nyungc jauv ceix baengh orn bun meih mbuo. Tov Ziouv caux meih mbuo zuangx mienh yiem. 
2Thessalonians3:17 Yie ganh nanv batv fiev naaiv deix waac, “Yie, Baulo, jangx taux meih mbuo.” Yie fiev nyei zeiv-zeiv fienx maaih naaiv deix waac zoux jangx-hoc. Yie ganh nyei nzaangc-waeqc yaac hnangv naaiv nor fiev." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Tov Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en bun meih mbuo zuangx mienh. 
1Timothy1:1 Yie, Baulo, ziux mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv Tin-Hungh caux bun mbuo maaih lamh hnamv nyei Giduc Yesu nyei lingc zoux Giduc Yesu nyei gong-zoh." 
1Timothy1:2 Yie fiev fienx bun Ti^mo^tai, dongh weic mbuo sienx Ziouv dorngx zoux yie nyei cien dorn wuov dauh. Tov Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh, yaac tov mbuo nyei Ziouv Giduc Yesu korv-lienh meih, ceix en ceix baengh orn bun meih." 
1Timothy1:3 Yie kuinx meih yiem njiec E^fe^so Zingh hnangv zinh ndaangc yie oix mingh Maa^si^ndo^nie wuov zanc yie kuinx meih nor. Yiem naaic maaih deix mienh zunh jaav doz-leiz, yie yaac oix meih hatc jienv maiv dungx bun ninh mbuo njaaux." 
1Timothy1:4 Oix zuqc mbuox ninh mbuo guangc, maiv dungx bun hnyouv nzamc loz-hnoi nyei gouv-laic caux loz-hnoi ong-taaix nyei douh zong maiv haih jomc, doic jiex doic nyei mbuox. Naaiv deix sic kungx zoux gorn bun mienh nzaeng mingh nzaeng daaih hnangv, maiv tengx mienh sienx longx, haih hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh nyei za'eix." 
1Timothy1:5 Yie hnangv naaiv nor hatc se weic bun meih mbuo laanh hnamv laanh. Laanh hnangv naaiv hnamv laanh oix zuqc longc cing-nzengc nyei hnyouv, longc kuv laangh fim, yaac zien-zien nyei sienx." 
1Timothy1:6 Mv baac maaih deix mienh guangc naaiv deix jauv mingh pien, kungx nzaeng maiv lamh longc nyei sic hnangv." 
1Timothy1:7 Ninh mbuo oix zoux fin-saeng njaaux Tin-Hungh nyei leiz-latc mv baac ninh mbuo gorngv nyei waac ninh mbuo ganh maiv mengh baeqc. Ninh mbuo ngaengc jienv gorngv nyei sic ninh mbuo ganh zungv maiv bieqc hnyouv. 
1Timothy1:8 Se gorngv mienh longc duqv horpc nor, mbuo hiuv duqv leiz-latc se longx nyei." 
1Timothy1:9 Mv baac oix zuqc jangx jienv leiz-latc se maiv zeiz weic kuv mienh liepc daaih. Leiz-latc liepc daaih weic mienh waaic mienh caux maiv muangx leiz nyei mienh, aengx caux maiv gan Tin-Hungh nyei, baamz zuiz nyei, maiv cing-nzengc nyei, caux mangc piex Tin-Hungh nyei, daix die daix maa nyei, caux daix mienh nyei mienh," 
1Timothy1:10 maiv luonx horngc nyei, m'jangc hienx m'jangc nyei mienh, nimc mienh maaic nyei, caux gorngv-baeqc nyei, zoux jaav zorng-zengx nyei, yaac weic yietc zungv ngaengc zien doz-leiz nyei mienh." 
1Timothy1:11 Naaiv zien doz-leiz se horpc zuqc ceng nyei Tin-Hungh jiu bun yie zunh wuov nyungc njang-laangc nyei kuv fienx. 
1Timothy1:12 Yie laengz zingh mbuo nyei Ziouv Giduc Yesu, dongh ceix qaqv bun yie wuov dauh, weic zuqc ninh funx yie ziepc zuoqv nyei ziouc paaiv yie zoux ninh nyei gong." 
1Timothy1:13 Maiv gunv zinh ndaangc yie ki ninh, zoux doqc gorngv doqc ninh, Tin-Hungh korv-lienh yie weic zuqc wuov zanc yie maiv gaengh sienx Giduc, yie ganh zoux nyei yie yaac maiv hiuv." 
1Timothy1:14 Mbuo nyei Ziouv ceix en camv-camv nyei ziouc bun yie kaux Giduc Yesu maaih sienx fim yaac maaih hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv. 
1Timothy1:15 Giduc Yesu njiec baamh gen weic njoux zuiz-mienh. Naaiv joux waac za'gengh zien haic, puix duqv maanc mienh sienx. Yietc zungv zuiz-mienh yie ganh yaac zoux gauh waaic jiex wuov dauh." 
1Timothy1:16 Mv baac Tin-Hungh korv-lienh yie, weic bun Giduc Yesu yiem yie bun cing ninh maaih nyei yietc zungv noic. Hnangv naaic, maiv gunv yie zoux gauh waaic jiex nyei zuiz-mienh, naaiv zoux nyungc zeiv bun nqa'haav daaih sienx ninh, duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc nyei mienh." 
1Timothy1:17 Oix zuqc taaih yietc liuz yiem nyei Hungh Diex, dongh maiv haih daic, mbuo mangc maiv buatc nyei nduqc dauh Tin-Hungh. Yaac oix zuqc yietc liuz ceng taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Aamen." 
1Timothy1:18 Yie nyei dorn, Ti^mo^tai aah! Yie ih zanc heuc meih zoux nyei se ziux zinh ndaangc mienh douc daaih gorngv taux meih wuov deix waac, weic bun meih longc wuov deix waac zoux wuoqc ginc mborqv longx nyei jaax." 
1Timothy1:19 Oix zuqc zanc-zanc sienx longx yaac maaih kuv laangh fim. Maaih deix mienh waaic laangh fim, ninh mbuo nyei sienx fim ziouc ndortv nzengc mi'aqv." 
1Timothy1:20 Naaiv nyungc mienh maaih i dauh, mbuox heuc Hi^me^ne^atc caux Aa^lekv^saan^nde. Yie zorqv ninh mbuo jiu bun Saadaan mi'aqv, weic njaaux ninh mbuo maiv dungx ki Tin-Hungh." 
1Timothy2:1 Hnangv naaiv, da'yietv yie kuinx meih oix zuqc tengx maanc mienh tov Tin-Hungh. Oix zuqc weic ninh mbuo daux gaux, jouh Tin-Hungh, laengz zingh Tin-Hungh." 
1Timothy2:2 Yaac oix zuqc weic zuangx hungh diex caux yietc zungv zoux hlo gunv baeqc fingx wuov deix daux gaux, bun mbuo maiv maaih sic, taaix-baengh nyei yiem, ziouc haih longx-longx nyei zaangc Tin-Hungh, laanh yaac taaih laanh." 
1Timothy2:3 Hnangv naaiv daux gaux se longx nyei, yaac horpc mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv Tin-Hungh." 
1Timothy2:4 Tin-Hungh oix maanc mienh duqv njoux yaac oix ninh mbuo hiuv duqv zien leiz. 
1Timothy2:5 Weic zuqc maaih nduqc dauh Tin-Hungh hnangv. Yaac maaih nduqc dauh yiem Tin-Hungh caux mienh mbu'ndongx zoux mbu'ndongx mienh, se Giduc Yesu, dongh benx baamh mienh wuov dauh." 
1Timothy2:6 Giduc Yesu siev ninh ganh nyei maengc weic zuoqc maanc mienh nzuonx. Taux horpc nyei ziangh hoc ninh hnangv naaiv nor zoux bun cing Tin-Hungh oix maanc mienh duqv njoux. 
1Timothy2:7 Weic naaiv Tin-Hungh paaiv yie zoux zunh doz mienh yaac paaiv yie zoux gong-zoh, zoux fin-saeng njaaux maanc fingx Janx sienx Yesu, yaac hiuv duqv zien leiz. Naaiv yie maiv gorngv-baeqc. Yie gorngv zien nyei." 
1Timothy2:8 Yie oix yiem norm-norm dorngx nyei m'jangc dorn sung jiez cing-nzengc nyei buoz daux gaux, yaac maiv qiex jiez, maiv nzaeng jaax." 
1Timothy2:9 Yie yaac oix m'sieqv dorn zuqv zong horngh lui-houx. Maiv dungx zorng weic saaix-liangz mienh, yaac maiv dungx gitv mba'biei mbinz, fai longc jaaix nyei la'bieiv-zou, fai jiem, fai longc jaaix haic nyei lui-houx zorng sin." 
1Timothy2:10 M'sieqv dorn oix zuqc zoux kuv sic weic zorng ganh. Naaiv se puix nyiemc sienx Tin-Hungh nyei m'sieqv dorn zoux nyei sic. 
1Timothy2:11 Hoqc doz-leiz nyei ziangh hoc, m'sieqv dorn oix zuqc nzieqc nzingz yaac hnyouv suonc nyei." 
1Timothy2:12 Yie maiv bun m'sieqv dorn njaaux fai longc hatc maaz gunv m'jangc dorn. M'sieqv dorn oix zuqc nzieqc nzingz nyei," 
1Timothy2:13 weic zuqc Tin-Hungh zeix Aa^ndam ndaangc, nqa'haav cingx zeix Haawaa." 
1Timothy2:14 Zuqc nduov nyei se maiv zeiz Aa^ndam. Zuqc nduov nyei se m'sieqv dorn, ninh ziouc baamz zuiz aqv." 
1Timothy2:15 Mv baac weic zuqc m'sieqv dorn yungz gu'nguaaz, se gorngv zanc-zanc sienx longx, maaih hnyouv hnamv mienh, zoux cing-nzengc yaac gunv duqv ganh, ninh mbuo ziouc duqv njoux." 
1Timothy3:1 Naaiv joux waac se za'gengh zien nyei. “Haaix dauh maaih hnyouv oix zoux jiu-baang nyei mienh gox, wuov dauh oix zoux nyei se longx haic nyei gong.”" 
1Timothy3:2 Jiu-baang nyei mienh gox oix zuqc zoux maiv maaih dorngx daanh nyei mienh, kungx longc nduqc dauh auv, haih zanv ganh, gunv duqv ganh, zoux dorh leiz nyei mienh, maaih hnyouv zipv kaeqv, yaac haih njaaux mienh." 
1Timothy3:3 Ninh maiv hengx hopv diuv, maiv zoux ciouv mborqv mienh, hnyouv suonc nyei, maiv oix caux mienh nzaeng jaax, yaac maiv mauv nyaanh." 
1Timothy3:4 Oix zuqc haih gunv duqv longx ganh nyei hmuangv doic, njaaux ganh nyei fu'jueiv taaih ninh, muangx ninh nyei waac." 
1Timothy3:5 Se gorngv mienh maiv haih gunv duqv ganh nyei hmuangv doic, ninh hnangv haaix nor haih goux Tin-Hungh nyei jiu-baang?" 
1Timothy3:6 Siang-sienx nyei mienh maiv horpc zuqc zoux jiu-baang nyei mienh gox. Nzauh heix ninh haih ceng-hlo ziouc zuqc dingc zuiz, hnangv mienv nyei hungh zuqc dingc zuiz wuov nor." 
1Timothy3:7 Zoux mienh gox nyei mienh oix zuqc dongh jiu-baang ga'nyiec nyei mienh funx mengh hoc longx nyei mienh. Ninh ziouc maiv zuqc mienh daanh yaac maiv zuqc mienv nyei hungh zaeng koux hlopv ninh. 
1Timothy3:8 Jiu-baang nyei borng-buoz mienh fih hnangv. Oix zuqc benx mienh taaih nyei mienh, ninh mbuo gorngv nyei waac haih kaux duqv zuqc, maiv hengx hopv diuv, yaac maiv mauv zinh zoih." 
1Timothy3:9 Ninh mbuo oix zuqc longc cing-nzengc nyei laangh fim sienx wuonv Tin-Hungh bun mbiaangx yaangh cuotv daaih nyei zien leiz. 
1Timothy3:10 Haaix dauh oix zoux borng-buoz mienh oix zuqc seix ninh mbuo ndaangc. Buatc ninh mbuo maiv maaih dorngx daanh nor, gunv paaiv ninh mbuo zoux naaiv nyungc gong aqv." 
1Timothy3:11 Fu-sux Ziouv nyei m'sieqv dorn yaac fih hnangv nyei oix zuqc maaih mengh dauh longx, maiv gorngv waac-huv, haih zanv duqv ganh, yiem maanc sic yaac zoux hnyouv zingx nyei mienh." 
1Timothy3:12 Borng-buoz mienh oix zuqc longc nduqc dauh auv hnangv, yaac haih gunv duqv longx ganh nyei fu'jueiv caux biauv zong mienh." 
1Timothy3:13 Ninh mbuo zoux duqv gong longx ziouc duqv mienh taaih yaac duqv bungx laangc nyei zunh ninh mbuo sienx Giduc Yesu nyei jauv-louc. 
1Timothy3:14 Yie hnamv daaih maiv nangc lauh yie oix mingh meih naaic, mv baac yie fiev naaiv zeiv fienx bun meih hiuv duqv naaiv deix sic ndaangc." 
1Timothy3:15 Hnangv naaic, se gorngv maaih haaix nyungc zorv yie, meih ziouc hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zong mienh, dongh ziangh jienv nyei Tin-Hungh nyei jiu-baang, oix zuqc hnangv haaix nor yiem. Jiu-baang zoux zien leiz nyei ndiouh caux gorn-ndoqv." 
1Timothy3:16 Mbuo oix zuqc nyiemc mbuo sienx nyei jauv mbiaangx yaangh cuotv daaih nyei sic za'gengh hlo haic aqv. Ninh hinc cuotv benx dauh baamh mienh, Singx Lingh biux mengh ninh horpc nzengc, fin-mienh yaac duqv buatc ninh, maaih mienh zunh ninh nyei jauv bun maanc fingx muangx, lungh ndiev norm-norm dorngx maaih mienh sienx ninh, Tin-Hungh yaac zipv ninh faaux taux njang-laangc nyei dorngx." 
1Timothy4:1 Singx Lingh mengh mengh nyei gorngv, nqa'haav hingv maaih deix mienh oix guangc ninh mbuo sienx nyei jauv, muangx mienv nduov ninh mbuo yaac gan mienv njaaux nyei jauv." 
1Timothy4:2 Beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh longc gorngv-baeqc nyei waac nduov weic zuqc ninh mbuo nyei laangh fim hnangv buov hlieqv naatv daic mi'aqv. 
1Timothy4:3 Ninh mbuo maiv bun mienh dorng jaa, yaac hatc mienh maaih deix nyanc hopv oix zuqc gec. Mv baac naaiv deix nyanc hopv Tin-Hungh zeix daaih bun sienx nyei caux hiuv duqv zien leiz nyei mienh laengz zingh liuz, nyanc duqv aqv." 
1Timothy4:4 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh zeix daaih nyei ga'naaiv, nyungc-nyungc se longx nyei, maiv zuqc nqemh haaix nyungc. Da'faanh laengz zingh liuz Tin-Hungh, nyungc-nyungc nyanc duqv nyei," 
1Timothy4:5 weic zuqc Tin-Hungh nyei waac caux mbuo daux gaux nyei waac bun nyungc-nyungc cing-nzengc daaih. 
1Timothy4:6 Se gorngv meih zorqv naaiv deix jauv mbuox gorx-youz mbuo, meih ziouc zoux Giduc Yesu nyei kuv bou. Yaac maaih meih sienx nyei zien leiz caux meih gan nyei kuv doz-leiz yungz ganh nyei lingh wuonh." 
1Timothy4:7 Oix zuqc simv nqoi maiv sienx Tin-Hungh wuov deix mienh nyei gouv-laic. Yaac oix zuqc hoqc linc gan longx Tin-Hungh. 
1Timothy4:8 Hoqc linc sin zaangc nyei qaqv haih tengx duqv nyungc baav. Mv baac hoqc linc gan longx Tin-Hungh weic nyungc-nyungc maaih lamh longc, yaac tengx naaiv seix caux nqa'haav hingv wuov seix." 
1Timothy4:9 Naaiv joux waac za'gengh zien nyei, puix duqv maanc mienh sienx." 
1Timothy4:10 Weic naaiv yie mbuo zoux gong kouv, diev kouv, weic zuqc yie mbuo maaih lamh hnamv dorngx yiem ziangh jienv nyei Tin-Hungh, ninh zoux maanc mienh nyei Njoux Ziouv, yaac lengc jeiv nyei zoux sienx ninh wuov deix mienh nyei Njoux Ziouv." 
1Timothy4:11 Naaiv deix sic meih oix zuqc hatc mienh, njaaux mienh." 
1Timothy4:12 Maiv dungx bun haaix dauh laaix meih hnyangx-jeiv lunx mangc faix meih. Daaux nzuonx oix zuqc zoux nyungc zeiv longx, bun sienx nyei zuangx mienh zuotc meih gorngv nyei waac caux zoux nyei sic, meih hnangv haaix nor hnamv mienh, hnangv haaix nor sienx Yesu yaac zoux cing-nzengc mienh." 
1Timothy4:13 Oix zuqc longc hnyouv dorng zuangx doqc Ging-Sou, zunh doz, njaaux mienh, yaac zoux jienv mingh zuov yie taux meih naaic." 
1Timothy4:14 Maiv dungx bungx lorx meih zipv daaih nyei zingh nyeic, dongh zuangx mienh gox maan jienv meih, yaac maaih mienh douc Tin-Hungh nyei waac wuov zanc meih duqv daaih nyei zingh nyeic." 
1Timothy4:15 Naaiv deix jauv oix zuqc liepc fiem liepc eix jorm hnyouv zoux, weic bun zuangx mienh buatc meih bieqc bouc." 
1Timothy4:16 Oix zuqc faix fim longx-longx nyei goux jienv ganh caux ganh njaaux nyei doz-leiz. Meih longc hnyouv zoux nor, meih ziouc njoux ganh yaac njoux muangx meih nyei waac wuov deix mienh." 
1Timothy5:1 Maiv dungx hemx mienh gox mienh. Oix zuqc kuinx ninh hnangv kuinx ganh nyei die nor. Oix zuqc kuinx hnyangx-jeiv lunx nyei wuov deix hnangv ganh nyei gorx, ganh nyei youz nor." 
1Timothy5:2 Hnyangx-jeiv gox wuov deix m'sieqv dorn oix zuqc kuinx hnangv ganh nyei maa. Gauh lunx wuov deix oix zuqc kuinx hnangv ganh nyei dorc, ganh nyei muoc, yaac oix zuqc zoux hnyouv cing-nzengc daaix ninh mbuo." 
1Timothy5:3 Oix zuqc taaih ginx maiv lamh kaux dorngx nyei auv-guaav. 
1Timothy5:4 Haaix dauh auv-guaav maaih dorn-jueiv fun-faqv, ninh nyei dorn-jueiv fun-faqv da'yietv oix zuqc hoqc ei jienv ninh mbuo sienx nyei jauv zoux, goux ganh nyei hmuangv doic. Hnangv naaic haih winh ninh mbuo ong gux diex maac nyei en-zingh, weic zuqc hnangv naaiv zoux se horpc Tin-Hungh nyei hnyouv." 
1Timothy5:5 Mv baac dongh maiv lamh kaux dorngx nyei auv-guaav-ndoqc, ninh yiem Tin-Hungh maaih lamh hnamv ziouc hnoi-hnoi muonz-muonz tov Tin-Hungh tengx." 
1Timothy5:6 Kungx hnamv oix ganh duqv njien-youh nyei auv-guaav, ninh ziangh jienv mv baac dorngx daic mi'aqv." 
1Timothy5:7 Oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor njaaux zuangx mienh cingx daaih maiv maaih haaix dauh zuqc daanh. 
1Timothy5:8 Se gorngv haaix dauh maiv goux ganh nyei cien-ceqv, lengc jeiv goux ganh nyei hmuangv doic, wuov dauh se ngaengc zien doz aqv. Ninh zungv gauh waaic jiex maiv sienx Yesu nyei mienh." 
1Timothy5:9 Auv-guaav oix zuqc buangv luoqc ziepc hnyangx yaac longc jiex nduqc torngx nqox hnangv cingx daaih faaux mbuox yiem auv-guaav daan. 
1Timothy5:10 Ninh yaac oix zuqc maaih mengh dauh zoux kuv sic, dorh longx ninh nyei fu'jueiv, maaih hnyouv zipv kaeqv, tengx Giduc Mienh nzaaux jiex zaux, tengx jiex ndortv naanc mienh, yaac jienh cuotv fim zoux nyungc-nyungc kuv sic, cingx duqv faaux mbuox yiem auv-guaav daan." 
1Timothy5:11 Lunx wuov deix auv-guaav, maiv dungx faaux mbuox yiem auv-guaav daan, weic zuqc ninh mbuo aengx haiz oix dorng jaa ziouc guangc Giduc mi'aqv." 
1Timothy5:12 Hnangv naaic, ninh mbuo zuqc dingc zuiz weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv ei zinh ndaangc ninh mbuo laengz jiex nyei ngaengc waac." 
1Timothy5:13 Ninh mbuo yaac hoqc saau laangz guangc ziangh hoc bieqc naaiv norm biauv, cuotv wuov norm biauv. Maiv daan mbuoqc naaiv hnangv, ninh mbuo yaac gorngv waac-huv, laamh zouh mienh nyei sic, maiv horpc zuqc gorngv nyei yaac gorngv." 
1Timothy5:14 Weic naaiv yie oix lunx wuov deix auv-guaav aengx longc nqox, yungz fu'jueiv, zaangv longx jaa, bun mbuo nyei win-wangv maiv maaih dorngx daanh." 
1Timothy5:15 Maaih deix auv-guaav-lunx zungv huin nqaang gan Saadaan mi'aqv. 
1Timothy5:16 Se gorngv sienx Yesu nyei m'sieqv dorn maaih muoz-doic cien-ceqv zoux auv-guaav, ninh oix zuqc goux, maiv dungx feix luic jiu-baang, weic bun jiu-baang haih tengx za'gengh maiv lamh kaux nyei auv-guaav." 
1Timothy5:17 Gunv duqv jiu-baang longx wuov deix mienh gox, lengc jeiv nyei jienh zunh doz caux njaaux mienh wuov deix, oix zuqc funx puix duqv zipv sung-gouv nyei fin-kouv." 
1Timothy5:18 Weic zuqc Ging-Sou gorngv, “Ngongh linc mbiauh nyei ziangh hoc maiv dungx dou ngongh nyei nzuih baengx.” Yaac gorngv, “Zoux gong nyei mienh horpc zuqc duqv gong-zinh.”" 
1Timothy5:19 Se gorngv maaih haaix dauh gox jiu-baang nyei mienh gox, cuotv liuz maaih i ziex laanh zorng-zengx mienh, maiv dungx sienx." 
1Timothy5:20 Se gorngv haaix laanh jiu-baang nyei mienh gox zanc-zanc baamz zuiz, oix zuqc dorng jienv zuangx mienh gorngv ninh, weic bun zuangx mienh gamh nziex." 
1Timothy5:21 Yie dorng jienv Tin-Hungh caux Giduc Yesu caux ginv daaih nyei zuangx fin-mienh longx-longx kuinx meih, oix zuqc ei jienv yie mbuox meih naaiv deix waac. Yaac oix zuqc baengh fim nyei zoux, maiv dungx mangc haaix dauh nyei hmien." 
1Timothy5:22 Maiv dungx huaang jienv maan haaix dauh weic orn ninh. Maiv dungx caux haaix dauh maaih buonc zoux zuiz. Oix zuqc goux ganh zoux cing-nzengc mienh. 
1Timothy5:23 Yangh naaiv jiex, maiv dungx kungx hopv wuom hnangv. Oix zuqc hopv deix baav a'ngunc diuv tengx meih nyei ga'sie weic zuqc meih butv baengc maqc haic." 
1Timothy5:24 Maaih deix mienh baamz nyei zuiz se nqaengc nyei, bun cing ninh mbuo zungv zuqc dingc zuiz aqv. Mv baac maaih deix mienh baamz nyei zuiz nqa'haav cingx daaih buatc duqv mengh." 
1Timothy5:25 Fih hnangv nyei, kuv sic se buatc duqv nqaengc nyei. Maiv nqaengc wuov deix zungv bingx maiv jienv." 
1Timothy6:1 Zoux nouh wuov deix oix zuqc yiem nyungc-nyungc sic taaih ganh nyei ziouv, weic maiv bun haaix dauh gorngv doqc Tin-Hungh nyei mbuox caux yie mbuo zunh nyei leiz." 
1Timothy6:2 Haaix dauh nouh maaih sienx Yesu nyei ziouv, maiv dungx mangc piex, weic zuqc ninh nyei ziouv zoux sienx Yesu nyei gorx-youz. Daaux nzuonx zungv oix zuqc fu-sux gauh longx, weic zuqc ninh fu-sux wuov dauh ziouv se sienx Yesu nyei mienh yaac zoux ninh hnamv nyei gorx-youz. Naaiv deix sic meih oix zuqc njaaux mienh, kuinx ninh mbuo ei jienv zoux." 
1Timothy6:3 Haaix dauh njaaux ganh nyungc doz-leiz, leiz yaac maiv doix mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc nyei zien waac yaac maiv njaaux mienh gan longx Tin-Hungh," 
1Timothy6:4 wuov dauh ceng ganh hlo hnangv, maiv hiuv haaix nyungc. Ninh kungx oix nzaeng waac nzaeng leiz hnangv butv inv nor, ziouc maaih mueic jieqv nyei sic, nzaeng jaax, gorngv doqc mienh, maaih hnyouv nyeiv orqv sic." 
1Timothy6:5 Naaiv nyungc mienh zanc-zanc nzaeng nyinh cox nyouz, weic zuqc ninh mbuo waaic haic, zien leiz maiv yiem ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv. Ninh mbuo laaic gan Tin-Hungh se bun mienh maaih jauv butv zoih." 
1Timothy6:6 Haaix dauh gan longx Tin-Hungh yaac buangv hnyouv ninh maaih nyei, wuov dauh za'gengh butv zoih." 
1Timothy6:7 Mbuo maiv duqv dorh haaix nyungc bieqc naaiv baamh gen. Mbuo cuotv baamh gen yaac maiv haih dorh haaix nyungc mingh. 
1Timothy6:8 Hnangv naaic, da'faanh mbuo maaih nyanc maaih hopv, maaih lui-houx zuqv, oix zuqc buangv hnyouv aqv." 
1Timothy6:9 Mv baac mauv oix butv zoih wuov deix mienh zuqc nduov baamz zuiz, zuqc koux hlopv jienv. Ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv hanc dorh ninh mbuo ei camv-nyungc hngongx haic, haih hoic mienh nyei za'eix, ninh mbuo ziouc zuqc ndortv nzengc, qui nzengc." 
1Timothy6:10 Weic zuqc mauv zinh mauv nyaanh se nyungc-nyungc orqv sic nyei gorn. Laaix mauv zinh nyaanh maaih deix mienh leih ninh mbuo sienx nyei jauv ziouc zoux bun ganh zuqc nzauh camv, hnangv maaih nzuqc baqv jienv mba'nziu nor." 
1Timothy6:11 Ti^mo^tai aah! Meih zoux Tin-Hungh nyei mienh ziouc oix zuqc biaux nqoi naaiv deix yietc zungv sic. Oix zuqc hungx mingh zoux horpc nyei jauv, gan longx Tin-Hungh, sienx longx, hnamv mienh, longc noic diev yaac zoux hnyouv suonc." 
1Timothy6:12 Oix zuqc njiec qaqv weic mbuo sienx nyei jauv mborqv longx nyei jaax, caangv duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc, weic zuqc meih dorng jienv zorng-zengx mienh camv longx-longx nyei nyiemc Yesu wuov zanc, Tin-Hungh heuc meih zipv yietc liuz nyei maengc." 
1Timothy6:13 Yie dorng jienv Tin-Hungh, dongh bun maanc muotc ziangh jienv wuov dauh, yaac dorng jienv Giduc Yesu, dongh yiem Born^ti^atc Bilaatv nyei nza'hmien longx-longx nyei weic zien leiz zoux zorng-zengx wuov dauh, hatc meih." 
1Timothy6:14 Meih oix zuqc ziepc zuoqv nyei ei jienv naaiv diuh lingc, maiv bun mienh maaih dorngx daanh, zuov taux mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu Giduc aengx daaih wuov hnoi." 
1Timothy6:15 Tin-Hungh oix ei ninh dingc daaih nyei ziangh hoc bun Ziouv Yesu Giduc aengx daaih. Tin-Hungh puix duqv mienh ceng. Ninh nduqc dauh hnangv gauh hlo jiex se zoux maanc hungh nyei Hungh, maanc ziouv nyei Ziouv." 
1Timothy6:16 Kungx Tin-Hungh ganh yietc liuz ziangh jienv. Ninh yiem jienv nyei njang, maiv maaih haaix dauh haih mingh duqv fatv. Maiv maaih haaix dauh buatc jiex ninh fai haih duqv buatc. Ninh yietc liuz maaih qaqv yaac duqv mienh taaih ninh. Aamen." 
1Timothy6:17 Oix zuqc hatc yiem naaiv baamh gen nyei butv-zoih mienh maiv dungx zoux maux, yaac maiv dungx kaux zinh nyaanh, weic zuqc zinh nyaanh se kaux maiv wuonv. Oix zuqc kaux Tin-Hungh, dongh ceix nyungc-nyungc camv nyei bun mbuo, weic bun mbuo njien-youh." 
1Timothy6:18 Oix zuqc hatc ninh mbuo zoux longx, zanc-zanc zoux kuv sic camv, yaac zoux hnyouv jangv nzie mienh." 
1Timothy6:19 Hnangv naaiv zoux se siou jaaix nyei ga'naaiv zoux gorn-buonv weic nqa'haav hingv ziouc haih duqv zien-zien nyei ziangh maengc. 
1Timothy6:20 Ti^mo^tai aah! Dongh jiu bun meih, oix zuqc longx-longx goux jienv. Oix zuqc simv nqoi maiv sienx Tin-Hungh nyei mienh gorngv nyei henh mbienx waac, yaac simv nqoi dongh mienh heuc “wuonh zaang” mv baac maiv zien." 
1Timothy6:21 Maaih deix mienh gorngv ninh mbuo maaih naaiv nyungc wuonh zaang ziouc guangc, maiv gan mbuo sienx nyei doz mi'aqv. Tov Tin-Hungh ceix en bun meih mbuo yietc zungv." 
2Timothy1:1 Yie, Baulo, ei Tin-Hungh nyei za'eix zoux Giduc Yesu nyei gong-zoh weic zunh Tin-Hungh laengz bun nyei maengc, dongh mienh kaux Giduc Yesu duqv daaih nyei ziangh maengc." 
2Timothy1:2 Yie fiev fienx bun yie hnamv haic nyei dorn, Ti^mo^tai. Tov Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh caux mbuo nyei Ziouv Giduc Yesu korv-lienh meih, ceix en ceix baengh orn bun meih." 
2Timothy1:3 Yie laengz zingh Tin-Hungh, dongh yie, hnangv yie nyei ong-taaix mbuo nor, longc cing-nzengc hnyouv fu-sux wuov dauh. Yie hnoi-hnoi muonz-muonz daux gaux nyei ziangh hoc yie zanc-zanc jangx zuqc meih." 
2Timothy1:4 Yie jangx zuqc meih nyiemv nyei wuom-mueic ziouc za'gengh! oix buatc meih haic. Duqv buatc meih nor, yie ziouc njien-youh orn-lorqc aqv." 
2Timothy1:5 Yie jangx zuqc meih zien-zien nyei sienx, hnangv zinh ndaangc meih nyei daa gux, Lo^itc, caux meih nyei maa, Yunitv, zien-zien sienx wuov nor. Yie sienx dingc meih ih zanc yaac hnangv wuov nor sienx." 
2Timothy1:6 Weic naaiv yie tengx meih jangx jienv yie maan jienv meih wuov zanc, Tin-Hungh ceix bun nyei zingh nyeic, meih oix zuqc bun hnangv douz nor hiaangx daaih." 
2Timothy1:7 Tin-Hungh ceix bun mbuo se maiv zeiz gamh nziex nyei hnyouv. Ninh bun mbuo nyei hnyouv maaih qaqv, bun mbuo hnamv mienh, yaac haih gunv duqv ganh." 
2Timothy1:8 Hnangv naaic, maiv dungx nyaiv tengx mbuo nyei Ziouv Yesu zoux zorng-zengx. Yie weic Giduc zuqc wuonx jienv loh, meih yaac maiv dungx weic yie nyaiv. Daaux nzuonx meih yaac oix zuqc kaux Tin-Hungh nyei qaqv weic kuv fienx maaih buonc siouc kouv." 
2Timothy1:9 Tin-Hungh njoux mbuo, yaac heuc mbuo daaih zoux ninh nyei cing-nzengc mienh, maiv zeiz weic mbuo zoux nyei haaix nyungc kuv sic, se ei ninh ganh nyei za'eix caux ninh nyei en hnangv. Naaiv nyungc en, yiem dongh cor maanc gouv maanc doic wuov zanc Tin-Hungh longc Giduc Yesu ceix bun mbuo." 
2Timothy1:10 Mv baac ih zanc mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv Giduc Yesu njiec daaih biux mengh naaiv nyungc en, weic zuqc Giduc mietc nzengc daic nyei qaqv, yaac longc kuv fienx bun mienh hiuv duqv yietc liuz maiv haih daic nyei maengc." 
2Timothy1:11 Tin-Hungh paaiv yie zoux zunh doz mienh, zoux gong-zoh yaac zoux fin-saeng zunh naaiv kuv fienx." 
2Timothy1:12 Weic naaiv kuv fienx yie ih zanc hnangv naaiv nor siouc kouv. Mv baac yie maiv nyaiv, weic zuqc hiuv duqv yie sienx nyei se haaix dauh yaac hiuv dingc yie jiu bun ninh nyei, ninh haih beu jienv taux siemv zuiz wuov norm hnoi." 
2Timothy1:13 Oix zuqc longc meih haiz yie njaaux jiex nyei zien waac zoux nyungc zeiv. Yaac oix zuqc kaux Giduc Yesu duqv daaih nyei sienx fim caux hnamv mienh nyei hnyouv ei jienv zoux. 
2Timothy1:14 Singx Lingh yiem mbuo gu'nyuoz. Oix zuqc kaux Singx Lingh goux jienv jiu bun meih nyei zien leiz. 
2Timothy1:15 Meih hiuv duqv Esie Saengv nyei mienh yietc zungv guangc yie nzengc, liemh Fi^je^latv caux He^mo^ge^netv guangc yie." 
2Timothy1:16 Yie tov Ziouv korv-lienh O^ne^si^fo^latv wuov biauv mienh weic zuqc O^ne^si^fo^latv nunz yie nyei hnyouv ziex nzunc. Yie zuqc limc ndoh jienv, ninh yaac maiv nyaiv." 
2Timothy1:17 Yietv taux Lomaa Zingh ninh ziouc njiec qaqv zimh lorz yie, yaac lorz taux buatc." 
2Timothy1:18 Meih yaac hiuv duqv yiem E^fe^so Zingh wuov zanc ninh tengx yie ndongc haaix camv! Yie ziouc tov Ziouv, taux siemv zuiz wuov hnoi, oix zuqc korv-lienh ninh." 
2Timothy2:1 Yie nyei dorn aac, meih oix zuqc kaux Giduc Yesu ceix bun nyei en henv jiez daaih." 
2Timothy2:2 Meih haiz yie dorng jienv zorng-zengx mienh camv nyei nza'hmien njaaux wuov deix waac, meih oix zuqc jiu bun ziepc zuoqv nyei mienh, dongh maaih banh zeic njaaux mienh wuov deix." 
2Timothy2:3 Meih oix zuqc caux yie mbuo maaih buonc siouc kouv naanc hnangv Giduc Yesu nyei kuv baeng. 
2Timothy2:4 Dorng baeng nyei mienh maiv maaih haaix dauh zanc-zanc la'nyauv ga'nyiec nyei sic. Ninh kungx oix zoux bun gunv ninh wuov dauh baeng-bieiv buangv hnyouv hnangv. 
2Timothy2:5 Ndouv saaix nyei mienh saaix nyei ziangh hoc, maiv ei jienv leiz zoux nor, maiv haih duqv ningv." 
2Timothy2:6 cuotv qaqv zoux ndeic nyei mienh maaih leiz duqv ninh nyei buonc laangh ziqc ndaangc. 
2Timothy2:7 Meih oix zuqc longx-longx nyei hnamv taux yie gorngv nyei waac, weic zuqc Ziouv zungv oix tengx meih mengh baeqc naaiv deix yietc zungv." 
2Timothy2:8 Oix zuqc jangx jienv Yesu Giduc, Ndaawitv Hungh nyei Zeiv-Fun, dongh daic mingh Tin-Hungh bun nangh daaih wuov dauh. Naaiv se yie zunh nyei kuv fienx." 
2Timothy2:9 Weic naaiv kuv fienx yie zuqc siouc kouv, zungv zuqc limc ndoh jienv hnangv zoux zuiz-mienh nor. Mv baac Tin-Hungh nyei doz maiv zuqc limc ndoh." 
2Timothy2:10 Hnangv naaic yie weic Tin-Hungh ginv daaih nyei mienh diev nyungc-nyungc, weic bun ninh mbuo kaux Giduc Yesu duqv njoux yaac duqv yietc liuz nyei njang-laangc." 
2Timothy2:11 Naaiv joux waac za'gengh zien nyei. “Se gorngv mbuo caux ninh daic, mbuo ziouc duqv caux ninh ziangh." 
2Timothy2:12 Se gorngv mbuo diev taux daauh, mbuo ziouc duqv caux ninh gunv. Se gorngv mbuo maiv nyiemc ninh, ninh ziouc maiv nyiemc mbuo." 
2Timothy2:13 Maiv gunv mbuo hnyouv maiv zingx, ninh hnyouv zingx nyei, weic zuqc ninh maiv haih nduov ninh ganh.”" 
2Timothy2:14 Oix zuqc mbuox zuangx mienh jangx jienv naaiv deix sic. Yaac oix zuqc yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien hatc ninh mbuo maiv dungx nzaeng nyinh nzaeng nyouz. Nzaeng nyinh nyouz se maiv lamh longc, kungx zoux waaic muangx nyei mienh hnangv." 
2Timothy2:15 Meih oix zuqc njiec qaqv zoux nyungc-nyungc weic bun Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv, ziouc zoux maiv zuqc nyaiv nyei gong-mienh, yaac longc duqv horpc Tin-Hungh zien leiz nyei doz." 
2Timothy2:16 Oix zuqc simv nqoi maiv sienx Tin-Hungh nyei mienh nyei henh mbienx waac, weic zuqc naaiv nyungc waac kungx bun mienh gunv zoux gunv leih Tin-Hungh go hnangv." 
2Timothy2:17 Naaiv nyungc waac oix faanv jienv mingh hnangv butv doqc haic nyei faang huv jienv orv mingh nor. Njaaux naaiv nyungc waac nyei mienh maaih i dauh heuc Hi^me^ne^atc caux Fi^le^tatv. 
2Timothy2:18 Ninh mbuo guangc zien leiz nyei jauv yaac gorngv mienh nangh daaih nyei hnoi jiex liuz aqv, ziouc maaih deix mienh nyei sienx fim lunc nzengc." 
2Timothy2:19 Mv baac Tin-Hungh liepc daaih nyei gorn-ndoqv se wuonv haic yaac maaih yienx nqaapv jienv gorngv, “Ziouv hiuv duqv haaix dauh zoux ninh ganh nyei mienh,” yaac gorngv, “Haaix dauh nyiemc Ziouv nyei mbuox, wuov dauh oix zuqc guangc nzengc yietc zungv waaic sic.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Yietc norm domh biauv nyei jaa-dorngx, maiv daan longc jiem longc nyaanh zoux daaih hnangv, yaac maaih longc ndiangx longc nie zoux nyei. Maaih deix longc duqv jaaix nyei. Maaih deix pou-tong nyei longc." 
2Timothy2:21 Se gorngv haaix dauh fioux ganh cing-nzengc, guangc nzengc hiuang orqv nyei sic, wuov dauh ziouc hnangv longc duqv jaaix nyei jaa-dorngx, cing-nzengc nyei, puix duqv ninh nyei Ziouv longc, yaac duqv liuc leiz ziangx zoux nyungc-nyungc kuv sic." 
2Timothy2:22 Hnangv naaic, oix zuqc simv nqoi, maiv dungx zoux hnangv mienh lunx mienh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux nyei sic. Oix zuqc caux yietc zungv longc cing-nzengc hnyouv heuc Ziouv tengx nyei mienh jienh zoux horpc nyei jauv, sienx longx, hnamv mienh yaac maaih baengh orn." 
2Timothy2:23 Oix zuqc simv jienv mienh nzaeng hngongx haic, maiv maaih eix leiz nyei sic, weic zuqc meih hiuv duqv naaiv deix sic kungx zoux gorn bun mienh nzaeng jaax hnangv." 
2Timothy2:24 Ziouv nyei bou maiv horpc zuqc nzaeng jaax. Daaux nzuonx oix zuqc zoux longx bun zuangx mienh, oix zuqc njaaux longx yaac maaih noic." 
2Timothy2:25 Oix zuqc longc suonc hnyouv kuinx caux ninh doix-dekc wuov deix mienh. Nziex Tin-Hungh oix bun ninh mbuo maaih qangx goiv hnyouv, hiuv duqv zien leiz mv bei." 
2Timothy2:26 Hnangv naaic ninh mbuo haih nzang daaih ziouc biaux ndutv mienv nyei hungh nyei koux, dongh hlopv ninh mbuo, aapv ninh mbuo ei ninh nyei za'eix zoux." 
2Timothy3:1 Meih oix zuqc hiuv duqv taux setv mueiz nyei hnoi-nyieqc maaih kouv haic nyei sic. 
2Timothy3:2 Baamh mienh kungx oix hnamv ganh hnangv, hnamv nyaanh, ceng haah baah buang, zoux maux, ki mienh, maiv muangx diex maac, maiv maaih en-zingh, maiv cing-nzengc." 
2Timothy3:3 Ninh mbuo maiv hnamv mienh, nipc win, gorngv doqc mienh, maiv haih zanv ganh, zoux ciouv, nzorng zoux longx nyei sic," 
2Timothy3:4 maaic guoqv maaic gorx-youz, maiv hnamv zinh hoz, zorqv laangc, hnamv ganh oix duqv njien-youh gauh camv hnamv Tin-Hungh," 
2Timothy3:5 beih zaangc zoux hnangv sienx Tin-Hungh, mv baac hnyouv maiv nyiemc ninh mbuo sienx nyei jauv maaih qaqv. Naaiv nyungc mienh meih oix zuqc simv nqoi." 
2Timothy3:6 Maaih deix naaiv nyungc mienh borngz bieqc mienh nyei biauv gunv hnyouv hngongx nyei m'sieqv dorn, weic zuqc naaiv deix m'sieqv dorn ei ganh nyei hnyouv hanc zoux nyungc-nyungc ziouc zuqc ndaam jienv zuiz hniev haic." 
2Timothy3:7 Naaiv deix m'sieqv dorn maiv gunv zanc-zanc hoqc mv baac hoqc taux haaix zanc maiv haih hiuv zien leiz. 
2Timothy3:8 Zinh ndaangc Yannetv caux Yam^mbe hnangv haaix nor ngaengc Mose, ih zanc zoux waaic wuov deix mienh yaac hnangv wuov nor ngaengc zien leiz. Ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv waaic nzengc. Ei ninh mbuo sienx nyei jauv ninh mbuo yaac ndortv nzengc mi'aqv." 
2Timothy3:9 Ninh mbuo hnangv naaiv nor zoux mv baac zoux maiv duqv ndongc haaix lauh weic zuqc zuangx mienh ziouc buatc ninh mbuo ndongc haaix hngongx, hnangv Yannetv caux Yam^mbe wuov nor." 
2Timothy3:10 Mv baac meih hiuv duqv yie njaaux nyei doz-leiz, yie zoux nyei sic, yie hnyouv nyei eix. Meih yaac buatc yie nyei sienx fim, yie nyei noic, yie hnangv haaix nor hnamv mienh, buatc yie diev duqv," 
2Timothy3:11 buatc yie zuqc mienh zoux doqc yaac zuqc siouc kouv. Meih yaac hiuv duqv yiem An^ti^okc Mungv, I^ko^ni^yum Mungv, Li^saa^daa Mungv yie zuqc mienh zoux doqc, diev kouv haic. Mv baac Ziouv njoux yie leih ndutv naaiv deix yietc zungv sic." 
2Timothy3:12 Haaix dauh oix caux Giduc Yesu juangc maengc ziangh, gan longx Tin-Hungh, wuov dauh ziouc zuqc mienh zoux doqc." 
2Timothy3:13 Orqv nyei mienh caux nduov mienh nyei mienh yietc hnoi beiv yietc hnoi waaic, kungx nduov mienh yaac zuqc mienh nduov ninh mbuo hnangv." 
2Timothy3:14 Mv baac meih ganh hoqc liuz, sienx wuonv nyei zien leiz, oix zuqc zanc-zanc ei jienv zoux, weic zuqc meih hiuv duqv haaix dauh tengx meih hoqc daaih." 
2Timothy3:15 Yiem meih zoux fu'jueiv nyei ziangh hoc meih zungv hiuv duqv Ging-Sou. Ging-Sou haih bun meih maaih cong-mengh hiuv duqv oix zuqc sienx kaux Giduc Yesu cingx duqv njoux. 
2Timothy3:16 Douc-douc Ging-Sou, Tin-Hungh dorh mienh fiev yaac maaih lamh longc weic njaaux mienh, weic gorngv-hemx mienh, weic zorc mienh zoux dorngc nyei dorngx, weic njaaux mienh zoux horpc nyei jauv." 
2Timothy3:17 Hnangv naaic ziouc bun Tin-Hungh nyei mienh duqv dunh yunh nzoih weic zoux nyungc-nyungc kuv sic. 
2Timothy4:1 Yie dorng jienv Tin-Hungh yaac dorng jienv Giduc Yesu, dongh oix siemv ziangh jienv nyei mienh caux daic mingh nyei mienh, aengx oix daaih zoux Ziouv gunv mienh wuov dauh, longx-longx kuinx meih." 
2Timothy4:2 Oix zuqc zunh Tin-Hungh nyei doz. Maiv gunv maaih qangx fai maiv maaih qangx, zungv oix zuqc zunh aqv. Oix zuqc za'gengh longc noic longx-longx nyei njaaux, porv bun mienh mengh baeqc, gorngv-hemx, kuinx mienh." 
2Timothy4:3 Ziangh hoc oix taux, mienh oix ngaengc maiv muangx maaih gorn-buonv nyei doz. Kungx oix ei ganh nyei hnyouv nyunc lorz fin-saeng camv nyei daaih njaaux puix ninh mbuo nyei m'normh oix muangx nyei." 
2Timothy4:4 Ninh mbuo maiv oix muangx zien leiz ziouc hlioux m'normh mingh muangx maiv maaih gorn-buonv nyei gouv-laic. 
2Timothy4:5 Mv baac meih ganh yiem maanc sic oix zuqc gunv jienv ganh, oix zuqc diev kouv naanc, oix zuqc zoux zunh doz mienh nyei gong. Tin-Hungh paaiv meih zoux nyei gong, nyungc-nyungc oix zuqc zoux taux nzengc." 
2Timothy4:6 Yie ih zanc zuqc ciev ziec. Yie leih seix nyei ziangh hoc yaac taux aqv. 
2Timothy4:7 Yie longc nzengc qaqv mborqv liuz longx nyei jaax aqv. Yie saaix tiux yaac tiux taux dorngx mi'aqv. Yie sienx nyei doz yie goux longx aqv. 
2Timothy4:8 Ih zanc maaih norm ningv liouh jienv bun yie, dongh bun cing yie zoux duqv horpc wuov nyungc ningv. Taux wuov norm hnoi, baengh fim nyei Siemv Zuiz Jien, se Ziouv, oix zorqv wuov norm ningv zoux zingh nyeic bun yie. Maiv daan bun yie hnangv, yaac bun yietc zungv hnamv ninh ziouc zuov ninh aengx daaih wuov deix mienh." 
2Timothy4:9 Tov meih siepv-siepv nyei daaih yie naaiv oc," 
2Timothy4:10 weic zuqc Ndemaatv hnamv naaiv baamh gen nyei jauv ziouc guangc yie mingh Te^saa^lo^ni^gaa Zingh mi'aqv. Ke^le^sen mingh Gaa^laa^tie Saengv, Tidatc yaac mingh Ndaan^maa^tie." 
2Timothy4:11 Kungx Lugaa caux yie yiem naaiv hnangv. Tov meih mingh lorz Maako, dorh ninh caux meih yietc jauv daaih, weic zuqc ninh haih borng yie zoux nyei gong." 
2Timothy4:12 Yie paaiv Ti^ki^gatc mingh E^fe^so Zingh mi'aqv. 
2Timothy4:13 Meih daaih nyei ziangh hoc, tov tengx dorh yie nyei domh lui daaih. Domh lui yie juix Do^atc Zingh, Kaan^batc wuov, aengx dorh yie nyei sou-njunc daaih oc. Longc jienv jiex se dongh longc ndopv zoux daaih wuov deix." 
2Timothy4:14 Wuov dauh dongh zaangc, Aa^lekv^saan^nde, zoux hoic yie camv haic. Ei ninh zoux nyei sic, Ziouv oix winh bun ninh." 
2Timothy4:15 Meih ganh oix zuqc mbungh jienv ninh, weic zuqc ninh njiec qaqv laanh jienv mbuo nyei doz." 
2Timothy4:16 Yie jaiv da'yietv nzunc sin wuov zanc, maiv maaih haaix dauh yiem ga'hlen tengx yie. Yietc zungv guangc yie. Tov Tin-Hungh maiv dungx longc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz." 
2Timothy4:17 Mv baac Ziouv caux yie yiem, bun yie maaih qaqv zunh nzengc ninh nyei doz bun zuangx Janx muangx. Yie yaac duqv yiem sienh nyei nzuih baengx njoux cuotv daaih aqv." 
2Timothy4:18 Ziouv yaac oix njoux yie leih ndutv nyungc-nyungc orqv sic, yaac dorh yie baengh orn nyei mingh taux ninh nyei tin-dorngh guoqv. Oix zuqc yietc liuz ceng ninh taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Aamen." 
2Timothy4:19 Yie jangx taux Bitc^sinx^laa caux Aa^kuin^laa yaac jangx taux O^ne^si^fo^latv wuov biauv mienh. 
2Timothy4:20 E^latv^tatv corc yiem Ko^lin^to Zingh. Do^fi^matv butv baengc, yie ziouc liouh ninh yiem Mi^le^tatv Mungv." 
2Timothy4:21 Tov meih jienv sic daaih yie naaiv ndaangc dong-gen hnoi oc. Yu^mbu^latv, Bu^nden, Linatv, Kaa^laau^ndie caux sienx Yesu nyei zuangx gorx-youz jangx taux meih." 
2Timothy4:22 Tov Ziouv caux meih yiem yaac tov ninh ceix en bun meih mbuo. 
Titus1:1 Yie, Baulo, zoux Tin-Hungh nyei bou yaac zoux Yesu Giduc nyei gong-zoh weic tengx Tin-Hungh ginv daaih nyei mienh sienx duqv henv, yaac bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv zien leiz, dongh dorh mienh gan longx Tin-Hungh nyei zien leiz." 
Titus1:2 Ninh mbuo sienx nyei caux hiuv nyei zien leiz nyei gorn-ndoqv se bun mienh maaih lamh hnamv oix duqv yietc liuz nyei maengc, se maiv gorngv-baeqc nyei Tin-Hungh yiem dongh cor maanc gouv maanc doic wuov zanc laengz bun nyei maengc." 
Titus1:3 Dingc daaih nyei nyutc zeiv taux, Tin-Hungh bun ninh nyei doz biux mengh cuotv daaih. Naaiv doz ninh jiu bun yie zunh, yie ziouc ei mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv Tin-Hungh hatc yie zunh bun mienh muangx." 
Titus1:4 Tidatc aah! Yie fiev fienx bun meih, dongh weic mbuo lomh nzoih sienx Yesu, meih se dorngx yie nyei cien dorn. Tov Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh caux mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv Giduc Yesu ceix en ceix baengh orn bun meih." 
Titus1:5 Yie liouh meih yiem wuov Kelitv Koiv-Nzou, weic bun meih mbenc maiv gaengh sung nyei sic, yaac yiem norm-norm mungv paaiv mienh zoux jiu-baang nyei mienh gox hnangv yie mbuox jiex meih wuov nor." 
Titus1:6 Jiu-baang nyei mienh gox oix zuqc zoux maiv maaih dorngx daanh nyei mienh, kungx longc nduqc dauh auv hnangv. Ninh nyei fu'jueiv yaac oix zuqc sienx Yesu, maiv bun mienh maaih dorngx nqemh ninh mbuo maiv muangx waac, bungx laangc nyei ceux sic." 
Titus1:7 Weic zuqc jiu-baang nyei mienh gox se Tin-Hungh nyei gunv gong mienh, ziouc maiv horpc zuqc maaih dorngx bun mienh daanh. Ninh maiv nzaeng-ngaengc, qiex maiv beqv, maiv hengx hopv diuv, maiv zoux ciouv, yaac maiv mauv zinh zoih." 
Titus1:8 Daaux nzuonx ninh oix zuqc maaih hnyouv zipv kaeqv, hnamv zoux kuv sic, haih zanv duqv ganh, zoux baengh fim nyei, cing-nzengc nyei, yaac haih gunv duqv ganh." 
Titus1:9 Ninh oix zuqc goux longx kaux duqv wuonv nyei zien doz, dongh doix mienh njaaux jiex nyei zien doz. Hnangv naaic ninh haih longc zien doz-leiz kuinx mienh yaac haih biux mengh bun ngaengc naaiv zien doz nyei mienh hiuv duqv ninh mbuo dorngc." 
Titus1:10 Weic zuqc maaih mienh camv nyei, lengc jeiv nyei sienx Yesu wuov deix Yiutai Mienh, ngaengc doz yaac gorngv maiv lamh longc nyei waac nduov mienh." 
Titus1:11 Meih ndongc haaix zungv oix zuqc zoux bun naaiv deix mienh sekv, weic zuqc maiv horpc zuqc njaaux nyei leiz ninh mbuo njaaux ziouc zoux bun ziex norm jaa-dingh lunc nzengc. Naaiv deix mienh yaac kungx njaaux weic mauv zinh zoih hnangv." 
Titus1:12 Ninh mbuo Kelitv Mienh ganh maaih dauh douc waac mienh gorngv jiex naaiv deix waac. “Kelitv Mienh zanc-zanc gorngv-baeqc, yaac hnangv hieh zoih nor ciouv, youc cei youc lueic.”" 
Titus1:13 Ninh gorngv nyei waac za'gengh zien nyei. Weic naaiv meih oix zuqc hniev-hniev nyei gorngv ninh mbuo, weic bun ninh mbuo sienx wuonv zien doz," 
Titus1:14 maiv muangx Yiutai Mienh nyei gouv-laic, fai wuov deix maiv gan zien leiz nyei mienh benx daaih nyei leiz-latc." 
Titus1:15 Cing-nzengc nyei mienh funx nyungc-nyungc se cing-nzengc nyei. Mv baac waaic nyei, maiv sienx nyei mienh funx maiv maaih yietc nyungc cing-nzengc, weic zuqc ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv caux laangh fim yietc zungv waaic nzengc." 
Titus1:16 Ninh mbuo gorngv ninh mbuo hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh mv baac ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic bun cing ninh mbuo maiv hiuv duqv ninh. Ninh mbuo se mienh youx mienh, maiv muangx waac yaac maiv puix zoux haaix nyungc kuv sic." 
Titus2:1 Meih njaaux mienh, meih oix zuqc njaaux doix maaih gorn-buonv nyei doz." 
Titus2:2 Oix zuqc njaaux hnyangx-jeiv gox nyei m'jangc dorn zanv duqv ganh, zoux sic puix duqv mienh taaih, yaac gunv duqv ganh. Oix zuqc njaaux ninh mbuo sienx longx Yesu, hnamv mienh, yaac maaih noic diev." 
Titus2:3 Fih hnangv nyei, oix zuqc njaaux hnyangx-jeiv gox nyei m'sieqv dorn zoux sic puix sienx Tin-Hungh nyei mienh, maiv dungx gorngv waac-huv, maiv dungx hengx hopv diuv. Ninh mbuo kungx oix zuqc njaaux longx nyei sic hnangv." 
Titus2:4 Hnangv naaic, ninh mbuo haih njaaux auv-jaanx hnamv nqox caux fu'jueiv," 
Titus2:5 haih gunv duqv ganh, maaih hnyouv cing-nzengc, zaangv longx jaa-dingh, zoux longx bun mienh yaac mbuoqc ganh nyei nqox weic maiv bun mienh maaih dorngx gorngv doqc Tin-Hungh nyei doz." 
Titus2:6 Fih hnangv nyei, meih yaac oix zuqc kuinx hnyangx-jeiv lunx nyei m'jangc dorn gunv duqv ganh." 
Titus2:7 Yiem maanc sic meih yaac oix zuqc zoux longx nyei nyungc zeiv bun ninh mbuo zuotc. Njaaux doz nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc ziepc zuoqv nyei longc hnyouv njaaux. 
Titus2:8 Oix zuqc longc maaih gorn-ndoqv nyei waac, dongh maiv maaih dorngx daanh nyei waac. Hnangv naaiv, caux meih doix-dekc wuov deix ziouc zuqc nyaiv, weic zuqc lorz maiv duqv dorngx daanh mbuo." 
Titus2:9 Oix zuqc njaaux zoux nouh wuov deix yiem nyungc-nyungc sic mbuoqc ganh nyei ziouv gunv, yaac zoux nyungc-nyungc weic bun ziouv a'hneiv. Maiv dungx daux nzuih," 
Titus2:10 yaac maiv dungx nimc ziouv nyei nyaanh. Ninh mbuo oix zuqc yiem maanc sic bun cing ninh mbuo zanc-zanc ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux weic bun ninh mbuo zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc duqv mienh taaih mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv Tin-Hungh nyei doz. 
Titus2:11 Tin-Hungh nyei en zungv biux mengh cuotv daaih weic bun maanc mienh duqv njoux. 
Titus2:12 Naaiv nyungc en njaaux mbuo guangc nqoi dongh maiv taaih Tin-Hungh nyei caux baamh mienh hnyouv hanc zoux nyei yietc zungv, ziouc yiem naaiv jaax lungh ndiev gunv duqv ganh, zoux baengh fim nyei, yaac gan longx Tin-Hungh." 
Titus2:13 Oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor zoux zuov jienv mbuo maaih lamh hnamv oix duqv nyei orn-lorqc, dongh hlo jiex nyei Tin-Hungh, mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv Yesu Giduc, yiem ninh nyei njang-laangc aengx daaih." 
Titus2:14 Ninh weic mbuo siev ninh ganh nyei maengc zuoqc mbuo nzuonx, leih ndutv yietc zungv waaic nyei, orqv nyei sic. Ninh yaac nzaaux mbuo cing-nzengc daaih, benx ninh ganh nyei mienh, mbuo ziouc jorm hnyouv nyei zoux nyungc-nyungc kuv sic." 
Titus2:15 Meih oix zuqc longc naaiv deix waac njaaux mienh. Oix zuqc longc nzengc meih nyei hatc maaz kuinx mienh, gorngv-hemx mienh. Yaac maiv dungx bun haaix dauh mangc piex meih." 
Titus3:1 Oix zuqc tengx sienx Yesu nyei mienh jangx jienv. Ninh mbuo oix zuqc mbuoqc hungh jaa jien-fouv gunv. Oix zuqc ei jienv ninh mbuo nyei waac zoux yaac liuc leiz ziangx zoux nyungc-nyungc kuv sic. 
Titus3:2 Oix zuqc mbuox mienh maiv dungx gorngv doqc haaix dauh, maiv dungx hengx nzaeng jaax. Oix zuqc horh norh nyei, yaac caux mienh suonc zingh suonc eix nyei yiem." 
Titus3:3 Zinh ndaangc mbuo ganh yaac hngongx, maiv muangx waac, zuqc nduov yaac zuqc hnyouv hanc zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc sic caux seix zaangc nyei njien-youh gunv jienv mbuo. Mbuo yaac yiem seix zaangc zoux waaic sic bun mienh, hanc mienh, nzorng mienh, yaac zuqc mienh nzorng mbuo." 
Titus3:4 Mv baac mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv Tin-Hungh bun cing ninh zoux longx yaac hnamv mienh wuov zanc," 
Titus3:5 ninh njoux mbuo. Se maiv zeiz weic mbuo zoux nyei haaix nyungc kuv sic, se weic Tin-Hungh ganh korv-lienh mbuo. Ninh longc Singx Lingh nzaaux mbuo, bun mbuo siang-yungz jiex." 
Titus3:6 Tin-Hungh yaac longc mbuo nyei Njoux Ziouv Yesu Giduc dox Singx Lingh camv-camv nyei bun mbuo," 
Titus3:7 ziouc bun mbuo weic ninh nyei en haih duqv caux Tin-Hungh horpc hnyouv yaac duqv zipv yietc liuz nyei maengc, dongh mbuo maaih lamh hnamv oix duqv nyei maengc." 
Titus3:8 Naaiv joux waac za'gengh zien nyei. Yie oix meih hniev-hniev nyei gorngv naaiv deix sic weic bun sienx kaux Tin-Hungh nyei mienh jorm hnyouv zoux kuv sic. Naaiv deix sic se longx nyei yaac weic zuangx mienh maaih lamh longc. 
Titus3:9 Mv baac oix zuqc simv nqoi, maiv dungx nzaeng hngongx haic nyei sic, fai ong-taaix doic jiex doic nyei mbuox. Yaac maiv dungx da'hauv, maiv dungx nzaeng leiz-latc nyei sic, weic zuqc naaiv deix sic maiv lamh longc, tengx maiv duqv haaix dauh." 
Titus3:10 Haaix dauh ceux lunc zoux bun jiu-baang bun nqoi, oix zuqc kuinx yietc nzunc i nzunc liuz, nqa'haav maiv dungx mingh coiv ninh aqv." 
Titus3:11 Weic zuqc meih mbuo hiuv duqv naaiv nyungc mienh se waaic nzengc mi'aqv. Ninh nyei zuiz biux mengh ninh se dorngc. 
Titus3:12 Yie paaiv Aan^te^maatv fai Ti^ki^gatc mingh meih naaic wuov zanc, meih oix zuqc gaanv mingh Ni^ko^mbu^li Mungv caux yie gapv doic, weic zuqc yie dingc yiem naaic jiex dong-gen hnoi." 
Titus3:13 Yaac oix zuqc longc hnyouv tengx caengx sic mienh, Senaatv, caux Aa^bor^lo cuotv jauv. Maiv dungx bun ninh mbuo caa ninh mbuo qiemx longc nyei haaix nyungc." 
Titus3:14 Oix zuqc mbuox mbuo nyei mienh hoqc longc ninh mbuo nyei ziangh hoc zoux longx nyei sic, weic duqv hnoi-hnoi qiemx longc nyei ga'naaiv. Maiv oix ninh mbuo yiem seix zaangc zoux maiv cuotv haaix nyungc." 
Titus3:15 Caux yie yiem naaiv nyei zuangx mienh jangx taux meih. Aengx mbuox dongh hnamv yie mbuo, caux yie mbuo lomh nzoih sienx Yesu wuov deix, yie mbuo jangx taux ninh mbuo. Tov Tin-Hungh ceix en bun meih mbuo zuangx mienh." 
Philemon1:1 Yie, Baulo, weic Giduc Yesu zuqc wuonx jienv loh. Yie caux mbuo nyei youz, Ti^mo^tai, fiev fienx bun yie mbuo hnamv nyei doic, dongh caux yie mbuo juangc gong zoux nyei mienh, Fi^le^mon," 
Philemon1:2 yaac fiev bun yie mbuo nyei muoc, Apc^fie, aengx caux yie mbuo lomh nzoih zoux baeng wuov dauh Aan^kipv^batc, caux yiem Fi^le^mon nyei biauv gapv zunv zoux leiz-baaix nyei jiu-baang." 
Philemon1:3 Tov mbuo nyei Zaangc Diex Tin-Hungh caux Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en ceix baengh orn bun meih mbuo. 
Philemon1:4 Fi^le^mon youz aac, yie daux gaux nyei ziangh hoc yie jangx zuqc meih yaac zanc-zanc weic meih laengz zingh yie nyei Tin-Hungh," 
Philemon1:5 weic zuqc yie haiz gorngv meih sienx longx Ziouv Yesu yaac hnamv haic Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx mienh. 
Philemon1:6 Yie tov Tin-Hungh bun mbuo weic mbuo dongh nyungc sienx maaih nyei jiu tong, tengx mbuo jaa hiuv duqv mbuo caux Giduc juangc maengc ziangh duqv daaih longx nyei yietc zungv." 
Philemon1:7 Youz aac, meih ndongc naaic hnamv mienh bun yie gengh njien-youh orn-lorqc haic, weic zuqc meih tengx Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx mienh nyei hnyouv henv jiez daaih." 
Philemon1:8 Weic zuqc mbuo se lomh nzoih sienx Giduc nyei gorx-youz, yie haih bungx laangc nyei paaiv meih zoux meih horpc zuqc zoux nyei sic." 
Philemon1:9 Mv baac weic zuqc yie hnamv meih, yie cingx daaih tov meih hnangv. Yie, Baulo, mienh gox mienh, ih zanc yaac weic Giduc Yesu zuqc wuonx jienv loh." 
Philemon1:10 Yie tengx yie nyei dorn, O^ne^si^matv, tov. Yie zuqc wuonx jienv loh nyei ziangh hoc yie duqv O^ne^si^matv daaih zoux yie nyei dorn." 
Philemon1:11 Zinh ndaangc meih buatc ninh maiv lamh longc. Mv baac ih zanc ninh weic meih yaac weic yie maaih lamh longc haic aqv. 
Philemon1:12 Ih zanc yie fungx ninh nzuonx meih naaic, se hnangv maeqv yietc buonc yie nyei mba'nziu gan jienv mingh mi'aqv nor." 
Philemon1:13 Yie weic kuv fienx zuqc wuonx jienv loh yaac haiz oix liouh ninh yiem naaiv div meih tengx yie. 
Philemon1:14 Mv baac yie maiv gaengh zoux haaix nyungc taux meih nqoi nzuih, weic bun meih zoux haaix nyungc longx se yiem meih ganh maaih hnyouv zoux, maiv zeiz aapv zoux." 
Philemon1:15 Nziex O^ne^si^matv leih caamx baav meih se weic bun meih duqv ninh nzuonx daaih yietc liuz yiem. 
Philemon1:16 Mv baac ih zanc ninh maiv zeiz kungx zoux nouh, ninh zoux gauh longx jiex nouh, se zoux hnamv nyei gorx-youz. Yie za'gengh hnamv ninh, mv baac meih zungv oix hnamv ninh gauh camv weic zuqc ninh se meih nyei mienh yaac caux meih zoux sienx Ziouv nyei gorx-youz." 
Philemon1:17 Hnangv naaiv, se gorngv meih funx yie caux meih juangc gong zoux nyei mienh, oix zuqc zipv O^ne^si^matv hnangv zipv yie nor." 
Philemon1:18 Se gorngv ninh zoux haaix nyungc dorngc meih fai qiemx meih nyei haaix nyungc zaeqv, oix zuqc funx benx yie nyei." 
Philemon1:19 Yie longc yie ganh nyei buoz fiev naaiv. “Yie, Baulo, laengz jaauv sung meih.” Yie maiv gorngv meih qiemx yie nyei zaeqv, se meih zungv qiemx meih ganh yie." 
Philemon1:20 Youz aac, tov meih weic Ziouv hnangv naaiv nor tengx yie, bun yie nyei hnyouv orn-lorqc, weic zuqc mbuo lomh nzoih sienx Giduc." 
Philemon1:21 Yie fiev naaiv zeiv fienx, yie hiuv dingc meih oix ei jienv yie tov nyei zoux. Yaac hiuv duqv meih zungv oix zoux camv jiex ndaangc yie tov nyei." 
Philemon1:22 Aengx maaih diuc. Tov meih mbuo liuc leiz dorngx bun yie hitv. Yie hnamv daaih Tin-Hungh oix dau meih mbuo daux gaux nyei waac bun yie maiv lauh aengx duqv nzuonx meih mbuo naaic. 
Philemon1:23 E^baa^faa, dongh weic Giduc Yesu zuqc caux yie wuonx jienv naaiv loh wuov dauh, jangx taux meih mbuo." 
Philemon1:24 Caux yie juangc gong zoux nyei mienh, Maako, Aa^litv^taa^katv, Ndemaatv caux Lugaa yaac jangx taux meih mbuo." 
Philemon1:25 Tov Ziouv Yesu Giduc ceix en bun meih mbuo. 
Hebrews1:1 Loz-hnoi Tin-Hungh longc ninh nyei zuangx douc waac mienh yaac longc camv-nyungc za'eix caux mbuo nyei ong-taaix mbuo gorngv camv-nzunc. 
Hebrews1:2 Mv baac yiem naaiv deix setv mueiz nyei hnoi Tin-Hungh longc ninh nyei Dorn caux mbuo gorngv. Naaiv dauh Dorn Tin-Hungh longc zeix maanc muotc yaac paaiv ninh nzipc maanc muotc benx ninh nyei jaa-dingh. 
Hebrews1:3 Ninh aengv Tin-Hungh nyei njang-laangc, yaac zuangv nzengc Tin-Hungh, aengx longc ninh maaih lingc nyei waac bouh jienv maanc muotc. Ninh nzaaux liuz baamh mienh nyei zuiz, nqa'haav yiem tin-dorngh zueiz jienv maaih haangh daauh nyei Tin-Hungh nyei mbiaauc maengx." 
Hebrews1:4 Naaiv dauh Dorn duqv zoux gauh hlo jiex fin-mienh ndongc Tin-Hungh cuotv bun ninh wuov norm mbuox gauh hlo jiex zuangx fin-mienh nyei mbuox. 
Hebrews1:5 Weic zuqc Tin-Hungh maiv mbuox jiex haaix dauh fin-mienh, “Meih zoux yie nyei Dorn. Ih hnoi yie benx meih nyei Die.” Ninh yaac maiv nuqv jiex haaix dauh fin-mienh gorngv, “Yie oix zoux ninh nyei Die. Ninh oix benx yie nyei Dorn aqv.”" 
Hebrews1:6 Aengx maaih nzunc, dongh Tin-Hungh oix paaiv ninh nyei dorn-la'gauv bieqc baamh gen wuov zanc, ninh gorngv, “Tin-Hungh nyei zuangx fin-mienh oix zuqc baaix ninh.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Gorngv taux fin-mienh wuov zanc Tin-Hungh gorngv, “Tin-Hungh bun ninh nyei fin-mienh benx nziaaux, yaac bun ninh nyei bou benx douz-mbietc.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Mv baac gorngv taux ninh nyei Dorn wuov zanc, Tin-Hungh gorngv, “Tin-Hungh aac, meih nyei weic oix yietc liuz yiem taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Meih yaac oix baengh fim nyei gunv meih nyei guoqv." 
Hebrews1:9 Zoux horpc nyei jauv meih hnamv, zoux orqv nyei meih nzorng. Weic naaiv, Tin-Hungh, dongh meih nyei Tin-Hungh, longc orn mienh nyei youh hietv meih, orn meih zoux gauh hlo jiex meih nyei yietc zungv doic.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Tin-Hungh yaac gorngv, “Ziouv aac, yiem gorn wuov zanc meih zeix cuotv ndau nyei gorn-ndoqv daaih, yaac longc ganh nyei buoz zeix cuotv lungh." 
Hebrews1:11 Lungh ndau zungv oix zuqc mietc, mv baac meih yietc liuz yiem. Lungh ndau oix hnangv lui-houx nor, loz nzengc." 
Hebrews1:12 Meih oix zorqv lungh ndau njunc jienv hnangv njunc domh lui. Lungh ndau ziouc goiv yienc hnangv yienc lui mv baac meih yietc liuz hnangv loz wuov nor. Meih nyei hnyangx-jeiv yietc liuz yaac maiv jomc.” 
Hebrews1:13 Tin-Hungh maiv mbuox jiex haaix dauh fin-mienh, “Zueiz jienv yie nyei mbiaauc maengx, zuov yie bun meih nyei win-wangv njiec meih nyei zaux-ndiev zoux lorngx zaux nyei dorngx.”" 
Hebrews1:14 Wuov nyungc, fin-mienh hnangv haaix nor? Fin-mienh maiv maaih sin, mienh yaac mangc maiv buatc. Ninh mbuo yaac fu-sux Tin-Hungh. Tin-Hungh paaiv ninh mbuo mingh tengx oix duqv njoux nyei mienh." 
Hebrews2:1 Weic naaiv, mbuo gauh oix zuqc muangx longx mbuo haiz jiex nyei zien leiz. Maiv zei aeqv, nziex mbuo haih leih zien leiz go." 
Hebrews2:2 Fin-mienh douc wuov deix waac se zien nyei. Haaix dauh baamz, maiv ei jienv naaiv deix waac zoux, wuov dauh ziouc puix ninh zoux nyei zuqc winh bun ninh." 
Hebrews2:3 Wuov nyungc, se gorngv mbuo maiv muangx Tin-Hungh hlo haic nyei za'eix njoux mbuo, mbuo hnangv haaix nor haih biaux duqv ndutv maiv zuqc dingc zuiz? Tin-Hungh nyei za'eix njoux mienh, Ziouv ganh gorngv ndaangc. Muangx haiz nyei mienh yaac biux mengh se za'gengh zien nyei." 
Hebrews2:4 Tin-Hungh ganh yaac zoux zorng-zengx. Ninh zoux jangx-hoc caux mbuoqc horngh, hnamv maiv mengh baeqc nyei sic camv nyei, yaac zorqv yiem Singx Lingh daaih nyei zingh nyeic, ei ninh ganh nyei za'eix ceix bun mienh." 
Hebrews2:5 Tin-Hungh maiv zeiz paaiv fin-mienh gunv oix daaih wuov norm siang-lungh ndiev, dongh yie mbuo gorngv wuov norm lungh ndiev." 
Hebrews2:6 Mv baac, yiem Ging-Sou maaih norm dorngx maaih dauh gorngv, “Meih funx baamh mienh benx haaix nyungc cingx jangx taux ninh? Funx seix zaangc mienh benx haaix nyungc cingx daaih goux ninh?" 
Hebrews2:7 Meih bun ninh maaih douc zoux gauh aiv deix fin-mienh, aengx taaih ninh, bun ninh maaih njang-laangc weic zoux hungh ningv," 
Hebrews2:8 zungv orn ninh gunv maanc muotc.” Tin-Hungh orn ninh gunv maanc muotc bun cing maiv maaih haaix nyungc Tin-Hungh maiv bun ninh gunv. Mv baac ih zanc mbuo maiv gaengh buatc ninh gunv maanc muotc. 
Hebrews2:9 Daaux nzuonx mbuo buatc Yesu, dongh maaih douc zuqc zoux gauh aiv deix fin-mienh, duqv Tin-Hungh nyei en weic maanc mienh daic. Weic zuqc ninh siouc kouv taux daic, mbuo ih zanc buatc Tin-Hungh taaih ninh, bun ninh maaih njang-laangc dorngx hungh ningv." 
Hebrews2:10 Tin-Hungh zeix maanc muotc yaac zeix daaih weic ninh ganh. Hnangv naaic Tin-Hungh bun Yesu siouc kouv weic bun ninh dunh yunh nzoih se zoux duqv horpc nyei. Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv zoux weic dorh mienh camv daaih zipv ninh nyei njang-laangc weic zuqc Yesu zoux bieiv dorh ninh mbuo duqv njoux. 
Hebrews2:11 Ninh nzaaux nzengc mienh nyei zuiz, bun ninh mbuo cing-nzengc daaih. Liemh ninh ganh caux duqv ninh nzaaux cing-nzengc wuov deix yietc zungv juangc dauh Die. Weic naaiv Yesu maiv nyaiv heuc ninh mbuo zoux gorx-youz." 
Hebrews2:12 Ninh gorngv mbuox Tin-Hungh, “Yie oix zunh meih nyei mengh mbuox yie nyei gorx-youz. Ninh mbuo gapv zunv nyei ziangh hoc yie oix yiem ninh mbuo gapv zunv nyei wuic mbu'ndongx ceng meih.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Yesu yaac gorngv, “Yie oix sienx kaux Tin-Hungh.” Aengx gorngv, “Mangc maah! Yie caux Tin-Hungh ceix bun yie naaiv deix naamh nyouz yiem naaiv.”" 
Hebrews2:14 Ninh heuc naamh nyouz wuov deix, se maaih orv maaih nziaamv nyei mienh. Yesu ganh yaac benx baamh mienh, maaih orv maaih nziaamv fih hnangv nyei. Hnangv naaic, weic ninh daic mingh ninh haih mietc nzengc maaih lingc bun mienh zuqc daic wuov dauh, se mienv nyei hungh," 
Hebrews2:15 yaac bungx nqoi ziangh seix zuqc zoux nouh weic gamh nziex haih daic nyei mienh. 
Hebrews2:16 Hnangv naaic, buatc duqv mengh nyei. Ninh tengx nyei se maiv zeiz fin-mienh. Ninh tengx nyei se Apc^laa^ham nyei zeiv-fun." 
Hebrews2:17 Weic naaiv ninh oix zuqc yiem maanc sic hnangv nzengc ninh nyei gorx-youz, weic duqv zoux ninh mbuo nyei domh sai mienh, maaih hnyouv korv-lienh mienh yaac ziepc zuoqv nyei fu-sux Tin-Hungh, ziouc duqv tengx baeqc fingx fiqv zuiz." 
Hebrews2:18 Weic ninh ganh zuqc seix jiex yaac zuqc siouc kouv, ninh cingx daaih haih tengx zuqc seix nyei mienh." 
Hebrews3:1 Sienx Giduc nyei gorx-youz aac, meih mbuo benx Tin-Hungh heuc daaih nyei mienh. Oix zuqc hnamv taux Yesu, dongh ziux mbuo nyiemc nyei jauv zoux gong-zoh yaac zoux domh sai mienh wuov dauh." 
Hebrews3:2 Yesu ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux paaiv ninh daaih wuov dauh nyei gong, hnangv Mose ziepc zuoqv nyei weic Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zong mienh zoux gong." 
Hebrews3:3 Yesu yaac puix duqv mienh taaih gauh camv Mose, hnangv gomv biauv zaangc duqv mienh taaih ninh gauh camv taaih ninh gomv nyei biauv." 
Hebrews3:4 Mouz norm biauv m'daaih maaih laanh mienh gomv. Mv baac maanc muotc se Tin-Hungh ganh zeix daaih. 
Hebrews3:5 Mose ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux bou tengx Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zong mienh weic zoux zorng-zengx gorngv Tin-Hungh nqa'haav hingv oix gorngv nyei sic. 
Hebrews3:6 Mv baac Giduc zoux Dorn ziepc zuoqv nyei gunv Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zong mienh. Se gorngv mbuo bungx laangc sienx wuonv mbuo maaih lamh hnamv oix duqv nyei, mbuo ziouc benx Tin-Hungh nyei biauv zong mienh." 
Hebrews3:7 Wuov nyungc, hnangv Singx Lingh gorngv nor, “Se gorngv meih mbuo ih hnoi haiz Tin-Hungh gorngv nyei waac," 
Hebrews3:8 maiv dungx zoux hnyouv ngaengc hnangv meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix yiem deic-bung-huaang ngaengc jienv seix Tin-Hungh wuov nzunc nor. 
Hebrews3:9 Feix ziepc hnyangx gu'nyuoz meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix buatc yie zoux nyei jauv, mv baac ninh mbuo corc cuoqv yie, seix yie." 
Hebrews3:10 Yie ziouc nouz haic wuov doic mienh yaac gorngv, ‘Ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv zanc-zanc maiv oix gan yie. Ninh mbuo yaac maiv hiuv duqv yie nyei jauv.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Yie qiex jiez haic, ziouc houv jienv gorngv, ‘Ninh mbuo yietc liuz maiv duqv bieqc yie nyei hitv kuonx dorngx.’+”" 
Hebrews3:12 Zuangx gorx-youz aac, oix zuqc faix fim, yiem meih mbuo naaic maiv dungx bun haaix dauh maaih orqv hnyouv, maiv sienx ziouc leih ziangh jienv nyei Tin-Hungh." 
Hebrews3:13 Meih mbuo oix zuqc hnoi-hnoi laanh kuinx laanh, da'faanh corc maaih dongh mienh heuc, “Ih Hnoi” nyei hnoi, weic maiv bun meih mbuo haaix dauh zuqc zuiz nduov ninh hnyouv ngaengc." 
Hebrews3:14 Se gorngv mbuo sienx wuonv taux daauh taux mueiz hnangv yiem gorn sienx wuov nor, mbuo ziouc caux Giduc maaih buonc." 
Hebrews3:15 Ging-Sou gorngv, “Se gorngv meih mbuo ih hnoi haiz Tin-Hungh gorngv nyei waac, maiv dungx zoux hnyouv ngaengc hnangv meih mbuo nyei ong-taaix ngaengc jienv Tin-Hungh wuov nzunc nor.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Haiz Tin-Hungh nyei waac mv baac corc cuoqv ninh wuov deix se dongh haaix deix? Dongh Mose dorh cuotv I^yipv Deic-Bung wuov deix yietc zungv maiv zeiz? 
Hebrews3:17 Tin-Hungh nouz feix ziepc hnyangx wuov deix dongh haaix deix? Dongh baamz zuiz zuqc guangc sei yiem deic-bung-huaang wuov deix maiv zeiz? 
Hebrews3:18 Dongh Tin-Hungh houv jienv gorngv, “Ninh mbuo yietc liuz maiv duqv bieqc yie oix bun ninh mbuo hitv kuonx nyei dorngx” wuov deix waac, ninh gorngv haaix deix mienh? Se dongh ngaengc jienv maiv muangx ninh wuov deix." 
Hebrews3:19 Hnangv naaic, mbuo hiuv duqv ninh mbuo maiv duqv bieqc hitv kuonx nyei dorngx se laaix ninh mbuo maiv sienx." 
Hebrews4:1 Tin-Hungh laengz bun mbuo duqv bieqc ninh hitv kuonx nyei dorngx wuov deix waac corc maiv gaengh jiex. Wuov nyungc, mbuo oix zuqc faix fim, nziex meih mbuo maaih haaix dauh mingh maiv taux." 
Hebrews4:2 Yie mbuo haiz liuz kuv fienx hnangv ninh mbuo haiz nor. Mv baac ninh mbuo haiz liuz nyei kuv fienx maiv tengx haaix nyungc ninh mbuo, weic zuqc haiz liuz ninh mbuo yaac maiv sienx." 
Hebrews4:3 Mbuo sienx nyei mienh za'gengh duqv bieqc Tin-Hungh laengz bun nyei hitv kuonx dorngx. Wuov norm hitv kuonx dorngx se dongh Tin-Hungh gorngv, “Weic naaiv yie qiex jiez ziouc houv jienv gorngv, ‘Ninh mbuo yietc liuz maiv duqv bieqc yie nyei hitv kuonx dorngx.’+” Tin-Hungh hnangv naaiv nor gorngv maiv gunv yiem ninh zeix lungh zeix ndau wuov zanc ninh zoux ziangx gong mi'aqv." 
Hebrews4:4 Weic zuqc yiem Ging-Sou maaih norm dorngx gorngv, “Da'cietv hnoi wuov hnoi Tin-Hungh dingh njiec ninh nyei yietc zungv gong hitv kuonx.”" 
Hebrews4:5 Aengx hnangv a'jang gorngv liuz wuov deix waac, “Ninh mbuo yietc liuz maiv duqv bieqc yie nyei hitv kuonx dorngx.”" 
Hebrews4:6 Haiz kuv fienx ndaangc wuov deix maiv duqv bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei hitv kuonx dorngx weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv muangx waac. Mv baac maaih deix duqv bieqc nyei. 
Hebrews4:7 Weic naaiv, Tin-Hungh aengx dingc norm hnoi heuc “Ih Hnoi.” Nqa'haav lauh nyei, Tin-Hungh longc Ndaawitv Hungh gorngv wuov norm hnoi, hnangv gorngv jiex wuov deix Ging-Sou nyei waac, “Se gorngv meih mbuo ih hnoi haiz Tin-Hungh gorngv nyei waac, maiv dungx zoux hnyouv ngaengc.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Se gorngv Yo^su^waa bun ninh mbuo duqv hitv kuonx, nqa'haav Tin-Hungh maiv gorngv aengx ganh maaih norm hnoi." 
Hebrews4:9 Hnangv naaic, weic Tin-Hungh nyei baeqc fingx aengx ganh maaih norm Dingh Gong hitv kuonx Hnoi," 
Hebrews4:10 weic zuqc haaix dauh duqv bieqc Tin-Hungh bun nyei hitv kuonx dorngx, wuov dauh duqv dingh ninh ganh nyei gong hitv kuonx, hnangv Tin-Hungh dingh gong hitv kuonx wuov nor." 
Hebrews4:11 Hnangv naaic, mbuo oix zuqc njiec qaqv zoux weic bieqc Tin-Hungh nyei hitv kuonx dorngx, weic maiv bun haaix dauh hnangv wuov deix mienh maiv muangx waac ziouc maiv duqv bieqc." 
Hebrews4:12 Tin-Hungh nyei waac se nangh nyei, maaih qaqv nyei, gauh laic jiex yietc zungv i maengx laic nyei nzuqc ndaauv. Haih nzopv bieqc taux hnyouv caux lingh wuonh gapv nyei dorngx, mbungv-fim caux mbungv-daaux gapv nyei dorngx. Zungv haih siemv duqv mienh hnyouv nyunc zoux nyei caux hnyouv hnamv cuotv nyei sic." 
Hebrews4:13 Maiv maaih haaix nyungc bingx duqv Tin-Hungh jienv. Daaux nzuonx maanc muotc yietc zungv yiem Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien koi nqoi nzengc. Mbuo yaac oix zuqc zorqv mbuo nyei nyungc-nyungc binv mengh mbuox ninh. 
Hebrews4:14 Hnangv naaic, oix zuqc sienx wuonv mbuo nyiemc nyei doz, weic zuqc mbuo maaih dauh zoux hlo nyei domh sai mienh bieqc taux Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien, dongh Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn, Yesu." 
Hebrews4:15 Mbuo nyei domh sai mienh maiv zeiz maiv hiuv mbuo mau nyei dorngx, weic zuqc ninh ganh yaac zuqc nyungc-nyungc seix jiex, hnangv mbuo zuqc seix nor, mv baac ninh maiv baamz zuiz." 
Hebrews4:16 Weic naaiv mbuo oix zuqc bungx laangc nyei mingh taux Tin-Hungh ceix en nyei weic. Yiem naaic mbuo qiemx zuqc nyei ziangh hoc ziouc duqv Tin-Hungh korv-lienh yaac ceix en bun mbuo. 
Hebrews5:1 Dauh dauh domh sai mienh se yiem zuangx mienh mbu'ndongx ginv cuotv daaih yaac orn ninh div zuangx mienh fu-sux Tin-Hungh. Ninh oix zuqc weic zuangx mienh nyei zuiz dorh zingh nyeic caux ziec nyei ga'naaiv fungx bun Tin-Hungh. 
Hebrews5:2 Weic zuqc domh sai mienh ganh maaih ziex diuc mau nyei, ninh haih suonc hnyouv nyei tengx maiv hiuv caux caqv-bouc zoux dorngc nyei mienh." 
Hebrews5:3 Weic zuqc ninh ganh yaac mau, ninh oix zuqc dorh ga'naaiv mingh ziec weic ninh ganh nyei zuiz caux zuangx mienh nyei zuiz." 
Hebrews5:4 Maiv maaih haaix dauh haih taaih ganh zoux gauh hlo jiex nyei domh sai mienh. Se Tin-Hungh paaiv ninh zoux hnangv paaiv Aalon nor. 
Hebrews5:5 Fih hnangv nyei, Giduc yaac maiv zeiz taaih ganh zoux domh sai mienh, se Tin-Hungh paaiv ninh zoux. Tin-Hungh mbuox ninh, “Meih zoux yie nyei Dorn. Ih hnoi yie benx meih nyei Die.”" 
Hebrews5:6 Aengx maaih norm dorngx ninh gorngv, “Meih yietc liuz zoux sai mienh, hnangv Men^ki^se^ndekc wuov nyungc sai mienh nor.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Yesu corc yiem naaiv baamh gen wuov zanc, ninh heuc jienv mbui, maaih wuom-mueic liouc cuotv nyei tov Tin-Hungh, dongh haih njoux ninh, bun ninh maiv zuqc daic wuov dauh. Weic zuqc ninh longc hnyouv muangx Tin-Hungh, Tin-Hungh ziouc haiz ninh daux gaux tov nyei waac." 
Hebrews5:8 Maiv gunv Yesu zoux Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn, ninh zuqc siouc nyei kouv naanc bun ninh hoqc linc muangx waac." 
Hebrews5:9 Tin-Hungh bun ninh dunh yunh liuz, Yesu ziouc zoux gorn bun yietc zungv muangx Tin-Hungh nyei waac nyei mienh yietc liuz duqv njoux." 
Hebrews5:10 Tin-Hungh yaac paaiv ninh zoux domh sai mienh hnangv Men^ki^se^ndekc wuov nyungc sai mienh nor. 
Hebrews5:11 Yie mbuo corc maaih waac camv nyei gorngv zoux sai mienh nyei jauv mv baac aqc duqv gorngv mengh weic zuqc meih mbuo nyei m'normh maiv zaangh waac. 
Hebrews5:12 Taux ih zanc meih mbuo zungv horpc zuqc zoux fin-saeng, mv baac meih mbuo corc qiemx zuqc mienh aengx njaaux da'yietv kang Tin-Hungh nyei doz. Meih mbuo corc qiemx zuqc hopv nyorx nyei, maiv haih nyanc hnaangx." 
Hebrews5:13 Haaix dauh oix zuqc hopv nyorx, wuov dauh corc zoux gu'nguaaz, maiv mengh baeqc zoux horpc nyei jauv." 
Hebrews5:14 Hnaangx se weic domh mienh nyanc, dongh hoqc linc liuz ziouc hiuv duqv haaix nyungc se longx nyei, haaix nyungc se waaic nyei, wuov deix mienh." 
Hebrews6:1 Hnangv naaic, mbuo oix zuqc jiex da'yietv kang Giduc nyei doz-leiz aengx hungx jienv wuov ndaangc mingh taux ei sienx nyei jauv benx domh mienh. Maiv dungx aengx paan-pei liepc nzunc gorn-ndoqv, dongh oix zuqc goiv hnyouv guangc maiv lamh longc nyei sic sienx Tin-Hungh." 
Hebrews6:2 Maiv dungx paan-pei njaaux jiex wuom nyei leiz, caux longc buoz maan mienh nyei leiz, caux mienh daic mingh aengx nangh daaih nyei jauv, caux zuqc Tin-Hungh siemv dingc zuiz weic yietc liuz wuov nyungc jauv." 
Hebrews6:3 Se gorngv Tin-Hungh bun nor, mbuo za'gengh hnangv naaiv nor zoux aqv." 
Hebrews6:4 Zinh ndaangc sienx liuz Yesu aengx cuotv mingh wuov deix mienh, hnangv haaix nor haih dorh ninh mbuo goiv hnyouv nzuonx? Ninh mbuo zipv jiex Tin-Hungh nyei njang, yaac seix jiex yiem tin-dorngh daaih nyei zingh nyeic nyei mueix, yaac duqv buonc Singx Lingh," 
Hebrews6:5 yaac duqv seix jiex ziouc hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh nyei waac maaih mueix doc longx nyei, yaac duqv seix jiex nqa'haav wuov gitv lungh ndiev nyei qaqv." 
Hebrews6:6 Se gorngv seix liuz mv baac nqa'haav cuotv Yesu, maiv sienx, za'gengh maiv maaih za'eix dorh naaiv nyungc mienh goiv hnyouv nzuonx, weic zuqc ninh mbuo zorqv Tin-Hungh nyei Dorn aengx ding jienv ziepc nzaangc jaax bun ninh dorng zuangx zuqc nyaiv." 
Hebrews6:7 Haaix nzong ndeic zanc-zanc duqv mbiungc-wuom longx, gaeng-zuangx ziouc cuotv longx weic tengx zoux ndeic nyei mienh, wuov nzong ndeic duqv Tin-Hungh ceix fuqv." 
Hebrews6:8 Mv baac haaix nzong ndeic kungx cuotv njimv cuotv miev se maiv lamh longc, aav lamh deix zuqc zioux aqv. Nqa'haav ziouc zuqc douz buov qui nzengc." 
Hebrews6:9 Hnamv haic nyei gorx-youz aac, maiv gunv yie mbuo hnangv naaiv nor gorngv, yie mbuo sienx dingc weic meih mbuo duqv njoux meih mbuo oix duqv gauh longx nyei sic." 
Hebrews6:10 Tin-Hungh se baengh fim nyei. Ninh maiv haih la'kuqv meih mbuo zoux nyei gong, yaac maiv la'kuqv meih mbuo bun cing meih mbuo hnamv ninh, dongh meih mbuo tengx ninh nyei mienh yaac zanc-zanc tengx jienv mingh." 
Hebrews6:11 Yie mbuo oix meih mbuo mouz laanh fih hnangv nyei jorm hnyouv taux setv mueiz weic bun meih mbuo za'gengh duqv dongh meih mbuo maaih lamh hnamv oix duqv nyei. 
Hebrews6:12 Yie mbuo maiv oix meih mbuo lueic, mv baac oix meih mbuo zuotc dongh maaih sienx fim yaac longc noic zuov wuov deix nyei nyungc zeiv ziouc duqv siouc Tin-Hungh laengz bun nyei buonc." 
Hebrews6:13 Tin-Hungh laengz waac bun Apc^laa^ham wuov zanc ninh maiv lamh ziangv dorngx weic zuqc maiv maaih haaix dauh gauh hlo jiex Tin-Hungh ganh. Ninh ziouc ziangv jienv ninh ganh laengz waac. 
Hebrews6:14 Ninh gorngv mbuox Apc^laa^ham, “Yie zungv oix ceix fuqv bun meih yaac oix bun meih maaih zeiv-fun camv.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Apc^laa^ham longc noic zuov ziouc duqv zipv Tin-Hungh laengz ceix bun nyei. 
Hebrews6:16 Baamh mienh laengz waac ninh mbuo ziangv jienv yietc dauh gauh hlo ninh mbuo ganh laengz. Hnangv naaic laengz liuz, naaiv deix waac se liepc dingc mi'aqv, maiv lamh nzaeng dorngx." 
Hebrews6:17 Tin-Hungh oix bun, dongh oix zipv ninh laengz bun nyei wuov deix, mengh mengh nyei hiuv duqv ninh nyei za'eix yietc liuz maiv haih goiv yienc. Weic naaiv, ninh cingx daaih ziangv ninh ganh laengz waac." 
Hebrews6:18 Hnangv naaic, maaih naaiv deix i nyungc yietc liuz maiv haih goiv yienc, Tin-Hungh yaac maiv haih gorngv-baeqc. Weic naaiv mbuo biaux daaih lorz ninh bun mbuo maaih lamh kaux dorngx ziouc bun mbuo gauh jorm hnyouv sienx wuonv maaih lamh hnamv nqa'haav hingv oix duqv nyei." 
Hebrews6:19 Mbuo hnangv naaiv maaih lamh hnamv se hnangv maaih ga'naaiv zuic jienv mbuo nyei hnyouv dingc nyei, wuonv nyei. Naaiv nyungc maaih lamh hnamv bieqc tin-dorngh nyei singx dinc, yiem mbaeqc gaengh ndie gu'nyuoz wuov qongx." 
Hebrews6:20 Yesu weic mbuo zungv bieqc gu'nyuoz ndaangc mi'aqv, yaac yietc liuz zoux domh sai mienh, hnangv Men^ki^se^ndekc wuov nyungc sai mienh." 
Hebrews7:1 Naaiv dauh Men^ki^se^ndekc zoux Saalem Zingh nyei hungh yaac zoux Yiem Hlang Jiex nyei Tin-Hungh nyei sai mienh. Apc^laa^ham mingh mborqv hingh wuov deix biei dauh hungh diex liuz, nzuonx wuov zanc, Men^ki^se^ndekc mingh buangh ninh yaac buang waac bun ninh."
